chapters.title: Chapter 1000 - Nine Stars Align
chapters.body:
Chapter 1000 - Nine Stars Align

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

The battle between the beats quickly ended. With the top ten beasts’ existence, the battle between the beasts was not exciting at all since it was a totally one-sided match! In addition, thanks to the beasts’ innate high-level suppressing the low-level beasts, the battles involving the top ten beasts were simply too smooth.

Soon, it was Li Xin’s match.

The figures of Li Xin and Chen Xing slowly appeared on the plain arena.

It was a scene as simple as always. In consideration to their strength, the arena was much larger than before, and the ground had also been reinforced.

This was a battle without suspense.

At least, that was how it looked like on the surface.

However, the humans were still cheering enthusiastically. Facing a level three world esper, Li Xin was still full of self-confidence, which had proven his courage.

If it were any other person, they would have given up before even fighting.

Only Li Xin could have such courage!

“Bring it on!”

Before the battle started, Li Xin pointed at Chen Xing, “I will definitely win this battle!”

Poof~

Everyone burst out into laughter.

This guy, what strong confidence!

Whether he won or lost, this mentality was truly unrivaled.

However, the beasts were gritting their teeth in anger. Forget about the previous encounters, this time, the one out on stage was Chen Xing. This guy, how confident is he?

Or perhaps…

The humans are planning a conspiracy?

The beasts didn’t know much of Li Xin.

Seeing that Li Xin was so confident, they naturally doubt whether this guy has any killer moves or not. Could it be that the humans have a method?

In an instant, they became skeptical.

On the stage, Chen Xing didn’t care at all, “Just don’t be terrified later.”

“Fart!” Li Xin said in disdain.

Dang~

A soft sound rang, and the system sound came.

The match began!

Swish!

Golden light flickered as quick as lightning. As soon as the battle began, one could see a dazzling light charging towards the opposite direction; it was a punch.

Boom!

The golden light oscillated.

Everyone looked around and was suddenly startled.

Li Xin?

It turned out to be him!

Damn, this guy is so fierce!

Everyone thought that he was just saying empty words, but they never expected him to actually do it. A level one world esper against a level three world esper, he took the initiative without hesitation!

He didn’t feel terrified even a tiny bit.

“Great.”

“Li Xin, all the best!”

“I like your violent temper!”

Everyone cheered.

Forget about the outcome, Li Xin’s fighting style was really full of excitement. Opposite of Li Xin, Chen Xing was taken aback by him.

Boom!

The golden light dispersed.

Yet another incoming punch.

However, Chen Xing raised his hand. With his Star Force, one saw him block the incoming attack. One needs to know that his Star Force belongs to World Force!

How could Li Xin break through with his pitiful Rule Force?

Boom! Boom!

Two consecutive punches.

As stable as Mount Tai.

“Ridiculous.”

Boom!

A stream of Star Force struck.

Li Xin was sent flying. If not for him blocking with his punch to offset part of the Star Force, he would have been killed instantly.

World Force, since when was it something easy to face head-on?

Poof~

With just one blow, Li Xin spat out a mouthful of blood.

Everyone went silent.

The gap was too huge.

It was so huge that one couldn’t imagine it!

One could say that this battle was undoubtedly the biggest gap ever so far! After all, this was a gap between a level one and a level three world esper! Moreover, Li Xin couldn’t even be invincible within the level one world realm. Facing a level two world esper was already enough to choke him, let alone a level three world esper?

However, unexpectedly.

“Hey.”

Li Xin vomited out blood, “Brat, not bad.”

Brat…

The crowd turned dull.

He actually called Chen Xing a brat?

“Come, continue.”

Boom!

Golden light flashed.

Li Xin charged forward once again and sent another punch. Everyone’s eyes were both opened wide. Damn, who’s the actual level three world esper? What’s with this guy being so aggressive?

“Hmmpphh!”

Chen Xing’s eyes flashed coldly.

A childlike game, I don’t have the time to play with you!

Swish!

Stars flickered, and Chen Xing controlled his powerful Star Force to slam down.

Bright starlight covered the entire sky, and the day suddenly turned into night. This was a precursor to the starburst. Obviously, Li Xin’s ignorance had angered him a little.

“Ignorant human.”

“Go to hell!”

Boom!

The starlight blinded everyone.

The starlight from the sky suddenly brightened as several terrifying starlights fell from the sky, directly blasted on where Li Xin was standing at. In the sky, those multiple starlights merged together to form a ray that looked as terrifying as a dragon.

Astral Dragon.

What a scary move that was!

Being visible to the naked eye.

Under everyone’s shocked gaze, the giant astral dragon roared its way down. It was a powerful force belonging to a level three world esper!

Li Xin, he had no way to resist!

“He’s about to lose.”

Everyone’s heart palpitated for a second.

As for the one on the stage.

“Wow, so fierce!” Li Xin yelled. With excitement in his eyes, he faced the giant dragon head-on. A powerful force burst out from his fists with golden light illuminating.

Boom!

A huge force exploded.

One hundred times critical hit!

He finally managed to release it!

Anyone who was able to guess this trick of his had their eyes glazed. Being known as Li Xin’s strongest attack, while within the controllable range, Li Xin’s best shot, one hundred times critical hit! Facing Chen Xing’s fierce attack, Li Xin finally used it. The battle had just begun, and it had already reached the climax of the fight.

“Can he win?”

Many people were looking forward to the result.

They didn’t understand the world realm classification.

However…

One hundred times critical hit, that was truly one hundred times his original strength, he should be able to win, right?

If it was strong enough, he could even end the opponent with a single punch!

Everyone was looking forward to it. However, if they knew that when Chen Xing was studying Li Xin, the beasts had also tested one thousand times critical hits smoothly, what would they think?

The terror of a level three world esper, most people simply couldn’t comprehend the concept.

As for those world espers, they sighed helplessly. He’s about to lose… The gap between the two forces could be felt without even having to look.

The gap was too huge!

Even if Li Xin’s one hundred times critical hit wasn’t able to touch that astral dragon.

Li Xin would most likely vanish on the spot from the collision!

However, at this moment, a roar echoed.

Everyone vaguely heard the sound of a dragon.

What sound was that?

Was it coming from Astral Dragon?

No, that wasn’t it.

Everyone had a careful look, and saw a shocking scene. They saw golden light erupting from Li Xin’s fist, and that vast golden dragon followed Li Xin’s powerful eruption and clashed with the equally powerful Astral Dragon.

Boom!

Boom!

The two giant dragons confronted each other. The golden dragon and astral dragon were entangled as they fought several times, but no one lost their ground. That was not Rule Force but World Force!

Everyone couldn’t help but widen their eyes.

Rule Force from a level one world esper could compete against level three World Force?

Boom!

Roar!

Several roars could be heard again.

Yes, the golden dragon fought with the astral dragon without any disadvantages.

After transforming into a dragon, Li Xin’s one hundred times critical hit actually managed to stop the astral dragon. Those two dragons fought for quite some time. When the astral dragon gradually gained the upper hand and was about to defeat the golden dragon, Li Xin detonated the golden dragon without hesitation.

Boom!

A powerful force erupted, and a terrifying shockwave swept the entire stage.

In an instant, the whole area became flat. All the surrounding flowers, trees, and even the woods in the distance disappeared!

At the same time, the dominant astral dragon couldn’t escape its inevitable fate, dying together with the golden dragon. It turned out that their clash was a tie…

“This…”

Everyone was shocked.

Forget about the astral dragon, what the hell was that golden dragon?

When did Li Xin learn this move?

“Hehe, so amazing.” Li Xin happily wiped off the blood from the corner of his mouth, “Just now I saw you create a dragon, so I followed along. Sure enough, it was fun, hahahaha!”

He turned out to learn it on the spot!

Everyone became even more speechless.

At this moment, even Chen Xing couldn’t help but swallow his saliva for a second.

What heaven-defying is this comprehension?

Inspiration was born with just one look, and he casually turned his strength into a dragon? One needs to know that it wasn’t a simple form. To create an image of a dragon, one needs to have absolute control over his own power. After completion of that stage, the increment in strength wouldn’t be just a tiny bit.

Li Xin, this guy…

He wasn’t a simple man.

Everyone took a deep breath.

Could Li Xin win?

No.

However, that move alone was enough to make everyone admire him. Even if he fails, he would still be liked by everyone. Even if he lost, he still shocked everyone.

“Again!”

Li Xin shouted out loud.

Before Chen Xing could get started, he already rushed forward again!

The moment he attacked, it was yet another terrifying golden dragon with one hundred critical hits! The golden dragon rose to the sky, and Li Xin was as strong as ever! Watching Li Xin’s fight, one rarely sees him being passive or plotting something because he does not or rather, he doesn’t know how to.

His battles had always been exciting.

Boom!

Boom!

Roar~

The golden dragon twisted up.

Chen Xing frowned slightly as he condensed another astral dragon with Star Force again, and the two dragons clashed once more. As for the result…

It was beyond anyone’s comprehension.

Boom!

Another shock wave swept the scene.

The already flat surrounding land was sunk by another meter!

One could see how powerful that attack was! Fortunately, the attacks of those two dragons were in a horizontal direction. If it was vertical, the entire area would be destroyed.

“Seems that the budget for creating the scene will increase again.”

One staff member felt heartbroken.

On the stage, there was no doubt that Li Xin was injured again. However, this guy would rise again after wiping his blood as if it wasn’t him being injured!

The fight actually escalated to such a point unexpectedly.

“I can’t let this continue like this any longer.”

Chen Xing’s eyes flashed.

Boom!

The starlight shone.

The stars in the dark sky started circulating. However, nine stars in the sky rose sharply and formed a straight line, aiming directly at Li Xin on the stage.

This time, Chen Xing’s raised hand was akin to a god of death making his judgement.

“Nine stars align!”

“Kill!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1001 - Star Body
chapters.body:
Chapter 1001 - Star Body

Chapter 1001: Star body

The starlight shone brightly before vanishing.

He couldn’t imagine how a little level one world esper could last this long! For him, this was simply humiliating.

Within the stars in the dark night, nine stars were aligned together.

This was his powerful killer move.

It was at this moment that the entire sky seemed to have dimmed, causing the audience to exclaim. Amidst the shouts, the stars in the sky slowly vanished, leaving only nine stars behind.

The stars flickered and became brighter than ever.

What was scarier was that they had actually formed a straight line!

Buzz~

A ray of starlight shot out from the farthest star as it reached the second star in a flash.

Swish!

The stars were flourishing.

The second star lit up, and the subtle starlight suddenly became a bit thicker. The starlight continued its path, connecting to the other stars. Three, four, five, six, seven… When the starlight fell on the ninth star, it was already shining extremely bright. That was a powerful force belonging to Heaven and Earth.

It was so powerful that one couldn’t believe it.

The starlight literally made one impossible to look at it directly.

“This force…”

Everyone was shocked.

Nine stars in a row!

Was this the killer move of a level three world esper?

Swish!

The nine stars lit up.

As Chen Xing waved, the dazzling starlight condensed into a ray as it blasted Li Xin. Li Xin punched out again without hesitation.

The golden dragon violently rose.

Roar~

The golden light burst.

It rushed up without waiting for the star ray to come down.

However, different from his previous attempts, when the ray of starlight came into contact with the golden dragon, it easily penetrated it!

Poof~

The golden dragon was pierced in an instant.

Jizzz~

The golden light soared and exploded.

This was Li Xin’s 100 times critical hit. However, such a powerful attack ended up being so vulnerable in front of the ray.

“The gap was actually that huge?”

Everyone felt despair.

Even the 100 times critical hit golden dragon couldn’t stop it, what else could he do? Fortunately, even though the golden dragon was useless, it still managed to delay the bombardment for a bit, buying himself some time.

Li Xin gritted his teeth.

He was still standing like before while looking at the ray of starlight that was about to fall.

Facing the incoming ray, golden light was condensed within his hand as he calmly threw a punch.

Swish.

It was an ordinary punch.

Obviously, he didn’t trigger his 100 times critical hit attack. It was just a normal punch.

It was plain as water.

“Is he giving up?”

“Has his Rule Force run out?”

Everyone felt sad.

No matter what, when Li Xin was no longer able to activate his 100 times critical hit, defeat was already set! If he kept throwing a dozen of such attacks, he might still be able to contend, but now…

Wasn’t that a confirmed loss?

Swish!

The ray of starlight descended.

The powerful nine stars attack finally arrived.

As for Li Xin, after throwing a punch earlier, he threw another punch. It was still the same ordinary punch without the 100 times critical hit.

Everyone became discouraged.

As expected, his force had been exhausted…

He was about to lose.

However, no one thought that when Li Xin directed his punches calmly, a heart-palpitating force would suddenly erupt from Li Xin’s hands.

“That is…”

Chen Xing’s eyelids twitched. It really came.

Boom!

Sky and earth shook.

Bright golden light burst!

Within Li Xin’s hands, a wave of force that almost dazzled everyone erupted. Rich golden light burst out, colliding with the ray!

“This is…”

Everyone suddenly stood up.

Su Hao’s eyes shone brightly, “1,000 times critical hit, what a great move!”

“Such a small probability…”

Yes.

1,000 times critical hit.

Li Xin managed to activate it after all!

This wasn’t like the 1,000 times critical hit of origin energy like in the past. Increasing origin energy is easy, but now it is 1,000 times of Rule Force!

How difficult was that?

However, Li Xin managed to trigger it.

At such a crucial moment too!

Can he win?

This might be his only chance!

Boom!

Boom!

The starlight was glaring.

The golden light was dazzling.

The fusion of both lights blinded the audience.

The dark night was like daytime.

Everyone couldn’t see what’s in front of them; they could only hear the roar of those two forces. Even so, they still couldn’t conceal the shock in their heart.

1,000 times critical hit!

That was one thousand times stronger!

1,000 times of Rule Force, how terrifying would that be?

It was unimaginable!

Soon, the light subsided.

On the stage, those two figures still stood in place.

Li Xin’s clothes were already torn apart. It was obvious he was caught in the attack earlier. What was surprising is that Chen Xing’s figure still remained elegant like before.

1,000 times critical hit…

He didn’t suffer any damage?

“You really triggered it.” Chen Xing’s eyes turned cold, “1,000 times critical hit, what kind of luck is that?”

“Cough, cough.”

Li Xin coughed for a bit, and large amounts of blood followed along.

Everyone was greatly alarmed.

He was injured again!

Even a 1,000 times critical hit against the nine aligned stars attack had no advantage. At most, it was a tie! But the aftermath of the clash already caused Li Xin harm. As for Chen Xing…

He was still safe and sound!

“This is the power of a level three world esper?”

Everyone swallowed their saliva.

“How many more times can you block?” Chen Xing sneered.

“Hehe.” Li Xin spat out a mouthful of blood and rushed forward without hesitation, “That might not be necessary.”

Boom!

A punch came again.

The golden light illuminated.

There was no eruption this time.

“Not 1,000 times critical hit?” Chen Xing raised a smile at the corner of his mouth, “Then, this will be the end of our match.”

Swish!

“Nine stars align!”

“It’s here again!”

The audience’s face turned ugly.

However, Li Xin just showed a smirk at the corner of his mouth. Punching lightly, the same attack broke out again under everyone’s stunned look.

1,000 times critical hit!

Boom!

The golden light illuminated.

What was even more terrifying was that everyone unexpectedly seemed to hear a familiar voice.

Roar~

“That is…”

“Could it be…”

Everyone’s eyes lit up.

Boom!

The golden light burst.

Within Li Xin’s fist, the 1,000 times critical hit erupted. Not only that, but it also turned into a larger dragon along with the explosion of the golden light.

1,000 times critical hit, Li Xin could still easily activate it!

Boom!

The nine aligned stars and the golden dragon collided.

The world turned chaotic once again.

This time…

It was different from the previous result.

When the light subdued, Li Xin was still looking as embarrassed as ever, but opposite of him, the always elegant Chen Xing had his clothes become tattered.

Chen Xing’s shoulder even had bloodstains.

He was injured.

Someone as strong as him actually got injured by Li Xin?

“One thousand times critical hit coupled with the dragon?” Chen Xing suddenly smiled.

During the test, there was no such thing… This dragon was something Li Xin learnt from him. Could this be considered a self-inflicted crime?

“Hehe.”

“No one has hurt me for a long time.”

Chen Xing chuckled, “Li Xin, your power and potential are beyond my imagination. You’re worthy to face my true power.”

Buzz~

In the beast domain, a certain beast lying in the room began to transform. Its entire body shone like stars, and a powerful force made it float in the air.

That was the body of Chen Xing!

On the stage, a strange power flickered around Chen Xing as he finished speaking. Everyone could clearly see Chen Xing’s body become unusually bright. This wasn’t about how much force, but more of a qualitative change. At the same time, a terrifying force began to appear.

Everyone couldn’t help but be shocked.

The star body!

This was Chen Xing’s true strength!

When the transformation was completed, Chen Xing didn’t even touch the ground. Half-floating in the air, he was surrounded by Star Force.

“In the past, I used the star body to kill a level three world esper in seconds.” Chen Xing said indifferently, “And you are the weakest opponent that I have encountered with my star body, but… you’re the most dangerous one.”

Chen Xing gave Li Xin a high evaluation.

“I often leapfrog and challenge those in higher realms, but you… if we have the same strength and are at the level three world realm, my chance of defeating you is zero!”

“You deserve to face my Star Force.”

“Time to end this.”

Chen Xing pointed toward the starry sky, “When you reach the level three world realm, we shall have a rematch.”

Boom!

The Star Force condensed.

Chen Xing made his move again. As stated in the data, once his star body appear, Chen Xing’s strength would explode in a geometrical fashion!

As predicted, it was only a ray of starlight!

When the ray was shot out, it even brought a glow that shocked the crowd. Chen Xing didn’t use any tricks, as for Li Xin, he had to resort to using the golden dragon to stop it.

Of course, it was too powerful!

That was the difference of 100 times and 1,000 times critical hits!

Poof~

Li Xin had blood all over his body.

However, wiping off the blood, Li Xin still charged forward fiercely.

“Damn it.”

“So much nonsense!”

“In the future?”

“No, I want to win this match!”

Golden light shone within his eyes. Li Xin had already used almost all of his Rule Force, so he could no longer use 1,000 critical hits. He only used his familiar 100 times critical hit, forming a dragon and rushed forward without hesitation. In front of the dazzling stars, his figure looked very sad.

The gap was too huge.

Everyone smiled bitterly.

The strength displayed by Li Xin was already quite powerful!

However, what about going against a beast with a star body?

This battle seemed to be brilliant, but Li Xin only slightly injured Chen Xing once. The gap between level one and level three world realm was unsurpassable!

“Sigh, why still insist?” Chen Xing shook his head and sighed.

Regarding Li Xin’s guts, he did admire him.

“I will express my admiration to you with my strongest attack.”

Chen Xing raised his hand, and the dark night and starry sky became bright at this moment.

In the sky, thousands of stars flickered. When one focused on Chen Xing’s hand, a sword of stars bloomed with a strange radiance. It was a real sword of stars.

Swish.

Chen Xing slashed down with his sword.

The entire arena was almost torn apart!

“This brat…”

“Even if he loses, he doesn’t want to have any regrets.”

Su Hao sighed. However, at this moment, he suddenly saw the changes happening in reality recorded in Synchronize Space.

“Damn it!”

“What the hell is that!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1004 - An Extreme Counterattack
chapters.body:
Chapter 1004 - An Extreme Counterattack

Chapter 1004: An extreme counterattack

How to win?

Zheng Tai licked his lips which were somewhat a bit dry and opened his eyes slightly. This place was hotter than the desert. Without the atmosphere as a layer of protection, the sun was more poisonous than one imagined.

He was a world esper and could stay here for a long time but…

Would Dream Talker sit and wait for his death?

Of course not!

As expected.

Soon, he felt the sun was getting more and more dazzling.

Was he moving?

No, the sun was approaching him!

Zheng Tai suddenly awakened.

Without water and air, the only thing he could do is to compete with the time limit that Dream Talker could last supporting the dreamland but if the sun approached him…

Chiii, chiiii~

Zheng Tai could feel his skin burning.

If not because of him being a world esper with an improved physical body, he would have long been burnt to death by now.

“Run!”

Zheng Tai subconsciously wanted to flee but then ridiculously found that it was futile no matter how he hid.

This is after all the space.

“The temperature is getting higher and higher.”

Zheng Tai frowned slightly.

This didn’t feel right.

So this is the so-called power of Dream Talker?

This was too horrifying!

However, this wasn’t enough. If it really had such strength, it could have just directly put him in on the sun. Then, he would surely die. What was there to even fight? Forget about him, even if Mo Ling entered here, there would only be a dead end awaiting. This was already nearing the true state of invincible.

Since that was the case, why didn’t it do so?

Or perhaps…

It couldn’t do so?

Zheng Tai stopped his action and closed his eyes instead.

“He gave up?”

Everyone sighed when they saw Zheng Tai’s reaction.

Although they had no expectation for him to win, there was still a glimmer of hope after all. However, Wang Ru and others were completely relieved.

“It’s fine if he loses.”

Wang Ru wiped off his sweat.

It was alright to lose a match but if Zheng Tai was ruined because of this battle, that wasn’t worth it. After all, in terms of age alone, he was three years younger than Su Hao and the rest!

It was too dangerous to confront that Dream Talker!

However…

Su Hao’s eyes narrowed subconsciously.

“What’s wrong?”

Chen Yiran was sitting next to him.

“This little brat, he noticed a problem.”

There was a smile in Su Hao’s eyes.

Zheng Tai was an assassin to begin with.

With two dreamlands, Dream Talker was able to easily decipher his invisibility and shadow ability, almost shutting off all his strength. Then, when he was exposed to the sun, it was impossible to crack it.

However, the biggest problem was precisely because it couldn’t be cracked!

Dream Talker?

It could easily change one new dreamland after another.

However, since when a world is that easy to create?

Others were clueless but Su Hao who controlled the Kingdom of Heaven was extremely aware of this fact. For the dreamland to be that scary and even surpass Kingdom of Heaven, what gave it such strength?

What was the source of the dreamland?

The Mental Force!

The Consciousness Force!

Thus, to be precise, everything was an illusion. No matter what physical damage or the sun’s scorching heat, it was all an illusion caused by the mental attack.

The sun?

It was false.

Suffocation?

It was false.

In fact, when the dream began, everyone was aware.

However, if you face the attack within the dream without fighting back, you will most likely be killed directly because those skeleton attacks would accurately attach the mental force on you. If you die, you are really dead! When it came to the third dream, the interstellar adventure, everything changed.

Was there any spiritual attachment?

There was.

However, it was very minute.

No matter how strong Dream Talker was, it would not be able to create a giant sun!

This feeling must be false as it was completely different from the time in the gloomy cemetery. To be precise, the gloomy cemetery and the age of dinosaurs were just foreshadows and now, the so-called interstellar adventure was the true ultimate move! After the previous two dreams’ influences, who would doubt it anymore?

What was that?

Sun!

If you try to resist or run away, you will only be burned alive in the end.

When the combination of truth and false was enough to make one collapse mentally, this was the biggest issue. The reason why he was so immersive is that in reality, to be precise, in the holographic world, it had the same heating element! This was Zheng Tai’s opportunity!

“Zheng Tai, can you grasp it?”

Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

In the holographic world.

Zheng Tai was still immobile.

Within the dreamland of interstellar adventure, Zheng Tai was floating in space with dried skin. Quite a number of people actually closed their eyes as they couldn’t bear to look anymore.

Everyone could feel that Zheng Tai was dying.

This would be the first participant ever to die of starvation or suffocation right?

Everyone sighed secretly.

No one would have thought that Dream Talker was that strong.

One needs to know that in the previous battles, only two levels of the dreamland were created but now, it had finally released the third level which was so terrifying!

There was no solution to this!

Looking at the infinitely approaching sun, no one could speak.

This kind of attack was too terrifying.

However, no one noticed that in the holographic world, the temperature was also rising! In order to make the sun’s scorching immersive, to make the third dream indistinguishable from the first two, to make the mental attack effective, the temperature of the holographic world kept rising!

The invisible Zheng Tai couldn’t escape from this!

At this time, Dream Talker was exuding a thick heat wave as the hot heat radiated to the surrounding. This was the perfect combination of dream and reality.

Perhaps the outsiders could notice the problem.

However, for Zheng Tai who was immersed in the dream, the feeling he felt matched what he was experiencing in the dream.

Jizzz~

Zheng Tai had gradually become confused. His entire person began to lose consciousness.

His body which struggled at first was now floating in space, slowly wandering. Even when the sun kept approaching him, he still didn’t react.

Zheng Tai had completely lost consciousness.

“This guy is about to lose?”

Li Xin broke the silence.

“No, he’s looking for an opportunity.”

Su Hao’s eyes widened as he carefully observed Zheng Tai’s reaction, “He had discovered the problem and guessed something but that also required him to wake up. Otherwise, even if he knew that was fake, he would still end up burnt to death while in doubt. All he needed to do was to regain his consciousness.”

“From the dream itself.”

Su Hao finished his analysis.

“Won’t waking up something easy?”

Li Xin wondered, “You just wake up when you want to right?”

“Not everyone is as single-celled as you.”

Su Hao gave him an annoying look.

“Oh.”

Li Xin scratched his head.

“He’s using the simplest and cruelest method to sober up.”

Su Hao narrowed his eyes, “As for whether he succeeds or not, that depends on his persistence.”

In the starry sky.

Zheng Tai was floating.

His body had completely lost consciousness.

Within the fusion of falseness and reality, it had made him believe that he was about to face death. His physical function had reached its limit and dropped to its lowest point. However, at that very moment, Dream Talker who had been waiting for an opportunity made its move. Silently, a dim light flashed.

A dark shadow appeared from the space, completely ignoring the rule within the space.

Swish!

Cold light ray flashed and blasted into Zheng Tai’s heart.

Poof~

Blood splattered everywhere.

“I won!”

Dream Talker’s eyes lit up.

However, at this moment, who would have thought that Zheng Tai who had almost lost his consciousness suddenly opened his eyes. Those eyes of his flashed with unprecedented brilliance which made Dream Talker feel bad.

Boom!

Zheng Tai exhausted his last bit of strength and made a forward wave motion.

Poof~

It cut through Dream Talker’s throat.

Blood trails appeared.

Dream Talker opened its eyes in disbelief and looked at Zheng Tai who was so weak in shock. With a grunt in its throat, he fell to the ground without uttering anything.

Boom!

Boom!

The dream broke.

That powerful dreamland created by Dream Talker collapsed.

Zheng Tai returned to reality and the blood traces on his heart were clearly visible. That sun could never cause his death. Only the final blow of Dream Talker was the real fatal attack! However, in order to wait for a chance to attack, Zheng Tai had to first receive its attack!

This one blow was a kamikaze!

One was a sword through the heart.

The other one was a dagger snapping the throat.

“Sigh…”

Zheng Tai was covering his chest. Blood couldn’t stop coming out from the wound.

However, his face was full of smiles because here was a holographic world! If both were dueling in reality, they might really die together.

But here…

Swish!

Dream Talker was cut through its throat and died on the spot, disappearing into thin air.

Due to it losing consciousness…

It was convicted of death.

As for Zheng Tai, even though he was pierced in his heart, he remained stable and still. There was that last line of his life. In fact, he could maintain his position for quite some time.

Until…

“Zheng Tai, victory!”

Swish!

The scene vanished.

Zheng Tai won.

When everyone saw this scene, they were all in daze.

It seemed like…

They won again?

Those human audiences were stunned for a long time before they started to scream wildly.

Wonderful.

This was too awesome.

Zheng Tai was always like that. He might not be taking any action but once he did, his action would inevitably shake the world. In this match, he really only attacked Dream Talker once but that one time…

One hit kill!

Wasn’t that the same as last time too?

This was simply a demon of assasination!

At the same time, Zheng Tai’s invisibility and persistence as an assassin had won respect from everyone. That was simply an extreme test for him! Even the onlookers felt that Zheng Tai was about to die, let alone Dream Talker who was in the match.This counterattack was simply beautiful.

The humans rejoiced.

As for the beasts, they weren’t looking great.

It was the same result again!

It turned out to be like that again!

The beasts nearly went crazy!

With victory in sight, it was a nearly perfect torture, why at the final moment, why at the last second, it got counterattacked?

The script was obviously not like this!

How many times was that already?

Five losses in a row!

One needs to note that there were only seven humans.

If all humans won, there would be seven humans and nine beasts in the next round which was almost equal. How could the beasts bear such a result when they had the absolute advantage?

Only God knew that there was this age rule as their advantage too..

If not because of this…

Won’t the beasts destined to lose? If they still lose in such a mess while enjoying all the advantages, that would truly be a shame!

They couldn’t bear it!

They couldn’t stand it!

“Who is next? We must never lose anymore!”

“It’s that guy named Wan Cheng.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1008 - A Surpassed Banishment Counterattack
chapters.body:
Chapter 1008 - A Surpassed Banishment Counterattack

Chapter 1008: A surpassed banishment counterattack

Boom!

Thousands of streams rushed forward.

Time stood still at this moment.

In Wan Cheng’s vision, there were only thick lines. The momentary comprehension from the Wave Force allowed him to witness the mystery of a certain power.

And what he wanted to achieve was analyzing that small portion that he could understand.

Deduction.

Analysis.

Trial.

Wan Cheng finally comprehended a simple part. At this moment, all the waves around Wan Cheng instantly upgraded with an extra layer of mysterious power.

Boom!

Golden Silkworm was about to rush out of the encirclement but was bounced back.

Swish!

An uproar was happening in the audience.

What happened then?

Everyone’s eyes widened.

It took three lives of Golden Silkworm to rush to the edge. How did it end up restarting in an instant?

“Do you think this is any use?”

Golden Silkworm didn’t mind it.

“With such a large-scale consumption of Rule Force, you will soon run out of it, and this pseudo-banish state you originally intended to create will become useless!”

“Because I will eventually rush out!”

“I know that doing so will be my path to victory.”

“So how are you going to give me the misperception of being banished?”

“This battle, my victory is confirmed!”

Golden Silkworm sneered.

“Really?”

Wan Cheng’s voice rang leisurely.

At this moment, he had unprecedented confidence, “Then, give it a try.”

“Wave Force, Seal!”

Wan Cheng waved his hand.

Boom!

The surrounding waves vibrated.

The originally huge waves resembling high-rise buildings suddenly began to shrink. With Golden Silkworm acting as the focal point, the waves began to condense!

Locked!

Sealed!

Boom!

A loud blast rang.

At such an unbelievable moment, the huge whirlpool shrank to a finger’s size like a ring, before entering Golden Silkworm’s body.

It was just a breath of time.

Golden Silkworm didn’t even manage to react to what happened!

“What was that just now?”

“Not sure, I couldn’t see it.”

“No matter how I look at it, did that power enter Golden Silkworm’s body?”

“I also saw the same thing…”

The audience was mind blown.

Wan Cheng’s move must have a profound meaning behind it, but no one could tell what he had done exactly. As for the waves, it was as if they had never existed before.

“What the hell was that?”

Golden Silkworm swallowed a mouthful of saliva. It had this uneasy feeling in its heart.

“You will know soon.” Wan Cheng smiled lightly.

Boom!

A sword slashed down.

Wan Cheng, who was already seriously injured, took the initiative to attack!

“Again?”

Golden Silkworm’s eyes flashed with hostility. It hesitated for a second before deciding to rush forward mercilessly. It had an immortal body. It wanted to see what kind of trick Wan Cheng wanted to use.

Boom!

Wan Cheng slashed through with his sword, and a lump of force bloomed in Golden Silkworm’s body.

Golden Silkworm suddenly felt something was amiss.

When that force exploded in its body, it finally understood where its panic came from. The immortal body of its couldn’t even react in time.

“No!”

“How could this be!” Golden Silkworm screamed.

However, before it could continue speaking, it got covered in endless force.

Boom!

Light bloomed.

In the holographic world, only a dazzling beam of light could be seen.

When the light beam vanished, only Wan Cheng was left. As for Golden Silkworm, with the outbreak earlier, it had been wiped out by Wan Cheng!

“Wan Cheng wins!”

When the system released these three words, everyone finally recovered from the shock.

Humans won again.

It was yet another last-second counterattack!

On the playback, everyone could clearly see what happened at that instant. Combined with Golden Silkworm’s reaction, it was crystal clear that Wan Cheng’s final blow…

It turned out to be a seal!

The seal born from Wave Force!

An extremely different seal completed this gorgeous scene.

“He won like that?”

Wang Ru and the others were amazed.

To comprehend the trick of forming a seal from Wave Force? How heaven-defying was his insight? Of course, if they knew that Wan Cheng just caught a glimpse of the resonance of the terrifying waves in the Endless Sea through the Wave Force, how would they feel?

No matter what specialty, once one reaches the limit, it would always have a heaven-defying effect.

Whether it was luck or comprehension, the cheers from mankind had reached its peak. No matter how the battle would end up afterwards, at least six humans were in the top 16!

Not only that…

Six consecutive victories!

It was such an exciting match.

A thrilling counterattack.

Each time it would make people feel excited. Of course, the same result was a catastrophe to the beasts. They still lost under such conditions?

Up until now, the beasts still couldn’t comprehend it.

Wasn’t it immortal?

Wasn’t it invincible?

It died just like that?

This was too terrifying!

When Hydra and the others saw this result, their livers hurt even more, if they had a liver…

Lost.

Lost again.

They had tested countless times and prepared so well in advance. Why did they still end up losing?

Aaahhhhh! What the heck was that?!

All the beasts went mad.

Out of the seven matches with humans, they had lost six of them. This was simply too shameful for them! Turning to the next matchup, when they saw the name Su Hao, the beasts’ faces turned green. Because out of this competition between humans and beasts, only Su Hao is the most terrifying.

An opponent that couldn’t be restrained by common sense.

The strongest one among the seven human geniuses!

Invading the beast domain alone and destroying Geomagnetic Despair, unlike other participants, Su Hao’s reputation within the beast domain could be described as thunderous!

In the beasts’ eyes, Su Hao is the representative of the devil.

As for Hydra, Su Hao’s name was even more hateful. It was this guy who ruined his years of careful planning!

One man single-handedly ruined his plans.

And the last match was this man!

“Could it be we’re going to lose seven times consecutively?”

The beasts went crazy.

At least they were confident before the match for other humans even if they got counterattacked later, but facing this Su Hao…

They had no confidence before the fight.

It would be alright if it were any of the top ten beasts, but now that the top ten beasts weren’t matched with humans, Su Hao’s opponent was a beast ranked in 10-ish. In Su Hao’s records, he had quite a number of instant kills of level two world espers. How could the beasts win?

Go up and become cannon fodder?

The beasts sighed.

They had always thought mankind would be the one worried about the match results, but never did they expect the ones worried would be them instead!

“Anyway, the top eight belongs to us.” A beast hesitated for a second, “So what if they enter the top 16?”

Hydra glanced at it but said nothing.

Yes, it was so in theory, but if this match were lost, it would be quite sometime before the top 16 matches began. By then, they would be on the receiving ends of being mocked.

In the previous few matches, quite a number of beasts were mocking humans too.

“Who is Su Hao’s opponent?”

Hydra was a bit washed out.

“Zi Tian.”

An underling beast had a look, “A special strong bloodline. Specifically, it is unknown. Its combat power is amazing. With just a wave of purplish aura, many have fallen victim to it!”

“Oh.” Hydra responded.

Amazing or not, it was just fine to listen with a pinch of salt. If he considered those words to be true, then he would be a fool. When he saw Su Hao again, he already had no confidence in this match.

“Damn it, how could it be such a coincidence for them to avoid the top ten beasts?”

Hydra was very unhappy.

There was only one among the top ten that faced a human, and it just happened to meet Li Xin and got blasted by a meteor. This was simply the funniest event in history!

“Uh.”

Seeing Hydra’s completely indifferent reaction, the beast hesitated for a moment before continuing, “This Zi Tian, its talent is a bit special.”

“Huh?”

Hydra sounded a bit interested.

“It isn’t known where this Zi Tian came from. At first, its strength was weak, but it suddenly began to skyrocket. The advancement of its strength could be described as terrifying. Three months ago, it killed a level one world esper, and then two months ago, it beheaded a level two world esper.”

“Plus, one month ago…”

The subordinate was a little shocked, reading up to this point, “It actually killed a level three world esper.”

Swish!

Hydra stood up and said in disbelief, “A level three world esper?”

Level three world realm!

That was an insurmountable gap.

At least, in Hydra’s memory, there was no one-to-one case where a level two world esper defeated a level three world esper. After all, level three world espers possessed World Force! Even though Su Hao had several experiences fighting level three world espers, everyone could clearly see that…

There were tricks behind his strength.

Plus, Su Hao didn’t actually win, right?

Even with countless forbidden techniques, Su Hao only managed to secure a tie.

Right now, this Zi Tian actually beheaded a level three world esper?

“One on one?” Hydra couldn’t help but ask.

“Yes.” The beast confirmed, “It was one on one.”

“What a monster.”

Hydra instantly turned excited.

Zi Tian killed a level three world esper?

And Su Hao tied with a level three world esper?

Hmmm…

To compare the strength of both, wasn’t that crystal clear? What’s more, Su Hao was at most peak level two world esper. Could he display that same strength again?

This battle did not seem to be hard.

Hydra had a smile on his face.

“Quick, quick, I want all the information on this Zi Tian.”

“Damn you!”

“For humans to win six matches at once, that really gave us a bad taste in our mouths. I don’t mind giving humanity a big upset. Didn’t they consider Su Hao as a hero? If Su Hao loses…”

“Hehe.”

“Won’t his popularity drop instantly?”

Hydra sneered.

Zi Tian’s information was quickly sent.

It was strange.

This guy had been mediocre since childhood. The bloodline power was a garbage bloodline named Fusion, which is near useless. However, two years ago, without knowing why, this guy suddenly had a rise. Starting from king-level, it climbed up to its current realm!

In just one year, it reached the world realm.

Then another year, it reached the current peak level two world realm today. If one was to ignore the first half of its experience, it was simply a legend!

If one is to add up the first half too…

Isn’t this the classic human face-slapping novel?

“Hmm, could this guy be someone who came back from the future? No matter what, as long as it could destroy Su Hao, it will become the hero of beasts!”

But then again, didn’t the name Zi Tian sound familiar?

Could it be that I have heard it somewhere before?

chapters.title: Chapter 1010 - T’S Just A Leftover Of My Toys
chapters.body:
Chapter 1010 - T’S Just A Leftover Of My Toys

Who is it?

Who else could it be but him!

Falling into the beast realm and surviving by chance. In the end, it wasn’t just Ping Yang who obtained a heaven-defying ability there, but also another person…

Zi Tian, Tian Zi!

“Why can’t it be me?”

Tian Zi’s eyes flashed in gloom while carrying dense sarcasm.

This day had finally arrived!

He had waited too long for it…

Two years of hard work, two years of madness, wasn’t this what he was looking forward to?

“I told you that I would be back.” Tian Zi continued in a grim tone, “I will come back gorgeously and take away everything that belongs to you. Right now, this competition is just the beginning!”

“You’re that confident?” Su Hao smirked.

“Hahahaha.” Tian Zi laughed wildly, “Of course I’m confident! Do you know what I have experienced in the past two years? Do you know how much have I sacrifice in the past two years?”

“No, you will never know!”

“However, I will make you feel the existence of fear! I will make you desperate till no hope remains! I will make your family fall and be buried for my Tian family!”

When Tian Zi finished his words, he was already frantic.

There seemed to be a trace of blood in his red eyes. No one knew what he had paid for revenge! What kind of nightmare was that?

“For example…”

“You turning into this current state where you’re not a human nor a ghost?” Su Hao leisurely said, “Zi Tian… Fusion…”

“So, that was it.” Su Hao suddenly understood.

Fusion!

“It turned out that guy actually merged with you? Looking at your current strange appearance, it most likely tried to merge with you but failed, and you occupied its consciousness.”

Su Hao analyzed.

“Haha, so what if you know?” Tian Zi sounded sinister, “No one knew where I was, and no one knew who I was! Two years ago, I came here to look for the Tian family. Never would I have thought that all I saw were corpses. At that moment, I vowed to kill you! Then, someone noticed my identity and inflicted a serious injury to me.”

“When I was about to die, there was this one beast who tried to swallow me!”

Tian Zi laughed out loud.

“What a poor bloodline, fusion! It doesn’t matter if it tried to fuse an item, but to fuse with a human, it swallowed me whole! It’s such a pity that it didn’t know the true power of fusion and was clueless about how to bring this bloodline power to shine.”

“And all of these…”

“They belong to me now!”

Boom!

Skyrocketing aura erupted.

The familiar aura appeared, shocking everyone.

“This aura…”

“War Intent!”

“This War Intent belongs to Tian Zi. How could it appear on that beast?”

“What happened?”

Recalling Su Hao and this beast’s conversation, everyone seemed to have understood something, “Tian Zi! That guy is Tian Zi!”

Boom!

The audience went into an uproar.

Tian Zi, a peerless talent of mankind, which one could say that before the college entrance exam at the age of 18, he was the one with the most potential, and no one could match him! Tian City was the largest city at that time, and he enjoyed an indescribable glory.

Literally everyone knew Tian Zi!

Of course…

The failure in the college entrance exam made this genius gradually disappear.

Afterwards, he clashed with Su Hao many times but failed. Then, after the fall of the Tian family, everyone died, and Tian Zi quietly disappeared from the public view.

He never revealed himself again.

There was a rumor that this guy followed the Tian family and entered the beast domain. There were also rumors of him cultivating hard, striving to win back the Tian family’s glory one day.

However, no one would have expected that when Tian Zi appeared again, it would be at such a place!

He stood on the stage of Battle of Glory and represented the beasts!

“Damn you!”

“He actually betrayed humans?”

“Damn it, get down from the stage right now!”

The human camp was full of curses.

No matter what era, traitors would always be despised. After knowing Tian Zi’s identity, a series of curses came from the audience.

“Humph.”

Tian Zi sneered.

He didn’t care about everyone’s reaction.

Anyway, he’s technically a beast, right?

Looking at Su Hao’s smile, Tian Zi only felt the anger in his heart soaring wildly, “I have said, you will never know how much I have sacrifice!”

At first, he began to cultivate hard when he left, wanting to enter the world realm and come back to kill Su Hao.

However, how would he know that when he was truly a world esper, he was shocked to find that Su Hao had unexpectedly ran ahead of him!

Even after stepping into the world realm, Su Hao was still ahead of him!

Revenge…

It looked so far away!

Just when he was desperate, he was lucky enough to meet that unlucky beast with a fusion talent. More interestingly, he ended up as a beast by chance and became more powerful than before! At that moment, he realized how heaven-defying this fusion talent is!

“What I have experienced.”

Tian Zi calmed himself while still maintaining endless killing intent in his eyes, “I will let you feel it all.”

“Now.”

“Let’s fight!”

Boom!

War Intent crazily erupted.

In the air, Tian Zi’s War Intent instantly condensed into a huge sword and slashed at Su Hao. That sharp edge made one dare not look at it directly. This was Tian Zi’s own power.

Bang!

With a slash of Xinghe Sword, the War Intent was easily cut off.

“This force…” Su Hao narrowed his eyes, “With such a level, you want to defeat me?”

“Hehe.”

Tian Zi sneered and pointed at Su Hao again.

Swish!

A dazzling cold light flashed.

The speed was so quick that it was unbelievable. Su Hao was taken aback by this familiar scene. After avoiding it, he discovered what Tian Zi had just released earlier.

This is…

A laser?

The power of Three Eyes?

How could he have it?

“Hehe.”

Tian Zi sneered.

Swish!

Light flashed.

Tian Zi’s figure moved swiftly. Controlling War Intent, he charged at Su Hao directly. As for Su Hao, he slashed down with his Xinghe Sword without hesitation. However, it was at this instant…

Swish~

Tian Zi’s figure floated and became illusory.

“What the hell was that?”

Before Su Hao could react, Tian Zi’s figure became solid again, and a deep mark was drawn on Su Hao, dying his clothes in red.

“This is…”

Su Hao was shocked.

In the audience stand, everyone was dumbfounded.

Were those two tricks of Tian Zi strong?

No!

However, what he revealed surprised everyone. The laser of Three Eyes and that spectre state that can be switched at will…

Aren’t those the bloodline of previous beasts?

How would Tian Zi have those?

“Fusion…”

Su Hao pondered.

Boom!

Xinghe Arrow suddenly appeared.

Bending the bow to shoot an arrow, Su Hao’s hand burst out with a flash of radiant brilliance, blasting Tian Zi at an extreme speed. This Xinghe Arrow wasn’t strong because that would consume too much time from Su Hao. Because of that, its strength was weak. Otherwise, that won’t make Tian Zi react too late.

The light vanished, and Tian Zi reappeared with a bloodstain on his arm.

Buzz~

A beam of light flashed, and his arm was as good as ever!

“As I expected.” Su Hao thoroughly understood.

“Hahaha, what can you use to defeat me?” Tian Zi laughed wildly, “I already said this. The terror of fusion, how would you all understand it? This is a truly terrifying power, whatever Golden Silkworm or Spectre, they can go to hell!”

In the holographic world, there was only silence with Tian Zi’s laughter.

With Su Hao’s words earlier, the audience finally understood where Tian Zi’s self-confidence came from. Fusion, he actually fused with others’ ability?

Laser, spectre state, and even rebirth!

How many had he fused with?

Boom!

A huge star blasted down, and Tian Zi stood proudly like a god. That rich starlight made his figure mysterious, Star Force…

As expected, even Chen Xing’s power couldn’t escape from his fusion!

Fusion, so this was the true power of his fusion?

Everyone was shocked.

“As long as I am given time, I can integrate with any talent.” Tian Zi looked at Su Hao proudly and aloft as if he was looking at a dead body, “As long as I am given time, I can defeat any opponent. In my territory, I am a god!”

Su Hao smirked.

Boom!

Boom!

Locking on target for analysis!

3D modeling!

Light flashed in Su Hao’s eyes.

With the assistance of a quantum computer, Illusion Reality was activated. It was as if Su Hao had opened his cheats as numerous Xinghe Arrows were short out from his hand.

Swish!

Swish!

A light ray flickered.

Each sharp arrow seemed to have automatic targeting. Tian Zi couldn’t avoid them at all. A series of seven Xinghe Arrows penetrated Tian Zi again and again without leaving a route to escape.

What was left behind was a corpse nailed to the ground!

The arena suddenly turned quiet for a while.

Just a second ago, Tian Zi was laughing arrogantly, and the next second, he was nailed to death by Su Hao? The change of direction was too quick that the audience somewhat couldn’t process it all.

And it was at this time.

Buzz~

Light flashed, and Tian Zi’s body suddenly reorganized and appeared in front of everyone, still and intact.

“Rebirth!”

“It must be rebirth!”

“This is Golden Silkworm’s ability. Tian Zi had mastered it.”

“This fusion bloodline is too shameless. If he could use any power, wouldn’t he be invincible in this world then?”

Everyone went into an uproar.

Laser attack from Three Eyes, the terrifying defensive spectre body, and the healing ability of rebirth, not to mention the almighty Star Force!

Could there be anything more heaven-defying than Tian Zi?

Everyone was terrified when they saw this!

What was there to fight then!

This was too scary.

“This is your attack?” Tian Zi looked at Su Hao indifferently with a sarcastic expression, “Too weak!”

In the college entrance exam, he was abused by Su Hao, but now, in Battle of Glory, in this larger stage, he wanted to return all the humiliation back to Su Hao.

Tian Zi’s eyes looked extremely cold.

Last time during the college entrance exam, had you thought that this scene would be happening to you?

Su Hao!

“This is your confidence?” Su Hao touched his forehead helplessly and sighed, “I thought it was something grand or something.”

“What?” Tian Zi was taken aback.

“Poor child.” A pitiful look could be seen in Su Hao’s eyes, “It seems that you’re still clueless regarding how you lost in the college entrance exam, right?”

“Replicating talents or whatever, it’s just a leftover of my toys…”

chapters.title: Chapter 1015 - An Opportunity For A Breakthrough
chapters.body:
Chapter 1015 - An Opportunity For A Breakthrough

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

In the beast domain, a shabby thatched house was still standing in the already destroyed Scarlet Forest, swaying within the wind as if it might fall down at any moment.

An elegant figure stood on the side of the thatched house.

Behind him, two bright lights were shining.

It was none other than the currently strongest being on Earth, Heavenly Emperor Mingguang!

“Two more to go.” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang looked at the final two lights and whispered softly.

“Heavenly Emperor.”

A beast knelt on the ground, “With your word, your subordinates will immediately lead men to destroy the last two Great Despairs!”

“No need for that.”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang waved his hand.

Swish!

A gust of wind passed.

Out of the two lights, one suddenly went out.

Nine Lamps, only one was left.

The void trembled, and a figure appeared before Heavenly Emperor Mingguang. It turned out to be Hydra, “Heavenly Emperor Mingguang, Despair Abyss has already been destroyed.”

“Great.”

A smile appeared on Heavenly Emperor Mingguang’s face.

Out of Nine Great Despairs, only one remained.

“However…” Hydra paused for a moment before sighing, “Our beasts suffered a terrible loss in the recent matches. We fought the humans seven times and lost all of them! Especially that Su Hao…”

“His strength is terrifying!”

“Su Hao, huh?” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang repeated the name, “Don’t bother with him. As long as Mo Ling can win and obtain first place, there’s no need to care about the others.”

“Understood.” Hydra responded.

A beast also kneeling on the ground suddenly showed a fierce sign, releasing its terrifying aura of a peak world realm as it looked at Heavenly Emperor Mingguang, “Heavenly Emperor, there’s a rumor that you’re seriously injured going outside and you can’t make a move! So, I can only use this method. What do you think…”

“What do you want?!” Hydra was furious, “This is our Heavenly Emperor!”

“Beasts are respected by their strength. Heavenly Emperor should have the strength of a Heavenly Emperor, right?”

That beast said grimly, “If Heavenly Emperor wants to command all the beasts, you have to prove your strength, right? Otherwise, who knows if you’re a pretender? I heard that there is such a talent in the human world that could use aura to trick others. Perhaps…”

“How bold of you!” Hydra shouted violently.

“It’s fine.” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang looked at him indifferently, “You want me to prove it?”

“Yes.” That beast insisted.

“It’s very simple.” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang didn’t care, “This request is reasonable. Stretch out your hand, and I will let you feel my power.”

“Huh?”

That beast was stunned for a moment before reaching out its hand.

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang grabbed it gently and said in a calm tone, “Now, feel the power of a Heavenly Emperor.”

Buzz~

A soft sound rang.

The beast didn’t feel anything wrong. A Heavenly Emperor’s strength was that simple? However, when it glanced at those around it, it suddenly noticed that their gazes were full of horror. It subconsciously followed their gazes and saw its own body.

Its own body that was gradually disappearing.

With the emergence of Heavenly Emperor’s power, its body couldn’t bear it and decomposed!

The force belonging to Heavenly Emperor flew through its body, and wherever it passed, everything disappeared. Whether it was its Rule Force or powerful physical body, everything disappeared into nothing!

They all vanished…

A few seconds later…

There was nothing in Heavenly Emperor’s hand.

Hydra and the others were deeply shocked. That was a peak world esper! In just a few seconds, its existence completely turned into nothing in Heavenly Emperor’s hands!

Who said that Heavenly Emperor couldn’t make a move?

Who said that Heavenly Emperor was seriously injured?

Damn!

“Is there anyone who wishes to try?”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang looked at the beasts. His gaze was as gentle as ever, but that gentleness currently made all the beasts feel a chill in their heart.

“We don’t dare.”

All beasts knelt on the ground.

“Do you also have doubts?” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang suddenly asked Hydra.

“Uh.” Hydra hesitated for a while before affirming, “Yes, you can destroy the humans with your strength, so why not do so? If you want to destroy The Secret Realm of the Deep Sea, you can directly make a move right? Although the beasts will definitely get first, I feel that it’s a bit redundant to create the Battle of Glory.”

“Exterminate mankind?” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang laughed at himself, “If I could destroy them, I would have taken action long ago.”

“You can’t wipe them out?” Hydra’s eyes widened.

“I am indeed the Heavenly Emperor.” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang smiled leisurely, “However, I am not the strongest in the world. Plus, if I take action… that place will definitely be aware of it.”

“That place?”

Hydra was at a loss.

What place could make Heavenly Emperor Mingguang be this wary?

“When you become Emperor-ranked, you will naturally know.” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang patted his shoulder, “For now, just guide them well in the competition.”

“Yes.” Hydra and the other beasts retreated respectfully.

Next to the thatched house, only Heavenly Emperor Mingguang was left. Suddenly the wind blew, and Yin Ling appeared. That familiar shadow bowed in front of him. Heavenly Emperor Mingguang had a quick glance.

“Execute everything according to the plan.”

“Yes.”

…..

The Su family’s residence.

After Su Hao followed Chen Yiran home, he found that Su Ling was setting the table with tableware and chopsticks. His heart suddenly skipped a beat, “Ling Er, where’s our mom?”

“What’s wrong?” Li Xiaoru’s voice came from the kitchen, “You’re back! Well, the food will be ready soon.”

“Phew.”

Su Hao breathed a sigh of relief.

“What’s wrong?”

Chen Yiran felt that his state wasn’t right.

“Not sure, just now I was in a trance, but it recovered the next second.”

Su Hao shook his head slightly and guessed, “I guess someone planned to take action here, but then gave up? But that feeling…”

“Forget about it, as long everything is fine, that’s good.”

Su Hao let go of his worry.

The entire family started their meal in a friendly manner. For Su Hao, whether or not he participated in the competition, he would come back for dinner on time every day. Then, after confirming with the Su family’s Old Ancestor, who is also Su Hao’s grandfather, that nothing was wrong here, he would leave in relief.

If he couldn’t guard against the enemy at this level, it would still be useless if he knew about it, right?

Everything seemed to be so peaceful.

Within the Federation, as the current round of matches ended, everyone was finally relieved.

As for the battles for 8th place and below, it was actually needless to mention. This Battle of Glory was already over for most humans. Because out of the remaining 16 participants, excluding the seven humans, eight out of the remaining nine beast participants were level three world espers. Plus…

That perverted Mo Ling!

How to compete?

Unless you have luck like Li Xin!

Summon a meteor to kill the opponent in reality; otherwise, this is a lost battle! It was very likely that no human could get into the top eight! Of course, if one really wants to count it, maybe Su Hao still has a chance? At least, during the battle earlier, Su Hao revealed terrifying strength.

“Who has confidence?” Wang Ru looked at the group, but this time, even Li Xin didn’t say a word.

Chen Xing.

A character with such strength was only ranked tenth!

What about the top nine then?

They were all stronger than Chen Xing. How could they match them? This time, after seeing Chen Xing’s strength, everyone was shocked!

How to defeat them?

There was total silence in the meeting room.

Everyone was confident, and they believed in their own strength.

However, this wasn’t a question about whether they believed or not, but the opponents were far older than everyone here. No one dared to act arrogant!

“Su Hao?” Wang Ru looked at Su Hao.

“Hold on…” Su Hao closed his eyes and meditated as if he was thinking of something important.

“Perhaps there might be a way.” Su Hao suddenly said, causing everyone’s eyes to light up.

There is really such a solution?

“Let me think about it…”

Su Hao felt quite a headache. He had this feeling that he had grasped something, but it was very vague. That kind of fleeting thought, what was it?

Su Hao frowned for a moment and then suddenly said, “Where is the gap between us and the beasts?”

“Gap?”

Everyone glanced at each other. Zhou Wang answered flatly, “Realm!”

Yes.

They were a bunch of level one and level two world espers. Against a group of level three world espers, for them, the most important thing is the difference of a realm!

Yet, World Force was so powerful that it by no means comparable to any ordinary force!

Thus…

This was why they had such a huge contrast.

“Then, in other words, if we’re in the same realm, it’s possible to win?” Su Hao muttered to himself. His eyes turned brighter and brighter.

If that was the case…

Hmmm…

“From level two to level three world realm, what is needed?” Su Hao pondered.

“Ten boundary spirits.” Chen Yiran said softly.

“Ten boundary spirits!” Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

Yes, ten boundary spirits!

The difference between level two and level three realm is ten boundary spirits. Thus, if you gather ten boundary spirits together, wouldn’t everyone be able to step into the level three world realm?

Then…

To create boundary spirit quickly…

Su Hao’s eyes were shining. For others, it might be difficult, but this was definitely not an issue for him! However, how could he cultivate a boundary spirit suitable for the others to use?

Su Hao fell into deep thought again.

In the meeting room, There was only Su Hao’s voice as he thought alone.

Ten boundary spirits…

A quick success…

The secret of boundary spirit…

Su Hao felt as if he had grasped the thread.

Under normal circumstances, one’s cultivated boundary spirit could only be used by them, but didn’t he have the secret of boundary spirits? What if one studied the secret of boundary spirit?

As long as they match, what was so hard about ten boundary spirits?

One needs to know that in the past, just after breaking through, Wan Cheng merged with a fourth grade boundary spirit!

This was the power of the secret of boundary spirit!

Right now, what these people lack, is it not just the secret of boundary spirit? If that was really the case, as long as he helped them get ten boundary spirits…

Level three world realm would be within their grasp!

“Absolutely feasible.”

Su Hao turned excited.

Of course, the premise is that he managed to study the production of the secret technique of boundary spirits.

Buzz~

Su Hao closed his eyes for a bit.

Backtracking the time…

The scenes when he entered Taihu Territory last time came to his mind. He had analyzed and created a model out of those secrets of boundary spirits, and the layers of data were quickly retrieved.

The content of the secret of boundary spirits was analyzed one by one.

Su Hao didn’t know how the secret of boundary spirit was made, but he could imitate the same boundary spirits with the original design drawings. As for how to make them use…

“Perhaps I can imitate their Rule Force?”

Su Hao had countless thoughts in his heart.

To create the secret of boundary spirit.

That’s feasible!

chapters.title: Chapter 1016 - The Magical Function Of Little Dark Room
chapters.body:
Chapter 1016 - The Magical Function Of Little Dark Room

Create the secret of boundary spirit!

This was the solution Su Hao suggested.

Using their original Rule Force, after imitating and analyzing it based on the original design drawings, a new secret of boundary spirit would be created after some modifications.

Of course…

In theory, that was feasible.

However…

“Can you keep up with such an enormous amount of calculations?” Li Tiantian asked, “Deduction, analysis, testing, and simulating their Rule Force, the amount of data needed isn’t small at all.”

“Should be no problem.”

Su Hao gave it a try.

The quantum computer in his body was fully operational without any burden at all!

“The previous computers weren’t good, but this quantum computer is absolutely fine.”

Su Hao was delighted.

The improvement provided by this quantum computer wasn’t just by a small margin. One could even say it provided a qualitative change to him.

“Then, what about the time issue?” Ping Yang interjected the conversation with a question.

“Time?” Su Hao was taken aback for a second, and only then did he remember this.

Although the quantum computer won’t collapse due to the workload, it was limited to one secret of boundary spirit creation at a time. To calculate several at the same time was impossible!

In other words, he could only make one at any given moment!

How long would it take to make one?

“Let me test it out!”

Su Hao made a decision.

Swish!

Light shrouded him.

In the meeting room, Su Hao’s hands burst with a dazzling cluster of energy.

“Yiran, give me your hand.” Su Hao said as he grabbed Chen Yiran’s hand, “Send your Rule Force over here slowly. I just need a tiny bit.”

“Alright.”

Several units of Rule Force were transferred.

Su Hao quickly activated his analysis.

Fortunately, the boundary spirit’s degree of acceptance of Rule Force was very high. Soon, a secret of boundary spirit matching the Rule Force was analyzed. Then…

It was time to condense it.

What are the benefits of the secret of boundary spirit?

Saving time!

It wasn’t known how long it would take for a normal secret of boundary spirit to be created. Thus, if Su Hao wants to recreate the effect of the secret of boundary spirit, he must complete a template.

Then, as for Chen Yiran, as long as the required Rule Force amount was filled, a real boundary spirit could be formed soon!

“Model Analysis!”

“Realization!”

Within Su Hao’s body, a boundary spirit model slowly took shape. Based on Su Hao’s analysis, it was constructed bit by bit before it was quickly filled with the force imitating Chen Yiran’s Rule Force.

“Great.”

Su Hao breathed a sigh of relief. At least, it was perfect up until now.

The next step would be to move the model to reality. For Su Hao, it was the most crucial step. He didn’t have any golden paper of the secret of boundary spirit. The only thing he could do was to condense it into reality! Make this force through Realization, and it would be absorbed instantly the moment it was completed.

“Yiran, pay attention!”

Su Hao looked solemn.

Buzz~

In the sky, some stars flickered.

In order to achieve perfect success, Su Hao was extremely cautious of each step. One could say that it was up to the point of each particle. It took half an hour just for the outline of the boundary spirit to gradually take shape! For Su Hao, it wasn’t just as simple as an outline. It was a boundary spirit itself.

“When I signal you, you absorb it and fill it with your Rule Force.” Su Hao instructed.

“En.” Chen Yiran nodded and watched carefully.

“Three, two, one… Now!”

The moment when Su Hao completed the process, the moment when Su Hao spoke, light blue Rule Force flickered and quickly surrounded Su Hao’s condensed model.

Buzz~

Literally similar forces quickly merged.

For that model, after the Rule Force was filled, the effect of the original secret of boundary spirit was completed. Just like that, a boundary spirit was formed.

Swish!

Swish!

The boundary spirit was completed!

Chen Yiran waved the ice sword in her hand. This is a third grade boundary spirit. Although it wasn’t that strong, one needs to note how long they took to create this from the beginning to the end!

If ordinary people are to condense this, they would need at least a few months!

Damn it.

Everyone was dumbfounded. However, Wan Cheng, who had been to Taihu Territory before with Su Hao, seemed to understand something. A strange light flashed within his eyes.

“Wait a moment…” Su Hao didn’t have the time to explain and immediately started the analysis.

Deduction, analysis, imitation, conversion, absorption…

“How long was it?” Su Hao asked.

“Three hours.” Ping Yang recorded the data very accurately.

“Three hours, and this is only a third grade boundary spirit. If it was a fourth grade boundary spirit, the time needed would be even longer, most likely more than eight hours. Nine third grade boundary spirits and one fourth grade boundary spirit, a total of thirty-five hours, which is a day and a half.”

Su Hao felt a headache.

“There are only five days off. A day and a half for one person. That’s not enough for seven of us!”

“The difference is exactly doubled!”

Ping Yang analyzed.

“It’s not that long.” Su Hao frowned, “You don’t need to count me in. Besides Wan Cheng and some of them, they would at least have some boundary spirits. So, we can omit a few.”

“Even so, that’s not enough time.” Li Tiantian said without hesitation, “We still haven’t considered the factor of failure in the boundary spirit creation. Even if there are only six people, the time still wouldn’t be enough. Moreover, even if you are barely able to complete all of them, ignoring the time for their breakthrough, you plan to let them go with the lowest standard?”

“For a competition, is it worth giving up their future?”

Su Hao became silent.

Yes.

That was the lowest requirement.

Ten boundary spirits were also divided into strong and weak ones. One fourth grade boundary spirit and nine third grade boundary spirits are obviously the minimum requirements. Although they could have breakthroughs, it was very obvious that such a method would only put them at the bottom level of world espers.

These years, fifth grade boundary spirits could be met but not sought.

However, if one worked hard for a fourth grade boundary spirit, it was still possible to get one.

Thus, most powerhouses and true geniuses would frantically search for fourth grade boundary spirits and strive to collect as many as possible when breaking through. Of course, even two fourth grade boundary spirits would be so much stronger than the minimum standard!

With an additional fourth grade boundary spirit…

The strength would be completely different!

Plus, were the beasts that weak? To go with the lowest requirement, they would most likely end up as cannon fodder, right? Besides, was that really worth blocking one’s future for the competition?

One needs to know that the cohesion of ten boundary spirits could only be done once!

Su Hao once again immersed himself in his thoughts.

“What’s wrong?” Wang Ru finally couldn’t help but ask doubtfully.

Su Hao took a moment to sort out his thoughts. Everyone around was shocked when they heard the actual truth. Create the secret of boundary spirit?

How crazy was that?

However…

No matter how crazy that was!

He completed it!

Looking at the boundary spirit still blooming with brilliant light in Chen Yiran’s hand, Wang Ru truly felt that he could no longer comprehend Su Hao’s current strength.

How could the current generation grow up to this point?

Looking at Su Hao, Chen Yiran, and even the 20-year-old Zheng Tai, Wang Ru was emotional.

“So, it’s a matter of time?” Wang Ru narrowed his eyes.

“Yes, you’re right.” Su Hao nodded.

“Even if you have enough time, can your consumption keep up?” Wang Ru asked.

Although he only helped to create a boundary spirit and consumed Chen Yiran’s own Rule Force, as a guide, he probably consumed quite an amount, right?

“Origin energy.” Su Hao hesitated for a moment before saying, “As long as there is enough origin energy!”

“Origin energy…”

Wang Ru pondered for a moment.

He didn’t ask why Su Hao still needs energy as a level two world esper but considered this matter’s feasibility instead. If it’s purely just a matter of time…

“Maybe I have a solution.” Wang Ru suddenly said.

“Senior, you have a way?” Su Hao’s eyes lit up.

“We can give it a try.” Wang Ru smiled, “Do you still remember Chen Sheng?”

“Chen Sheng?” Su Hao froze for a moment. That name sounded familiar. The memory from ages ago flew back. Su Hao pondered for a moment before he finally remembered who Chen Sheng was.

Chen Sheng, one of the top ten fierce men in the illusion school.

His killer move: Little Dark Room

Back then, Shi Mingxuan was in Little Dark Room, and he had to endure for ten full years. If Shi Mingxuan had not accompanied him, he would have surrendered back then. That was a terrifying mental attack!

“What Chen Sheng learnt is not even the start of the door.” Wang Ru smiled, “I can let you be completely immersed in the world of Little Dark Room, but I can’t help you with the consumption.”

“Alright.”

Su Hao became excited.

If Wang Ru, this peak world esper, would help him solve the issue of time, what was there for him to fear?

Creating these boundary spirit molds couldn’t be any easier! He could complete the calculation work in Little Dark Room. As for the rest, after coming out, he could then perform Realization.

The only thing he consumed was origin energy!

“Give me sufficient origin energy.” Su Hao said.

“This is not an issue. When your energy is consumed, I can give you the recovery drugs.”

Wang Ru hesitated for a second before continuing, “The problem regarding origin energy isn’t a problem. The real problem is that Little Dark Room affects your mentality and makes one feel lonely and desperate. The original version of Chen Sheng was incomplete, so you didn’t have a problem. However, if you’re in my Little Dark Room…”

“You will face an issue.”

“There is no need to worry about this.” Su Hao smiled, “Little Dark Room is harmless to me.”

“Really?” Wang Ru nodded, “Then, I can rest assured.”

“Don’t hesitate. It’s about time to start.” Su Hao said.

Soon, the stocks of origin energy were ready. In order to help Su Hao recover his energy, even the Federation’s energy warehouse was opened for Su Hao. While Wang Ru assisted him, he activated Little Dark Room, which was a nightmare to many as Su Hao began.

Swish!

In front of Su Hao, it was total darkness.

Forget about thinking and analyzing, just a few seconds there would make one feel despair, darkness, and loneliness. Fortunately, Wang Ru reminded him; otherwise, with his current strength, he would be knocked out in minutes. Wang Ru’s strength at the peak world realm is definitely not something he could contend with.

Swish!

Su Hao decisively entered Kingdom of Heaven, but he didn’t abuse his hobby.

Everything returned to normal. With the help of those in Kingdom of Heaven, one boundary spirit after another was created. After endless deduction and analysis, they finally took shape and formed a terrifying boundary spirit model!

In reality, only three seconds passed, while one and a half months passed in Little Dark Room. Su Hao finally opened his eyes.

“It’s done!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1017 - Whose Alarm Rang Randomly?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1017 - Whose Alarm Rang Randomly?

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 1018 - All Advanced To Level Three!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1018 - All Advanced To Level Three!

Chapter 1018: All advanced to level three!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

Eighth round.

Ninth round.

Tenth round!

When the world bell finally stopped ringing, the beasts were already lifeless. At this time, no matter how retarded they are, they knew what had happened.

Ten boundary spirits!

It was indeed ten boundary spirits!

Plus, those damn humans actually created a total of 64 fourth grade boundary spirits!

You know what?

That damn alarm clock rang sixty times!

Whether it’s a human or beast, for the first time ever, they actually felt the world bell that they normally admire was becoming annoying…

Dong, dong, dong, dong, who won’t be annoyed by that?!

Of course, someone wasn’t annoyed.

At the Federation’s waiting room Wang Ru was smiling. Looking at those fourth grade boundary spirits, he couldn’t hide his smile. Ten fourth grade boundary spirits! What’s there to worry about humans not winning?

It will be fine as long as they step into the level three world realm!

Even if they went against the top ten beasts, they could still give a great fight!

Right now, everyone’s gazes toward Su Hao were completely full of admiration. He was simply too OP. Especially Wang Jun, who wasn’t close to Su Hao, he was about to offer his virginity to Su Hao.

This was simply an existence that defied heaven!
