At this time, Wang Ru seemed to have finally realized something. His brows inevitably frowned. Looking at the excited crowd, he suddenly asked, “What about yourself?”

Swish.

The scene went silent.

Everyone suddenly reacted.

Yes, what about Su Hao? Why everyone was fine, but Su Hao didn’t have a fourth grade boundary spirit. One needs to know that he was the most powerful of them!

Su Hao sighed.

In the end, he got noticed…

“What happened?”

Everyone noticed his wrongful expression now.

“I can’t break through.” Su Hao shook his head.

“Why?” Li Xin scratched his head, “Isn’t it just ten boundary spirits?”

“No.” Su Hao was helpless. He didn’t know how to explain. Rule Force wasn’t sufficient? Or should he say he hadn’t broken through into the world realm at all?

After thinking about it, Su Hao decided to use this reason, “Do you remember the world imprint?”

“Could it be…” Wang Ru was suddenly shocked.

“Yes, you’re right.” Su Hao sighed.

“What the hell is this?”

Everyone looked over here.

“The world imprint is a part of this world. Su Hao came back from the dead and lost his. Thus, he is rejected by the world. At first, a group of powerful espers judged that he couldn’t breakthrough into the world realm. However, he defied everyone’s expectations. I thought that was already over.”

Wang Ru shook his head slightly, “Unexpectedly, lacking the world imprint didn’t prevent you from entering the world realm, but it stopped you from reaching level three!”

Su Hao shrugged, taking it as he agreed.

Although there were some deviations, Wang Ru’s speculation was pretty close.

“Then what about your match?” Chen Yiran sounded worried.

“There’s not much hope.” Su Hao spread his hands, “Although I can still beat a peak level two world esper, facing a level three world esper is still not something I can handle. So…”

“At best, I promise I won’t die miserably.”

“So, I will leave it to you all to obtain first place.” Su Hao encouraged, “I can help you all to reach the top eight. As for the rest, it’s up to you!”

Everyone was silent.

No one would have thought that Su Hao actually couldn’t break through!

One need to know the boundary spirits in their hands were all thanks to Su Hao. Yet, the final glory couldn’t be enjoyed by him!

Without breaking through to the level three world realm, no matter how strong he is, it would be useless.

“Alright.” Li Xin raised the boundary spirit in his hand, “Boss, I will definitely win!”

“Of course.”

Su Hao glanced at this guy contemptuously, “With a breakthrough of ten perfect boundary spirits, if you still can’t win, you can commit suicide by cutting open your stomach.”

“Hehe.” Li Xin gave a dry cough.

“Okay, quickly go breakthrough. Time doesn’t wait.”

“Alright.”

Everyone left.

“After the competition ends, I will accompany you.” Chen Yiran said to Su Hao.

“Alright, go faster.” Su Hao smiled lightly.

The Federation’s conference room quickly emptied, leaving only Wang Ru and Su Hao.

“Aren’t you depressed?” Wang Ru looked at Su Hao, “These should have been your glory, right?”

“Is that any use?” Su Hao smiled indifferently, “If you lose, you lose. As long as humans can get first place, thinking about it, six of the top eight are humans. Isn’t that glorious?”

Wang Ru laughed.

***

This day was destined to be unforgettable.

That night, the news of the world bell’s sixty rings spread all over the Internet. As for those who were clueless, they were stunned once they understood what happened.

Sixty times!

Fourth grade boundary spirits!

This shocked the world.

What was even more incredible was that six terrifying auras went up to the sky in the middle of the night. Those powerful auras couldn’t be concealed at all, and literally everyone could see something with a glance.

Six humans…

Broke through!

Except for Su Hao, everyone broke through!

Level three world realm!

These people now truly stood on the same level as their opponents. All the beasts were terrified thinking of the previous sixty boundary spirits.

Those were ten perfect boundary spirits!

How strong were these humans now after these breakthroughs?

No one knew.

As for those the top ten beasts that despised human beings, they all desperately went to cultivate harder when they saw this scene.

Ten perfect boundary spirits, the pressure they felt could be imagined.

However, the beasts were truly not giving up. Soon, all sorts of news regarding Su Hao’s strength were squeezed out from the Federation. Something began to spread on the Internet. How many were paying attention to Su Hao? Soon, it turned into a mess.

Everyone broke through, but why didn’t Su Hao?

One needs to know Su Hao is the strongest one! Was it really because of the previous conflict Su Hao had with the Federation? If that was really the case, this was simply disappointing!

In an instant, the Internet exploded.

Having said that, Su Hao was helpless after reading the news.

It couldn’t be helped.

It’s the inferior nature of human beings.

In the beast camp, some of them were good at fanning trouble. As a portion of netizens were emotional and easily incited, they were clueless of good or bad. Thus…

This rumor had caused a bad effect.

It was up to the point where on the same day, the senior federal officials begged Wang Ru to come and explain something.

Wang Ru pondered for a while. It seemed that no explanation was reliable. Finally, he thought of an excuse that sounds reasonable for the failure and wouldn’t affect anything.

That day, Zheng Tai posted to the online community, “To be able to breakthrough in such a short time, it was all thanks to Su Hao’s assistance. In order for us to break through, Su Hao sacrificed his own training time! This battle, we will walk together! Su Hao is, without a doubt, the true captain that we deserved!”

At the same time, Chen Yiran, Zhou Wang, Li Xin, and the others released the same post.

As soon as this news came out, it caused another sensation.

With the analysis of some experts, everyone found out that Su Hao, as the captain, sacrificed his power to help everyone gather ten boundary spirits in order to make humans more glorious. This was how the legend of ten boundary spirits in one day came!

Su Hao once again became a hero.

“This is also possible?”

Su Hao looked at the explosion of the Internet speechless.

“Of course.”

“Like this, even if you lose, no one will say anything.”

Wang Ru finally found a sense of his existence and said proudly, “I’m not as good as you in leading the team, but suppressing the public opinion is still our expertise.”

Su Hao glanced at him in surprise, “Senior, this isn’t something worth showing off though.”

“Cough, cough.”

Wang Ru’s face blushed immediately and turned around to leave, “Don’t mind me, I have been with Li Xin for too long.”

“Huh?”

Li Xin, who was lying on the side, raised his head blankly. How does that relate to me?

Everyone laughed out loud.

Boom!

A house was blasted down.

“It was really him!”

Hydra’s angry voice came, “Damn Su Hao! Why is he involved each time? Plans, this daddy’s plans have all been destroyed by him!”

Boom!

Boom!

The furious Hydra smashed everything in the room to pieces.

Su Hao…

He hated this name the most.

One could even say his hatred was infused deep in his bones.

Whether it was his daughter’s death, the destruction of his decade long plan, or even this competition, Su Hao was like his nemesis who was always everywhere!

The most helpless thing was he couldn’t do anything about it.

Kill him?

Now that the humans and beasts were at peace, if he was discovered to have killed him, he would probably provoke a war between both again. Of course, the result would most likely be him sacrificed as cannon fodder. His entire clan would be buried with Su Hao! Besides, can he even kill the current Su Hao?

Not to mention that there must be someone protecting him, Su Hao’s strange strength alone was enough to give Hydra a headache.

After some entanglement, he sadly came to the conclusion that the only way to defeat Su Hao was openly in the Battle of Glory.

“I will never let you win!” Hydra raged.

Just like that, three days passed.

The beasts were busy preparing. However, humans had been discussing these topics about Su Hao for three days!

#Captain Su Hao

#Sixty boundary spirits

#Strong breakthrough

…..

The online community was basically full of similar news. Su Hao and the team kept becoming the focus of everyone’s discussion. Right now, they were truly top espers! Level three world realm, surpassing the existence of any ordinary world esper!

One needs to know that those were perfect boundary spirits!

Under such an atmosphere, the matches to determine the top 8 came quietly.

Within a few days, whether it’s about boundary spirits or the recently gained strength, Zheng Tai and the others had mastered it properly. This battle would be their real appearance!

The first human to go onto the stage was Wang Jun.

Having ten perfect boundary spirits, his strength was heaven-defying. Facing an opponent of a similar realm, it should have been a stable win, but the first match between humans and beasts dulled the humans’ cheering instead.

The first battle between humans and beasts.

Wang Jun got killed!

chapters.title: Chapter 1019 - Unimaginably Powerful Opponents
chapters.body:
Chapter 1019 - Unimaginably Powerful Opponents

Chapter 1019: Unimaginably powerful opponents

One hit kill!

There was so much suspense.

However, whether it was a beast or a human, they weren’t shocked. When the light and shadow appeared, the ending was already determined.

Mo Ling!

The number one genius among the younger generation; no one could rival him!

Su Hao and the others looked at each other and could only smile bitterly.

As expected…

At first, they thought that if Mo Ling fights with a beast instead of a human, there might be a chance to win. Who would have thought during the first match between beasts and humans, Mo Ling would show up. Plus, it was an instant kill!

The atmosphere froze in an instant.

Even if such a result was to be expected before the match, the atmosphere of human cheering stopped abruptly.

One hit kill!

That scene was too shocking.

That same familiar flickering and fluctuation, not even a new trick was used.

Mo Ling made everyone despair. Previously, people could use the excuse of being it too early, but what about now? They were about to reach the quarterfinals! Mo Ling, this guy that no one was willing to mention, once again appeared gorgeously in everyone’s vision!

It was that scary!

His match ended so fast and domineering.

Wang Jun returned helplessly. His strength soared, but before even he exerted his might, he was eliminated. In fact, he didn’t even know how he died!

“Is the strength gap that huge?” Wang Jun sounded bitter.

“I thought this was something we discussed since the beginning?” Wang Ru shook his head lightly, “From the very beginning, our goal was to be in the top 16. Even if we are going to lose, we must show our strength!”

“With the current result, I am already very satisfied.” Wang Ru calmly said, “At least, we have given mankind an explanation.”

Su Hao and the others comforted each other.

It couldn’t be helped.

Who wouldn’t be affected by this situation?

After all…

This was too demoralising!

“It’s alright, I will help you win the second match!” Li Xin patted his shoulder as his confidence soared. Everyone nodded.

Not bad.

What was Li Xin’s strength back then?

Level one world realm!

He still managed to defeat Chen Xing. With Su Hao’s assistance, he reached level three world realm in one leap. His current strength had soared so much that no one could estimate it!

Within the same realm, who would he even be afraid of?

“Alright.” Wang Jun nodded.

Li Xin’s opponent was a beast ranked ninth on the genius list, which could be considered the weakest one among nine remaining beasts. Dressed up like a human, it looked ordinary, and there was nothing shocking based on its appearance.

“This guy…”

Su Hao suddenly narrowed his eyes when he saw it.

“What’s wrong?” Wang Ru was startled.

“Something is amiss. There is a problem here.” Su Hao frowned slightly, “Do you have information about it?”

“I do.” Wang Ru opened the virtual screen and transmitted the data.

_______________

Name: Mo Cheng

Age: 29

Strength: Level three world realm

Description: Unknown bloodline. One of the terrifying powerhouses among the younger generation of beasts; talented and intelligent. While in the level one world realm, it leapfrogged and defeated dozens of level two world espers. While in the level two world realm, it managed to kill a level three world esper by chance. An expert in leapfrog challenges.

Rank: 9

_______________

“Unknown?”

Su Hao stared at the description of the bloodline.

“Humans and beasts know very little of each other.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly and shook his head, “The beasts don’t know much about human talents, and the same is applied to humans not knowing the beasts’ bloodlines. This is an advantage and a disadvantage at the same time.”

Su Hao nodded slightly.

That was true.

The peace between beasts and humans had only been going on for a few months. How could they understand each other that quickly? Unless the beasts were displaying their strength on the screen, how many people would actually know the beasts’ different powers?

“Li Xin won’t lose, right?”

Wang Ru was a bit uncertain.

Li Xin was a participant with a high instability!

When you’re sure of his win, he might do some retarded actions and lose. When you think he is bound to lose, he might win instead!

This guy…

He’s unpredictable!

In short, never consider him as a normal person.

“Not sure.” Su Hao also smiled bitterly.

He could predict, but he is no god.

He really couldn’t see through Li Xin because luck isn’t part of this man’s talent! Su Hao had analyzed that unstable talent many times, but he really didn’t detect anything related to luck. However, Li Xin had it! On his body, he was always surrounded by that familiar force…

That was luck!

Li Xin’s body had an aura of infinite luck!

This was something that people couldn’t ignore. Just that, most people wouldn’t notice it at all, but Su Hao could sense it. That powerful force that one couldn’t see!

He admitted that luck is also a kind of strength.

However…

Where does that power come from?

Because he wasn’t sure, he didn’t even know how to help Li Xin. Right now, that opponent of Li Xin was enveloped in a similar force!

Yes, the same force but with minor differences.

Was it because it’s the luck of the beasts?

Su Hao’s eyes narrowed.

In the holographic world, Li Xin and Mo Cheng appeared one after the other. Accompanied by the holographic scene, Li Xin looked very arrogant when he saw his opponent.

“Brat, this time, I will defeat you!”

“Hush!”

There were hissing sounds coming from the beast camp.

This guy would always attract everyone’s hate each time he came up to the stage. Thanks to his previous battle, the amount of hatred he attracted became denser and denser.

“That guy again!”

“Damn it, he relies on his luck to win each time!”

“Yes, he’s nothing without luck!”

“I pity Lord Chen…”

“Sigh, Lord Mo will definitely defeat him.”

“Yeah, how long can he last by depending on his luck to proceed?”

Countless beasts cursed.

Regarding humans, it wasn’t that the beasts only had one single feeling.

For Su Hao, not only did they hate him, but they also admired him a bit because of the numerous legends about him! As for other humans, they had the mindset as an opponent, but against Li Xin…

Countless hated him to no end.

Not strong, sharp mouth, arrogant, etc…

Those were the labels they gave Li Xin. They detested him so much that they wished to kill him every minute! However, each time Li Xin arrogantly appeared on the stage, he was able to crush his opponent. Not to forget, the previous meteor!

“You’re Li Xin?”

Mo Cheng looked at this man in front of it.

Those who were over twenty and could be regarded as a teenager, only Zheng Tai and Li Xin…. It was because one was extremely young and the other really had such a young mindset.

“The struggle of a villain?”

Li Xin happily said, “Do you know that each time a villain utters a lot of nonsense, he would be stepped on by the protagonist? At first, I was a little worried about you, but when you started saying nonsense, I already knew that you will lose. Thanks to your nonsense chatter, you’re now placed as a supporting role.”

Mo Cheng: “…”

The audience: “…”

What the hell is this logic?

The theory of the protagonist’s halo?

Supporting role theory?

“This is your philosophy?” Mo Cheng asked indifferently.

“Philosophy? What’s that?” Li Xin disdainfully said, “This is the theorem! Look at Mo Ling, has he ever said any nonsense before a fight? Because he felt that doing so was below his dignity, and you… Sigh, you’re destined to be cannon fodder.”

Mo Cheng’s mouth twitched a bit.

Earlier, when it was a spectator, it didn’t feel much. When it actually had a clash of words with this guy, it really had the desire to kill him immediately! It was its first time ever hating a human this much.

Damn!

“You’re so sure that you can defeat me?” Mo Cheng’s eyes gradually enlarged.

“Of course.” Li Xin took it for granted, “Because you talk too much.”

“Humph.”

Mo Cheng didn’t care, “Then give it a try.”

“To be frank, if I am to face the others, even if it’s Su Hao who’s just in the level two world realm, I won’t have that much confidence to win. However, against you…”

A sneer flashed within Mo Cheng’s eyes, “I will definitely win!”

“Oh?”

Li Xin paused for a moment.

“Because you’re weak!” Mo Cheng smirked, “Too weak! I have watched all of your previous matches. Luck? What a ridiculous thing, in front of me, there’s no such thing as luck!”

“Humph!”

Li Xin said disdainfully, “It has always been this young master pretending. Since when is it your turn to do so? Just a mere supporting character!”

Boom!

With a disagreement, Li Xin attacked immediately.

Like a thunder, an afterimage appeared, causing a cry.

This was the first time Li Xin made an all-out effort since his breakthrough. He was in an entirely different form than when he was a level one world esper! That was such a terrifying force!

Swish!

Mo Cheng also attacked at the same time.

A fist!

Using a similar punch to clash head-on!

Boom!

A shockwave flickered around them.

Mo Cheng didn’t seem to mind at all. Using its powerful beast body to face Li Xin, the battle between both broke out. A total physical confrontation, this was completely different from other battles.

“This…”

“A physical confrontation?”

The audience was also at a loss.

The battle using physical confrontation wasn’t uncommon, but it will definitely never appear against Li Xin!

At least, up until now, they have never seen it before.

Because no one dared to fight him head-on!

What is Li Xin’s talent?

Unstable Eruption!

With that damn luck, no one knew when he would generate X times of force. Even if it was Chen Xing, Li Xin’s maximum strength had been calculated in advance! One needs to know that a level one world realm Li Xin had created one thousand times critical hits before!

Then, what about the current Li Xin?

As a level three world esper, even if it was just a one hundred times critical hit, it should be enough to destroy the opponent!

Thus, who dared to fight head-on with him?

In front of them, there was one.

“Damn, this guy is so fierce!”

“It isn’t afraid of Li Xin’s critical hits?”

“Could it be that it has a great defense?”

“Who knows. But according to rumors, this guy…”

Everyone marveled.

It was the first time they saw someone fight Li Xin head-on. Just as they were waiting for Li Xin to erupt and kill Mo Cheng, both had unexpectedly clashed for a few minutes. Li Xin had not generated a single critical hit up until now. Not even a double times critical hit. Not even once! At this time, people finally realized the problem.

“What happened?”

In the audience, Su Hao and the others also looked at the ongoing fight solemnly.

At this moment, Su Hao heard Ping Yang’s voice from Kingdom of Heaven, “Damn, Li Xin’s opponent is actually it?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1020 - Persist: Never Give Up!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1020 - Persist: Never Give Up!

Chapter 1020: Persist: Never give up!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“Who?”

Su Hao arrived in Kingdom of Heaven instantly, “You know it?”

“Of course!” Ping Yang exclaimed, “This guy is a legend. It didn’t reveal any of its special traits before. If not for the trick earlier, I really wouldn’t recognize this guy.”

“Is it strong?”

Su Hao went straight to the main point.

“Strong, it’s very strong. As heaven-defying as Li Xin!”

“However, very few knew its face. In the beast domain, one only heard of its legend. I also just remembered who was so daring to fight with Li Xin head-on.”

Ping Yang’s tone sounded solemn, “Its name was rarely known but its nickname…”

“Angel of Misfortune!”

“It’s it?”

Su Hao suddenly felt horrified.

Angel of Misfortune, he had heard of this title before. Humans still paid quite the attention to strong beasts. Although the number was low, there were always some strong names reaching human ears such as this Angel of Misfortune. As for what Ping Yang said, this guy is definitely a legend.

Because…

Its bloodline power was misfortune!

Whenever he goes, no grass grows.

If one is to say Li Xin is a luck attracter, then this guy is an absolute disaster-level creature. Moreover, the effect had no regard for foes or friends. Not even its own family was an exception! In the legend, when it first appeared on the beast battlefield, it was total destruction. It wasn’t humans, but both beasts and humans! Everyone!

Then, it appeared six more times.

Each time, both beasts and humans would be wiped out; no one survived. The terrifying army was all obliterated by various unexpected accidents and natural disasters!

In fact, it didn’t even make a single move.

Of course, the existence of Angel of Misfortune had always been a legend because everyone who had seen it before had all died. That was a disaster walking creature that couldn’t be controlled.

Perhaps, only in this holographic world did it have a place.

Because this place…

It’s not reality!

However, no one thought that it would show up on the stage and happened to be Li Xin’s opponent. Just like what it said, its strength wasn’t strong. However, to generate good luck in front of it was simply a joke. One could even say it suppressed Li Xin’s main weapon and made him helpless.

“Angel of Misfortune.”

Su Hao looked at this mysterious figure and suddenly remembered the so-called grade S talent.

If…

If the bloodline of the beast is to be graded too, this guy must be grade S! Unlike Li Xin’s inexplicable luck, this guy caused misfortune to its surroundings!

That power belongs to itself!

Back in reality, Su Hao still hadn’t recovered from his shock.

Misfortune…

Who would have thought of this power?

“What have you seen?” Zhou Wang felt that Su Hao’s expression was amiss.

“Angel of Misfortune.” Su Hao sighed and roughly explained it, but everyone was stunned after hearing this. There was such a power? A disastrous power far worse than curses?

“Does that mean Li Xin is destined to lose?” Wang Jun smiled bitterly.

“Not sure, at least, he still might be able to release it within a controllable range…” Zhou Wang thought for a moment.

At this moment, Li Xin, who was in the middle of the fight, couldn’t bear it any longer. After hundreds of his attacks failed to produce a critical hit, he finally released his own force.

“One hundred times critical hit!”

A golden light appeared in Li Xin’s hand.

Everyone was taken aback.

One hundred times?

This wasn’t the previous power!

Now stepping into level three world realm, integrating World Force, if it’s one hundred times critical hit… Even Angel of Misfortune would tremble.

“Defense!”

Angel of Misfortune summoned its most powerful defensive measures.

Countless light circulated around it.

As for Li Xin, the power in his hand was getting stronger and stronger. Just when everyone was waiting for Li Xin’s move to collide with Angel of Misfortune…

Crack!

Li Xin’s accumulated strength in his fist suddenly shattered.

Buzz~

Numerous particles emerged, and the golden light dissipated into nothing.

“Huh?”

“Huh?!”

“What happened?!”

Everyone’s eyes widened. It took a few seconds before they suddenly realized the move failed!

Damn!

This was also possible?

“This…”

Zhou Wang looked at this scene in disbelief, “How is this possible? Is Angel of Misfortune that powerful that it can make the opponent’s move fail?”

Chen Yiran and the others were also quite shocked.

This was too unbelievable! One hundred times critical hit, how many times had Li Xin used this skill? How could it fail? However, the fact was it failed!

“It’s because of Angel of Misfortune.”

Su Hao narrowed his eyes and saw something, “Li Xin broke through too quickly, which is why he’s not yet proficient in using World Force. To control World Force and generate such strength, he’s still not consistent. To be precise, the success rate is only 50%.”

“50%…”

Everyone smiled bitterly.

That was quite a high probability.

Two times and one will succeed, how powerful would that be!

However, it depended on who he was against!

If it were someone else, that wouldn’t matter, but if it’s Angel of Misfortune… out of a 50% chance, it could be infinitely reduced close to zero!

Boom!

Li Xin did the same move again, but it still failed.

Failed!

Failed!

Failed!

Angel of Misfortune also understood the current situation right now and looked at Li Xin with a smile, “Little brat, no matter how many times you try, you will not succeed.”

“Because this is a power that you can never understand!”

“Luck?”

“No, in front of me, there’s no such thing as luck!”

Boom!

A cloud of dark energy burst out.

Angel of Misfortune made its move. This time, it was different from before. After this attack, it still maintained its absolute advantage, firmly suppressing Li Xin!

With physical strength alone, how would the beasts be afraid of humans?

Without critical hits, Li Xin’s power was literally sealed off.

At this moment, the audience had long been dumbfounded.

They seemed to finally understand something. This wasn’t a battle of strength but a battle of talent!

Unstable Eruption VS Misfortune!

As a result, Li Xin’s Unstable Eruption was completely rendered ineffective.

For Unstable Eruption failing to erupt, it was almost equivalent to a world esper without a talent. If one’s talent is sealed, what was there left to fight then?

Boom!

Boom!

Both clashed several times.

However, Li Xin has been completely suppressed right now. He could only barely hang on.

“He lost.” Wang Ru smiled bitterly. Everyone also felt helpless.

Luck…

Who would have thought that Li Xin would run into this guy?

Perhaps, the reason Li Xin met this beast was because of the talent issue? Maybe he got targeted by Angel of Misfortune, or is it because of the opponent’s misfortune?

Otherwise, why was Li Xin the one being matched against it out of seven humans?

The battle had already begun before the match!

Boom!

Li Xin was blasted away.

“Damn it.”

Li Xin stood up and charged at it again.

He’s a protagonist!

How could he lose?

The invincible talent of his seemed to have lost its effect now. Forget about not having luck, being unable to perform even the most basic attack was extremely bad!

“A protagonist won’t have it smooth sailing either.” Li Xin sneered, “A powerful protagonist can only transform himself after experiencing suffering. A mere beast, I will never admit defeat! Ahhhhh!”

Li Xin gave a howl and charged again.

Boom!

Boom!

A clash started again.

Li Xin had no talent, but Angel of Misfortune was useless too.

The battle between both had turned into a complete physical brawl! The powerful Rule Force in their hands only had the effect of smashing into each other…

It was similar to Su Hao.

Boom!

Boom!

Two punches crossed each other again.

The fighting pace between these two participants was getting faster and faster. Everyone could see that Li Xin was being abused!

It couldn’t be helped. Angel of Misfortune hit him with ten punches before he managed to return one. At this time, the powerful flesh of a beast finally showed its effectiveness!

Not to mention…

Angel of Misfortune was originally excellent in close combat, but Li Xin had always relied on his talent and was a bit restrained after losing his power.

He wasn’t familiar with such conditions.

If one is to ask an esper with a fire talent to suddenly erase his talent, and see how he fights! For Li Xin to be beaten like that, it was already fine because it was purely a physical brawl.

Boom!

Boom!

Li Xin could punch once per second, but his opponent could throw ten punches in one second!

What’s more, their physical quality was different to begin with!

Total abuse!

A few minutes later, Li Xin’s body was dyed red.

No matter how strong his body is, Li Xin couldn’t help being beaten like this. Li Xin had suffered many attacks all over his body. Even so, he was still getting beaten without any hope of winning.

“No outbreak…”

“Not even once!”

All humans sighed.

“I want to win!”

“I will definitely win!”

“Aaahhhhh!”

Li Xin roared, but Angel of Misfortune just sneered, “What can you use to win?”

Boom!

Li Xin’s chest received another punch.

Poof~

A mouthful of blood spewed out.

Everyone’s heart felt cold. He finally couldn’t hold on?

He was about to lose.

However, no one looked down on Li Xin!

Because Li Xin had always been supported by his luck, but he was still fighting even after losing his luck. The injuries were very heavy. If not for his persistence, what else could drive him to continue fighting? One need to know that after this is a virtual reality, the pain felt was real!

For his entire body to be like this, what kind of pain was he feeling right now?

Li Xin insisted on fighting!

Everyone couldn’t bear to watch it. As for the beast camp, their cheers were getting louder and louder. Everyone knew that Li Xin was about to be unable to continue any longer!

The battle had finally reached its final stage.

Boom!

Boom!

A series of attacks came from Angel of Misfortune.

This time, it didn’t show any mercy. Li Xin still insisted on hitting Angel of Misfortune with a punch. Although it was slow, his movement never stopped.

“He’s about to lose.”

Seeing Angel of Misfortune erupt, everyone sighed.

However, Su Hao suddenly noticed that Li Xin’s lips were squirming lightly. If one is to see closely, you will notice that he was actually counting each punch!

The number of each punch!

“What’s he doing?”

Su Hao was a bit dazed. Counting?

What does counting have to do with anything?

Could it be that a special punch requires counting? Li Xin created it? However, he had been using the most basic fighting techniques up until now… Hold on!

Su Hao seemed to understand something, and his eyes suddenly widened.

Could it be…

chapters.title: Chapter 1021 - Glory That Belongs To Mankind!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1021 - Glory That Belongs To Mankind!

Chapter 1021: Glory that belongs to mankind!

“Mo Cheng, win!”

“Kill him!”

“Kill that damn human!”

The beasts’ voices were transmitted across half of the planet. On the stage, Mo Cheng also had high hopes as it unleashed its powerful attack smoothly.

As for Li Xin, he was still struggling at death’s door. All he had was half breath of his.

How could Mo Cheng not win under such conditions?

However, no one would have thought that when Mo Cheng’s final attack was about to hit Li Xin, who was already on the verge of collapsing, when he suddenly erupted with unbelievable power!

It was unmatched!

“What?!”

Mo Cheng was suddenly shocked.

Li Xin actually managed to erupt?

Could it be that its misfortune had failed?

No, it wasn’t that…

Mo Cheng’s eyes widened. When it saw the power erupting from Li Xin’s hand, it suddenly realized that it wasn’t Li Xin’s one hundred times critical hit at all!

“This force…”

Mo Cheng watched the erupting force in horror.

Boom!

Both collided with each other.

Mo Cheng clearly saw its body shatter under Li Xin’s punch. It didn’t even have any strength to resist it. Its fists, arms, shoulder, body… Mo Cheng watched in horror as its body was bombarded and eradicated by this incredible force.

In fact, before losing consciousness, it still couldn’t believe this.

How is this possible?

How did Li Xin manage to erupt?

It was obviously not Unstable Eruption. Then, what was that?

Boom!

Just one move, and the match ended!

The audience went silent!

The cheering beasts and the gloomy humans were all dumbfounded as they watched this scene with their mouths wide open.

Li Xin…

He won?

How is this possible?

What happened in the end?

No one knew!

Could he have managed to erupt at the last moment?

He managed to comprehend it?

However, he was under the influence of misfortune!

All the audience members couldn’t understand. At this moment, the voice of the system finally rang.

“Li Xin, won!”

He won!

It was really him!

The audience went into an uproar.

Very quickly, the replay of the battle appeared. After seeing the systematic analysis with the slowed-down replay, they finally saw the force in Li Xin’s hand.

“That force…”

Many humans had their eyes widened.

Familiar!

It was too familiar!

Even any junior high school student was very familiar with this force! When this uncertainty was solved, all humans had their blood boil.

“Basic fighting technique, Fighting Essence!”

“It turned out to be that!”

“Unbelievable!”

“Haha, the battle of peak world realm actually ended up counter attacked by a basic fighting technique.”

“Li Xin is so strong!”

“Hahahaha, when this daddy goes back, I will train it one hundred times!”

The audience was extremely excited.

No one would dare to believe that the basic fighting technique would decide the final victory. One needs to know that in the later stage, this thing was basically useless!

First of all, there were very few with strong physical bodies. Rule Force could easily interrupt you. How could you use your physical body?

As for the same physical body powerhouses…

Use your head!

Everyone learnt basic fighting techniques from the start. Who will allow you to use it? They will definitely interrupt your combo in minutes! Still, dreaming for an eruption? Unfortunately…

Li Xin’s enemy wasn’t a human.

It didn’t know the basic fighting technique of mankind nor Fighting Essence. Of course, it would be even more clueless that Li Xin was condensing a force. In fact, countless viewers were clueless; how could it know? In order to quickly defeat Li Xin, it didn’t waste a single minute at all! Even if it received damage occasionally.

Thus, Li Xin was able to proceed with his plan without any hiccups.

Even if he could only throw one punch every second, even if his movements were slow, when the terrifying force kept gathering countless times and erupted…

Boom!

A perfect hit.

Victory!

In the beast camp, when Mo Cheng knew the truth of its failure, when it learned that the man who defeated him turned out to be using the most basic fighting technique, it almost went crazy!

It turned out that it lost like that?

Ridiculous!

What a sad way to end!

What lamentable fate!

Mo Cheng angrily smashed everything in its room. Within a hundred miles, many beasts died inexplicably. No one dared to underestimate Angel of Misfortune’s power.

Li Xin won.

He won without any tricks.

Because of this, no one dared to look down at him!

Look!

Even when he had no talent, when he had no luck to rely on, he could still win and defeat the ninth ranked beast, the so-called Angel of Misfortune!

Who could do so?

Without depending on luck!

This time, Li Xin received love from everyone with his display of strength and perseverance.

This was what he deserved.

“This brat…”

Wang Ru sounded emotional.

“This, this, this…”

Wang Jun’s mouth opened wide. To tell the truth, although he never underestimated Li Xin, he always thought that Li Xin won by luck.

After all, luck is also a strength.

“What a great guy.” Su Hao smiled.

After Li Xin returned, everyone cheered. Li Xin triumphantly said, “Look, I already said it’s just cannon fodder…”

Everyone laughed. This guy, really…

However, in any case, Li Xin won with his own strength.

“Who’s in the next battle?”

Su Hao and the others had no time to celebrate. After Li Xin’s victory, they quickly concentrated on the third battle. This time, it was Chen Yiran.

However, there was no suspense in the battle.

What was the strength of the beast?

Level three world realm!

What was the strength of humans then?

Level three world realm!

They were both in the same realm!

However, was that really so?

Of course not. Unlike previous level three world espers, today’s level three world espers, including Chen Yiran, constructed their World Force with perfect boundary spirits. Their World Force was more powerful than ever, many times stronger than the ordinary world espers!

It was unmatched!

How could a world constructed from ten perfect boundary spirits be something that a world constructed from one perfect boundary spirit could compare to?

It was like Heaven and Earth.

Each level three world esper was so powerful that it terrified others!

Even when they just stepped into the realm.

Thus, in addition to the terrifying Mo Ling before and the unbelievably strong Angel of Misfortune, the other beasts had no solution when facing their human opponents!

Third match, Chen Yiran won!

Fourth match, Wan Cheng won!

Fifth match, Zhou Wang won!

Sixth match, Zheng Tai won!

Including Li Xin’s match, for five consecutive matches, humans had won! There were already five humans qualified in the top eight! The seventh match was a battle between beasts. By the end of the match, five humans and two beasts were qualifying for the next round. The glory humans experienced was incomparable!

The entire world was in a sensation.

Even the beasts were dumbfounded.

The result of the battles was beyond everyone’s expectations!

Dominating the top 16?

Dominating the top 8?

Ridiculous!

The beasts no longer dare to mention their previous declaration.

In the beginning, only seven managed to proceed to the next round when determining ranks 32-16. Who would have thought that these seven humans were so terrifying that five of them had qualified in the top 8?

Except for Wang Jun, who unfortunately met Mo Ling, everyone else managed to pass to the next round!

Domineering!

Too domineering that no one could believe!

As for the last match?

Uh…

Su Hao had no hope for victory.

Everyone was well aware of Su Hao’s strength. If previously Su Hao was absolutely the strongest human, after everyone broke through, Su Hao became the weakest. However, because of Su Hao helping them to breakthrough, no one would dare to look down on him even if Su Hao lost.

Even if Su Hao lost, only three beasts qualified for the next round.

This was glory!

An unmatched glory for mankind!

Humans actually gained an advantage in the matches! Even when humans got tricked by the age limit suggested by beasts, even if they won’t be able to get first place.

The humans were completely immersed in an atmosphere of victory.

So what if there’s Mo Ling?

So what if they got tricked by the age limit?

Humans still had countless geniuses, geniuses who far surpassed the beasts!

This is a victory for them!

“Damn human!”

“How could this be…”

“Could our beasts fall here?”

Countless beasts were sad. Only three beasts out of eight? One needs to note that this was the first time ever that humans gained the advantage in numbers!

Amidst the endless noises, Su Hao appeared on the stage.

Same as before, level two world realm.

His strength remained the same.

When everyone had improved by many times, Su Hao still remained in his original strength. Even he was quite helpless.

The result of this battle was already decided when he stood on the stage.

He had tried his best.

Before going on the stage, he also specifically asked Wang Ru to send a few new talent espers. It took a few months before he managed to gather ten new talents. Unfortunately, he had seen them all!

The Federation hadn’t registered them, but he had seen them in some small counties.

The distance before his successful breakthrough was two talents away.

He still…

Couldn’t breakthrough!

Although humans won the earlier matches, he had also seen the terror of level three world espers. Those battles were not something he could participate in.

Each one of the participants was stronger than Yun Yi!

He couldn’t even beat Yun Yi; how could he defeat them? Su Hao smiled bitterly when he thought of this. Unexpectedly, there would be such days when he was behind others.

“Su Hao, good luck!”

“All the best!”

“Just give your very best!”

“All the best!”

Su Hao came on the stage, receiving countless cheers from the audience. Even Su Hao was stunned. This…

He suddenly felt warmth.

This battle, he was destined to lose. Everyone was well aware of that, but they still supported him no matter what. After experiencing countless incidents, people had been worshipping and trusting Su Hao blindly. Even if this battle were a loss, no one would blame him.

This was an incomparable glory!

Su Hao’s popularity was unstoppable!

“If I have such popularity, even if I lose, I would be satisfied.”

After the defeat, Wang Jun returned to the audience seat. He happened to see a beast next to him and became happy, “Brother, do you want to bet who wins?”

The beast gawked, “It’s you again?”

“Ah.” Wang Jun happily said, “How about this? This time the strength gap is obvious enough. Do you dare to bet?”

The beast hesitated for a moment to look at Wang Jun and Su Hao before decisively replying, “I dare not.”

“You don’t dare?” Wang Jun was a little dazed, “You’re that worried? Don’t be afraid, man.”

“Who’s afraid of you? Humph, that’s not anyone but Su Hao!” The beast murmured, “What if there’s an accident?”

Wang Jun was dumbfounded.

Damn, Su Hao’s reputation is also that strong among the beasts?

chapters.title: Chapter 1022 - A God-Like Opponent!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1022 - A God-Like Opponent!

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 1023 - The “Duang” Sound
chapters.body:
Chapter 1023 - The “Duang” Sound

Chapter 1023: The “duang” sound

Quiet.

Terrifyingly quiet.

Everyone looked at this scene in disbelief.

Just when everyone thought that Su Hao might have a chance for a counterattack, Gao Ming made another move and shattered everyone’s illusions.

A phrase.

Just a single phrase.

Su Hao’s ten minutes of condensing was rendered, null just like that!

This was simply ridiculous!

At this time, the audience was finally deeply aware of how terrifying Gao Ming was!

It turned out that that film just now, the so-called translucent defense wasn’t its real power at all? It was just a force being casually released?

This is the young generation’s second strongest?

After being truly enlightened by the scene, everyone felt cold.

If so, how strong would Mo Ling be?

Strong.

They’re too strong.

So strong that it made one desperate.

At this moment, the audience realized that this second ranked beast was so much stronger than the third ranked beast! And that phrase made everyone understand what its description meant. It turned out that it referred to its bloodline power.

The legendary Great Prophecy.

Su Hao smiled bitterly, “This is your true strength?”

Su Hao’s tiny bit of fluke had now disappeared.

Great Prophecy!

That layer of film earlier was really just a casual move of Gao Ming. He was also aware that those attacks of his earliest served to make Gao Ming get used to his attacks with the intention to create a surprise, securing his victory with the strategy. That was also something that Su Hao learnt later after securing a quantum computer.

It was simple, rough and hard to guard against.

However…

It was such a pity. Everything was rendered invalid by Gao Ming.

It wasn’t because his move was weak, but due to the huge difference in power.

World Force.

With the mastery of World Force, Su Hao’s power couldn’t even break its defense at all, let alone its own bloodline power.

The only chance to attack was easily obliterated by the power.

“Time for me to attack.” Gao Ming spoke calmly.

Su Hao heightened his senses.

As for the audience, their eyes opened wide this time, watching this scene carefully. They wanted to see how powerful this Gao Ming is. Could it easily kill Su Hao?

Everyone was paying close attention to the upcoming scene.

And all of these… were going according to Gao Ming’s plan.

Su Hao could only smile wryly. He knew everything, but he couldn’t stop Gao Ming’s ideas. He could only keep fighting like a man who only knew how to use brute force!

“Your power will dissolve.” Gao Ming aimed at Su Hao.

Swish!

Su Hao’s body flashed.

There was no attack. Looking right and left, there was no incoming attack. Gao Ming seemed to just speak at him, but Su Hao felt bad for some reason.

Power… dissolve?

Su Hao suddenly made a move.

Swish!

A cluster of light was fleeting.

He made another move.

Another cluster of light flickered again.

However, he couldn’t gather any strength.

Su Hao’s pupils suddenly contracted. What is this?

The audience went into an uproar.

Under everyone’s watchful eyes, Su Hao’s power melted. All his Rule Force had disappeared at this moment.

“Shadowless God Needle!”

Su Hao tried to create a huge attack.

However…

Only a cluster of light flashed. There was no longer any silver needle appearing.

His Rule Force got sealed!

“This guy…”

Su Hao took a deep breath.

Sealed?

Melted?

No, Su Hao could still feel his Rule Force within his body!

However, he couldn’t summon it out. Each time he invoked his force, he could feel it inside his body, but it would instantly dissolve once it left his body. This was the reason why one could see the brilliance, but not the force because the force couldn’t be released at all.

“Damn it!”

Su Hao gritted his teeth.

Shadowless God Needle, Xinghe Sword…

His only two fourth grade boundary spirits were unable to be released. Gao Ming’s casual words already caused such a scary effect.

The audience was shocked.

Looking at the audiences’ stares, Gao Ming felt satisfied. Only in this way can humans understand the might of beasts, allowing the beasts to forget about their past failures. So what if there was one less quota? The final victory would still belong to the beasts!

At this moment, what Gao Ming wanted was to build momentum.

After a long time, seeing the humans lose their morale, Gao Ming planned to end it all.

“The sinful one will be wiped out by earth and heaven!”

This sentence.

Gao Ming said it to Su Hao.

When this sentence came, everyone could somehow see the end result because they knew that Su Hao was destined to die with this sentence from Gao Ming.

Well, the difference might be how is he going to die?

Thinking of this, everyone looked at Su Hao.

At this moment, Su Hao didn’t feel any incoming crisis. At this extremely dangerous juncture, Su Hao actually slowly closed his eyes.

Within his body, the quantum computer was working like mad!

No one knew what he was doing. Even Ping Yang and the others were clueless! As the unknown power approached Su Hao, without him knowing it might do in the next instant, it was at this critical moment that Su Hao opened his eyes and light flickered!

Swish!

A cold light flashed.

Su Hao made his move, and a dazzling white light burst out of his hand, blasting towards that terrifying force.

“How can this be?”

Everyone’s eyes suddenly widened.

Su Hao…

How could he break free from the power dissolution?

All of these were just the start. When that white light was shot out, a soft sound came from the sky and earth.

Duang!

It shook the sky.

This was a completely different sound from before!

Everyone was stunned.

That harsh sound was transmitted, ignoring the holographic equipment, and passed to everyone’s ears. It was because of this that they felt disbelief.

What the hell is that?!

The world bell rang?

Yes.

The world bell rang, but that sound…

“What happened?”

“Not sure, was a new strong esper born?”

“This sound was simply unbelievable!”

“I have never heard such a sound before. What had actually happened?”

Everyone was panicking.

Because the world bell had never sounded like this before, no one knew what happened. Gao Ming, who was opposite Su Hao, was suddenly pierced by this magical sound. It felt a terrifying force coming from the sky. Its entire person was blown away with a spurt of blood dyeing the air.

“What happened?”

Gao Ming was shocked.

Which esper broke through?

How could it be affected?

And that wasn’t the end. Taking this opportunity while it was injured, the white light shot out from Su Hao’s hand and headed toward it at an incredible speed. Gao Ming was just injured and couldn’t even react before it was pierced.

However, not many saw this scene because everyone was immersed in that sound.

The entire world was shocked.

For the world bell to ring like that, it must be a huge event!

Could it be that someone had become the strongest esper?

One couldn’t blame them for making such a guess.

It was because that sound was too magical, too shocking! The match between Su Hao and Gao Ming was even suppressed by it as everyone’s attention was shifted away. However, no matter how they searched, they couldn’t find anything. After quite an effort, they then noticed a problem.

Gao Ming was injured when they were all stupefied!

Everyone’s eyes suddenly widened.

“What happened?”

“Damn, how did Gao Ming get hurt?”

“!!!”

“What happened?!”

Countless people were shocked.

“Wait, look. What’s that?!”

An exclaim could be heard.

Many people had sharp eyes, and they could clearly see dazzling, white light bursting out of Su Hao’s hand!

A phantom flashed.

The appearance of the white light was finally revealed clearly. At this moment, everyone gasped.

“This…”

“This is…”

“Shadowless God Needle?”

Countless people’s doubts came.

It’s not that they were ignorant but because they were really puzzled. What appeared in their eyes was a translucent needle, shining brightly. Under the sun’s luster, it was invisible. This was the true Shadowless God Needle, many times stronger than the previous one.

“Is that an upgraded version of Shadowless God Needle?”

“It might be…”

“Hold on.”

Someone suddenly realized something. His expression instantly turned terrified as he couldn’t believe what he just saw, “Shadowless God Needle is a fourth grade boundary spirit. As for its upgraded version…”

The audience turned silent.

The strange thing was no sound was coming from the audience.

It was terrifying silent as everyone seemed to understand something. The upgraded version of Shadowless God Needle… Gao Ming’s sudden injury… That sudden sound…

Everything seemed to be pointing to one possibility.

However, it happened that this was the only plausible possibility. They couldn’t help but swallow their saliva. Su Hao’s Shadowless God Needle actually broke through at this critical moment!

And that special sound also represented one thing….

Boundary spirit!

A fifth grade boundary spirit! A heavenly grade boundary spirit appeared!

“Is that true?”

“A heavenly grade boundary spirit, has it really appeared?”

“No wonder…”

“That sound earlier…”

Everyone was shocked.

At this moment, all the explanations connected but became even more shocking. Everyone looked at Su Hao’s figure, and their shock increased even more.

Swish!

Cold light flickered.

The dazzling white light shone brightly. Shadowless God Needle returned after a round trip.

The white light remained still.

That Shadowless God Needle was silently guarding Su Hao.

On the opposite side, Gao Ming, dressed in plain clothes, had a pool of blood dyeing its chest that constantly spread.

Everyone was horrified.

Total silence.

It was a long silence. The beast who almost gambled with Wang Jun before had a dull look this time. Could it be that Su Hao is about to counterattack and flip the situation again?

Su Hao, he’s actually this scary?

Even with such a huge advantage, we couldn’t win?

Tick!

A drop of blood left Gao Ming’s chest. It was clearly audible within the silent holographic scene.

chapters.title: Chapter 1024 - The Ultimate Killer Move, Six Seals!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1024 - The Ultimate Killer Move, Six Seals!

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 1025 - Return To The Origin!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1025 - Return To The Origin!

Chapter 1025: Return to the origin!

It was destroyed!

Gao Ming’s attack was destroyed by Su Hao again!

Under normal circumstances, three seals on one’s senses would destroy a person, no matter which three senses they were, but Gao Ming used its full strength to deal with Su Hao and sealed six senses!

However…

That failed.

The terrifying Six Seals looked like a joke in front of Su Hao.

Failed?

No, it didn’t!

Looking at Su Hao’s state, he was obviously affected by the Six Seals’ power. He couldn’t see, but he could somehow easily sense everything around him.

“How is this possible?”

Everyone was shocked.

One needs to know that Su Hao’s Rule Force had been dissolved.

Excluding Shadowless God Needle, forget about using any Rule Force or using it to sense. What Su Hao could utilize was that one Shadowless God Needle!

Under such circumstances, Six Seals actually didn’t affect him?

He could still see and hear!

Even though his reaction speed and strength had greatly declined, he could still pinpoint and counter the incoming attacks accurately and quickly, which was simply unimaginable for everyone.

Obviously, no one would have thought of it.

In this battle of world espers, Su Hao turned out to be using an origin technique in the domain realm! They would also not consider that Su Hao still had his physical type talent. After countless upgrades, his physical body alone was comparable to a world esper!

This was Su Hao’s advantage.

Under the effect of Six Seals, the advantage was obviously shown.

“Luck?”

Gao Ming made another attempt.

Snap!

Su Hao easily intercepted them.

The audience was extremely excited.

“Su Hao is so fierce!”

“Yeah, under such a situation, he still didn’t fall.”

“Six Seals is nothing more than that.”

“Haha, Su Hao is really strong.”

The humans cheered, but everyone in the beast camp were even more shocked. Under such a situation, he still couldn’t be killed?

Su Hao…

Indeed, he’s a terrifying guy.

“The atmosphere isn’t good.”

Gao Ming felt something odd.

For this battle to be this difficult, it was beyond its expectation. This battle was already in its hand to begin with, but the tide had changed with the appearance of a heavenly grade boundary spirit. Although the boundary spirit is strong, it depends on who is wielding it. Su Hao is too weak. Plus, it’s a mere needle!

The weakest boundary spirit!

Even if it’s a heavenly grade spirit, its performance was limited.

Thus, Gao Ming still occupied the absolute advantage, but no one would have thought that Su Hao was able to defend so well even with the loss of his eyesight.

Defense!

A heavenly grade defensive boundary spirit?

Gao Ming couldn’t break it!

This really made it feel sick.

Su Hao was destined to lose, but it depended on how he lost. If he was defeated in a ravaging manner like before, the blow to the humans’ morale and the increase of the beasts’ morale would be very impactful. However, once they were caught in a tug of war…

That would definitely give the audience a feeling that they were evenly matched and ended up barely winning. This kind of battle, how could the humans feel the strength of the beasts?

At this moment, the battle was developing in such a very unfortunate direction that Gao Ming didn’t want to see.

Su Hao was fine with the current development.

He just recklessly used his heavenly grade boundary spirit for defense. If he could hold for one more second, that would score him an additional point.

“Damn it.”

Gao Ming was depressed.

Several attacks were attempted again, but they were all blocked and destroyed by the fifth grade boundary spirit. Any targeted attacks would be destroyed once it approached! However, the effect without a target wasn’t strong enough to kill him, which really made Gao Ming helpless.

Su Hao was like a hedgehog.

“I can’t let this continue like this any longer.”

Gao Ming became alert.

A battle that was supposed to be exciting for the beasts was all messed up by Su Hao. Now, Gao Ming felt that its strength couldn’t be fully displayed at all…

Damn it.

Since Six Seals is ineffective, time for Nine Seals!

Gao Ming’s murderous intent skyrocketed.

The latest three seals were something it had just researched recently. It had never used it on anyone before. Plus, the consumption is enormous. Using it against one in the same realm might be ineffective because the success rate is too low!

However, facing a lower realm like Su Hao…

“Your skin won’t feel anything.”

“Your intuition will disappear completely.”

“Your sense of taste will be nothing.”

Three seals!

Three more additional seals on his senses!

Touch, intuition, and taste.

Some people used their innate intuition or even sixth sense to detect a crisis. From Gao Ming’s perspective, Su Hao was obviously like that. There were also others who could detect a crisis via skin contact with air currents. Some people could even feel a crisis with their taste buds.

And now…

Everything was sealed!

Nine Seals!

This was his strongest set of seals.

At this level, even Mo Ling would be crippled! For Gao Ming, the most important thing was would those final three seals succeed?

Swish!

An invisible force enveloped Su Hao.

Then…

The brilliance of Nine Seals slowly appeared.

“A success!”

Gao Ming’s eyes lit up.

Sure enough, no matter how strong Su Hao is, it was inevitable thanks to his realm being too low. These final three seals with a success rate of 10% against the same realm just happened to be perfect on Su Hao.

Now, Su Hao continued to have his senses sealed.

His strength, speed, reaction, hearing, sight, smell, taste, touch, and intuition were all gone. How could Su Hao resist under such a situation?

All humans squeezed their hands.

In the holographic world, Gao Ming attacked again, and a targeted attack arrived.

Swish!

Shadowless God Needle made its move again.

Boom!

A cluster of light burst, blinding everyone’s eyes.

“Damn!”

Gao Ming’s pupils suddenly enlarged.

It got blocked again!

The audience was extremely excited.

Even Nine Seals was ineffective?

Su Hao stood there calmly. Because his strength was severely weakened, he hardly had much power to move, but the moment Gao Ming attacked, he could still stop it.

Unbelievable.

Shocking.

The entire world experienced a shock from Su Hao.

This was obviously an unwinnable battle. All he could do was to struggle and defend. However, he kept shutting down Gao Ming’s attack time and time again, knocking everyone’s heart.

Su Hao was still so domineering after being affected by Nine Seals.

Su Hao’s figure looked very small but was as shocking as ever.

Gao Ming watched this scene and couldn’t make a move for a long time. At this moment, it finally understood one thing. Its desire to raise the beasts’ morale by fighting Su Hao was simply ridiculous! Such a person would never allow it to succeed. Even if he’s going to lose, he would still shock the audience.

This is a strong esper.

And also a hero.

“In the end, I still underestimated you.” Gao Ming sighed slightly.

“I never underestimated you.” Su Hao smiled lightly.

“Indeed, you can hear.” Gao Ming smiled bitterly.

Nine Seals was actually ineffective against Su Hao?

He could hear?

Su Hao shrugged his shoulder.

Obviously he couldn’t hear, but there was Synchronize Space. If he couldn’t hear, Synchronize Space would automatically translate it into subtitles based on smart lip-syncing movement detection…

Hmmm…

Chinese subtitles.

“I didn’t wish to use this move.”

Gao Ming took a deep breath, “You’re an esper deserving of respect! With this move, it would appear like I am bullying you, but sorry in advance…”

“For beasts.”

“I want a beautiful victory!”

Su Hao narrowed his eyes. Gao Ming indeed had a trump card.

At first, he still had the thought of holding on with Shadowless God Needle until the last moment for a beautiful tap out. That didn’t seem to be bad. After all, his Rule Force was limited.

However, Gao Ming wouldn’t give him such an opportunity.

“Be careful.”

Gao Ming reminded him.

It actually even reminded Su Hao?

Everyone was shocked. What terrifying thing was it about to do?

“Heaven and Earth, all living things begin from nothingness.”

“Life comes from itself.”

“Everything will eventually return to nothingness.”

Gao Ming’s voice became different. Like an ethereal voice from nothingness, it was transmitted to everyone’s ears. It was far away, yet clearly audible.

“Su Hao, you shall return to the origin.”

Swish!

The world changed.

As Gao Ming pointed his finger, the entire holographic scene began to tremble.

“Not good.”

Somewhere in the Federation.

The staff in charge of the holographic world were shocked. Urging everyone in a hurry, they began to increase the stability of the world infinitely. Otherwise, Gao Ming would destroy it. Having said that, what was that move of Gao Ming?

It actually affected the entire scene?

In the holographic world.

Poof~

A mouthful of blood spewed out.

It was bright red.

Everyone looked over subconsciously and was suddenly shocked. It wasn’t Su Hao but Gao Ming! Gao Ming made its move, and before affecting Su Hao, it actually got injured first.

“A backlash!”

“This is the effect of a backlash!”

“What kind of attack did this guy do that caused a backlash?”

Everyone was stunned.

“Puff~”

“Puff~”

Bloodstains could be seen all over the place.

Its eyes, nostrils, and ears leaked out blood…

All seven orifices were bleeding!

Gao Ming’s face looked pale.

When the audience saw this, they couldn’t help but swallow. What kind of move was it that the backlash was this strong?

That wasn’t anything but bleeding from the seven orifices!

One needs to know that when Gao Ming used Nine Seals, it had no effect at all. For a move to have such a backlash, that terrifying power…

The whole audience looked at Su Hao.

Right now, light rays around Su Hao flickered. When Gao Ming used its final move, it even gave up on maintaining all the previous effects, which included Nine Seals. It wasn’t because it lacked strength, but Gao Ming felt that under its final move, Su Hao couldn’t resist at all!

“Is that so?”

Su Hao’s eyes flickered.

Illusion Reality, nothing. He couldn’t feel it!

“What kind of attack is it?”

While Su Hao was still thinking, an inexplicable force suddenly fell from the sky. Shadowless God Needle burst out as usual but…

Swish!

Shadowless God Needle just pierced through it without any effect!

Boom!

That force arrived.

Su Hao’s entire body shook. All his defenses were ignored, and the surging force hit Su Hao without causing any damage. Then…

A cluster of light wrapped around Su Hao.

In one second, Su Hao’s skin became fairer and seemed to be younger, but at this moment, Su Hao’s face changed drastically because he suddenly discovered that his strength…

It had gone back to one year ago!

chapters.title: Chapter 1026 - Choose A Good Way To Die
chapters.body:
Chapter 1026 - Choose A Good Way To Die

Chapter 1026: Choose a good way to die

“What happened?”

Everyone at the scene watched this scene strangely.

Gao Ming’s terrifying attack didn’t cause any harm to Su Hao, but turned him younger instead. With his white and tender skin, that was simply a beauty weapon. However, immediately afterwards, everyone saw Su Hao’s expression change.

In the air, a cluster of light flickered.

That was the scene of Su Hao fighting against Gao Ming. The strange thing was the scene above was flickering very quickly, and it turned out to be playing reverse order!

Each of Su Hao’s breakthroughs was shown.

The weird thing was the scene above was akin to a movie being rewound. Of course, the scene was a mess since most people couldn’t comprehend at all because the speed was too fast!

In just that one second, the scene had changed a lot.

As for the audience with some strength, they seemed to have noticed something.

“Su Hao’s strength seems to be declining?”

“He got weakened again?”

“No, he wasn’t weakened, but it seems more like he has such strength to begin with?”

“What do you mean by that?”

Everyone was in a daze. They looked at Su Hao carefully, only to realize that Su Hao’s strength had become so weak that he might not even be a world esper.

“What happened?”

At this moment, someone seemed to have realized something from those few scenes. His face was suddenly shocked, “Su Hao returned to as he was a year ago!”

“What?!”

Everyone was shocked.

“A year ago! Returning to the origin, that was what Gao Ming’s attack is all about?”

“There was really such a force?”

“It’s impossible, right?”

Everyone looked at Su Hao with a hint of horror, yet they clearly noticed that Su Hao’s strength was exactly the same as a year ago. What was even more frightening was the process was still ongoing.

Yet another second passed, and the time jumped again.

“Two years ago!”

Everyone was horrified.

Sure enough, Su Hao’s strength had returned to two years ago.

Another second passed as time jumped again.

“Three years ago!”

Everyone trembled.

In just three seconds, Su Hao had been reduced to a dog. What changed wasn’t only his strength, but he became younger under this attack’s influence.

Returning to the origin!

It turned out there was such a force?

This wasn’t a Time Force but return!

There was also no consumption.

The time didn’t change either. When Gao Ming made this move, there was only one result. Su Hao would be forcefully regressed until when he was a baby!

The ending had already been decided the moment Gao Ming attacked.

The time was still ticking.

“Four years back!”

At this time, Su Hao’s strength was even more obvious. Almost everyone could sense Su Hao’s strength. Four years ago, at that time, Su Hao had just entered Zhanzheng College not long ago, right?

His strength was without doubt within the professional realm!

Another second passed.

“Five years before.”

At that time, Su Hao had just entered the natural selection class, and his strength was so weak! In fact, he returned to the time when his origin ability was a mere ten points.

However, the time still hadn’t stopped. Su Hao kept reverting back to his past strength!

Yet another second passed, and Su Hao became an ordinary person.

Another second passed, and Su Hao returned to his freshman year.

Even Su Hao’s Model Analysis was gone…

“It’s over.”

When everyone saw this scene, no one dared to speak.

No wonder Gao Ming dare not use this attack because this was an absolute trump card. Because it was too terrifying, the backlash was too strong!

Returning to the origin!

It can make a person go back to babyhood!

The time was still ticking, but everyone knew that Su Hao no longer had any possibility of a counterattack because Su Hao had now become an ordinary person.

A thoroughly ordinary person.

That force was truly reverting one back to the origin!

At least, in this holographic world, that was the case.

This was a power belonging to gods!

Everyone’s expression had become complex. No one knew that Su Hao, who was in the center of everything, was unprecedentedly peaceful…

“Sure enough, I am about to lose.”

Regarding failure, Su Hao didn’t mind. Everything was within his expectations.

However, to lose in such a way…

Sure enough, Gao Ming was so powerful that it gave one goosebumps.

As time went on, he could clearly feel his power gradually disappearing. This wasn’t about time, but regressing to the beginning. Su Hao even could even feel his life reversing. That strange feeling…

Peak domain realm, domain realm, peak professional realm, professional realm, specialized realm, basic realm…

Everything returned back to the beginning.

This was the strength of Gao Ming.

Su Hao knew his body best. When he returned to his days in the third year of junior high school, everything was gone. His Model Analysis was gone, and there was nothing left for him.

He seemed to have really returned to the beginning.

“It’s about to end.”

Su Hao sighed.

Since this was about to end, why not take the chance to feel it. Just as he was thinking about it, a thought suddenly came into Su Hao’s mind. Since all power of his disappeared, then Kingdom of Heaven…

Swish.

Su Hao’s heart skipped a beat.

He actually could enter Kingdom of Heaven!

“This…”

Su Hao was stunned.

Immediately he woke up, yes, Kingdom of Heaven was different from the holographic world. More precisely, Kingdom of Heaven wasn’t in the holographic world at all but in reality. It belonged to his true power. Due to the fact that he had an extra consciousness in reality, he could easily enter here.

Kingdom of Heaven was linked to reality but not the virtual world.

“Slow down time.”

Su Hao arrived in Kingdom of Heaven and decisively delayed the time.

Right now, Li Tiantian and the others were looking at Synchronize Space with gusto, “Hahahaha, look. Su Hao was exactly like this fool in the oast. Let me tell you, that time…”

“What are you all talking about?” Su Hao leisurely interrupted.

“Damn.” Li Tiantian shivered in fright.

Everyone turned their head around as if they had seen a ghost, “During the match, you still have the time to come over here?”

“Why not?”

Su Hao pointed his finger.

Everyone then realized that everything in Synchronize Space was frozen. The scene on the virtual screen also went still. It wasn’t that the real time was locked, but the time here had infinitely doubled.

“What’s wrong?”

Everyone felt a bit strange.

One need to know that the current Kingdom of Heaven wasn’t like before. To accelerate time this much, with Su Hao’s power, that effect wouldn’t last long, right?

“I need to find the method to crack it.”

Su Hao pointed at the void and replayed the earlier scene.

One second.

Two seconds.

Three seconds.

…..

After Li Tiantian and the others finished watching, they were also helpless.

This kind of attack, even replacing him with someone else, they still wouldn’t be able to hold on, right?

Of course, there was also another possibility.

That it was someone as powerful as Mo Ling, when Gao Ming had a backlash, he could easily kill Gao Ming in seconds, but how many could do so?

Up until now, Gao Ming was still sound and safe!

“It’s a bit similar to time.”

Li Tiantian’s eyes narrowed.

He had the heaven-defying time reversal ability. Thus, he naturally knew what returning to the origin meant, but to perform it to such a degree…

“Even the time talent isn’t capable of doing so.”

Li Tiantian shook his head, “Time talent could increase the time infinitely with Time Force consumption. I can only hold it for a few seconds, but twenty years? This move of his isn’t about time but something about returning back to its origin. It looked similar but completely different in nature.”

“I have no solution!”

Li Tiantian came to a conclusion.

Su Hao wasn’t shocked. He just held on a glimmer of hope.

“This doesn’t make sense.”

Ping Yang inserted a sentence while pointing toward Su Hao, who was in the holographic world, “Let me ask you. Even if there’s a method to counter it, can you still use it?”

Su Hao went speechless.

That seemed to be true?

In the holographic world, everything was over.

Su Hao had returned back to the time when he was in the third year of junior high school. He had lost his Model Analysis. Even if he found a way to counter it, even if he could interrupt the move, he was now an ordinary person. What could he achieve under such conditions?

Everything…

It was really over.

Su Hao sighed and began to ponder.

“Why are you not leaving then?” Ping Yang glanced at him, “There’s already no solution. What’re you even thinking about?”

“I am thinking about a better way to die…” Su Hao quietly replied.

Ping Yang and the others thought about it. That sounded logical. If he were to be killed like this, that would look too ugly. To become a baby…

Even the thought of it made them feel bad.

Su Hao fell into deep thought. He was really pondering on how to have a good way to die. After a while, he happened to have thought of something!

Although he had become an ordinary person in the holographic world, that was irreversible but…

What if the remaining effect of returning back to the origin was stripped off?

Su Hao had a whim.

Under normal circumstances, that would be impossible, but now this was an abnormal situation. Returning back to its origin belonged to a unique force or Su Hao would have defended against it. Then, Kingdom of Heaven was also a special force. Although in the holographic world, Su Hao was now an ordinary person.

However, if he’s to borrow Kingdom of Heaven’s strength…

Maybe the holographic world could be introduced into Kingdom of Heaven and then refracted to the real world?

“Perhaps I can give it a try.”

Although he couldn’t change back like that, he would remain at the standard of year three junior high standard. At least, he could die in a more dignified manner.

“I can give this a try!”

Su Hao made a decision immediately.

When Li Tiantian and the others heard Su Hao’s decision, they just ran away. They didn’t want to be affected. If they were turned into babies here, they wouldn’t be able to reverse the effect.

Buzz~

Su Hao returned to reality.

Stretching out his hand under everyone’s surprised look, that force suddenly disappeared.

Swish!

Terrifying force flew into Kingdom of Heaven.

Su Hao’s mind was now at his highest point as he immediately connected to reality. Just when these two forces were about to burst, Su Hao’s mind suddenly had a bulb light up.

No matter who, this force wouldn’t be suitable to be placed on.

However…

What if he’s to put it on others?

It seemed that Su Hao had thought of something. His eyes lit up, and Su Hao soon reflected this terrifying force onto two people in reality.

One of them was Wang Jun!

chapters.title: Chapter 1027 - Breakthrough: A Glorified Advance!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1027 - Breakthrough: A Glorified Advance!

Diversion!

The terrifying power that was supposed to hit Su Hao, after turning him into a junior high school student, was diverted by Su Hao and transferred to other people.

Not only that…

It was in the actual world!

One had to admit this was simply a fraud, especially when one of them was an acquaintance.

Wang Jun was watching the match when he suddenly felt something strange happening to his body. His face had a drastic change. Leaving virtual reality, he was horrified to discover that his strength was decreasing, and the symptoms were exactly similar to Su Hao. There was another person too!

Two powerful world espers, their strength was diminishing.

“What is happening?”

Wang Jun was shocked.

Just like that, he watched his strength free fall.

From level three world realm to level two world realm to level one world realm to peak domain realm, Wang Jun couldn’t help but be terrified.

It was at this moment that a scanning force swept across him.

Su Hao’s Model Analysis casually arrived. These two men, which included Wang Jun, were the strong espers he specifically selected because they…

They were super talented!

With the emergence of returning to the origin, they finally regressed to their time as domain espers.

It was because of this that both of their ability talents had returned!

At this moment, Su Hao’s eyes lit up. How long had he waited for this scene?

“Hahahahah!”

Su Hao laughed wildly.

Swish!

“Model Analysis!”

“Talent copy!”

It wasn’t within the holographic world but in reality!

In reality, Su Hao’s ability was activated, and these two men’s talents were copied instantly. Within Su Hao’s body, those one hundred and eight thousand talents were finally gathered after so long…

Boom!

A terrifying aura shot up into the sky.

If not for the holographic device being protected by Su Hao, it would have been destroyed just now! After all, that was an indescribable force…

How strong was Su Hao?

Everyone was well aware of this.

However, who would have thought that Su Hao was just a domain esper?

A domain esper confronting a level three world esper?

That was totally impossible!

However, it was the truth.

However, now the situation has changed. A carp has turned into a dragon, and Su Hao has waited a long time for this moment! Being enveloped by golden light, his body flashed brilliantly. This scene shocked Wang Jun, who was still suffering from the losses earlier. Forget about himself, what was going on with Su Hao? He was still in the middle of a match!

Boom!

Wang Jun rushed over.

Then, he saw an unbelievable scene.

…..

In the holographic world, the overall situation had pretty much been decided. Everyone was just seeing whether Su Hao would turn into a baby or not.

However, no one expected that when Su Hao casually waved his hand, that terrifying force that reversed Su Hao actually halted.

It disappeared without a trace.

As for Su Hao, he just stabilized himself as a year three junior high student.

“What happened?”

“Not sure…”

“Gao Ming’s force was exhausted?”

“Su Hao probably did something.”

“Impossible, Su Hao obviously doesn’t have any strength left!”

Everyone was shocked.

As for Gao Ming, his face revealed a shocked expression. However, he quickly reacted and smiled indifferently, “As expected of Su Hao, under such a situation, he still managed to crack my attack. Unfortunately, it’s too late! With your strength from your third year of junior high, do you even have a tiny bit of power left?”

Yes, he was right.

The current Su Hao was just a mere year three junior high brat.

“Time to end this.”

Gao Ming stood proudly.

Swish!

A bright light blasted down.

Even though Su Hao prevented himself from becoming a baby, he still couldn’t fight back against this terrifying attack. Everyone knew that when this attack landed, Su Hao would definitely die.

“It’s finally over.”

Without knowing why, all the beasts were feeling relieved at this moment.

It was strange.

Obviously Gao Ming had the advantage. Obviously Su Hao could only defend. Obviously Gao Ming didn’t even suffer any injury, but why did they feel relieved?

Forget about it, it’s finally over anyway.

Yes.

At last…

The bright attack blasted down and fell on Su Hao.

Just when the audience was about to witness Su Hao’s death, suddenly a terrifying aura burst out from Su Hao’s body.

Boom!

Bright golden light headed straight to the sky!

Heaven and Earth shook.

The entire scene had a change of color.

The golden light was so bright that one couldn’t see any other color.

Su Hao just stood there. His appearance as a junior high school student returned to normal in an instant. His entire body shone like a god.

“Again?”

All beasts were stunned.

When is it going to be over?

Why is it so hard to fight against Su Hao?
