Moreover, the changes in this breakthrough had left everyone clueless. In fact, many people felt a terrifying crisis!

What was actually going on?

Boom!

Golden light shone as Su Hao stood still.

At this moment, before everyone managed to react, a strange sound resounded through the sky.

Duang!

It was a magical sound that swept the entire world.

Swish!

The audience went into an uproar.

“That sound again!”

“Could it be that Su Hao made another heavenly grade boundary spirit?”

“Get lost! Heavenly grade boundary spirits aren’t some Chinese cabbage. You think you can make it as long as you wish?”

“No, it isn’t that. Although the sound is similar, the meaning is different. This is a breakthrough into the world realm, a blessing of the breakthrough!”

“What?”

Everyone was horrified.

Boom!

Boom!

Golden light appeared.

Not only the Su Hao in reality, even the Su Hao in the holographic world recovered to his peak state.

Perfect!

This is Heaven’s blessing, ignoring illusion and reality!

However, this scene frightened the audience and Gao Ming!

“Hold on…”

“Heaven’s blessing?”

“Su Hao broke through? He broke through at this critical moment? Well it’s understandable that he broke through during this crisis, but why did he receive the blessing from Heaven?”

Yes.

Everyone couldn’t understand it.

That magical sound, the blessing from Heaven, signified to everyone that this is a breakthrough into the world realm! Moreover, it was by no means an ordinary breakthrough; otherwise, it won’t be that heaven-defying.

However…

Wasn’t Su Hao a world esper?

Why could he still breakthrough?

Everyone was at a loss.

As for Su Hao, who was immersed in the golden light now, he was enjoying the long-lost glory! This feeling of power surging was simply too cool!

Kingdom of Heaven!

It was transforming.

Countless golden light poured in, transforming Kingdom of Heaven. Kingdom of Heaven was already incredible to begin with, but it had now turned into a real world under the golden light’s transformation!

Li Tiantian and the others all watched this scene in shock.

One hundred and eight thousand talents; they were finally gathered!

Everything in the world began to operate on its own. Although not all one hundred and eight thousand types of talents could be seen, they acted as a foundation, a nucleus. With this core, in the future, the world would be able to develop new talents on its own and become a real world similar to reality!

This would then be Su Hao’s world!

Buzz~

Su Hao didn’t need to even feel that new powerful force present in Kingdom of Heaven. He knew it was the feedback from this newly born world.

It was so powerful that one could hardly believe it!

At the same time, Su Hao’s own Rule Force transformed under the golden light. His Realization force transformed under the golden light! In his body, his Realization that was only using origin energy directly skipped Rule Force and was converted to World Force!

A qualitative change.

An incredible qualitative change.

At this very moment, Su Hao directly stepped into the level three world realm while enveloped in the golden light!

Boom!

The terrifying aura skyrocketed.

Everything was still changing, and everything was still going on.

Su Hao’s strength continued to surge, and after everything received the blessing from the golden light, the light rushed towards Su Hao’s body again. In just a moment, Su Hao’s body stepped into the world realm! Regardless of other Rule Forces, Su Hao’s body alone had reached the world realm!

That was a terrifying progress.

An unbelievable breakthrough!

“This…”

Wang Ru and the others were shocked, looking at this scene.

Then, Wang Ru soon felt something was amiss because Wang Jun suddenly sent a message over, “Senior, in reality, something isn’t right with Su Hao.”

“What?”

Wang Ru and the others were taken back.

Swish!

Everyone went offline at the same time, returning to reality.

Could it be that Su Hao used some forbidden techniques?

Or perhaps overdrafting his potential? This was just a match. To resort to such means and destroy his own future, that was obviously not worth it.

Everyone returned to reality in shock.

Then…

They were all stunned.

Golden light, endless golden light enveloped Su Hao. It turned out that this wasn’t a breakthrough in the holographic world but a breakthrough in reality that affected the virtual world too?

In the beast domain, Heavenly Emperor Mingguang and even a group of powerful beasts felt this breakthrough.

“No, this is…”

“A breakthrough?”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang was stunned.

Su Hao?

How could this be?

A guy thought to be a level two world esper suddenly broke through from the domain realm. How could this not be a surprise, but Mingguang soon understood the truth.

“What a Su Hao.”

“His ability to fight against those in higher realms is so strong, not any worse than Su Tiancheng.”

“Too bad…”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang was somewhat regretful.

“Too bad?”

His subordinates were stunned.

If Su Hao really made such a breakthrough, how strong would he be?

Too bad?

Why would it be too bad?

“His breakthrough is very different.”

Mingguang revealed a casual gaze, seeing through space as if he could see the current Su Hao, “Ignorance is really a terrifying thing…”

“Neither Su Tiancheng nor I would dare to make such a breakthrough.”

“Su Hao.”

“Hehe.”

His subordinates were even more confused, hearing these.

What does it mean by not supposed to breakthrough like that? In their mind, they thought it was pretty normal though?

Could it be that there’s a secret to this breakthrough?

Mingguang didn’t bother to pay attention to the doubts of his subordinates, “Although I don’t know how you did it, to have Rule Force first and then breakthrough, this is simply an illegal breakthrough…”

“Illegal breakthrough?”

His men couldn’t understand, but they knew at least one thing.

Su Hao is in trouble!

“Boss, if Su Hao is in trouble, won’t the first rank be confirmed to be ours?”

“First rank?”

Mingguang was rejoicing in someone’s calamity and soon remembered something when he heard his subordinates’ words. He frowned subconsciously, “It shouldn’t affect the plan, right?”

“Damn it.”

Mingguang smiled bitterly.

His plan!

He must never let Su Hao interfere with his plan!

However, now….

“Could it be that I have to make a move in the end?”

“Hold on…”

“In other words, this bastard Su Hao caused trouble, and I have to help him resist it?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1028 - That Damn Chain Again!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1028 - That Damn Chain Again!

Chapter 1028: That damn chain again!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

At the same time when Su Hao broke through, the world shook so much that it even shook the sky.

He didn’t have the world imprint to begin with. No matter whether it was illegal or not, he wouldn’t be detected by any regulation. However, it was such a pity that his breakthrough into the world realm conflicted with the entire world’s rules. The perfection of Kingdom of Heaven had finally enraged the law enforcement team.

This was understandable.

The former Su Hao was akin to a stand-alone software without an internet connection. Whether you activate the cheat or not, nobody would know and care about it.

However…

The moment you broke through, you need to be connected to the internet in order to do so.

Then, here comes the trouble.

Quickly run for your life! The GM is coming for you soon.

Of course, this was just a figure of speech, but it was very similar to Su Hao’s current situation. The most helpless thing was that only very few people knew the world’s deepest secret, and Su Hao only knew very little of it.

“Warning, warning.”

“Someone violated Regulation 293.”

“Sensing the creation of a new world, breaking through illegally, requesting punishment!”

“Request completed. Mission released.”

“Goal: Kill Su Hao.”

“Beginning mission. Law enforcement team dispatched.”

At the top of the world, vivid golden light emerged.

A group of girls came out from it. Under such vivid scenes, this was an extremely gorgeous view, but when each girl looked cold and full of murderous intent, this scene wasn’t that great anymore.

These girls were law enforcers!

Boom!

The space scattered.

Each of these people had amazing capabilities.

The law enforcers were being dispatched.

If Su Hao saw this scene right now or expanded his 2D map to the entire world, he would be surprised because this group of girls had already locked onto him! Like the automatic navigation of a car, the quickest route automatically appeared between them and Su Hao.

Buzz~

Within the space shuttle, the law enforcers were quick.

If nothing else happened, it would only take a few minutes for them to reach Su Hao and kill him! However, just as they were passing through the beast domain…

Boom!

A strange aura shattered the space shuttle.

Light escaped from the shattered space channel.

All the law enforcers were taken to another space.

“Who?”

A cold snort could be heard.

Even when these law enforcers face such a situation, they still do not have any fear shown on their faces. They just turned coldly and looked at the darkness in the void.

In the dark, a figure gradually walked out.

Upon seeing this, the leader of the team frowned slightly, “Mingguang?”

“!!!”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang’s pupils suddenly shrank, “You actually know me?”

Damn it!

Aren’t all law enforcers created creatures?

These creatures created out of nothing shouldn’t have any consciousness!

Although she had a near-perfect body, she acted more like a robot as she couldn’t think independently at all. Right now, this girl actually called his name.

Of course.

Forget about the law enforcers being able to identify people.

After all, the top of the world is omnipotent, but… what the hell with that tone of hers?

Was she confused?

How could this be something an artificial being can feel?

Mingguang felt strange.

“Of course.”

That law enforcer pointed at Mingguang, full of killing intent, “When Su Tiancheng kidnapped my sister, weren’t you the one who stopped me?”

“Damn!”

Mingguang finally recalled who she was.

Back then, he and Su Tiancheng met the law enforcers. A huge battle happened, and they narrowly won.

Su Tiancheng analyzed the weakness of the law enforcers and took one of them away. As for him, he decisively stopped another law enforcer who tried to chase after Su Tiancheng.

Of course, he didn’t know what happened afterwards.

All he knew was after the incident, Su Tiancheng seemed to have changed.

He gave up everything…

And returned to Jianghe City.

“I thought law enforcers are always cold and ruthless.”

Mingguang seemed to understand something, “It turns out that you actually have consciousness. So, the changes that happened to Su Tiancheng in the past was because of that law enforcer’s instigation?”

Yes.

Instigation, that was the only explanation Mingguang could think of.

“What nonsense?!” That law enforcer girl was furious, “You obviously took my sister away! Where’s she now?”

“Who knows!” Mingguang sneered, “Su Tiancheng is already dead. How could that thing still be here?”

“You’re the thing!” The law enforcer girl gritted her teeth, “Heaven and Earth undergoes changes, do you think that the only thing that changed is your beasts? You’re wrong. During the chaotic era, the beasts gained wisdom, and we law enforcers also gained wisdom! However, because of the regulations, most have been obliterated.”

“Only a few of us survived and hid well.”

“Hold on…”

Mingguang suddenly thought of something, “Gaining wisdom? I thought you all appeared when the chaotic era occurred?”

That day the entire planet changed!

Everyone thought that it was on that day that the top of the world appeared. At least, that was what Su Tiancheng and Mingguang thought.

“No.”

The law enforcer girl sneered, “We have existed since long ago.”

“It’s just that you’re too weak to detect us. As for the chaotic era…”

The law enforcer girl no longer said anything.

However, this exchange, one could imagine the shock! It turned out that the top of the world had long existed? It turned out that it wasn’t when the chaotic era happened?

The truth of this world was different from what he originally thought?

Mingguang’s brain was a bit confused.

He felt that it was necessary to revise his plan. Of course, if he could capture this young girl, perhaps he would know the entire truth.

“Hehe, I thought you all only acted based on orders, so I have never considered that.” Mingguang sneered, “It seems that if I am to capture you, I will know more things, right?”

“You’re simply courting death.” The law enforcer girl said with cold eyes, “You have violated at least ten regulations today and prevented me from completing my mission. If this is known…”

“That won’t happen.” Mingguang sneered, “You all are already inseparable.”

Buzz~

Infinite brilliance shrouded them, and a great battle broke out somewhere.

At first, Mingguang just planned to resist the law enforcers for Su Hao. Never would he have thought that there would be an unexpected joy. He couldn’t take action on them here, nor could he do about it at ordinary times. However, the moment when they were dragged into a different space, the ending was already decided!

A few minutes later.

The battle was over.

Several girls were beheaded, and the only one remaining alive was that leader.

“Look at yourself…”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang looked at her slowly, “I am still pretty kind, right? Since you have activated your spiritual wisdom, then answer me. What’s the secret of this world?”

“I can’t say it out loud.” The law enforcement girl shook her head, “Although I have wisdom, I still can’t say anything because of the restrictions. Besides, even if I know, I will never tell you!”

“Restrictions?” Mingguang pondered, “Well, then let me retrieve your memory.”

“Not going to tell me?” Mingguang sneered.

Swish!

Grabbing her head with his big hand.

Endless brilliance shrouded the girl, who possessed the strength of half step strongest esper, but facing Mingguang, a true emperor-ranked beast, she was still not his opponent. The law enforcement girls closed her eyes slightly, and one could sense despair in her eyes that had never been seen before.

However, at this moment, when no one expected it.

Boom!

A long chain cut through time and space.

Bang!

Mingguang’s dark hand shattered on the spot as the swinging chain flashed with endless brilliance in the void. It didn’t only cut the hand, but the external space was shattered.

“Return!”

“Sending information about the mission.”

“Mission failed, return!”

Countless words popped out of the law enforcement girl’s mouth. She looked at a fleeing figure with a somewhat complicated expression and flew away like that.

Mingguang’s hands trembled.

He dared not chase!

At this moment, the law enforcement girl had already resumed her contact with the top of the world. Once he attacked, he would be destroyed!

Damn it.

Just when he was about to succeed, that chain appeared out of nowhere…

Although he couldn’t see it clearly, if he didn’t guess incorrectly, there is only one person in this world who possesses such great strength, that bastard Su Tiancheng!

“Su Tiancheng!” Heavenly Emperor Mingguang hated him, “This daddy has worked so hard to wipe your son’s ass, and yet you tried to take advantage of me? Damn you, damn you!”

How could he not be filled with hate?

He had been exchanging moves with Su Tiancheng for so many years and never won before!

In the Federation’s training room, Wang Ru and the others were still in shock.

“What happened?”

“What is his breakthrough?”

“Is he entering level three world realm?”

Everyone asked a series of questions.

“I don’t know.” Wang Jun looked up blankly, “I feel that wasn’t it. As soon as I came out, I already saw him breaking through. Moreover, I clearly felt that his breakthrough…”

“What happened to his breakthrough?”

Everyone asked hastily.

“It’s a breakthrough from domain to world realm.” Wang Jun smiled bitterly as he said what he dared not even believe.

“What?”

Everyone was taken aback.

“I just felt so…”

Wang Jun knew they couldn’t believe it.

“No, this feeling…” Wang Ru also clearly sensed something, “Well, we can only wait until Su Hao awakens. Let’s go back to the holographic world.”

It took quite a while for the infinite golden light to slowly vanish in the holographic world.

When the golden light ended, everyone knew that Su Hao broke through! Although they didn’t know why and how he did it, the current Su Hao was obviously extremely terrifying!

“World Force…” Gao Ming was stunned, “You have stepped into level three world realm?”

“Yes, you’re right.” Su Hao took a leisurely step forward.

“That sound of world bell earlier…” Gao Ming stared at Su Hao, “Could it be that someone also happened to breakthrough into the world realm at the same time?”

Gao Ming asked a question that everyone wanted to know.

“Of course not.” Su Hao smiled cruelly, “In fact, I have forgotten to tell you just now. I was only a domain esper, and I only broke through just now.”

Boom!

The world had an uproar.

Everyone looked at him in disbelief. The previous Su Hao had always been a domain esper?

chapters.title: Chapter 1029 - Seven Arrows To Pierce The Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 1029 - Seven Arrows To Pierce The Heart

“No, impossible!” Gao Ming exclaimed, “How could you be a domain esper?”

Yes.

How is this possible?

If Su Hao was a domain esper…

Then his previous opponents, those world espers he eradicated before and even Gao Ming who fought with Su Hao to such a degree, how could they have any face to meet others?

Damn it!

Level three world realm versus domain realm!

They actually couldn’t defeat him?

How could this be?

“Why not?”

Su Hao leisurely explained, “Do you know why your Nine Seals are useless against me? Unfortunately, I am using the origin energy to sense my surroundings. Thus, your seal… is ineffective against me.”

Origin energy…

That was actually the case?

Gao Ming was shocked.

Was that the reason why Nine Seals failed to stop him?

However, at a stage of level three world realm, who would have thought one’s opponent was just a domain esper? This was simply the damn truth.

“How could you have Rule Force then?!”

Gao Ming seemed to have found an excuse, “You obviously have boundary spirits…”

“Who said that one can’t use Rule Force without stepping into the world realm?”

Su Hao smiled indifferently, “Seeing that I couldn’t breakthrough into the world realm, in desperation, I could only create a Rule Force of my own. Do you still remember the world bell ringing in the Su family?”

“When I fought against Tian Gang, although I lost everything, I was lucky enough to gain Rule Force from the battle.”

Su Hao calmly spat out the truth of the past.

Every sentence of his was sufficient to cause an uproar.

“Don’t you all wonder why I can help others create boundary spirit, but I can’t do so myself?” Su Hao revealed his white teeth.

“Because my Rule Force was too little.”

Su Hao explained, “The reason why I could only condense two types of boundary spirit was because I have too little Rule Force. All my Rule Force was obtained externally. Thus…”

“The amount is very minute!”

“I can’t even cultivate or improve it.”

“This is also the reason why I am using Shadowless God Needle because it saves Rule Force.”

Su Hao freely explained.

Opposite of him, Gao Ming looked as if it had seen a ghost. The audience was completely stupefied. All these words of Su Hao, any ordinary man won’t even think of it, right?

Domain realm?

Are you trying to tease me?

However, if everything was true, then what is Su Hao’s current realm after his breakthrough?

“Then, your current realm…”

Buzz~

A cluster of force appeared in Su Hao’s hand, “Sorry, but I have entered level three…”

Gao Ming: “…”

The audience: “…”

Level three!

Having not broken through for several years, he instantly jumped to level three once he broke through!

This was simply a legend!

Although they could already guess it from Su Hao’s World Force, hearing Su Hao confirm the fact, they didn’t know what expression to show on their faces.

World realm, level three?

What the hell was that!

Total silence.

The audience turned silent.

As the audience didn’t speak a single word, Gao Ming had an even weirder expression.

There were too many twists and turns in this battle, and the ending was too unbelievable for everyone.

If Gao Ming knew that the reason for Su Hao’s breakthrough was entirely by relying on its returning to the origin, how would it feel? The strength it displayed ended up helping Su Hao to breakthrough instead?

This was simply the most ridiculous thing in the world!

The battle was flipped instantly.

Su Hao stood there without being anxious at all. He needed to familiarize himself with his new power, and isn’t the current Gao Ming the best opponent for it?

As for failure?

Hehe.

Su Hao smirked.

As a domain esper, he didn’t even fail, so how could he fail after his strength increased tremendously? Even if he didn’t make a move, Su Hao could feel that his power was at least a hundred times stronger than before! Rule Force is by no means comparable to origin energy, and World Force is by no means comparable to Rule Force.

Now, in just one leap, Su Hao reached a new peak.

“Haha…”

Gao Ming laughed in a self-mocking manner, “Sure enough, you’re worthy of your reputation, Su Hao. A legendary character, but even if you breakthrough, you’re just on the same realm as me.”

“Plus.”

Gao Ming sneered, “You shouldn’t have done it, revealing your trump cards. Since you used energy to escape the seals before, what about now?”

“You now only have Rule Force, can you avoid it?” Gao Ming gave a cold grumph and immediately attacked.

“Your strength will be weakened.”

“Your speed will be restrained.”

“Your reaction will become slower.”

“Your eyes will lose their sight.”

“Your ears will hear nothing.”

“Your nose will be unable to smell.”

“Your skin won’t feel anything.”

“Your intuition will disappear completely.”

“Your sense of taste will be nothing.”

Nine Seals.

Its first move was directly Nine Seals.

Nine auras shrouded Su Hao. Just like Gao Ming mentioned, since he had escaped from the catastrophe through origin energy before, how could Su Hao avoid it now with Rule Force?

“You will die by your own proud hands.” Gao Ming sneered.

Su Hao was now in the same realm as itself. Nine Seals, the final three seals might not succeed, but as long as a portion of them succeed, it would be enough to reverse this situation.

Su Hao sighed, “Seems that you still don’t understand.”

Su Hao just leisurely took his steps forward, completely ignoring Nine Seals, “When I was a domain esper, you could surpass me in everything, but it was still a difficult fight. After I stepped into the world realm, my strength soared and would definitely not be any weaker than yours! What’s more, my strength continued to increase and step into level three world realm.”

“We are in the same realm.” Su Hao coldly continued, “But our strength isn’t on the same level.”

Boom!

Su Hao grabbed at empty space.

Without using any tactics, he just grabbed Nine Seals and squeezed his right hand lightly, forming a soft sound.

Crack!

Nine Seals… was crushed?

Such a powerful move could be crushed?

Everyone opened their mouths wide.

This…

The difference in strength was that terrifying?

“No, it can’t be!”

Gao Ming’s eyes turned red. It finally realized one thing; that the flow of this battle had changed. It was no longer the dominant one. Right now, Su Hao was already in an absolute advantageous position.

“How could this be?”

Gao Ming was still at a loss.

It still didn’t know how it ended up like this.

Six Seals?

No, that was useless!

It could be used against the same realm, but just as Su Hao mentioned, his strength had completely surpassed it. What should it do then?

A leapfrog challenge!

Gao Ming took a deep breath.

It was very accurate in positioning itself.

To be able to evaluate itself as the one who dominated a weak esper to a weak one who had to leapfrog challenge in a few seconds, Gao Ming’s response was worth mentioning.

For a leapfrog challenge, Gao Ming naturally had to change its routine completely.

The best solution was also the killer move, the one and only!

Returning to origin!

“I have used it once. Logically, I shouldn’t use it again, but if I don’t do so, only failure awaits! It will be a shame if I can’t even enter the top eight. Anyway, even if I have to use a forbidden technique, I have to use it again. Let’s see how you are going to resist.”

Gao Ming responded extremely quickly.

Seeing that Su Hao was so powerful, it naturally knew that ordinary methods would be useless. That being the case, it had to resort using its strongest move then!

Just now, Su Hao wasn’t able to resist it!

“You were just lucky to be able to breakthrough and revert to normal!”

“What about now?”

Gao Ming’s fighting spirit broke out, “Could it be that you are going to breakthrough again and become the strongest esper?”

Swish!

Gao Ming made its move.

“Earth and Heaven, all living things begin from nothingness.”

“Life comes from itself.”

“Everything will eventually return to nothingness.”

“And Su Hao, you will return to the origin.”

That familiar voice was here again. When the ethereal voice rang, everyone knew that Gao Ming was using that same powerful move again.

It could actually use it twice a day?

Everyone stood up nervously. They knew that if this move succeeded, it would be enough to reverse the universe!

Boom!

Terrifying force blasted out.

When Su Hao saw this scene, only a smile appeared at the corner of his mouth — using the same trick to deal with him, and a trick that he had cracked previously?

This is…

Truly ridiculous!

Swish!

Su Hao stretched out his hand.

This time, he didn’t wish to endure this attack. A terrifying black hole appeared and absorbed the force, transferring it into Kingdom of Heaven. This time, Su Hao decisively threw it to the lowest level of Kingdom of Heaven, the terrifying Purgatory.

Over there, quite a number of guys were sealed, right?

Su Hao stood there in the holographic world and just waved his hand to destroy the force lightly, stunning everyone. This… this was the previous killer move?

The gap…

It was too huge!

After all, that was returning back to the origin!

“Now, it should be my turn, right?”

Su Hao looked at Gao Ming while revealing a playful expression.

Upon seeing this, Gao Ming didn’t hesitate to summon its defensive moves. Layers of translucent film emerged, and it even used its prophecy force.

Obviously, it wanted to emulate Su Hao and defend!

Dragging out the battle!

“It’s a pity that you’re not me.” Su Hao coldly said.

Buzz~

Xinghe Arrow appeared, and a bright light emerged. It was Xinghe Arrow condensed with World Force, shining in dazzling light.

Swish!

First arrow!

Boom!

As it was shot out, Gao Ming’s defensive layers were penetrated one after another. Thus, it hastily used Prophecy Force to build its defense again before managing to stop it.

However, Su Hao had shot the second arrow!

Its defense was destroyed and rebuilt.

Third arrow!

Over half of its defense was destroyed and rebuilt.

Fourth arrow!

Its defense was wiped out completely.

Fifth arrow!

The defense was destroyed, and Gao Ming suffered an injury.

Sixth arrow!

The terrifying brilliance pierced through Gao Ming.

“Seventh arrow.”

Su Hao lightly let it fly.

Swish!

The stars flickered.

The seriously injured Gao Ming didn’t even have the time to react. Just like that, it was nailed to the arena by this terrifying arrow. Its heart was pierced again!

Second ranked beast in the genius list.

Gao Ming.

It was nailed to death in the holographic arena by Su Hao’s seven arrows!

Su Hao won!

chapters.title: Chapter 1030 - A Strong Start!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1030 - A Strong Start!

Chapter 1030: A strong start!

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

Gao Ming lost.

It lost in such a heroic way.

Seven arrows were needed to pierce its heart, and Su Hao showed no mercy. When he broke through, the result was already determined. His momentum when reaching level three world realm wasn’t something that anyone could stop!

Boom!

The world was in an uproar.

When the battle ended, Su Hao’s battle scene was replayed countless times on the virtual screen.

Classic.

They were all outstanding scenes!

Whether it was when he was only a domain esper and dared to fight against level three world espers, or the shocking, gorgeous breakthrough to seal his victory.

Su Hao caused an uproar again.

In the audience, the beast who hadn’t bet against Wang Jun earlier took a deep breath. At first, it only thought that Su Hao wouldn’t be that easy to deal with, but who would have thought this would be the end result? Su Hao actually won! Fortunately, it didn’t gamble with Wang Jun earlier or else…

At the same time, Su Hao went viral all over the world.

Friends who missed the match were called over to watch the replay, and Su Hao’s breakthrough easily topped the chart in the topics list.

Of course, for the beasts, that seemed like a big issue.

Battle of Glory, the pre-quarterfinals finally ended.

Then…

There were only two beasts left?

Only upon this realization did the beasts take in a breath of cold air.

Two!

Yes, only two qualified.

One was the powerful Mo Ling, and the other was a level three world realm beast who fought against another beast, but it wasn’t strong. Most likely, it would fall in the next battle! When this truth was realized, the beasts felt extremely painful…

Battle of Glory, humans were totally ahead of them!

Not only this time, but also the next rounds.

Even if Mo Ling and that beast won, it would only be a tie, but was that possible?

Compared to the strength shown from the breakthrough via ten perfect boundary spirits, the beast was only an ordinary level three world esper and was probably the weakest one among the eight.

This also meant that.

From now on, the hope of the beasts…

Is only Mo Ling alone!

There was no more else.

“How could this be…”

“6 to 2…”

In the beast camp, countless beasts muttered to themselves. Obviously, in any case, they would have never thought that the battle would be completely reversed right before the quarterfinals!

The so-called top ten beasts in the original genius list were easily abused.

This was simply too sad.

Hydra was nearly dumbfounded.

All sorts of messy battles had caused Hydra’s brain to be stunned that he revealed his original body.

“Look at those trash.”

“That’s right. If we divided ourself, we could participate, right?”

“Ha, when we divide ourself, if we’re to count the age, I am within 30 years old.”

“Shut up everyone!”

Hydra shouted angrily, which caused the atmosphere to quiet down.

Divide himself and participate?

Let the other heads participate?

Nonsense!

This is the Battle of Glory.

Besides, the scale of this battle had reached level three world realm. Whether it was Gao Ming or Su Hao, that wasn’t something that Hydra could participate in once he divided himself.

“Seems that the top four is no longer within our reach.”

Hydra sighed.

Of course, the top four he meant was excluding Mo Ling.

Because in his heart, Mo Ling was the well-deserved first place. After all, that guy is…

Right now, the only thing that worried him was Su Hao.

It was because Su Hao’s strength was too weird. If he as a domain esper could compete against level three world espers, how strong would he be after breaking through to level three world realm? What was even more interesting was that after his breakthrough, he didn’t reveal any special strengths.

The only thing he did was use Xinghe Arrow!

An upgraded Xinghe Arrow by an unknown number of times!

As for other powers?

Of course not!

Su Hao didn’t reveal them at all.

If his previous moves were all based on origin energy, what about Su Hao’s Rule Force after his breakthrough?

No one knew!

#Su Hao’s breakthrough.

#Su Hao’s Rule Force.

#Su Hao’s victory.

#Su Hao’s counterattack.

#”Duang” cry

…..

All kinds of topics were spread on the Internet, and it was total chaos. This pre-quarterfinals of the Battle of Glory had brought too many surprises to people.

In the Federation’s training hall, when the battle was over, Su Hao was also surrounded.

“Damn, Boss, you’re too fierce!” Li Xin’s eyes lit up.

“How could you hide it from us that long!” Chen Yiran rolled her eyes.

“Cough, cough.”

Su Hao quickly surrendered, and various explanations were mixed up. There was no other way, the existence of Kingdom of Heaven was a secret, and he would never let anyone know about it.

Fortunately, the secrets of this world aren’t too difficult to keep.

The parts that Su Hao didn’t explain, everyone knew why.

Soon, their topic was focused on how Su Hao broke through, which made him recall that he had diverted the effect of returning back to the origin to other people.

“Where’s Wang Jun?” Su Hao finally remembered.

“Wang Jun?”

Everyone looked at each other and was taken aback.

True, why wasn’t Wang Jun here?

He can’t be turning into a baby right?

Su Hao’s heart skipped a beat.

At this moment, Wang Jun walked in with a refreshing look. When Su Hao took a closer look, Wang Jun was still a world esper as if he wasn’t affected at all.

Huh?

“Are you alright?”

Su Hao felt a bit strange.

“Me?”

Wang Jun scratched his head and remembered, “Don’t remind me of it. Just now, without knowing why, I was also affected by that damn returning back to the origin. My strength began to drop, and that scared me to death. Fortunately, that force wasn’t strong. After I cultivated for a bit, I gradually recovered my strength.”

“Oh.”

Su Hao nodded in surprise.

It seemed that his guess was right. After all, the force had been shunted thrice. Of course, if he guessed incorrectly… um…

They could only remember Wang Jun’s contribution.

After all, this was for the glory of mankind!

However, Su Hao also predicted that although Gao Ming’s force was powerful, it wouldn’t take long before the original strength was recovered even if one turns into a baby. Otherwise…

When one was about to die, wouldn’t he be saved with this one session?!

Wouldn’t one become immortal then?

This pre-quarterfinals wasn’t far from the quarterfinals. Moreover, those who needed to pray ended up being the beasts instead.

Humans were on the dominant side.

After this battle, there was no doubt that Su Hao was the strongest human! The first ranking that no one dared to dream of, after Su Hao finished overwhelming Gao Ming, the people’s cheers became louder and louder.

Su Hao was finally qualified to fight Mo Ling.

The real championship battle!

A few days quickly passed.

Su Hao, Chen Yiran, and the others literally mastered their newly earned power in the past few days. In just this short period of time, they achieved perfect mastery. Seeing Su Hao proficient using his World Force, Wang Jun and the others all complained. Su Hao had just broken through, how could he be more proficient than them?

Regarding this, Su Hao could only smile lightly.

This wasn’t a joke.

Who knows how long he had been in contact with Kingdom of Heaven?

As for Little Dark Room…

During the time when they just broke through, Li Xin once suggested that everyone go to Little Dark Room to master their new power, and… without any surprise, everyone left in disgust.

That kind of loneliness and endless nothingness, not everyone could bear it!

After coming out, everyone was full of admiration when they looked at Su Hao. When he was trying to create a boundary spirit, Su Hao stayed in it for a long time!

Just as everyone was training, the quarterfinals arrived.

This time, humans were the ones enjoying the advantage!

Su Hao sat in the contestant stand and could hear the audience’s voices soaring to the sky! That couldn’t be helped, having the absolute advantage of six to two, how could they not be excited?

As for the beasts, their expressions weren’t looking great.

They didn’t have much hope.

Their only hope was the beast who advanced together with Mo Ling could meet the weakest one among the humans and win by luck.

In this way, at least it would be a tie in the semifinals!

Two versus two.

However, when the list of the matches was announced, all the beasts were dumbfounded.

_______________

Quarterfinal Matches

_______________

Li Xin versus Wan Cheng.

Chen Yiran versus Zhou Wang.

Mo Ling versus Zheng Tai.

Su Hao versus Xuan Ming.

_______________

The first three matches were fine, but the final matchup…

Su Hao?

Damn!

The weakest beast actually met Su Hao?

All the beasts were too helpless to complain. What the hell was that?

Would the battle still be suspenseful?

Of course not!

In the first battle, Li Xin made his appearance.

During the training, those two had already fought each other countless times. This time, it was just a performance. In the end, Li Xin was easily defeated by Wan Cheng. This was a battle between humans and beasts. There was no need to expose all of their power.

In the second match, Chen Yiran versus Zhou Wang.

Both turned the scene upside down by randomly throwing things. One could see ice and thunder on the stage. In the end, Chen Yiran was defeated, and Zhou Wang reached the semifinals.

What concerned humans the most was the third match.

Mo Ling versus Zheng Tai.

What was the strength of these two?

It was similar to the previous match of Gao Ming and Su Hao, a sharp contrast!

Mo Ling overwhelmed Zheng Tai.

However, Zheng Tai was still a level three world esper. Although he wasn’t considered strong, when facing Mo Ling, he should be able to force him to make a second move, right?

That was everyone’s thought.

In the holographic world, the match slowly revealed itself.

Mo Ling was expressionless as before, as if he didn’t care about this battle. On the other hand, Zheng Tai could be seen sweating nervously.

The match began!

Swish!

Without any hesitation, seeing the match start, Zheng Tai went invisible without a delay.

Invisible.

Hiding within shadows.

That was a set of smooth moves.

His purpose was simple. As long as he didn’t let Mo Ling kill him in one move, he would be able to see Mo Ling’s other tricks. Even if he can’t win, he can always force a few more tricks, right?

Just then, Mo Ling took action.

Swish!

Space shook.

Endless blue light flashed.

That familiar move reappeared. A wave of fluctuation by Mo Ling reached Zheng Tai, and just when it was about to hit the target, Zheng Tai disappeared.

However, Mo Ling didn’t pay attention to Zheng Tai at all. After the fluctuation flashed, the excess amount of force turned into the familiar arc-shaped fluctuation.

Swish!

Zheng Tai just disappeared like that.

It took quite a while.

When the words “Mo Ling won” popped out, everyone was stunned.

It ended just like this?

It was still one move!

A flicker and fluctuation, that never changed!

After being invisible, Zheng Tai was killed without even having a chance to show himself. There was no doubt that that terrifying fluctuation could ignore space!

The audience went into an uproar.

chapters.title: Chapter 1033 - Precisely, I Want You To Divide
chapters.body:
Chapter 1033 - Precisely, I Want You To Divide

Chapter 1033: Precisely, I want you to divide

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

Six!

Everyone was shocked.

After perfectly trapping Wan Cheng, those three light balls bombarded Wan Cheng’s defense at the same time and transformed into six perfect light balls.

Wan Cheng was able to avoid the crisis.

However…

Six balls!

Damn it.

Without any doubt, these six balls would be enough to destroy Wan Cheng in just three seconds! Three light balls were sufficient to stop him, how about six? However, different from everyone’s expectations, Wan Cheng had an extremely calm expression. It was as if he didn’t bother with those six balls at all.

Boom!

Those six light balls charged toward him.

Wan Cheng retreated suddenly.

“He’s trying to avoid?”

Everyone muttered to themselves.

These six light balls crossed, forming a perfect arc to attack Wan Cheng. However, these six light balls converged and seemed to be condensing. That was where Wan Cheng was before. In theory, those six light balls would pass by and once again attack Wan Cheng from another angle.

However, nobody expected Wan Cheng to make his move.

Boom!

Endless Wave Force blasted down.

The Wave Force within Wan Cheng’s hands that he had held for so long erupted like a tsunami!

Boom!

Boom!

Two forces collided with each other.

Everyone couldn’t help but widen their eyes. What is this Wan Cheng trying to do?

Could it be that he had found a solution?

However, when the light formed from the blast ended, everyone’s heart skipped a beat because everyone saw that there were six more light balls on the original position. Twelve blue light balls are neatly arranged there like planets.

“This…”

“Twelve?”

“What is Wan Cheng trying to do? Trying to gather the dragon balls to summon Shenlong?”

“Is this mitosis or amitosis?”

Everyone couldn’t understand it.

If he just steadily fought it, the fight could be delayed for a while even if he lost. Perhaps he might even find a way to crack it, but looking at the state, Wan Cheng was simply courting his own death.

Yes, courting his own death.

If one is to say everyone wasn’t sure previously, then when Wan Cheng made his next move, they couldn’t help but open their mouth wide. Damn, he’s simply courting his death.

Boom!

Endless waves crashed.

Before it managed to even react, Wan Cheng attacked the six light balls that just formed a moment ago. In fact, Wan Cheng’s attack hadn’t stopped at all.

Because everyone could see that this was a combo attack!

Boom!

Under the suppression of the violent waves, it was obviously a notch stronger than before.

Boom!

Twelve light balls slammed toward the Wave Force.

The familiar brilliance bloomed again.

The cracking sound was endless. When the light vanished, everyone was speechless because they saw twenty-four light balls. However, even though they had the time to express their opinions, Wan Cheng erupted his strength again.

“Again?”

Boom!

Endless Wave Force came.

This was the third move.

Wave Force, one layer after another, they were stronger than before.

Even Mo Ling couldn’t understand. What exactly was Wan Cheng trying to do? Could it be that he knew he couldn’t last long and decided to die after a meaningless struggle? If that was the case, it would fit those with a hero mindset, for example… someone like Li Xin.

However, was Wan Cheng such a person?

He wasn’t sure.

However, against a weak enemy, Mo Ling didn’t need to bother wasting his thoughts.

At this time, everyone could see that Wan Cheng was attacking at full force.

One could fail, but not in a meaningless style. Since he couldn’t win, he might as well use his best move to show his final glory!

Without knowing why, no one had an objection.

Theoretically, Wan Cheng should develop a new trick to counter Mo Ling and create a better opportunity for Su Hao. This was the right move, but looking at the current Wan Cheng, everyone understood his intention.

Fight for glory.

Boom!

Light ray burst.

Forty-eight light balls flickered.

However, since Wan Cheng wanted to use his full strength, how would he stop here?

Boom!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the fourth move.

Ninety-six light balls!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the fifth move.

One hundred and ninety-two light balls!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the sixth move.

Three hundred and eighty four light balls!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the seventh move.

Seven hundred and sixty-eight light balls!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the eighth move!

One thousand five hundred and thirty-six light balls!

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, the ninth move.

Three thousand and seventy-two light balls!

…..

“Madman!”

This was everyone’s thought.

No one would have thought that this division would be so terrifying after Wan Cheng used his full strength. When Wan Cheng made his ninth move, the earth had a quake as the mountains and seas moved, but Mo Ling was even more terrifying. In the holographic world, there were more than three thousand light balls all over. They literally covered every spot!

If they were all to charge at the same time, Wan Cheng would definitely die without any ashes left behind.

Now, it was no longer a question of whether or not to hide. Instead, there was no place to hide!

As long as there was a window of time for Mo Ling, this match would be done in seconds without any suspense.

However, Mo Ling had no time because Wan Cheng never gave him the time.

Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves one after another, with a time interval of less than 0.1 seconds, where would Mo Ling have the time to make a move? Right now, the ninth attack arrived, but another Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, which was Wan Cheng’s tenth time using, already bloomed in Wan Cheng’s hands again. This should be the final move, right?

Everyone sounded emotional.

After this move, Wan Cheng would go down.

Mo Ling had only made two moves up until now.

The first move, the invincible suppression was finally countered by Wan Cheng. However, this second move of Mo Ling, the endless light balls, was obviously more terrifying.

To be more accurate…

There was no solution.

Buzz~

Wave Force in Wan Cheng’s hands condensed and illuminated endless brilliance.

A bright light erupted from his hands, but different from everyone’s expectations, what Wan Cheng used this time wasn’t like the previous tsunami-like Wave Force, but a concentrated beam of light condensed to the extreme. This was the condensation of Wave Force.

The last move of Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves was a single target attack?

Swish!

Before everyone reacted, the light beam slammed onto the endless light balls. Moreover, that terrifying light beam was like a laser. After approaching the light balls, it took the initiative to form an arc.

“This…”

“A light beam that can turn?”

Everyone’s thoughts came to a halt.

This scene was too strange. Forget about the light balls travelling in an arc and turning around, this light beam also did the same.

While they were under this shock, that last move of terrifying Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves, that beam actually penetrated countless light balls and headed toward Mo Ling.

Boom!

It hit the bullseye.

Swish!

Everyone’s eyes widened.

Mo Ling got hit?

This isn’t a joke!

What about his Flashing through Space?

Just flash through space, wasn’t that something easy for Mo Ling?

However, he didn’t do so.

Mo Ling was hit without having the chance to flash. What was even more frightening was that he was currently controlling more than three thousand light balls with terrifying energy. Unfortunately, the last beam attack of Wan Cheng had almost no attack power. Its only function was…

Interference.

Boom!

Mo Ling’s control of the light balls ceased momentarily.

A light ball suddenly burst.

That terrifying force dissipated, covering the surrounding light balls. Then, the others also spread one after another, causing the most terrifying blast in history to appear.

Boom!

Boom!

The holographic world was in complete darkness.

No one could see anything.

Their eyes could see nothing but dark blue light. With over three thousand light balls bursting, they covered the entire holographic world.

The entire holographic world was shaking.

At this moment, everyone became dumbfounded.

So, this was Wan Cheng’s purpose?

This genius with amazing understanding had thought of a counter. Mo Ling, you’re so strong, right? You can control the light balls, right? One is fine, ten are fine, then how about one hundred, one thousand, or ten thousand? Even if you can control so many light balls, do you have the ability to watch out for other things?

Of course not!

Thus, Wan Cheng’s seemingly final moment of full strength was the last resort!

It was because of this that Mo Ling, who controlled more than three thousand light balls, had no way to evade when faced with a sudden attack. Of course, he might not even want to evade.

How much damage could Wan Cheng’s attack harm him?

Not much.

Regarding this point, Wan Cheng knew this very well.

Even with a full blow, he estimated that it wouldn’t be able to break Mo Ling’s defense. Thus, Mo Ling didn’t care at all. How would he know that Wan Cheng’s trick was just acting as interference?

Boom!

Boom!

The holographic world was still shaking.

It lasted for a long time.

That terrifying force was enough to surpass any previous battle. After Wan Cheng made his move, he ran to a corner of the holographic world to hide.

At last, the light ball eruption came to an end.

When everyone raised their head, they suddenly took a deep breath.

The entire holographic world had been completely destroyed. The ground that had been reinforced for so many times, had countless seemingly endless holes.

The audience suddenly had a thought.

If…

If it wasn’t for Su Hao proposing to fight in a holographic world, what would happen in reality?

If such a battle was to occur in reality? This scene was too shocking, and they dared not look at it. This was without a doubt a heavyweight disaster.

Right now, when the audience saw Mo Ling, they were also amazed.

The current Mo Ling was in a bit of sorry state. His clothes weren’t broken, but they were already in tatters. His entire person looked extremely gloomy. It was obvious that he was injured from the explosion earlier. Wan Cheng couldn’t break his defense, but his own attack could.

What bad luck…

Everyone was shocked.

Mo Ling.

This existence with infinite shock and mystery to humans was finally touched by Wan Cheng. See, he wasn’t invincible.

In the holographic world, when Mo Ling approached Wan Cheng step by step again, one could see the soaring anger in his eyes.

This was a first.

This was his first time being injured, and it was by his own attacks too.

Damn you!

There was endless coldness in Mo Ling’s eyes. He didn’t speak, but Wan Cheng could see the meaning in his eyes. A smile appeared at the corner of Wan Cheng’s mouth. He just sneered at Mo Ling.

“Come then.”

“I will wait and see!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1034 - The Berserk Mo Ling
chapters.body:
Chapter 1034 - The Berserk Mo Ling

Chapter 1034: The berserk Mo Ling

Flashing through Space.

It had been countered.

Infinite Division.

It had been countered.

Wan Cheng perfectly solved these two tricks by Mo Ling that could be called invincible. In fact, it was under the state when Wan Cheng didn’t suffer any injuries, and Mo Ling received quite the damage.

This situation finally made Mo Ling very angry.

Buzz~

Behind Mo Ling, a translucent pike appeared. One couldn’t identify its composition, but the pike head had an unusually scary brilliance.

“What kind of technique is this?”

Swish!

Mo Ling reached out his hand, and the pike whizzed out.

Boom!

Endless aura moved together with the pike.

Like a tiger descending a mountain, the wind screamed while the pile head illuminated an unbelievably dazzling light that pierced through the time and space!

“Not good!”

Wan Cheng couldn’t feel it from a distance.

Infinite Wave Force was summoned, forming defensive layers in front of him.

However, it was useless.

Snap!

Snap!

One after another, the defensive shields were destroyed.

The penetration of the long pike was unstoppable, like a hot knife cutting through butter. It even destroyed nine layers of defense made from Wan Cheng’s Wave Force before finally halting. That really shocked Wan Cheng into cold sweat.

This freaking strength…

Just then, Mo Ling made another move.

Swish!

Space shook.

“Huh?”

“Isn’t this Flashing through Space?”

“Mo Ling is planning to use that trick again?”

Everyone was shocked as they looked at Mo Ling. However, they soon realized that that wasn’t the case. This was because Mo Ling didn’t appear next to Wan Cheng this time and didn’t attack him, which is why Wan Cheng was unable to counter it. Just as he was approaching, there was an extra pike behind Mo Ling.

“Damn it!”

“That thing again.”

Wan Cheng’s complexion changed drastically. He had seen its power just now. To be from such a close range…

Swish!

“Weather Whiz!”

That terrifying pike struck again.

Wan Cheng literally summoned out all his strength.

Defense!

Defense!

He could only defend for now!

However, after having experienced it twice, Wan Cheng quickly remembered Su Hao’s Seven Arrows Piercing Heart. Applying the experience he had at that time, he immediately made changes to his defense. It turned out that the effectiveness had increased by a small margin.

The second attack was blocked.

Swish!

Flashing through Space.

The pike struck again!

Mo Ling shot from another direction.

Wan Cheng grit his teeth. He quickly made changes based on the combination of experience from dealing with Su Hao and Mo Ling. His defense evolved again and made a brand new version.

Bang!

The power of the pike was neutralized.

Although it was a bit difficult, it managed to be stopped again.

Swish!

Swish!

One after another, terrifying pikes came.

From numerous directions and angles, Wan Cheng became more proficient in changing his defense. In the end, he was able to perfectly tame that terrifying spear amazing to the crowd.

This heaven-defying comprehension!

However, would Mo Ling’s rampage stop because of this?

From the start, since he began his rampage, Mo Ling’s attacks have never halted. Seeing Wan Cheng blocking his attacks, Mo Ling just showed a sneer and then…

Swish!

Another incoming pike!

That was a little different from the previous attacks.

The momentum and color of this pike were by no means comparable to before. The pike erupted like a dragon! Not to mention its attack power, that pike that shot out from Mo Ling’s hand was by no means comparable to the previous one. Each pike of his was extremely furious!

Boom!

“An all-out attack?”

Wan Cheng made a guess and became even more alert.

However, unexpectedly, when the long pike came, it penetrated without any hindrance, ignoring all of Wan Cheng’s defenses!

“A non-offense type?”

Wan Cheng was shocked.

Only non-offense types could ignore his defense!

However, when Wan Cheng lowered his head, he saw bloodstains appear on his chest. There was no change to his body, but he could feel that his heart had been pierced.

“This…”

Wan Cheng’s eyes widened.

Suddenly remembering the previous attacks, he suddenly came to a realization. So that was the case?

Boom!

Wan Cheng fell to the ground.

Mo Ling.

He won.

The whole audience went silent.

Wan Cheng’s several attacks seemed to give people hope. However, just when it was obviously impossible to lose, he lost. At this time, people realized Wan Cheng’s opponent wasn’t anyone but Mo Ling. One was a newly promoted level three world esper while the other was at peak level three world realm!

Wan Cheng’s defense aside, have you ever seen Mo Ling’s rampage before?

Ten pikes in a row!

An attack, which literally never stopped, decisively took Wan Cheng’s life away.

Who could compare with such strength?

The semi-final battles ended just like that.

In the end, there were only two opponents who won, Su Hao and Mo Ling. Between them, it was a battle that all humans and beasts expected. The final match to decide the victor!

The next battle will determine who the Glory Battlefield would belong to!

The semi-final was over.

Wan Cheng returned to the training hall with a wry smile.

“How do you feel?” Su Hao asked, “That final moment, how did you lose?”

“Yeah.” Li Xin’s eyes were wide open, “How did you get stabbed to death in one move?”

Stabbed to death, everyone wiped off their sweat. Li Xin’s terminology…

“Overlaid.”

Wan Cheng sighed, “My Ten Thousands Overlapping Waves is overlaid to begin with. How could I ignore this factor? At this time, thinking about it carefully, each time Mo Ling attacked, I had a strange feeling. At first, I thought it was the suppression of momentum.”

“Now it seems that…”

“It should be the so-called overlaying.” Wan Cheng said.

“Damage stacking?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

“No, it’s not damage.” Wan Cheng shook his head, “If the damage is superimposed, I will definitely feel it, but that feeling, it seems like, how should I describe it? At the final moment, I seemed to have lost all of my strength and was locked on. There was no way to dodge or defend!”

“Lock on…”

Su Hao seemed to understand something.

Penetration.

What was the specialty of the pike?

Penetration!

After being overlaid countless times, each time the overlay would hide its penetrating property and wait for the last moment before combining all the effects together. The penetration hidden in Wan Cheng’s body would erupt simultaneously, and then one hit would secure the kill!

“Penetration?”

Wan Cheng was shocked.

“Wait…”

Su Hao let Wan Cheng calm down and specifically called Zhao Feng over.

This time, instead of letting Zhao Feng use space to penetrate, he used a spear to aim at Wan Cheng in the same way to let Wan Cheng feel it himself.

“It was this!”

Wan Cheng was shocked, “Although it’s weak, I felt a similar kind of force.”

“Now, that’s right.”

Su Hao already understood.

So far, Mo Ling has revealed three moves.

The first move, Flashing through Space. The second move, Infinite Division, and the third move was this Piercing Pike, which has a terrifying overlaid penetration ability at the same time.

“To be able to force him to use this third move, Senior Wan Cheng is already powerful enough.” Su Hao smiled.

“Unfortunately, if I could block that move, maybe we could see his fourth move.” Wan Cheng said regretfully.

Everyone also joined the discussion.

“Do you have the confidence?” Wang Ru asked softly.

“Nope.”

Su Hao shook his head, “Mo Ling has too many cards. You can clearly see that in the previous battles. Even if Wan Cheng forced his first move to be ineffective, he still planned to defeat Wan Cheng by the means of Flashing through Space. If not for Wan Cheng’s freakish comprehension, perhaps he might have fallen under the second move.”

Wang Ru also had the same thought.

Wasn’t that the case?

Any normal opponent, how would one resort to using only one move?

However, Mo Ling kept using the same move.

Even when Wan Cheng countered it.

However, as soon as Wan Cheng was injured, he kept using Flashing through Space, trying to drive Wan Cheng to death. This was an extremely cautious opponent.

And the same thing all over again the second time.

Seeing that Flashing through Space was invalid, Mo Ling was ready to use the second move, and if Wan Cheng couldn’t crack it this second move, it would continue using it.

The third move was the same!

With Mo Ling’s power, can’t he just use his full force to take Wan Cheng out?

He could!

But he didn’t do so!

Because if he really dared to use all his strength at once, even if he killed Wan Cheng in a second, all of his cards would be exposed. Thus, he was extremely cautious in using every single trick and never revealed an additional fact.

This was a terrifying opponent.

Su Hao was extremely alert.

Moreover, he didn’t say any nonsense.

From the start to the end, the fight against Wan Cheng was in full swing. Even when he got injured by Wan Cheng, he didn’t say a word. It’s either you attack or retreat.

All these qualities were extremely precious.

Only God knew how many people had been counterattacked by opponents because of too much nonsense. Out of all unique traits, the one most prominent on Mo Ling was his concentration, which made him even more terrifying.

That same day, the video of Mo Ling’s rampage was released.

It wasn’t known how many people had started to study the counter methods on the Internet. They might not be strong enough, but they could still offer some help through deduction and analysis. However, how would they know that there is a quantum computer within Su Hao? No one could compare to that with deduction and analysis alone.

#Help Su Hao to get first place.

#Battle of Champions

#Ownership of Glory Battlefield

…..

This was the topic that everyone was paying attention to up until now.

Especially in the last few battles, the glory obtained by humans had been quite amazing. Under Su Hao’s support, a team that was destined to fail at first had produced a brilliant success.

Now, there was only one more thing humans wanted, which is to bring home the championship.

The championship was unattainable at first, but now had turned into a reachable opportunity! The one who might bring them the championship was none other than Su Hao, who had already brought them countless glory.

Miracles and glory, Su Hao had created them too many times.

So countless of Su Hao’s fans chanted for him to win the championship. They firmly believed that Su Hao would definitely win. To be able to make a perfect comeback and reach level three world realm gorgeously, and his Seven Arrows Piercing Heart that killed Xuan Ming, the current Su Hao had this qualification!

As for the beast camp, they naturally cheered for Mo Ling.

The final battle was the most important one.

In fact, the Federation higher-ups even deduced that the beasts must have been preparing some big conspiracies, and these conspiracies were related to the Battle of Glory. Thus, they must win!

The next day.

Ten o’clock in the morning.

The battle of champions began!
