chapters.title: Chapter 1038 - The Glory Of A Pseudo-Emperor!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1038 - The Glory Of A Pseudo-Emperor!

World.

This is a power belonging to level three world espers.

Now that Mo Ling had been suppressed to the extreme, he finally decided to release the strength of his world, Earth Returns to Spring. The scenery changed, and Mo Ling finally regained his ground.

This was the advantage he enjoyed.

Having been a world esper for so many years, his understanding of the world was by no means comparable to Su Hao. Even though Su Hao is powerful, he had just condensed his world. How could Su Hao compare to him?

“Not good.” Wang Ru also remembered this fact, “World, this is a battle of worlds!”

“For example, something like Tian Zi’s?” Chen Yiran asked in shock.

“Yes. In addition to the basic confrontation between level three world espers, there is a more terrifying duel, which is the duel of worlds! After all, a world is the root of every level three world espers. Unless it’s a battle of life and death, it will never be used.”

Wang Ru slapped his head, “However, this is a virtual world!”

“What Tian Zi used was an incomplete version.”

“It’s just that because he’s a human, he will have this ability.”

Wang Ru smiled bitterly.

“You all just entered level three world realm. So, you can’t properly condense a world and use it yet. As for the beasts, under normal circumstances, they wouldn’t know these things. After all, they rely on their bloodline. Even a world esper is called venerable grade. Whether they have a world or not, that’s still debatable, which is why I forgot to remind you all..”

“However, seeing that Mo Ling is able to erupt with basic fighting technique, this guy is a character that can’t be judged with common sense.”

“He actually already mastered creating a world!”

“This time, it’s really troublesome.”

Wang Ru’s face looked ugly.

Tian Zi knew about it because he’s a human, and Mo Ling understood humans well as a beast since his world had obviously been condensed for many years!

Isn’t that because of their negligence and oversight?

Damn it.

Wang Ru cursed secretly.

“Will one definitely enter Mo Ling’s world?”

Wang Jun’s eyes showed a strange brilliance. The last time Tian Zi’s world was revealed, he was completely taken by that. That kind of battle would definitely not be a comfortable one.

“Originally, it won’t.”

Wang Ru shook his head.

“In a duel of worlds, two worlds would naturally confront each other. Only the failed one would be brought into the other world. However, does Su Hao have a world?”

“No!”

“If he doesn’t have one…”

“There is only one result; he will be taken in directly!”

Wang Ru looked at that vast land in the scene.

That was Mo Ling’s world. Although it was not known what is special about this world, it was obvious that it wouldn’t be good for Su Hao, who had just gained his advantage, to be brought into Mo Ling’s world.

“Really?”

Chen Yiran thoughtfully said so.

Chen Yiran remembered Su Hao’s past Universe Creator. He doesn’t have a world?

“Perhaps, he won’t lose like that.” Chen Yiran muttered to herself.

“How can that be?” Wang Ru smiled bitterly, “You all just stepped into level three world realm and are clueless about the might of a world. Tian Zi’s half-destroyed world could almost reverse the battle. One could imagine how powerful a perfect world is. As soon as the world is unleashed, the result of this battle is already set…”

“That’s not a sure thing.” Chen Yiran looked up and smiled, “He’s Su Hao after all.”

Wang Ru smiled bitterly.

He considered that as Chen Yiran’s confidence in her lover, but Zhou Wang, Zheng Tai, and the others had their eyes light up as they suddenly shifted their gaze back to the holographic world.

Right now, Mo Ling brought Su Hao into his world, and his eyes revealed his delight.

His strength had recovered!

Breakout!

A total breakout!

Mo Ling knew that this state of his wouldn’t last for long, but as long as Su Hao was killed during this period, he would win! For him, that’s sufficient.

Boom!

Mo Ling erupted again.

Su Hao just sneered. A world?

This isn’t a joke!

Trying to compete with him by using a world?

His strength was slightly weaker than Mo Ling, and it’s impossible to bring Mo Ling into Kingdom of Heaven. Thus, the advantages of Kingdom of Heaven were useless to him. However, who would have thought that Mo Ling would take the initiative to activate his world and attempted to suppress him with it?

This was simply courting his own death!

Boom!

Su Hao stretched out his hand.

In an instant, just as Mo Ling burst out, his entire world shattered.

Boom!

Boom!

The world fell apart.

Countless cracks appeared in time and space. In just a second, Mo Ling’s world disappeared.

This shocked everyone.

Mo Ling’s eyes flashed a look of disbelief.

How is this possible?

Under his expectation, this situation should be that his world would instantly crush Su Hao’s world and then bring Su Hao into his world! However, who would have imagined that the reverse would happen? How could this be? Su Hao only broke through into the world realm yesterday.

His world…

How could it be stronger than Mo Ling’s?

This doesn’t make sense!

Mo Ling was at a loss.

One second.

In just one second, Su Hao stunned everyone.

The world that Mo Ling had condensed for a few years collapsed instantly. Everyone looked at this scene in horror. Su Hao just broke through yesterday and immediately destroyed Mo Ling’s world?

A world showdown?

Sorry, you’re not even qualified for a duel!

Buzz~

Brilliance flickered.

Everyone was shocked. Everyone knew that through Mo Ling’s point of view, they would be able to see Su Hao’s world! What kind of world was it that it could destroy Mo Ling’s world in a second?

Swish!

Mo Ling choked his saliva.

It was an eye-catching scene.

There was an azure blue ocean.

An endless ocean.

The spot where they appeared turned out to be the bottom of the sea!

Su Hao’s world, could it be a water world? However, wasn’t he an expert in Realization? How is this has any relation to water? Everyone was shocked.

However, they were totally clueless that what they saw was just a corner of Kingdom of Heaven. Now that he had stepped into the world realm, Kingdom of Heaven was so large that it’s almost unimaginable!

Just a mere ocean?

Su Hao just put Mo Ling here in order to prevent any peeping.

Not to mention…

This is the most terrifying place for Mo Ling.

Will the spirit of land reach the water too?

“En…”

Boom!

Su Hao struck with a punch.

With his current power, coupled with the infinite aura brought by Kingdom of Heaven, he completely suppressed Mo Ling in an instant. This was yet another battle of complete abuse.

Right now, in the beast domain.

“The situation doesn’t look good.”

Hydra’s face looked ugly upon seeing this situation.

“Look, Mo Ling obviously couldn’t make it.”

“Yeah, this Su Hao is too fierce.”

“This kid is the beast’s number one? This doesn’t make sense. Could it be rigged?”

“Get lost!”

Hydra roared impatiently, and the buzzing in his mind finally stopped.

“Bo… Boss?”

The beast next to him was terrified as it wondered where it had offended its boss.

“I am not talking about you.”

Hydra glanced at it for a second before looking at Mo Ling again, “This can’t continue any longer. One minute at most, and Mo Ling would be completely destroyed by Su Hao!”

Seeing Su Hao’s explosive power, Hydra was a bit fearful.

Was that still the little guy back then?

That force…

This was too horrifying!

After a breakthrough into the world realm, Su Hao was like a ghost. When this world appeared, Hydra already knew that Mo Ling was about to lose.

This world had no rules.

It seemed that Su Hao had no time to make one, but…

Did you think he didn’t see the dark fishes drifting around?

Damn it!

There are actually lives in Su Hao’s world?

No wonder Mo Ling couldn’t hold on!

“No, if this goes on, Mo Ling will soon be over. I must find a way.” Hydra thought for a moment and finally handed over the control of his body to Old Two.

One then saw Hydra’s pupils dim before suddenly lighting up.

The momentum of Hydra had completely changed.

“Tsk, damn the original body. Finally, you’re willing to let me out.”

Hydra regained his composure. There was a trace of evil charm in his eyes, “Help Mo Ling get first place?”

“Let’s go!”

Hydra led his subordinates to the room where Mo Ling was.

Right now, Mo Ling’s real body was sleeping.

An evil smile flashed in Hydra’s eyes. One hand was placed on Mo Ling. Suddenly, endless power was poured into Mo Ling’s body.

The beast guarding next to him suddenly had a change of expression, “A forbidden breakthrough? Hydra, how dare you!”

“Why don’t I dare?” Hydra sneered.

“Using a forbidden breakthrough technique for a virtual battle, you’re mad! If this goes on, Lord Mo Ling will be abolished, and Lord will never let you go.”

The beast was furious.

“It won’t though.”

Hydra’s eyes flashed with cold light.

Poof~

That beast died on the spot.

“Humph.”

Hydra looked at Mo Ling again and smiled, “This is a virtuous cause for both beasts and humans. The Battle of Glory is of great importance. There should always be sacrifices, right?”

In the holographic world, Mo Ling was completely suppressed by Su Hao when he suddenly burst out with terrifying power.

Boom!

Boom!

The world had a change.

Rich golden light poured in, shaking the sky.

“This is…”

Su Hao suddenly woke up.

Swish!

Light flashed, and Mo Ling suddenly exited Kingdom of Heaven.

Not only that, but that terrifying brilliance that came from the sky also caused Su Hao’s previous Realization of 100-meter blue ice to break down. Mo Ling returned to the land.

Boom!

With a wave of his hand, the moment when he returned to the land, infinite power emerged.

Mo Ling erupted and destroyed all the blue ice. This was the power of the land spirit! Last time, he was tricked by Su Hao to leave the ground, but he wouldn’t be fooled again! Of course, what was even more terrifying was that the strength emerged from his body right now…

It belonged to the strength of a pseudo-emperor!

“This is…”

“Did Mo Ling breakthrough?”

“Damn, for a level three world esper to breakthrough, wouldn’t he be the strongest esper then? It can’t be, right?”

“Although the standard had been unified, their power measurement system is different. Did everyone forget that there are Emperor-ranked beasts, and before that are pseudo-emperors?”

“Pseudo-emperor!”

Everyone was stunned!

Although there was no sound of that magical ‘duang’ like Su Hao, this breakthrough into a pseudo-emperor still made everyone stand up in shock.

A pseudo-emperor…

What kind of power was that?!

Mo Ling was only 23 years old, the same age as Su Hao!

This was shocking.

However, only Mo Ling revealed a hint of bitterness from the corner of his mouth. It was still too early for him to breakthrough, but when a foreign force helped him to do so, he already knew something.

From now onwards, there was no hope for him to progress into Emperor-rank!

This breakthrough into a pseudo-emperor crippled his potential!

“Hydra.”

Mo Ling’s hatred reached up to the sky.

However, right now, he knew what he should do.

His father would naturally avenge him for Hydra’s action, but now all he needed to do was to get back the championship and earn the glory that belonged to the beasts.

“Come then, Su Hao!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1039 - The Prestige Of A Pseudo-Emperor!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1039 - The Prestige Of A Pseudo-Emperor!

Chapter 1039: The prestige of a pseudo-emperor!

Broke through!

Mo Ling’s breakthrough was beyond everyone’s expectations.

When the golden light that soared to the sky vanished, the aura coming from Mo Ling’s body changed drastically, and everyone was dumbfounded. This was the biggest breakthrough ever in this Battle of Glory.

Last time it was Su Hao.

Su Hao took one huge leap forward, coming from the domain realm to level three world realm, and from then on, he was among the top!

This time, it was Mo Ling’s turn.

Mo Ling also took one huge leap forward and became a pseudo-emperor. It was only half a step away from the legendary Emperor rank. This was simply the supreme glory of the beasts. Of course, they still didn’t know that Hydra forcefully caused Mo Ling’s breakthrough; otherwise, they would probably hate it.

After all, that was a future Emperor-ranked beast!

How could a mere pseudo-emperor be compared to that?

But now…

He’s a cripple.

Was that really just for the glory of the beasts?

Forget about Hydra’s careful thoughts, at least the beasts cheered wildly for Mo Ling’s breakthrough. A pseudo-emperor, although not on the same standing as Emperor rank, with that additional word ’emperor,’ it had touched the threshold. Such strength was already a completely different concept.

This is what a pseudo-emperor is all about!

Boom!

Terrifying aura went straight into the sky.

Mo Ling stood there, being surrounded by a raging blue flame. However, this time, it was so breathtaking that the light blue brilliance made everyone afraid to look at it directly.

It was as if he’s a god.

This is the true power of a beast!

Is there even any difference between the current Mo Ling and the legendary qilin?

Mo Ling couldn’t speak.

However, looking at Su Hao, he was full of endless fighting spirit.

“You breakthrough?”

Su Hao just showed a look of surprise.

Because based on his expectation, there should be quite a distance left before Mo Ling’s next breakthrough. To reach pseudo-emperor, it isn’t something easy like picking a Chinese cabbage.

However, the fact that Mo Ling broke through remained unchanged.

“Is there someone intervening in reality?”

Su Hao made a guess.

However, no matter what happened in reality, it had nothing to do with him. Right now, what he needs to solve is how to resist this abnormal pseudo-emperor Mo Ling!

Su Hao looked at Mo Ling’s figure and sighed slightly.

A breakthrough didn’t account much for him.

What made him depressed was that it took away all his hard work to isolate Mo Ling from the land. Now that Mo Ling was back, this skyrocketing aura wasn’t only just from the breakthrough into a pseudo-emperor, but also due to the connection back to the land.

Qilin…

That was still the spirit of earth.

A qilin who gained access to the land and a pseudo-emperor at that was definitely not something easy to deal with!

Roar~

Space shook.

Yet the same move again!

However, almost instantly, Su Hao’s expression had a drastic change. Before he could use his substitute, he rushed out with Phantom Sprint. Just after he left that spot, an azure blue hoof with flames stomped there.

Boom!

A huge hole was formed on the ground.

Su Hao turned his head and took in a mouthful of cold air. If that move of Mo Ling earlier hit him…

He wouldn’t be able to imagine how he was going to die!

He could calculate Mo Ling’s location, but his speed was too fast, so quick that he couldn’t even shoot Xinghe Arrow.

The difference in strength was clearly shown this time.

Roar~

Space shook again.

Su Hao’s eyes flashed with red and blue lights as he avoided another round of attack from Mo Ling in a thrilling fashion. Relying on the powerful Illusion Reality and Synchronize Space, he could only passively defend!

How big was the gap between those two?

“Damn it.”

A cold light flashed in Su Hao’s eyes.

Roar~

Flashing through Space.

Swish!

Piercing Pike.

Mo Ling shot out a pike that was previously ineffective against Su Hao. At this time, the pike was out. Su Hao had just dodged Mo Ling’s Flashing through Space was targeted by this pike.

Poof~

Su Hao felt that half of his body had been penetrated.

Quick!

It was too quick!

Too fast for him to use a double.

A smile flashed in Mo Ling’s eyes.

Swish!

Flashing through Space.

Su Hao dodged again. Then, Mo Ling would follow up with Piercing Pike. The duration for him to use these two moves is actually even less than half of the time needed to use Flashing through Space alone. The current Mo Ling was so fast that it had reached a point where it frightened people.

Poof~

Yet, the same incident repeated itself.

Su Hao was penetrated by the pike.

This semi-transparent spear was passing through Su Hao’s body and slid to the back. Su Hao seemed to only receive a slight injury, but he knew that the most terrifying part of this pike was the final outbreak! Su Hao still remembered the moment when Mo Ling killed Wan Cheng in a flash.

Swish!

Flashing through Space and Piercing Pike.

One!

Twice!

Thrice!

Su Hao knew what Mo Ling was trying to do, but there was nothing he could do. He could only watch Mo Ling hit him with the pikes one after another while something strange was accumulating in his body.

Su Hao was already at a complete disadvantage.

“He’s about to lose.”

Wang Ru looked displeased.

Everyone was delighted when Su Hao counterattacked, especially when Su Hao’s world broke out, but who would have known that the battle would be instantly reversed again?

A pseudo-emperor?

Looking at the battle, there was naturally no suspense.

Suppression.

A total suppression.

Just when everyone was frowning, a gleam of brilliant golden light flashed. Everyone noticed that the pike in Mo Ling’s hand suddenly had a special golden color.

It was still translucent, but that state…

It exuded a sharp chill.

“It’s coming!”

Everyone held their breath.

If it were the same as the previous battle with Wan Cheng, this pike would decide the victor and loser.

Swish!

Mo Ling’s eyes bloomed with brilliance.

The golden pike whizzed out like a bolt of thunder.

Swish!

The time stood still again.

This time, Su Hao didn’t hesitate to activate his substitute directly. When the golden light flashed in Mo Ling’s hand, he had already done so before Mo Ling shot out.

Deduction?

It’s useless!

Only by predicting in advance could he keep up with Mo Ling’s rhythm.

Phew!

The golden pike whizzed by, killing Su Hao’s substitute.

However, a smile suddenly appeared on Mo Ling’s face.

Swish!

Flashing through Space.

Mo Ling had just stopped when he suddenly flickered again, and a fluctuation appeared in front of Su Hao’s substitute. With a bang, the substitute was shattered! After the pike lost its target, it froze for a while before heading to another direction in the holographic world. Over there…

Su Hao just appeared.

“It had been cracked!”

Everyone was deeply shocked.

It had always been Su Hao countering Mo Ling. Who would have thought that at this critical moment, Mo Ling was able to return the treatment? Unlike Su Hao’s cracking style by using deduction, Mo Ling’s way of cracking…

Force his way through!

My speed is faster, and my strength is stronger than you. If you use a substitute, I will kill one!

This is Mo Ling’s way to counter him.

The automatic guidance of the golden pike played an important role this time. In an instant, it headed toward Su Hao the moment it passed through and shattered the substitute!

Swish!

The wind howled; what kind of speed was needed to produce such an effect?!

The entire holographic scene had no color. In everyone’s eyes, there was only an endless golden light.

“Not good.”

“Quickly evade!”

“This time, it’s really over.”

Everyone’s heart trembled for a second.

The golden light was so quick that it made them touch their throats in terror. However, despite that, they still hoped that Su Hao could perform miracles.

Because he’s Su Hao.

From the beginning to the current final match.

How much had Su Hao achieved?

How many miracles had he created?

He had always been the endorsement of miracles. Thus, despite the hardships and crisis, people still hope that Su Hao could win.

However, they were obviously disappointed.

The golden light.

It ran through everything along its path.

Time and space were still at this moment, and when the golden light passed through Su Hao’s body, the energy that had been hidden in Su Hao’s body burst out loudly. That was the power left by the previous pikes before! The penetrating power broke out at this moment, and it was impossible to resist.

Boom!

A terrifying force exploded within Su Hao’s body.

It was as bright as a lotus.

“Ahhhhh!”

Su Hao roared.

“Block for me!”

Boom!

For the first time ever, Su Hao’s aura surged. That was the strength of his flesh!

His physical body was comparable to a world esper. After a dazzling breakthrough, the strength of his physical body alone had surpassed ordinary world espers! It was just that because of World Force, there was no need to use his physical body. Now, while facing this powerful Penetration…

Su Hao used all of his might.

Boom!

His entire body was covered in blood.

Su Hao was surrounded by blood, and his whole body was as hard as a rock.

However, was that useful?

That was the terrifying Penetration after being accumulated for dozens of times!

Swish!

The bright golden light flashed, and the scene became quiet in an instant.

At this moment, whether it was humans or beasts, they all calmed down. Even if they knew that Su Hao and Mo Ling in the holographic world wouldn’t be able to hear them, they still dared not say anything.

The entire world was so terrifyingly quiet.

In the holographic world, only Mo Ling and Su Hao were facing each other.

“He managed to stop it?”

Everyone looked over subconsciously.

Tick!

A drop of blood fell.

Everyone glanced at them, and their hearts suddenly felt sad.

Over there, Su Hao was still standing straight. Facing Mo Ling. who’s a pseudo-emperor, Su Hao didn’t retreat in the slightest and even took the initiative to use his powerful physical body to resist. However, that was still a pseudo-emperor! How could it be blocked? The ground behind Su Hao had a bottomless hole.

The golden pike actually penetrated and hit the ground!

As for Su Hao…

A bowl-sized cavity appeared in his chest.

Someone as powerful as Su Hao got pierced through! All the people who saw this scene shuddered. One needs to know that Su Hao evaded Flashing through Space, used a substitute and Phantom Sprint, but still ended up killed by Mo Ling’s golden pike.

So this is Mo Ling’s current strength?

Everyone felt sad.

Tick~

Another drop of blood fell.

Su Hao could feel his strength quickly disappearing. His death was knocking on his door.

chapters.title: Chapter 1040 - The Power Of Realization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1040 - The Power Of Realization

Chapter 1040: The power of Realization

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“Am I going to die?”

Su Hao was very quiet.

Previously, after Wan Cheng was pierced, he disappeared from the world in just two seconds. His body was naturally stronger than Wan Cheng, but his entire heart had been obliterated!

How could he recover?

Having strong physical recovery is not rebirth.

“I’m going to die just like that?”

An unwilling look flashed in Su Hao’s eyes. He had come to this point with great suffering. Unfortunately, he couldn’t copy Rule Force. Otherwise, if he’s to copy Rebirth, wouldn’t his body recover easily?

Hold on…

Su Hao seemed to have thought of something.

Tick~

Another drop of blood fell.

There was only silence at the scene. All the humans and beasts were waiting for Su Hao’s death as it would be the moment when the system announces the victor. However, who would have thought that such a moment hadn’t arrived after so long.

One second…

Two seconds…

Five seconds…

Not yet?

Everyone was stunned.

At this time, everyone was surprised to find that there was a trace of Rule Force within Su Hao’s body flashing. Then, visible to the naked eye, his heart that Mo Ling pierced was actually recovering! Yes, recovering! One needs to know that Su Hao wasn’t just injured, but his entire heart was gone!

However, in front of everyone, Su Hao’s heart gradually appeared, and it became intact in a moment.

“This…”

“What the hell? Su Hao also has Rebirth?”

“No, no, this is definitely not Rebirth.”

Everyone looked at this scene in shock. Even Mo Ling was stunned. Even a totally destroyed heart could recover, what heaven-defying card did Su Hao have?

As for Su Hao’s eyes, they were sparkling like never before.

He finally remembered that he had overlooked something.

He’s a world esper!

He’s a level three world esper!

The current Realization was utilizing World Force! It far surpasses the previous version that just used origin energy. In that case…

Could they even be compared?

Realization: Physical Recovery!

He could make countless identical bodies, but why can’t he make one of himself? This can’t be any easier. As long as he thinks it, he will perfectly recover in an instant!

A substitute?

His actual body?

Is there even a difference?

As long as his soul didn’t vanish, his substitute is the actual body itself!

Right now, Su Hao finally realized this fact.

Since the start, he had been ignoring the true power of Rule Force. Instead, he regarded it as a weak visualization origin technique. As for his attack and defense, he had always used the fused Rule Force. As for the Realization itself, he only utilized it as a substitute.

However, the transformation of Realization, how could it only be that?

Su Hao pondered.

At this time, everyone finally recovered from their shock. Mo Ling’s killer move was actually cured by Su Hao flawlessly!

Boom!

Mo Ling didn’t hesitate.

Seeing Su Hao’s recovery, the ultimate move of his arrived without hesitation.

However, Su Hao no longer hid. Instead, he stepped up and charged at Mo Ling. He actually intended to exchange wound for wound.

This is the fighting style of an immortal body. Su Hao actually wanted to deal with Mo Ling like that?

“Puff~”

Su Hao was pierced again.

In the same way, Su Hao also left a scar on Mo Ling’s body. It wasn’t serious, just a slight wound. However, at this moment, Su Hao’s body shone, and his body returned to normal again.

The audience went into an uproar.

“Sure enough!”

“Is this the strength of Realization?”

“He could actually create his own organs flawlessly. Mo Ling is about to suffer.”

“This is infinitely close to an immortal body.”

Everyone was stunned.

The battle broke out once more. Mo Ling still had an overwhelming advantage. However, Su Hao’s powerful Realization always ensured Mo Ling’s effort returned with zero success.

Broken arm?

It’s fine, just make one.

Broken leg?

It’s all right, just make another one.

After several confrontations, Su Hao was able to do it so well as he became more proficient in the mastery of Realization. On the contrary, it was Mo Ling who had more scars on his body. This had turned out to be a disadvantage.

Su Hao became more and more courageous as he fought. Everyone’s heart turned excited.

And it was at this time.

Phew!

Cold light flickered.

Mo Ling was about to pounce on Su Hao again when he suddenly vanished.

“This is…”

“That quick killer move before!”

Su Hao’s complexion changed suddenly as he retreated. Sure enough, the place where he retreated from suddenly had Mo Ling’s figure appearing. One couldn’t see Mo Ling’s face clearly at all.

Only an afterimage was left.

Previously, a level three world realm Mo Ling could already achieve this invisible effect. Then, what about the current him as a pseudo-emperor?

Poof~

Cold light flashed.

A sword was slashed past. This time, Mo Ling’s unpredictable sword slash didn’t aim at Su Hao’s limbs or penetrate his heart. Instead, it slashed at his head.

Swish!

Su Hao’s head was separated.

Swish!

The audience went into an uproar.

Beheaded!

No wonder Mo Ling hadn’t taken any action for a long time. It turned out that he had been holding back this move!

It looks like he was willing to exchange injuries with Su Hao, but the gain wasn’t worth the loss. So, it was to hide his true purpose. At the most critical moment, he quietly charged and completed this fatal blow!

If you cut other places, you can recreate it.

What about being beheaded?

All human consciousness lies in the mind. Without the head, can Su Hao even perform Realization?

One sword sealed the deal.

The beasts rejoiced.

However, Su Hao’s severed head only showed a sarcastic smile. Phew, he thought it was some sort of killer move.

Swish!

The power of Realization flashed, and Su Hao quickly recovered.

Why must he create a head? Since his head was already separated, that body was no longer needed. Su Hao created a separated body directly under his head.

His physical body was once again complete.

“This…”

Everyone went dumbfounded.

A strange look flashed in Mo Ling’s eyes again. After Su Hao recovered, he quickly became lively and active again. The terrifying strength of Realization had truly transformed him.

“Kill!”

Su Hao lifted up his sword to kill without any hesitation.

This scene was simply a joy to look at.

This was because last time, the beast’s immortal body against Wan Cheng progressed into such a state too. However, Wan Cheng was able to use his Wave Force to comprehend a seal to torture the opponent.

Now, could Mo Ling perform a seal?

This wasn’t a question of whether that could be done or not, but that Su Hao’s power wasn’t immortality.

The powerful Realization wasn’t something that can be blocked with a mere seal. Simply put, the so-called seal is completely ineffective against Realization.

“A seal is ineffective?”

Light flashed in Mo Ling’s eyes.

Seeing Su Hao charged at him again, his eyes turned cold.

Realization?

Ignoring the fact that you’re faking rebirth, even if you have the legit rebirth, I must let you die without a burial place!

Roar!

Blue light flashed.

The flames around Mo Ling suddenly turned strange and unpredictable.

The faint flames flickered as the ground of the entire holographic scene began to tremble. This was the result of Mo Ling’s increased control after breaking through to the pseudo-emperor realm.

Beheading?

Ridiculous!

This was his true power.

Buzz~

Mo Ling stood proudly. With endless brilliance gleaming, the place where Su Hao just landed had a huge hole appear out of nowhere. It looked bottomless with hundreds of meters in depth!

Swish!

Su Hao floated in the air urgently.

Activating his Rule Force, his entire person floated in the air.

What is Mo Ling trying to do?

Kill him with a pit?

Please, everyone is a world esper and can fly. Don’t be too naive, alright?

Swish!

Su Hao’s figure once again revealed a domineering aura as he charged at Mo Ling.

However, several terrifying boulders volleyed up to the sky, sealing Su Hao’s path to Mo Ling. In front of him, there were also tall highrise buildings.

“What’s he trying to achieve here?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

Stop him?

He didn’t think that Mo Ling would be so naive to use this method to defend against his attacks. Then, if he’s Mo Ling, what would he do under such a situation?

Su Hao tried to deduce, but his face had a sudden change of expression.

“Retreat!”

Su Hao retreated without hesitation.

However, it was already too late!

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

The clouds moved in all directions.

All four directions, covering everywhere, these hundred meter high walls rose from the ground, surrounding Su Hao and trapping him in the center with no way out.

Boom!

Su Hao tried to blast the wall, but only left a one meter deep hole.

However, the thickness of this wall was more than ten meters!

This was the gap between him and Mo Ling!

Relying on Realization to fight against Mo Ling? Trying to force him to death slowly but steadily? Obviously, Mo Ling had no such plan to participate in it. With all four sides covered, Su Hao was completely trapped.

However, if Su Hao guessed correctly, this was just the beginning…

Boom!

As expected, Su Hao just had this thought flash in his mind, and the surrounding walls moved.

In all directions, all the walls head in one direction with Su Hao as the center, squeezing his unconditionally without leaving any gaps.

At this moment, everyone’s facial color changed in horror. They finally understood the reasoning behind Mo Ling’s actions!

You have Realization, right?

You can recover, right?

Even when you’re beheaded, you could still recover, but what if you’re crushed into meat paste? What if your entire body and soul were completely destroyed? Can you still recover?

Boom!

The walls were quickly approaching.

In an instant, the space left for Su Hao became extremely small.

Ten square meters.

Six square meters.

Three square meters.

One square meter…

The area under his feet was constantly decreasing!

There was no doubt that Su Hao might be crushed into meat paste in the next second.

Boom!

Boom!

Su Hao directed his iron fists.

The ground quaked.

However, it was ineffective!

Now as a pseudo-emperor, the powerful Mo Ling wasn’t something that Su Hao could resist. Even though Realization had given him an almost perfect defense, he still couldn’t break these walls. What was even more frightening was that Mo Ling even found a weakness of Realization and was about to give a fatal blow.

Swish!

Mo Ling waved his hand.

The walls that were already extremely close suddenly slammed shut.

Boom!

Four walls burst at the same time.

Countless thick walls were squeezed together, leaving no gap. Su Hao’s body was instantly crushed in front of the power of a pseudo-emperor!

Boom!

Boom!

The terrifying light rays dissipated.

Those four walls merged into one and became a thick white wall without a gap.

As for Su Hao?

He had long been overwhelmed by that move. That was the ultimate display of strength as a pseudo-emperor.

Who could stop him?

chapters.title: Chapter 1041 - The Appearance Of Mo Long!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1041 - The Appearance Of Mo Long!

Chapter 1041: The appearance of Mo Long!

Su Hao was gone.

Under Mo Ling’s terrifying attack, he was crashed until nothing remained. When Mo Ling finally merged the walls, one could no longer feel Su Hao’s aura.

Su Hao had completely vanished.

We won?

All the beasts opened their eyes wide.

It should be, right?

Although they were mentally prepared for it since long ago, when they finally saw this scene, the beasts couldn’t help but cheer. As soon as the system announced the information, Mo Ling would become the champion of Battle of Glory.

However…

One second, two seconds…

Thirty seconds passed, and the system still had no announcement.

Could it be that Su Hao is still alive?

Mo Ling suddenly looked at the wall, which led all humans and beasts to shift their vision toward the same direction.

Over there, a soft light appeared. It was the power of the land that firmly wrapped Su Hao, protecting him.

“!!!”

Seeing this scene, everyone went dumbfounded.

What did they just see?

Mo Ling’s power is actually protecting Su Hao?

No wonder Su Hao wasn’t dead.

At the last moment, that land force belonging to a pseudo-emperor had actually protected Su Hao from harm and led to his escape from death. However, how could this be possible?

Everyone went puzzled.

The force that clearly attacked the enemy ended up protecting the enemy instead?

Is there such an amusing thing in this world?

Astonishment flashed within Mo Ling’s eyes. He tried to control the force again, only to find that although that force was exactly the same as his, it was definitely not his!

“What’s going on again?”

Mo Ling was shocked.

“Kill!”

Seeing that something was amiss, he instantly stretched out his hand.

Swish!

Swish!

Swish!

Countless light balls flew over, covering Su Hao in a flash.

However, unexpectedly, Su Hao didn’t bother to evade. He just stood there quietly. Just when he was about to be bombarded by the light balls, a cluster of soft light rays emerged that took everything away from Mo Ling by expelling the force. When one saw this, they were suddenly shocked.

That was still Mo Ling’s force!

However, it wasn’t from Mo Ling, but the wall!

What happened?

Everyone looked at the wall in terror. What happened? Just as everyone was puzzled, a figure walked out from the wall quietly. Standing behind Su Hao quietly, he took half a step back. His expression looked solemn akin to a dedicated bodyguard.

However, everyone who saw this scene was in a daze.

“Damn.”

“What the hell is that?”

“Mo Ling?”

“Bodyguard?”

Everyone was dumbfounded. Even Mo Ling had his mind go blank because behind Su Hao, it turned out to be a qilin, an exact copy of himself!

Oh, of course, the colors were different.

Mo Ling was full of azure blue flames, but that one behind Su Hao was fused with Su Hao’s power. Thus, his entire body was bathed in soft golden light. From one glance, he looked extremely domineering.

Of course, the color wasn’t the main point.

The main point is…

What was actually happening here?

Mo Ling?

How could there be another Mo Ling?

Swish!

Mo Ling threw out a pike instantly.

Swish!

The Mo Ling behind Su Hao literally took action at the same time. The same pike was shot out, and these two same forces collided in mid-air and burst with a loud bang.

An exact copy!

Simultaneously!

The strength was also similar!

This was simply a copy of Mo Ling’s attack.

How can this be?

Mo Ling couldn’t speak, but the shock in his eyes had already asked the question he wished to ask.

A copy?

A clone?

Everyone had seen it before.

However, to copy the opponent’s body and strength exactly and even the same attack, no one had seen it before. Not to mention, that Mo Ling could counterattack completely without Su Hao’s command. It’s not like a clone, more like…

A living creature!

“How do you feel?” A smile appeared on Su Hao’s face, “I call him Mo Long. From now on, he’s your brother.”

Mo Ling: “…”

Everyone: “…”

Mo Long?

What the hell happened?

What the hell is going on here?

Obviously, Su Hao used his incomparable ability to fool all the beasts and Mo Ling because there was no doubt that Su Hao made this so-called Mo Long!

Making this Mo Long had literally consumed all of Su Hao’s energy!

Even though the energy preserved in Kingdom of Heaven had been exhausted because of this battle, Kingdom of Heaven suffered some damage in order to materialize Mo Ling.

However…

That was enough.

“He’s not weaker than you.” Su Hao smiled.

“Hmmpphh!”

Mo Ling grumbled contemptuously and attacked again.

Su Hao didn’t make a single move because it was Mo Long who greeted the incoming attack! That terrifying golden light dissipated as both instantly fought.

At this moment, Su Hao became an audience member instead.

Outside the stage, every human and beast felt quite ridiculous when they saw this scene. That couldn’t be helped.

Two identical guys fighting each other. Let’s not talk about that, but Su Hao actually sat over there and watched in excitement as if he bought a VIP ticket to this fight…

This strange scene stunned everyone.

Fortunately, this situation didn’t last long.

The battle between Mo Ling and Mo Long gradually began to distinguish who had the upper hand. Although Mo Long was created based on Mo Ling, there was still a gap. Just as when everyone thought that Mo Ling would defeat Mo Long and finally defeat Su Hao to win the championship…

Su Hao took action.

Buzz~

It was simple and straightforward.

Red and blue light flashed within Su Hao’s eyes.

At the same time, he ordered Mo Long to open up his sea of consciousness as he mapped the scenes he saw to Mo Long’s mind. This was equivalent to Mo Long possessing the Illusion Reality!

Boom!

In an instant, Mo Long had a boost in strength.

Having Illusion Reality, most of Mo Ling’s actions could be deduced. Even if it couldn’t be deduced, at least the traces of Mo Ling’s movement could be seen.

The battle power of Mo Long surged instantly.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

The fight’s intensity grew.

After confronting each other for an unknown amount of time, outside of everyone’s expectations, Mo Long completely crushed Mo Ling.

A total suppression!

Flashing through Space?

I am faster than you and more accurate!

Infinite Division?

Sorry, I am one fold more than you.

…..

A total suppression!

Mo Ling, who had been labeled invincible, was beaten heavily. Everyone looked at this scene dumbfounded. This… this is the pseudo-emperor Mo Ling?

The fight between those two had become crueler.

Mo Ling had countless combat experiences, while Mo Long had the advantage of Illusion Reality.

These two qilins were locked in such a heated battle.

Even though Mo Long gained the advantage in a short time, don’t even think of defeating Mo Ling. Mo Ling’s rich combat experience played an extremely important role.

Defense!

Defense!

Mo Long attacked with the intention of destroying Mo Ling’s defense.

Mo Ling was now in a full defensive mode.

The fight reached a deadlock.

In the holographic world, the golden light flickered while the blue light overflowed. At this point, the battle had completely transformed. As for Mo Ling, apart from defending, there were several attempts to attack Su Hao. However, they all ended up stopped by Mo Long.

As for Su Hao…

He didn’t even bother to make a single move.

This wasn’t a joke.

It would be a joke if the assassination attempt succeeds with Mo Long around with Illusion Reality.

This was what Su Hao’s Realization is capable of.

The feat of creating a living being that can’t be created with ordinary Realization, which relied on the origin energy, finally bloomed with dazzling brilliance!

This was the highest state of Realization!

Of course, Su Hao had to copy it based on the existing version. He couldn’t create a creature out of thin air. However, it wasn’t that Su Hao had never thought about it…

If one day, he broke through into the strongest esper, could he truly create creatures?

In ancient times, Pangu created the sky, and Nuwa created human beings. Although that was only a myth, if he’s the strongest esper, can he really have such kind of ability?

That…

Creation force!

According to Su Hao’s deduction of Realization, it might not be impossible.

This would be another driving force for Su Hao’s struggle. If not for Mo Ling’s suppression on him, how could he realize this?

As for the battle…

When he realized the true power of Realization, Mo Ling was no longer his opponent!

“This battle, it’s about time to end it.” Su Hao calmly said.

However, Mo Ling unexpectedly went berserk.

One could see countless lights flash in the air. Mo Ling suddenly shot out countless light balls and blasted towards Su Hao. As for Mo Long, who had long prepared, he blocked all the attacks. However, at this moment, Mo Ling made a decisive move and charged with a sword while Mo Long was busy defending Su Hao.

Boom!

Mo Long went to intercept.

Phew!

Mo Long’s attacks whizzed past and his face had a sudden change. Mo Ling’s attacks just turned out to be a disguised attack? At this time, a cold smile appeared on Mo Ling’s face as he appeared from the void.

“Puff~”

One of Mo Long’s limbs was cut off.

Mo Long, who had been standing proudly since the start, had turned into someone with three legs.

Seeing this scene, everyone was shocked.

What a great move from Mo Ling!

Attacking Su Hao to force Mo Long to defend and another attack in disguise to force Mo Long to urgently go and intercept. The last move was the true killer move.

Who would have thought that Mo Long, who always had the upper hand, would be instantly countered?

This was simply unbelievable!

This is what the so-called countless years of combat experience is!

Three legs…

Mo Long’s failure was as if foreseeing the conclusion.

Could it be that the ending of this battle is about to be reversed again?

Everyone was shocked. The battle between these two peerless geniuses had surpassed everyone’s imagination every time, and Mo Ling turned the battle around this time with one blow.

However, Su Hao saw this scene and just sighed.

“I have already said, it’s time to end the battle.”

Buzz~

Su Hao calmly stretched out his hand.

A cluster of leisure lights flashed and tightly surrounded Mo Long. After a breath, the light vanished and Mo Long’s body was completely recovered! Everyone then remembered Su Hao’s freakish Realization. Did Mo Ling reverse the tide of the battle?

No…

This was still the same complete suppression!

chapters.title: Chapter 1045 - Former Opponents!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1045 - Former Opponents!

Chapter 1045: Former opponents!

“They used to be glorified warriors.”

Wang Ru sounded emotional.

“Even now, they still are.” Cheng Tianya said flatly.

Regardless of whether the battle was over or not, the original warriors will be favoured by the Federation, and this is also the bottom line of the Federation.

The spirit vanished.

A crisis that could destroy the entire team was over.

Right now, Wang Ru, Cheng Tianya, and the others have already seen the significance of Su Hao’s presence here. Violence doesn’t apply here. In this Great Despair where danger could arrive at any time, one mishap and all might fall. Against different opponents, one needs to use different methods to cope with them.

On combat strength alone, Wang Ru and Cheng Tianya weren’t afraid of Su Hao.

However…

Only Su Hao alone was capable of thinking quickly within tens of thousands of battles! These two old guys couldn’t keep up with him at all.

Unknowingly, Su Hao became the team leader again.

Far away, the brilliance of the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea was flickering.

The azure blue vortex attracted everyone to enter.

“What a beautiful vortex.”

“The more beautiful things are, the more dangerous they are too, aren’t they?”

Su Hao narrowed his eyes. Chen Yiran just gave him a blank look without saying anything.

“Secret Realm of Deepest Sea, are you guys ready?”

Su Hao looked at those around him, “This is different from the previous other cases since no one knows what’s inside there. It might even be possible that the moment we enter, our entire team will be wiped out…”

“Even so, do you want to go in?” Su Hao asked in a solemn tone.

He had a reason to enter the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea. As for Wang Ru, these seniors…

“The crisis of the Federation, I can’t pretend it is invisible.” Wang Ru smiled indifferently, “Since the beasts entered, why can’t we? I want to see what scheme those beasts are trying to play!”

Cheng Tianya agreed.

Now the general trend of the whole world is mankind and beasts are at peace! Under the influence of incredible entertainment gadgets and mankind’s culture, the beasts quickly fell. It couldn’t be helped, these beasts had experienced the colorful world of mankind, so who would be willing to go back to living in the wilderness?

Thus…

The beasts integrated into the human world at an unbelievable speed.

At this time, even if one wishes to drive them away, you will feel embarrassed to do so. When humans noticed that the beasts aren’t that terrifying, they also began to accept it.

As for any contradictions…

“I will wait for you in the next Battle of Glory!”

“Grandson, come, see you in the sparring field!”

“Who’s afraid of who?”

A virtual online game solved all problems.

Of course, the only exception was probably those with deep hatred. For example, the top leaders of the beasts such as Hydra, who still didn’t give up on trying to conquer humans.

These beasts were the true threat.

The current world was at peace. If one is to describe them in layman terms, they are akin to those terrorists who are afraid of peace, and this Secret Realm of Deepest Sea was also their goal this time.

How could such warnings be ignored?

“Let’s go then.”

Su Hao stopped hesitating. With a light flash, he took the initiative to step into the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

Buzz~

Su Hao disappeared.

The others glanced at each other before following. Faint blue light flashed. and everyone soon disappeared into the endless vortex.

Boom!

The giant waves were strong.

When Su Hao regained his footing, he was almost killed on the spot.

Swish!

Synchronize Space was activated.

Before he landed, Su Hao had a clear sense of the surrounding situation.

Seawater.

He was now under the sea.

The surrounding was full of endless waves. Each wave is hundreds of meters in height. What was even more terrifying was that this seawater isn’t ordinary seawater.

Blue!

The entire seawater was a crystal-clear blue.

“This color.”

Su Hao’s pupils contracted, “Isn’t it the same color as that vortex?”

Boom!

Before having the time to think, another wave struck.

Su Hao hurriedly summoned Xinghe Sword. That huge sword appeared, and Su Hao cleanly stepped on it so as not to be killed by the wave.

Swish!

Su Hao tried to attack the seawater.

Snap!

Shadowless God Needle just made a short trip as it actually couldn’t go deep into the sea. This seawater indeed contained incredible power.

Turning his head back, Su Hao couldn’t help being a little worried.

The others weren’t here!

They didn’t follow?

No, thinking of the vortex before entering, Secret Realm of Deepest Sea already understood that according to the rotation of the vortex, each person stepping into Secret Realm of Deepest Sea would land at a different spot!

Vortex…

Azure blue…

Crystal clear…

Su Hao guessed that this entire Secret Realm of Deepest Sea was a terrifying vortex! The vortex at the entrance was just a reduced version of this Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

“In that case, isn’t that little Secret Realm of the Deepest Sea a map of itself?” Su Hao pondered as he raised his head up.

As expected, although these waves were fierce, in the end, they were moving in a rotation, and constantly rotating like the endless vortex at the entrance.

“Synchronize Space, Synchronous Playback!”

Su Hao recalled the scene he saw at the entrance and compared it to the waves and the environment right now, he quickly locked onto his position.

He was at the outermost vortex at 3 o’clock.

With a map, everything would be much easier. Su Hao immediately rushed forward. There was only one way to find the others and even the secret of this place.

That is…

The center of the vortex!

No matter what the beasts’ purpose is, no matter what great secret this place has, in the end, everyone would gather at the center of the vortex.

Even if he calculated incorrectly, he could at least reunite with the others.

Boom!

Su Hao charged toward the center.

As for the others?

He wasn’t worried at all. Although the waves here were strong, they weren’t that deadly. At least, for these level three world espers, it wouldn’t be a big problem.

At the endless deep sea, Chen Yiran’s figure fell on a certain wave. The moment she fell, a layer of similar seawater appeared all over her body which merged with the endless deep sea.

Her understanding of water had reached its limit.

After careful consideration, Chen Yiran also rushed directly to the deepest part of the vortex where there was a force that seemed to suck everyone in.

At the same time, when Wan Cheng fell, endless light flashed in his eyes.

Buzz~

Countless layers of waves emerged, and Wan Cheng actually controlled the surrounding force!

At this moment, Wan Cheng could feel the surging power in his body as if he was the master here! Within this seawater, there seemed to be countless mysterious forces hidden within.

For others, it may just be powerful.

But for him…

“Isn’t this that seal force from before?”

Wan Cheng watched this scene excitedly while being intoxicated.

He stood there and realized the surrounding sea revolved around him. Like a small sea vortex, no one could approach him!

At the same time in another place.

“Erha, charge!”

The husky was trying hard to move forward by doggy paddling. Li Xin rode on Erha with high morale! Even so, the figure of this one human and dog turned on the engine as they sprinted quickly!

As for the direction?

What’s that?

Li Xin just randomly chose a direction that looked comfortable, and that direction was the center of the vortex.

Another place in the endless deep sea.

One could see purplish lightning dashing in the sea but not a figure; that was Zhou Wang. In another place, one could see Zheng Tai standing proudly, and under his feet was a giant battleship! Of course, one could hear cursing from time to time coming from the battleship.

That battleship turned out to be Wang Jun.

These two were lucky enough to regroup with each other, and Wang Jun accidentally became a mount, a domineering battleship mount.

As for the seniors such as Wang Ru, it went without saying that after careful consideration, they all cautiously rushed towards the center of the endless deep sea vortex.

They were all different places.

Yet they were coming from different angles.

Everyone charged toward the center at the same time.

That location seemed to have a magical force that induced everyone to move forward. At the centermost of the endless deep sea, a figure was sitting cross-legged, intertwined with chains.

He just sat like that.

One hundred miles around him, there were no waves at all.

Those forces didn’t dare move!

Somewhere in the endless deep sea.

Hydra’s icy voice could be heard, “Are they here?”

“Yes.”

The beasts around responded.

“Great…”

Hydra smiled and said, “Last time, in the Battle of Glory, you all lost. Perhaps it might be the rules, perhaps it’s a virtual world, you all became the shame of us beasts. However, this time, I will give you all another chance. An opportunity to wash away your shame and win the glory for beasts!”

Hydra’s voice was floating.

In front of him, there were those who had fought with Su Hao and the others before!

Su Hao’s opponent, Mo Ling.

Li Xin’s opponent, the star body, Chen Xing.

Wan Cheng’s opponent, the immortal body, Golden Silkworm.

Wang Jun’s opponent, three-eye laser, Ya Yan.

Zheng Tai’s opponent, Dream Talker, Succubus.

Zhou Wang’s opponent, Specter.

Chen Yiran’s opponent, Natuo.

Just like Su Hao and the others who broke through into level three world realm, these opponents had also stepped into the same realm, and their strength were now similar!

The reason why Hydra chose these people was because of that obsession.

Only by losing once…

Would they have strong obsession!

Of course, he didn’t have Su Hao’s heaven-defying Little Dark Room so the only way he could make these people breakthrough is to exhaust their potential.

To put it in a simple way, these people’s strength will never improve again!

As for Wang Ru, those old guys, leave them to us.

Hydra said lightly, “Your opponents are still the same humans that you hate to the bone. I think you must be looking forward to this battle, right?”

“This time, he will have no luck.” Chen Xing sounded cold.

“Weapon change? I won’t be fooled anymore.” Ya Yan’s cold voice echoed.

“I will let that little brat enjoy it.” The succubus’s lips were red like blood.

“My specter body has evolved.” Specter was eager to test it out.

“I have fully understood Nezha heritage.” Natuo proudly stood up.

“I will let Wan Cheng understand what real immortality is.” Golden Silkworm said.

Behind these few people, Mo Ling just stood there quietly. In his previous breakthrough, he couldn’t master it all immediately, but after a few days of getting used to his own power, he came back!

chapters.title: Chapter 1047 - Little Bear The Hanging Ornament
chapters.body:
Chapter 1047 - Little Bear The Hanging Ornament

Chapter 1047: Little Bear the hanging ornament

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“This…”

Su Hao looked at the excited little girl, “Mo Ling?”

“Hm, hmmm, I am.”

Mo Ling said happily, “Su Hao, hello. Ha, I can speak now.”

“…”

Su Hao had black lines on his forehead.

He couldn’t have accidentally created a chatterbox, right? True, after being held back for so many years, it would be strange only saying a few words.

“Your appearance…”

Su Hao kindly reminded her.

“What do you mean by my appearance?”

“Oh.”

Mo Ling froze for a moment. Lowering her head, she was taken aback.

Su Hao facepalmed. Such a reaction, wasn’t it too excessive? She could still be shocked and stunned. Even after I reminded you, you took such a long time before looking over there…

Is this really the same mythical Mo Ling as described in the virtual world?

As expected, reality is always different from virtual.

Su Hao was already too speechless to curse.

Buzz~

The misty light flashed again, and the real Mo Ling’s figure vanished.

“Why are you so young?” Su Hao felt somewhat strange, “Aren’t you 23 years old?”

“En.” Mo Ling nodded and answered seriously, “But I am a qilin. My mother said that I can live for at least 300 years, if I am to convert it to human age…”

“Please don’t count.” Su Hao waved his hands.

Three hundred years old?

If converted, 7.5 years?

What kind of loli is this!

“Well, I’ll give you a suggestion. When you fight with your opponent in the future, it’s best to not talk at all.” Su Hao said with a wry smile.

“Why?”

Mo Ling looked at him blankly.

“Because there won’t be any mysterious feeling…”

Su Hao sighed, “It’s better to continue typing in words, just communicate like what you’re used to.”

“Oh.”

A big character appeared with even colors and special effects added into it.

Damn you! You think you are using Photoshop or something?! You are foolishly cute!

Su Hao: “…”

“You don’t have to do that with me. Since I am the one who cured you, how could I not know about it?” Su Hao sighed.

“Ooohhhh, alright, alright.” Mo Ling nodded.

Su Hao could only spread his hands seeing this, “Do you still want to fight me now?”

“Huh?”

Mo Ling was stunned for a second.

At this time, she seemed to remember that the purpose of her coming here was to kill Su Hao and complete the mission!

Isn’t the plot developing in the wrong direction now?

However, Su Hao helped her!

To kill someone who just helped her, she couldn’t do it.

Thus, this silly Mo Ling finally made a decision after a lot of thoughts and entanglement, “Well what do you suggest? I will listen to you.”

Su Hao: “…”

At first, in Su Hao’s plan, a battle with Mo Ling would be disadvantageous.

Because this isn’t a virtual game. The power here was limited! It would be impossible for him to spend all his energy just to create Mo Long.

Based on Su Hao’s deduction, no matter how he fought against Mo Ling, whether he wins or loses, the force in his body would be exhausted and completely abolished.

A world esper who loses his force, what could he do?

To rest somewhere?

Where should he go to do so then?

Maybe any wave that passes by would slap him to death.

Thus, in the original plan, he only had a request for Mo Ling to not fight him as long as he healed her. However, who knew that the result…

It was totally outside of his expectation!

A situation that could easily have ended without them interfering with each other and bidding goodbye with a hand wave, now because of Mo Ling’s overenthusiasm, Su Hao was entangled.

“Let me think about it.”

Su Hao felt really embarrassed to trick this girl.

“The reason you’re here is to restore your potential, right?” Su Hao asked.

“En.” Mo Ling looked sad, “Although I have become a pseudo-emperor, I am no longer qualified to even take half a step forward.”

“Potential…”

Su Hao suddenly smiled, “Why don’t you follow me? Look, now humans and beasts are living in harmony. To be honest, except Heavenly Emperor Mingguang and Hydra who tries to create havoc, other people and beasts are getting along pretty well. I believe you also realized that right.”

“En.”

Mo Ling nodded. These were something she already knew.

“So…”

“If Hydra became the leader of beasts and destroyed humanity, do you think the life of the beasts will become better than it is now?”

Su Hao tried to persuade her.

“No.”

Mo Ling affirmed. What kind of days were the beasts experiencing in the past? Compared to humans, it was simply a primitive society!

“Now, that’s correct.”

Su Hao clapped his hands, “You can’t destroy the happiness of the beasts for the selfishness of these guys. As for Heavenly Emperor Mingguang… he and my dad are actually friends.”

Su Hao knew Mo Ling’s dilemma.

In the eyes of the beasts, a Heavenly Emperor’s words have to be listened.

“Your dad?”

Mo Ling was a little surprised.

“Yes, The World Exterminator Demon, Su Tiancheng.”

Su Hao shrugged, “At the beginning, my dad and Mingguang planned to destroy the world together. Now that Mingguang appeared while my dad’s whereabouts are unknown, no matter what, Mingguang’s mind won’t change. His aim is to destroy the world!”

“Destroy the world?”

A cold light flashed in Mo Ling’s eyes.

“Yes!”

Su Hao affirmed, “Including all humans and beasts, every living thing in the world!”

“How dare he!”

Mo Ling was surprisingly angry.

Obviously, she didn’t notice that in her subconscious mind, her trust in Su Hao had surpassed that of Heavenly Emperor. After all, during the treatment earlier, she inadvertently gave her life to Su Hao. Su Hao could easily kill her if he wishes to. This is what trust is all about!

If Su Hao wants to deal with her, would he even resort to such a lie?

There was no need to.

Thus…

Su Hao didn’t lie to her, right?

“What’s your goal then?”

“Since Mingguang commanded you all to come over, presumably, his real purpose should be along the line of destroying the world.” Su Hao was doubtful.

“Not sure.”

Mo Ling shook her head slightly, “We don’t know. Our goal is to weaken humanity’s strength, especially you geniuses, but it seems to be vaguely related to the center of this vortex.”

“As I expected.”

Su Hao affirmed his suspicions, “If all Nine Great Despairs are destroyed, this world may have problems. Then…”

“Nine Great Despairs?”

Mo Ling was puzzled.

“En.”

Su Hao took a deep breath, “Although I’m not sure, according to my guess, this world is also made up of ten boundary spirits. The Nine Great Despairs are nine of them! Although the last one is unknown, with this Great Despairs’ destruction, the tenth one will definitely reveal itself!”

“Ten boundary spirits? The world?”

Mo Ling was shocked.

“Yes, you’re right.”

Su Hao was very sure, “Mingguang had destroyed Tiankeng in the dark. No, the only place left intact out of Nine Great Despairs is here. Didn’t you notice that with more Great Despairs are destroyed, the cultivation speed seems to be faster and more geniuses are born? This is the big problem.”

“Then, if this place is destroyed, my family…”

Mo Ling realized the problem.

“So, this is no longer a problem between humans and beasts.”

Su Hao stretched out his hand, “Will you protect this place together?”

“Alright!”

A smile appeared on Mo Ling’s face.

Ten boundary spirits are of great importance. With a crisis ahead, both wouldn’t have to worry about other factors too much! Moreover, because of the crisis encountered by mankind, Mo Ling turned into a qilin.

“Hop on me, I am faster than you.” Mo Ling’s clear voice sounded.

“Thank you.” Su Hao rode her back, but always felt a little awkward.

At this time, curiosity flashed across the big eyes of Mo Ling suddenly. She stretched out a hand, and placed it in Su Hao’s pocket. Little Bear was caught out.

“Hey, so cute.”

Little Bear: “…”

Motionless!

It was lying down without any motion completely!

Who did I provoke by lying down inside and resting? Little Bear was more than ready to get angry when it suddenly felt a terrifying aura. That was the almighty aura of Mo Ling!

It suddenly calmed down.

“So cute, I will play with it first.”

Mo Ling hung Little Bear on her body.

Yes.

Hang!

A layer of azure blue rope hung Little Bear on her. Yes, Little Bear who hadn’t appeared for a long time suddenly realized that it had become a pendant!

A bear pendant!

At the beginning, it mocked Li Xin’s Erha for being a mount. As for it? Who would have thought that it didn’t even have the qualification to be a mount, but a mount ornament?

“Aaahhhhhhhh, I don’t want to be a pendant! Aaaahhhhhhhh!”

Little Bear yelled frantically inside, but no one could hear it.

Boom!

Waves soared up the sky.

Mo Ling left Su Hao to the deepest part of the endless sea.

Based on Mo Ling’s words, others would probably encounter their opponent like him, but Su Hao could only trust them. Even if they couldn’t defeat them, they should be fine in escaping, right?

Right now, he had no time to help them.

The endless sea was too huge.

Without knowing their location, it was akin to finding a needle in a haystack! Moreover, the beasts were obviously trying to delay for time! Su Hao must go there as soon as possible!

“If you can win, then just run to the deepest part of the endless sea.”

Waves flickered.

Su Hao’s figure vanished together with Mo Ling, who had the appearance of a qilin with a bear pendant hanging on her waist!

Endless Sea.

Erha was sprinting hard, dragging Li Xin along. Suddenly a dazzling starlight appeared, turning the sky into night.

“Again?!” Li Xin shouted.

He was so familiar with this scene as he had seen it too many times in the virtual world.

“Where’s that evildoer?!”

Li Xin yelled, “Quickly show up now! Are you trying to avenge Chen Xing? Are you the son or grandson of Chen Xing? Boy, you’re too naive. I am a man destined to stand on the top of the world! Any villain who attempts to eliminate me are all cannon fodders!”

“…”

Far away, a figure revealed himself.

Chen Xing appeared, but his facial expression was akin to eating something bad. Obviously, what Li Xin said earlier made him feel disgusted.

“A ghost!”

Li Xin was startled when he saw Chen Xing with a disheveled look.

“Damn, aren’t you dead?”

“Could it be a lonely soul asking for my life?”

Li Xin pondered, “Yes, as a protagonist, I can understand this kind of extraordinary treatment.”

“…”

Chen Xing was full of black lines. Watching Li Xin start to talk to himself again, Chen Xing reminded him, “Last time, it was just a virtual game…”

“Huh?”

Li Xin thought for a moment, “Oh, then why are you here?”

“Huh?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1051 - The Strongest Esper!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1051 - The Strongest Esper!

Chapter 1051: The strongest esper!

Boom!

Boom!

Endless attacks fell.

The sky was full of lightning as if it represents the anger of God. Zhou Wang’s figure was so small within the sky of lightning. The golden glow emitted shined over the entire Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

“Zhou Wang!”

Everyone was stunned.

Did this guy go mad?

What kind of attack was that that he even dared to charge head-on?

Boom!

All attacks were blasted toward Zhou Wang.

Zhou Wang’s eyes were cold. Looking at everyone, he could actually still smile, “I have walked through thousands of mountains and rivers, looking for my master’s inheritance. When I found it, I realized that the so-called inheritance is actually a talent attribute and this attribute only has one function!”

“Refine thunder!”

“I used to think that I am the King of Lightning. No one could match me in this. So, what’s the point of having this attribute? Thus, it has never shown its potential.”

“However, now…”

Boom!

The golden light fell on Zhou Wang.

Instantly, Zhou Wang turned into a giant sun. That terrifying light emitted from him was so bright that one couldn’t open their eyes. The sky was filled with endless golden light.

Boom!

Everyone lost their sight.

Soon, the golden light faded. When they regained their vision, there was only that brilliance of lightning, Zhou Wang.

“Be quiet for me!”

Zhou Wang shook his hand, and the sky suddenly went silent.

What kind of majesty was that?

Zhou Wang’s body slowly stretched and a smile appeared on his cold face, “This is true power! This isn’t Rule Force, but the unmatched Supreme Rule!”

Wandering between lightning, Zhou Wang strolled leisurely.

At this time, the surrounding that was full of thunder was akin to a good kid, quietly surrendering to Zhou Wang

“What a great guy.”

Everyone marveled.

“How do you feel?” Su Hao breathed a sigh of relief.

“It’s fine.”

Zhou Wang was getting used to this power, “I can hold it down but that’s it. This is the Supreme Rule belonging to the strongest esper. I can’t absorb at all, and can only control it briefly! The moment I leave here, these thunder bolts will return to normal.”

“Then, what do we do?”

Everyone started to feel a headache.

“You all get through here.”

Zhou Wang waved his hand, “I will just stay here and get familiar with this power and learn the so-called Supreme Rule at the same time. If a beast tries to break in…”

“I will let it experience the power of the strongest esper!”

Zhou Wang sounded proud.

Wasn’t that the case? To be able to control the golden thunder, Zhou Wang was comparable to the strongest esper!

Who would dare to approach him?

Him standing there was like an immortal monument. Forget about Hydra, even if all the pseudo-emperors were to charge here, they shall not pass!

“Alright.”

Only then did everyone leave in peace.

Zhou Wang sat cross-legged. His expression was extremely happy. Being surrounded by the golden light, countless phantoms vaguely floated behind Zhou Wang like a golden crown!

The current him was akin to the true strongest esper!

Su Hao and the others continued their journey.

In this endless vortex, everyone was floating.

As everyone progressed, the path behind became more and more difficult. The color of the sea was getting darker, and when a drop of water accidentally fell, it almost obliterated Zheng Tai on the spot.

A drop of water could be that scary!

What about this entire sea then?

Fly?

Useless!

Everyone was flying!

However, an instantaneous wave of hundreds of meters in height, that endless sea wouldn’t be calm at all. If you’re not careful, one wave will arrive and wipe the entire team!

This was the horror of the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

Boom!

Yet another wave of hundreds of meters came.

Everyone avoided it in a thrilling manner.

This was the path’s condition of the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea. It was irregular and extremely dangerous. At first, everyone could still deal with the sea water, but once they entered the deepest region…

Each drop of water became a killer move!

The moment it touches you…

You die.

“Be careful.”

Su Hao took a deep breath.

World Force couldn’t stop it!

Just now Zheng Tai was rubbed by a drop of water and half of his body was almost destroyed. Su Hao urgently used Realization on him to help return his state to normal. Otherwise…

Zheng Tai would instantly be a cripple!

Boom!

Boom!

Wave after wave kept coming, and the splashing water droplets kept them alert.

Suddenly, a torrent rushed out from below, rushing towards them.

Danger!

Su Hao’s pupils shrank suddenly.

It’s too late!

Boom!

As light emitted from his body, Su Hao directly blocked it for everyone. However, who would have thought that at this moment, a beautiful figure flashed.

Su Hao trembled.

Chen Yiran?

Boom!

As the endless sea water impacted, a cluster of dazzling water waves emerged. The incoming seawater didn’t cause her any harm after falling on Chen Yiran.

“Yiran?”

Su Hao sounded a bit worried.

Boom!

Chen Yiran waved her hands.

A layer of invisible waves flashed.

This covered the entire Secret Realm of Deepest Sea, and it was sufficient to destroy countless world espers. After the fluctuation was over, the sea gradually calmed down.

This treacherous sea quickly returned to being calm.

What kind of shock was that?

“Sure enough…”

“Virtuous like water!”

“Master indeed didn’t say it incorrectly.”

Chen Yiran softly spoke.

This was what Su Wan passed to her at the beginning. A drop of water was enough to obliterate everything. The victory in the Battle of Glory, everything lies in that drop of water.

After arriving here, Chen Yiran unexpectedly found out.

That dripping water!

It was the exact same structure as the water droplet here!

Or to be precise, Su Wan’s water droplet killer move originated from here!

Master Su Wan, she really came here before?

The one inside, was it really Su Hao’s father?

In other words, from the moment Su Wan taught her, she already guessed that one day, she will accompany Su Hao to this Secret Realm of Deepest Sea?

Water droplet, the suffering in the extreme polar, it was all for this moment?

Chen Yiran suddenly understood everything.

With a wave of hand, Heaven and Earth regained its peace.

“Are you alright?”

Su Hao was a little worried.

“It’s fine.”

Chen Yiran smiled sweetly, “It’s just that I’m afraid I can’t go on. I originally wanted to accompany you to the end, but it seems that I can only stay here.”

“You want to stay too?”

Su Hao was stunned.

“En.”

A stream of water emerged from Chen Yiran’s hands.

“This force…”

“It’s a Supreme Rule that is beyond my current comprehension. Only by staying here can I control the entire Secret Realm of Deepest Sea. Otherwise, there will be no way for us to continue later!” Chen Yiran said.

“That’s good too.”

Su Hao breathed a sigh of relief, “At least it’s safe here.”

“Wait for my return!”

Feeling relieved, he left.

“Alright.”

Chen Yiran sat cross-legged.

Just like Zhou Wang, she was comprehending the power of a Supreme Rule, the power of the strongest esper. This was a touch of the bottleneck that was without a doubt a blessing from heaven.

Whether it was Zhou Wang or Chen Yiran.

Buzz~

A rich blue brilliance flashed around Chen Yiran.

No one noticed that behind her, countless shadows also emerged. That was a crown! At this moment, in this deep ocean.

She reached the level of the strongest esper!

The sea was calm.

Su Hao and the others had a smoother journey than ever before.

The sea was very scary, but once the wind and waves were calm, there was no longer any threat to them. As long as they left the sea, there wouldn’t be any problem flying.

“We’re about to leave.” Su Hao sounded excited.

They were getting closer and closer to the deepest part of the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

As the sea calmed down, everyone moved forward at a fast pace. Soon, they reached the deepest region, and when they arrived, everyone was shocked again.

This is the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

This is the deepest region.

Unexpectedly, there was still a vortex, a small one with strange light rays. Over there, there was even an entrance.

“How could this be?”

Su Hao frowned slightly, “There is a deeper region to the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea?”

“It’s different from what I saw”

Wan Cheng’s eyes turned cold, “The deepest region I saw, there were endless waves, and the surrounding was full of nothing but blue! It should be under the sea!”

“Under the sea?”

Su Hao looked at the vortex.

“In other words, we should dive inside and go under the sea?”

“It should be.”

“Alright.” Su Hao nodded, and a stand-in entered the vortex.

Boom!

The vortex twisted.

A terrifying force came and killed Su Hao’s stand-in immediately.

Everyone sucked in a mouthful of air.

Again?

“What kind of force was that?”

Everyone was horrified.

That was a small vortex.

With only less than ten meters in diameter, it didn’t even cause any fluctuation around it. With just light emitted from it, the endless brilliance was like a nightmare.

However, as long as something approaches or even attempts to enter, it will be beheaded by a strange force.

“Let me try again.”

Su Hao adjusted his body this time and used a substitute again.

Swish!

The substitute entered.

“Huh?”

Everyone was shocked. It actually managed to enter?

“Could it be because my adjustment is right?”

Su Hao was taken aback for a moment before sending out an identical stand-in again.

Boom!

The stand-in was strangled.

He tried again.

It got strangled again.

“Something is amiss.”

Su Hao thought for a moment. This time there was no need for a stand-in because it was too wasteful. Instead, he created a few ordinary footballs and kicked them in.

Swish!

One ball managed to enter.

It was safe and sound as always!

“It entered again.”

Everyone glanced at each other in dismay.

What was going on?

“Again!”

Su Hao raised his foot to shoot.

It got strangled!

A powerful force smashed the ball.

Snap, snap, snap!

Su Hao kicked dozens of times, and after countless tests, everyone finally knew what this so-called strangulation was all about.

Life?

It only aim at lives?

No, no, it had never been this!

The strangulations were completely irregular!

Su Hao finally fully fired up the quantum computer and quickly obtained the final result The so-called strangulation in this vortex was completely random.

And the probability was 80%!

In other words, there is an 80% chance that anyone who tries to pass this vortex will be strangled, regardless of strength or status. This really stunned everyone.

There was actually such an absurd thing?
