chapters.title: Chapter 1053 - I’M Sorry, I Did My Best Already
chapters.body:
Chapter 1053 - I’M Sorry, I Did My Best Already

Chapter 1053: I’m sorry, I did my best already

“It’s really him!”

Wan Cheng sounded excited.

Wave Force!

It really exists here, the source of Wave Force he saw before! This vortex is derived from the source of Wave Force.

As for Su Hao, looking at this figure, he was startled for a second, “Synchronize Space!”

Swish!

Countless brilliance shrouded.

Su Hao tried to see the situation clearly through Synchronize Space but it was ineffective. Synchronize Space could even be used against a pseudo-emperor, but it actually ended up failing…

At this time, Su Hao remembered.

Yes.

This place is the stage of Supreme Rule.

True Supreme Rule! How could his World Force be effective here?

“Is he your father?” Zheng Tai quietly asked.

“Not sure.” Su Hao shook his head slightly and shouted, “Hello?”

No one answered.

“It must be because of the seal.”

Wan Cheng frowned slightly, “I just studied that wave seal. It’s different from other forces. It’s too weird that no one could crack it. Moreover, once one is sealed inside, sound, touch, and other things are literally blocked. It’s even more terrifying than Gao Ming’s Nine Seals.”

“Is he asleep?” Su Hao asked.

“No”

Wan Cheng shook his head, “His consciousness is sober. That feeling is akin to an infinitely enhanced version of Little Dark Room. It will even directly made one commit suicide subconsicously.”

“Damn it.”

Su Hao’s heart went tight. That person, he wouldn’t commit suicide, right?

“Is he still alive?” Su Hao asked nervously.

“Not sure.”

Wan Cheng looked faintly and had a closer look, “Only after the seal is broken can we be sure, but once it’s broken, this place would be completely over.”

“It doesn’t matter.”

Su Hao coldly continued, “Our goal is to save him. As long as we save him, everything is worth it.”

“Alright.” Wan Cheng nodded.

Things shouldn’t be too late, and these people weren’t one who hesitates. After understanding the whole picture in short, he quickly made his move. Wan Cheng started to feel the Wave Force and prepared to crack it.

“How do you feel?” Su Hao softly said.

“It’s very complicated.”

Wan Cheng smiled bitterly, “The amount of data is too big.”

“Hold on.”

Su Hao calmly said while pointing at Wan Cheng, “Open your sea of consciousness.”

As soon as Wan Cheng opened his sea of consciousness, he felt a terrifying foreign consciousness instilled in it. It was Su Hao’s powerful consciousness and this consciousness…

It made Wan Cheng’s mind clearer than ever.

“If there’s anything that needs to be calculated, just pass it directly into that consciousness. Then, just roughly give the requirement for the result that needs to be deduced. For example, if you pass in a route with more than three thousand seals, it will give you an answer in an instant where that route comes from.”

Su Hao took the initiative to activate the quantum computer.

“Alright.”

Wan Cheng excitedly said. Sealing and cracking, what is one afraid the most?

Complicated calculations!

And right now, Su Hao’s horrifying calculation speed could solve it instantly for him. It was like the difference between someone using a hand to calculate and someone using a machine to assist when running various super-complex mathematical formulas.

This was simply cheating!

“Three minutes.”

Wan Cheng quickly calculated the result, “As long as I have three minutes, I can crack it.”

“Alright.”

Su Hao took a deep breath.

For three minutes, he could afford to wait, but could it be that Mingguang still didn’t notice anything? Hope that everything will be on time…

Three minutes.

In just three minutes, everything will be revealed.

Su Hao looked at that figure with a little confusion.

…..

Endless Sea.

At the center, Wang Ru and the others were standing there.

At this time, a figure slowly walked from a distance. He was wearing white clothes like snow, emitting the elegant fairy wind while holding a folding fan. However, he looked much younger than Wang Ru.

“Who?”

Wang Ru and the others quickly became alert.

One couldn’t blame them for being nervous. This is after all the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea! For a young man to come at this time, how could he not surprise them?

Beast?

No, they didn’t see any sign of a beast’s aura in that person.

Human?

Not sure.

“Who are you?” Wang Ru asked coldly.

“Me?”

The warm voice slowly drifted away.

“Oh, you must be Wang Ru.”

That young man in white smiled.

“You know me?”

A cold light flashed in Wang Ru’s eyes.

“Of course, any existence who has the chance to be the strongest esper, I will remember all, but you’re unfortunately a bit too old.” That man in white calmly said.

“Courting death!”

Cheng Tianya yelled, “Is Wang Ru someone you can comment on?”

“Cheng Tianya?”

That man in white glanced at him, “That temper is still as hot as ever. If you are able to tone it down a bit, perhaps your distance to become the strongest esper might be one step away.”

“Hmmpphh!”

Cheng Tianya sneered, “It’s not your turn to educate us. Who are you? A beast? Hydra?”

“Hydra?”

That man in white smiled, “He’s not qualified to appoint me. Let me introduce myself to everyone. This humble servant’s name is…”

“Mingguang.”

Boom!

Like a thunder struck to the ground, Wang Ru and the others trembled.

Mingguang!

He turned out to be Mingguang!

Everyone was horrified. No one would have thought that after they waited here for a while, before they met Hydra and the others, they actually met Mingguang first!

This is a huge trouble.

“What are you doing here?”

Wang Ru had a bitter face.

“I thought you all already guessed it long ago?”

Mingguang was as calm as ever.

“Ah, yes.”

Mingguang looked at the time suddenly before a smile appeared on his face, “Sorry everyone. There is only less than three minutes left. Please make way for me.”

Wang Ru and the others looked at each other.

Boom!

Several people blocked Mingguang’s path.

“Heavenly Emperor?”

“We are all also half-step strongest espers!”

“If you have invincible strength, you would have destroyed the world a long time ago, so why now? Your strength is either limited or not that strong.” Wang Ru said coldly.

“Not bad.”

Mingguang praised, “However, you all missed a bit.”

“That was once upon a time.”

Mingguang swept the folding fan in his hand.

Boom!

Light flashed.

A layer of light covered Wang Ru and the others. They roared and exploded with the power of half-step strongest esper. Terrifying force erupted from their hands.

However, Wang Ru and the others suddenly stiffened.

They never moved again.

“Half a step in is still half a step away.”

Mingguang casually passed through, as cool as ever.

Behind him, the expression of Wang Ru and the others remained the same over there. Only Wang Ru’s pupils had a trace of sadness.

Just as he said at the beginning.

As long as he lived, he would never let anyone pass by!

Sorry…

I have tried my best.

Su Hao, you guys must rescue that person!

…..

Endless Sea, just like that, a few more sculptures suspended in the air while maintaining the same expression without a sound.

Mingguang walked as usual.

Although his face didn’t show any sign of urgency, he was still keeping track of time.

There were two and a half minutes left.

Everything was the same as what he planned. Even this time, there was not a single second of error. The moment his strength recovered, no one could stop him!

“Humans?”

“Ignorant fools.”

Mingguang walked leisurely, but each step of his covered a hundred miles.

However, not long after he walked out, Mingguang suddenly stopped with a look of surprise in his eyes because at this time, a person stood in front of him.

A cold and proud young man.

What was even more incredible is that this young man, Mingguang had his information.

“Zhou Wang?”

Mingguang was shocked.

It wasn’t because of his identity as Zhou Wang, but because of the suspended crown behind Zhou Wang. Although it had not yet formed perfectly, it was still a sign of the strongest esper!

This young man actually touched that threshold?

This had far surpassed half-step strongest esper.

One could say that with one thought, he could become the strongest esper!

“Interesting.”

Mingguang was surprised.

“Heavenly Emperor Mingguang?”

Zhou Wang’s eyes were cold. Even if he knew this is a powerful Heavenly Emperor, he still didn’t have any slightest bit of timidness. The survival of this world was on the line, and there is no room for retreat!

“Get out of the way.”

“I don’t want to kill you.”

Mingguang frowned slightly. There were still two minutes and twenty-eight seconds left.

He hated wasting time.

“As long as I live, you will not be allowed to pass.” Zhou Wang stood proudly.

“Great.” Mingguang shook the folding fan in his hand and chopped down with a single action, “Then you will be destroyed.”

Buzz~

Light emerged.

Zhou Wang’s pupils shrank suddenly.

He could feel the terrifying power. Is this the power of a Heavenly Emperor? If it was his previous self, perhaps even one hundred of him couldn’t stop it, right?

What a pity!

The current him…

Boom!

Thunderbolts descended.

Zhou Wang made his move. That was a Supreme Rule! He was still far away from the true strongest esper, but in this region, he had the strength of the strongest esper!

Boom!

Two forces clashed.

Mingguang finally showed a surprise in his eyes because Zhou Wang even managed to wipe out his power.

“Supreme Rule?”

Mingguang’s eyes rolled, “Is this where your confidence comes from?”

“Naive.”

“Young man, let me show you what’s a real Supreme Rule.”

Swish!

Mingguang directed countless forces in his hand.

Time and space were still at this moment. Zhou Wang’s thunder was cut off and the powerful Supreme Rule was actually shattered forcefully. What kind of force was that?

Zhou Wang took a deep breath.

He finally knew what kind of opponent he was facing right now.

The strongest esper is indeed very strong.

However, the Heavenly Emperor in front of him was not an ordinary Emperor-ranked beast. If Zhou Wang guessed it correctly, this is the existence of the pinnacle of Emperor-ranked beasts!

This was just like having someone who just stepped into the world realm face a peak world esper. Only death awaits them!

Zhou Wang had the power of the strongest esper with the aid of the unique environment here!

However, he was still lacking.

“So, this is your strength?”

Zhou Wang took a deep breath.

“Erase!”

Mingguang opened the folding fan in his hand.

Behind Mingguang, a dazzling void suddenly appeared out of nowhere. Like a sun falling into a solar eclipse, with only the golden edge outline, the black region actually contained a real sun.

Boom!

The sun in the void turned out to be like a living thing.

In an instant, Mingguang turned into the sun!

Buzz~

The sky was full of white light.

“Not good.”

Zhou Wang’s heart skipped a beat.

chapters.title: Chapter 1055 - Lifting The Seal!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1055 - Lifting The Seal!

Chapter 1055: Lifting the seal!

Boom!

Mingguang attacked without hesitation.

Light emerged in the space, and it unexpectedly turned out to be totally empty. Just like a blank photo of Ping Yang, Mingguang smirked, “In my name, seal!”

Seal!

It turned out to be a seal!

Previously, Ping Yang could seal people into photos, but what about Mingguang?

He directly sealed one in a different space!

Whether it was that dragon, sun, or even moonlight, wasn’t each one of them extremely powerful?

Buzz~

Endless stream of light flashed.

Seal!

It was different from all the previous attacks!

This time, it turned out to be a seal!

Poof~

As soon as Mo Ling was about to make a move, she felt her soul tremble.

This was the suppression from the soul of a beast!

Even though she’s a qilin, even though she’s a pseudo-emperor, facing this Heavenly Emperor, she would still be suppressed. This was the powerful strict hierarchy system within beasts.

The moment when her soul trembled, the seal locked down Mo Ling.

“I just happen to be one pet short.”

“At first, I thought of taking you after everything is done!”

Mingguang had cold eyes.

“So, you have long labored with such intention?”

“Su Hao indeed was right.”

A smile appeared at the corner of Mo Ling’s mouth. The strength within her body was literally boiling, but it was useless. Facing the suppression of the soul and the seal at the same time, she couldn’t move.

“Surrender!”

Mingguang had cold eyes like a supreme king.

Swish!

The seal landed.

However, a shadow suddenly rushed out, which was accompanied by an angry roar, “Mo Ling, beat that damn dog for me!”

Mo Ling suddenly looked up.

It turned out to be Little Bear the ornament!

The little bear that she asked Su Hao to play with unexpectedly entered the seal instead of her. At this moment, Mo Ling broke out of it.

Boom!

The Supreme Rule of Earth skyrocketed.

Mo Ling’s strength was far superior to Chen Yiran and the others. When her true might burst, when the power of an Emperor-ranked beast erupted, her strength was not under Mingguang.

Boom!

A terrifying Supreme Rule invaded Mingguang’s body.

Poof~

Mingguang’s liver ruptured.

“Get lost!”

Mingguang was furious. His killing intent emerged, and the sun shined again, wiping out Mo Ling! That powerful seal fell to the ground. Inside it, it was Little Bear who just entered level one world realm.

Puff~

Mingguang staggered and almost fell to the ground.

Wiping the corner of his mouth, it was full of blood.

He’s not anyone but Mingguang!

The supreme emperor!

He held the sun and moon of the universe in his hand and controlled the world, how could he fall here? With only half a minute remaining, it should still be enough, right?

“Hmmpphh!”

Mingguang ignored the serious injuries on his body and headed toward the final destination.

Over there, one second is enough.

Boom!

At this time, Wan Cheng’s progress had reached the final moment.

“Courting death!”

Mingguang roared, and he actually forced his way in directly.

Wan Cheng didn’t even pay attention to him at all. He had been ignoring everything from the start. As for Su Hao, he stared at Mingguang the moment he charged in.

On Mingguang’s body, there were familiar auras.

Zhou Wang, Chen Yiran, Li Xin, Mo Ling…

Looking at the severely injured Mingguang, the result was self-evident.

Su Hao was instantly furious.

“Realization, Summon!”

Boom!

Su Hao’s body became so extremely weak that he almost fell to the ground.

All of his strength was used for Realization. When he finished, he created a copy of Mingguang!

A seriously injured Emperor-ranked beast!

If it was a normal Mingguang, one hundred Su Haos wouldn’t be enough to create it, but Su Hao managed to copy and create the seriously injured Mingguang!

“This is!”

Mingguang was stunned for a moment before he saw his other self attack.

Boom!

Both clashed.

In just a few seconds, these two Mingguangs were evenly matched!

There were 25 seconds left!

Mingguang looked ugly.

There were ten seconds left!

Mingguang’s face turned pale.

There were five seconds left!

Mingguang was already very anxious, and Wan Cheng’s unsealing had reached the final moment.

The final two seconds!

“Damn it!”

Mingguang erupted and was about to kill his opponent when he suddenly discovered that the other Mingguang had vanished. As for Su Hao, his face was already very pale.

He couldn’t maintain it anymore.

Even if the one he summoned is an injured one, that’s still an Emperor-ranked beast!

Without even using any powerful move, even under such basic conditions, that had consumed all of his power! The force consumption of Realization was evident.

However, these thirty seconds were enough.

When Mingguang just managed to get away, he discovered that the terrifying seal was actually lifted by Wan Cheng.

“Not good.”

Mingguang was shocked.

Boom!

A terrifying aura erupted, and the sound of countless chains rang.

Mingguang suddenly was a little pleased.

“Haha, so what if the seal is released? Your chains are still there. You can’t use your power at all. Su Hao and Wan Cheng have used up all their strength. Who can save you now?” Mingguang laughed wildly.

“Go to hell!”

Mingguang’s figure jumped up as he slammed towards that figure.

Wan Cheng and Su Hao were already so weak that they collapsed to the ground. Is it really over now?

Swish!

Mingguang slammed down.

At this moment, a figure suddenly sprang out of his own shadow, and that person’s hand had a weapon shining with strange light.

“Zheng Tai?”

Mingguang’s pupils contracted. When did this brat get into his shadow?

What’s with that item in his hand?

Bang!

A crisp sound rang.

Crack!

Crack!

That terrifying chain actually formed countless cracks, and it broke at a terrifying speed. Mingguang’s expression changed with just one glance.

“Run!”

Without any hesitation.

Mingguang turned around to flee!

However, just as he arrived at the entrance of the cave, not even 0.01 second passed, when he saw a terrifying giant hand coming from deep inside, grabbing him.

“Since you’re here, don’t even think of going back.”

Crack!

Mingguang’s figure actually got crushed forcefully!

That terrifying peak emperor-ranked beast, he died just like that? Everyone was terrified. What kind of terrifying guy did they release?

When that person turned around, Su Hao revealed a look of ecstasy.

Su Tiancheng!

The strongest esper sealed here was really Su Tiancheng!

Swish!

Su Tiancheng’s chain broke free suddenly and his eyes on Su Hao were full of pride, “Sure enough, you’re indeed Su Tiancheng’s son!

Su Hao clenched his fists until they turned pale.

Because he recalled Chen Yiran and the others…

His father was rescued, but Chen Yiran and the others were dead, and Mingguang was killed in seconds.

Is this the final ending?

Everything…

Is it going to end like this?

“They…”

Su Hao punched the bleeding marks with his fingers.

“The battle has just begun.”

Su Tiancheng suddenly uttered a sentence meaningfully.

“What?”

Su Hao was taken aback.

“Follow me.”

Su Tiancheng waved his hand. The space flowed, and they reached the place where Mo Ling died. Then, he said to Su Hao, “Do you still remember the Backtrack I left behind for you?”

“Huh?”

Su Hao froze for a moment.

“Be prepared.”

Su Tiancheng smiled lightly.

Boom!

Su Tiancheng displayed his Backtrack.

The scene changed.

A horrifying force kept flowing.

The scene of Mingguang fighting against Mingguang just now appeared in everyone’s eyes again until when Mo Ling died, everyone became even sadder.

“Son, make your move!” Su Tiancheng shouted.

Su Hao was awakened. Remembering what his father said earlier, he instantly used Universe Creator.

And then…

Unexpectedly, the figure of Mo Ling actually appeared in Kingdom of Heaven!

“Huh?”

Mo Ling was obviously at a loss, “I… am not dead?”

Mo Ling looked at herself and everything around her, feeling at a loss.

“Damn!”

Ping Yang was shocked, “Su Hao, you lolicon! You actually got another one!”

In reality, Zheng Tai and the others didn’t know what was going on, but Su Hao was stunned that he went into a daze. Is it useful to be able to control the universe? To be able to reverse the world, what a terrifying power that is!

What happened just now, wasn’t that already in the past?

How could…

“Again.”

Su Tiancheng led the way, and Su Hao took Chen Yiran, Li Xin, and Zhou Wang all into the Kingdom of Heaven one after another! Over there, Zhou Wang and the others were reborn again!

As for Li Tiantian, he was even more pleasantly surprised.

“Chen Yiran? How did you die?”

“Zhou Wang, you’re also dead?”

“Haha, even Li Xin, you fool also died?”

“You died well, you died well, haha.”

When Chen Yiran and the others turned sober, they found that there was a crazy Li Tiantian beside them. This guy… wasn’t he dead already?

Li Tiantian was extremely excited.

However, he had obviously forgotten the impact of his rebirth after death.

Thus…

“A ghost!”

With a scream, Li Tiantian was beaten into a pig head.

After explaining it, they realized this Kingdom of Heaven is Su Hao’s true trump card, an actual world!

In reality, Su Hao opened Synchronize Space and let them all watch. Although everyone was dead, for Su Hao, they were still alive!

Su Hao was still shocked.

This is the strength of my father?

Killing Mingguang with one hand, reversing life in a flash?

However, Su Hao remembered Su Tiancheng’s words, “The battle has just begun. What does that mean?”

“Do you think that if Mingguang made his move, Chen Yiran and the others could survive?” Su Tiancheng smiled lightly.

“Nope.” Su Hao affirmed.

This was also the strange part he noticed earlier. Reversing the universe, his father was able to rescue those who were obliterated by a Peak Emperor-ranked? This was never possible!

That was after all not just any beast but a Peak Emperor-ranked one!

When he attacked, everything would be obliterated! Once the body dies, the past, future, and present will all vanish. This was the terrifying aspect of a Peak Emperor-ranked.

Could it be…

Su Hao suddenly thought of something.

“You’re right.”

Su Tiancheng sneered, “This time, it’s only a clone of Mingguang. Otherwise, why do you think I can destroy him with one hand? If it’s his real body, no matter how strong, all talents would be truly obliterated!”

“A clone?”

Su Hao took a deep breath. If that was his actual body, Chen Yiran and the others…

“A clone is already this powerful?”

Yes.

Too strong!

One needs to know, they had used a Supreme Rule, yet they still lost to a clone?

“The power of a Peak Emperor-ranked is definitely not something that you can imagine.” Su Tiancheng shook his head slightly.

Su Hao and the others nodded.

At this time, Wan Cheng suddenly said, “Then, why didn’t he come here personally?”

Yes.

Why didn’t he come with his real body?

If the real Mingguang came, forget that everyone will die, at least, Su Tiancheng couldn’t be saved! That being the case, why didn’t he come?

Why only a clone?

What is his goal?

chapters.title: Chapter 1057 - Charging Towards The World Summit!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1057 - Charging Towards The World Summit!

Chapter 1057: Charging towards the world summit!

“It turned out…”

“That is Mingguang’s goal?”

Su Hao pondered.

No wonder his father said that the battle has just begun. Indeed, it had just begun…

All the truth was now revealed!

However, Su Hao always felt that his father didn’t reveal a certain part.

For example…

The part regarding Mingguang!

How did he meet Mingguang?

What is Mingguang?

What is his original body?

Seeing that a decisive battle was about to start, shouldn’t his father tell him the truth? However, each time he mentioned Mingguang, Su Tiancheng would only simply touch the surface.

Mingguang…

Who is he?

Su Hao was extremely curious.

“The next battle, it’s not your guys’ turn yet.”

“You all go and have a good rest.”

Su Tiancheng said indifferently, “The reason I told so many things to you guys is to hope you all can have a good rest. Don’t interfere with this matter any more. Leave the rest to me. Since the world summit has appeared, Mingguang should already have arrived there by now. The rest of the battle, leave them to us…”

Su Tiancheng muttered to himself.

Fight!

The strongest esper and Emperor-ranked beast!

This could be said as the top battle so far!

Just as Su Tiancheng said, Su Hao couldn’t get involved with the next battle. In Secret Realm of Deepest Sea, he only managed to resist Mingguang for 30 seconds before exhausting every bit of his strength before almost dying tragically. If it wasn’t because Mingguang wanted to kill Su Tiancheng in a hurry, he would have easily killed Su Hao. Also those few others…

Their fate was the same too!

Chen Yiran, Li Xin, Zhou Wang, and Mo Ling were equivalent to the strongest esper yet they had all fallen!

And these were the price for this battle. They had already used the strength far exceeding their capability, yet they failed to defeat a clone of Mingguang? Then what about the main body?

Crack!

Su Hao”s fists were clenched until they went pale.

It was the same thing all over again!

In the past, he had already told himself to not experience such feelings again!

However, even when he had become a peak world esper, it was still the same case. He could only watch from the sidelines!

“Smelly brat.”

Su Tiancheng patted him on the shoulder, “Don’t think too much. Wait until I extinguish the light. Then we will have a proper conversation. After being sealed for so long, I could barely wait for it.”

Buzz~

Su Tiancheng raised his hand.

Countless light rays flashed, and everyone returned to the Federation from the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

At this time, Su Tiancheng once again traveled through space and his arrogant voice echoed in the air, “Look at me destroy that grandson Mingguang!”

Everyone: “…”

From the looks of it, it should be fine, right?

The scene when Su Tiancheng killed Mingguang’s clone in seconds replayed in everyone’s mind. That was an absolute strength, it was too strong for them to imagine.

This is Su Tiancheng’s strength.

Once he was unsealed, no one could beat him!

“So impressive…”

Everyone said in amazement.

“Don’t worry. Since he’s taking action, we should not be worried about Mingguang anymore.”

Wan Cheng persuaded.

Su Hao went silent. He just looked toward the direction where Su Tiancheng left and slowly said, “You know what? My father won’t say this much on normal days.”

“Huh?”

Everyone froze for a moment.

Even if he was sealed for so many years, if he really became a chatterbox due to a mental disorder, that’s understandable but he’s obviously not. His spirit and soul is extremely stable. This shows that my father hasn’t been affected by the long period of seal at all. For him to suddenly have this much words, it gives me a bad feeling.”

“What?”

“A feeling that he’s giving his final words.”

Su Hao spat out these few words coldly, and everyone trembled.

“Then what do you want to do?” Wan Cheng asked.

“The world summit!”

Su Hao”s eyes turned cold.

“Can you join the fight?”

“Even if I can’t join the fight, I need to see it myself. I have too many doubts.”

Su Hao looked at the world summit, “Since my father is strong, who sealed him? To seal my father for so many years, yet Mingguang wasn’t sealed? With such a difference in strength, can my father still give a fight? If he can’t, why does he have so much self-confidence to be able to wipe out Mingguang? Could it be kamikaze?”

As for the truth…

What exactly was it?

Mingguang wanted to destroy the world. What’s his reasoning behind this action?

Just when these few people were puzzled, the aura belonging to the world summit suddenly escaped madly, and that endless brilliance spread all over the world.

The world summit had finally descended completely!

Everyone was on high alert.

Mingguang should be taking action soon, right?

As expected…

Just when everyone thought about it, a stream of light blasted toward the world summit. Mingguang had been preparing for this a long time ago. That terrifying, heaven-defying power could only leave a few traces on the world summit. The defense of the world summit…

It was far beyond everyone’s imagination.

“This move…”

Everyone was terrified, but they couldn’t see it.

The world summit was too far away from them!

“Hold on…”

Su Hao closed his eyes.

Soon a virtual screen appeared in front of him and countless data streams flashed by. In just three seconds, Su Hao used his quantum computer to bypass the Federation”s defense network to gain the highest control. The satellite that was originally aloft suddenly aimed elsewhere on the earth under Su Hao’s control.

Swish!

A scene appeared.

On the screen, a mountain range full of strange aura appeared. It was full of brilliance, and each pattern gave the onlookers an unbelievable feeling. There were countless strange runes and powers within them. If anyone saw this scene, they would be surprised because…

These comprised all of the Rule Force!

That was the state of the current world summit.

“This is the defensive realm?”

Everyone was shocked.

“Infinite self-repair and reaction, the world summit has too many Rule Force after all but…” After Su Hao explained, he looked over, “At this level, it’s not as fast as Mingguang’s attack!”

That’s right.

Mingguang alone against the world summit!

That was the fusion of all Rule Force and World Force since the existence of the world summit. As for Mingguang…

He confronted such force alone.

He was literally invincible!

“This battle, I really can’t join it?”

An unwilling look flashed in Su Hao’s eyes.

However, he understood that his current self can only serve as cannon fodder if he joins!

Wrong.

Without the strength of the strongest esper, he didn’t even deserve to be a cannon fodder!

After all, Mingguang’s true body was the peak emperor-ranked!

Then…

When could only they fight Mingguang? Mingguang is the peak emperor-ranked. No matter how heaven-defying Su Hao is, he needs to be the strongest esper first before being qualified to do so, right?

The strongest esper…

Su Hao felt a bit bitter.

In order to breakthrough that damn world realm, he had used way too long. Although he became a peak world esper as soon as he broke through, that process was hard to forget. To be the strongest esper, that legendary figure, and able to control Supreme Rule, how could it be simple?

Should he just spectate the battle then?

That would be even more impossible!

That tone of Su Tiancheng when he left was still fresh in Su Hao’s memory!

To let his father fight like that?

Is it possible?

Perhaps…

He had made the preparation to die together?

No, absolutely mustn’t!

Su Hao had worked so hard before he managed to find him. How could Su Hao give up just like that?

“Mingguang, is he really that strong?”

Su Hao looked at the Mingguang on the screen. His eyes flashed in red and blue lights, “A peak emperor-ranked, do you really have no flaws?”

At the world summit…

Boom!

Boom!

Each attack produced a quake.

This is what Mingguang is capable of!

“Just a mere world summit.”

“A bunch of waste.”

Mingguang’s eyes were cold. Facing the terrifyingly huge world summit that one couldn’t see the peak, only disdain could be seen in his eyes.

“Hmmpphh!”

An icy voice emerged.

Countless law enforcers emerged from the world summit. They couldn’t wait for the world summit to be destroyed before appearing because they are the guards here!

“You guys again.”

Mingguang’s eyes had a quick glance.

Sure enough, the girl in the lead was the same law enforcer who tried to catch Su Hao last time.

However, compared to last time, she was much stronger now. The previous her, who was just a peak world esper, had now entered the ranks of the strongest esper!

Boom!

A laser flashed

A powerful attack unexpectedly repelled Mingguang.

Mingguang stopped his hands, and for the first time ever looked at that girl properly, “The strongest esper? Interesting, you can still improve?”

“Nope.”

The law enforcer was as cold as ever, “The reason for having the strength of the strongest esper because this is the world summit! When the world summit is attacked, the limiter would be lifted.”

“Anyone who tries to attack the world summit will be obliterated!”

“And this time…”

“Mingguang, you will be the ultimate goal of all law enforcers!”

“Priority: Top level.”

The law enforcer coldly said.

“Hahahahah, then I’m really honored.” Mingguang laughed it off.

“Time to kill him!”

The law enforcer ordered.

“Ridiculous.”

A smile appeared at the corner of Mingguang’s mouth, “If the Nine Great Despairs are still there, I certainly wouldn’t dare to attack you. Unfortunately, only this world summit is left. Without the maintenance of the other powers, how can you destroy me? Just a mere world summit…”

“Haha.”

“Get lost!”

Mingguang’s folded fan waved, and bright light dispersed.

Boom!

Those law enforcers, who possessed the strength of the strongest esper, were blown out!

This is the current strength of Mingguang.

When he was in the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea, his clone was already so powerful; let alone his true body now. Facing these fools, who only had the strength of the strongest esper, it was a total massacre! The only one who didn’t get blasted away turned out to be the leader of the law enforcers.

“You’re indeed different.”

Mingguang looked at her with interest, “To be frank, at times I really want to open you all up and see what kind of species you are…”

The law enforcer became furious.

However, thinking of what happened back then, her hatred grew even more,”You guys are truly shameless!”

“You guys?”

Mingguang suddenly noticed the word guys, “What do you mean?”

“Stop pretending!”

The law enforcer raged, “Totally shameless!”

Boom!

The strength of the strongest esper broke out. An unbelievable sharp edge burst out from the girl’s hand, and for the first time, a puzzled look appeared on Mingguang’s face.

What do you mean by… you guys?

chapters.title: Chapter 1059 - Appear! Pika… No, Little Bear!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1059 - Appear! Pika… No, Little Bear!

Chapter 1059: Appear! Pika… No, Little Bear!

“Uh…”

Li Xin opened his mouth, but he didn’t say any amusing words.

He got scared.

Even Zhou Wang, who had always been calm, had his mouth agape.

Chen Yiran, who had always been elegant, looked at the supreme existence and couldn’t regain her composure even after a long time. Only then did she mutter to herself, “What a complicated relationship between mother-in-law and daughter-in-law…”

Su Hao rolled his eyes.

Can you guys stop making trouble?

Shouldn’t he be the one who turned craziest?!

Su Tiancheng said before that he had the bloodline of creation, but he never realized how terrifying it is. At this time, he understood the meaning behind his father’s words.

It turned out that his mother is the master of the world?

The daughter of the creator?

Su Hao felt that his views of this world were completely subverted.

Thinking of how his mother was busy every day to ensure both of her son and daughter’s happiness, Su Hao suddenly had a complicated look. This mother…

Is she still the same old mother?

Yes.

It must be!

Su Hao was very sure.

Back then, when his mother didn’t lose her memory, she was willing to take the initiative to seal it in order to take care of him and Su Ling, but now both mother and children had been dependent on each other for 20 years, right?

Su Hao suddenly smiled.

Yes, no matter how strong she is, she would still be his mother!

At the world summit, Mingguang stood there.

Around him, there were law enforcers who had fully recovered and they surrounded him tightly. At the moment Li Xiaoru returned, not only did they completely recover, their strength even surged and became the true strongest espers! As for the young girl, Li Xiaoru’s younger sister, her strength had also surged at this time.

The world summit had restored its former glory!

Mingguang sneered.

After several shocks, the current Mingguang had returned to his norm. After all, he was someone with a meticulous mind who had planned for ten years. How could he be shaken by this?

“Yes, I was indeed misled by all of you.”

Mingguang said faintly, “However, so what if I was misled? So what if this world is different from what I thought? So what if you are the peak strongest esper?”

“You are still not my opponent!”

Mingguang’s pupils changed color.

“My goal is to become the supreme god!”

“How can you hinder me?”

Boom!

Terrifying aura permated, and Mingguang’s aura broke out completely.

This was the first time that Mingguang had burst out with his full strength as a peak emperor-ranked beast. When one saw this scene, everyone was shocked.

Because, just with that aura alone, it could suppress them!

It was as if…

A peak world esper was going against a domain esper; in fact, it was even easier than that.

This was the gap.

“So, this is our opponent?” Zhou Wang smiled bitterly.

“A peak emperor-ranked beast.” Mo Ling whispered.

“Damn.”

Li Xin cursed while Erha panted rapidly beside him.

Yes, this was their opponent. If it wasn’t Mingguang’s clone confronting them, these fake strongest espers would probably be directly crushed!

How could they even hurt Mingguang?

Now that they thought about it, when did they even stop him? It was obviously them courting death instead!

“Mingguang’s strength is extremely powerful.”

Su Hao’s face was solemn.

The quantum computer was fully activated as he analyzed the strength of those two. Back then, his father Su Tiancheng and Mingguang most likely defeated his mother Li Xiaoru and sister. Then…

What about now?

Su Hao suddenly felt something was amiss.

Right now, at the world summit…

Mingguang coldly said Su Hao’s concerns, “Back then, you were defeated by Su Tiancheng, and your sister wasn’t my opponent. Now with you two joining hands, you think you can defeat me?”

“What a joke!”

“Twenty years have passed.”

“When you left the world summit, has there ever been any improvement in strength?”

“No!”

“And I have been improving!”

“After healing my injuries, I have regained my glory, and even after cultivating for several years, I have reached a bottleneck where I can no longer make any progress!”

“I’m only one step away, just one more step.” Mingguang coldly said.

As he spoke, his aura became stronger and stronger ,and he soon reached an unbelievable realm. Just like what he said…

Peak Emperor-ranked, the difference is only one step, just that one step away.

Mingguang’s strength had made great progress.

“You’re right.” Li Xiaoru calmly said, “However, you’re not him, and you’re not as good as him.”

Li Xiaoru criticized Mingguang.

And that sentence made him stamp in fury, “How could I be inferior to him? He’s just a sealed cripple!”

“Do you think he’s still alive?”

“That’s a huge mistake!”

“The current him is already exiled forever with the destruction of the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.”

Mingguang was furious.

That state was completely different from his usual self.

When he was told to be inferior to Su Tiancheng, he instantly lost control, but Li Xiaoru just smiled when she saw this.

Because she already felt the aura.

He would arrive soon.

“Su Tiancheng has been banished, and the next one is your turn.”

An endless stream of light flashed in Mingguang’s eyes.

Roar~

The space behind him flashed.

A terrifying creature appeared from the Space Seal.

“Destroy her for me.” Mingguang stood proudly.

Then, he suddenly felt something was amiss. When he looked at the creature he had summoned, he was dumbfounded. How could this be…

“Alright, Heavenly Emperor Mingguang.”

The creature heard Heavenly Emperor Mingguang’s order and executed it decisively without any hesitation.

“Kill!”

It rushed forward clumsily.

Everyone was stunned.

As for Su Hao and the others, they couldn’t bear to watch because the so-called creature turned out to be Su Hao’s Little Bear.

“Aaaaahhhh! Su Hao, snatch it back for me.” Mo Ling grabbed Su Hao’s arm and acted like a kid.

“Hehe.”

Su Hao could feel the incoming murderous intent from Chen Yiran and he quickly pushed her away, “Alright, alright, I will kill Mingguang later and get it back for you.”

Yes.

It was that Little Bear.

That poor Little Bear who just stepped into the world realm.

After experiencing the tragic fate of being inferior to beasts, pets, mounts, and even reduced to becoming a pendant for a mount, Little Bear was finally sealed! And the one who happened to seal it turned out to be Mingguang’s clone. Although it was a clone, the space used was universal.

This is Mingguang’s power.

When his clones obtains some benefits, he gets to enjoy them too.

Mingguang only had one pet and it was that dragon! Thus, each time he summoned the pet, he would easily let it go rampage. How could he have thought that the damn clone actually sealed another creature? Forget about him sealing another creature, he actually sealed a mere world esper?

Damn it!

“Kill!”

Little Bear rushed toward the group of girls.

The funny part was its height couldn’t even reach the corner of the girls’ skirt. When it rushed under the girls’ skirt and looked up…

Hmmm…

“Kill!”

The atmosphere didn’t seem right.

Little Bear left the dark skirt and leaped up and blasted toward the group of law enforcers. Its fist full of the strength of a world esper blasted on a certain law enforcer’s chest.

Bang!

Softly hitting the chest, Little Bear was bounced off.

Then it tried very hard to stabilize its figure and lay on the chest of the law enforcer, clutching it and said aggrievedly, “Heavenly Emperor Mingguang, I have tried my best…”

Heavenly Emperor Mingguang’s blue veins were exposed.

Yes.

Little Bear tried its best.

Each attack of its was at 120%!

However, its opponent was the strongest esper! Obviously, it also knew of this fact. Thus, all attacks were completed without any hold back.

This was where Mingguang turned speechless.

This is madness!

What the hell is that damned clone doing?

Mingguang had wronged his clone.

The plan of the clone was to seal an Emperor-ranked qilin, which was no less than the existence of a giant dragon. Who would have thought such a mishap would happen?

“Waaa so cute!”

Little Bear never returned. It got taken away just like that by the law enforcer.

This was a very tragic way of self-sacrifice. At least that was Little Bear’s understanding. As a summoned beast, it had tried its best right?

Mingguang finished watching this scene with a cold face.

And then…

Roar~

A dark, heavy aura flashed.

This time, Mingguang summoned the dragon. When its terrifying aura permeated at the world summit, it made those law enforcers shocked.

The giant dragon.

The same Emperor-ranked beast!

Unlike the one summoned by the clone, this dragon and Mingguang had shared their aura for a long time. This time, this dragon was without doubt…

An advanced Emperor-ranked beast!

Roar~

A roar echoed.

The giant dragon flared its teeth and danced with its claws as it turned toward this group of law enforcers.

“Go!” A law enforcement girl yelled.

Under the leadership of Li Xiaoru’s sister, a group of law enforcers charged toward the terrifying dragon, and a battle broke out on the world summit!

That scene was so beautiful that the spectators were too speechless to curse.

Dragon Quest?

Wrong.

It’s the Dragon Quest with beautiful girls version!

A big battle broke out.

Meanwhile, the aura of Mingguang and Li Xiaoru had risen to the peak as both auras were brewing. The battle between them was the true main event!

“Once I kill you, everything will be over.” Mingguang’s eyes were cold.

When all the truth was revealed, there was no need to speak any nonsense.

Because…

As long as he killed Li Xiaoru, his goal would be achieved.

Here, once the power of the world is absorbed by him, he would become the true god! That was an existence he dreamt of!

Family?

Friendship?

Love?

What are those?!

Only the supreme power is eternal!

The moment when he becomes god, not only would he have infinite power, he can even obtain eternal life and exist forever between Heaven and Earth!

That was his ultimate goal.

Anyone who tried to hinder him deserves death!

“Kill, kill, kill!”

Mingguang’s power was concentrated within his hands. Facing a powerful existence like Li Xiaoru, Mingguang’s large-scale attacks were obviously ineffective.

A quaint long sword appeared.

Mingguang grasped it in his hand. That kind of aura coming from the sword was definitely not something that can be cultivated for more than 20 years.

“That thing…”

Li Xiaoru showed a look of surprise for the first time, “Why is it here?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1060 - The Era’S Imprint!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1060 - The Era’S Imprint!

Chapter 1060: The era’s imprint!

“This?”

“It’s called Dragon Scale.”

Mingguang sneered, “Otherwise, what do you think I spend so many years preparing for?”

Dragon Scale!

It was a sword.

From outside, it looked like an ordinary sword.

However, it was this sword that made Li Xiaoru feel threatened.

“Experience it for yourself.”

Mingguang held Dragon Scale and slashed it down diagonally.

Swish!

The world summit seemed to be divided into two by it.

Time seemed to freeze at this moment.

In fact, when Su Hao saw the sword at the first glance, he already felt something amiss, “This sword… I somewhat feel it’s very familiar…”

“What’s wrong?” The others asked.

“Something is wrong with that sword.”

Su Hao thought for a moment.

The long-lost memories came into his mind. At this time, he finally knew the reason why he felt that the sword was familiar. That sword…

It actually had the same aura as the item he felt in Zhanzheng College.

He still remembered.

When he was in Zhanzheng College, someone gave him something, and there was an aura from fifty years ago on it, and this sword was the same as that item.

This was an item before the arrival of the origin ability era!

How could Mingguang obtain it?

Su Hao felt that something was amiss. Coincidently, he knew of a person who understood this. Su Hao opened his virtual screen, and a waterfall of data flashed past. Soon, Su Hao locked on the identity of that person. It was that man who helped others escape from the law enforcers.

Time!

He needs to hurry up!

Su Hao entered Kingdom of Heaven, and time stood still at this moment. For him, he could always use Kingdom of Heaven to accomplish many things.

Swish!

The time in Kingdom of Heaven had slowed down by countless times.

Right now, that thin man was hiding in his own home.

Wiping out all related memories, he hid under his bed and told himself that he would only show himself one month later without saying a word. Obviously, the appearance of the world summit had shocked him.

Suddenly, on the side of the scene he saw that the man realized the surrounding environment had changed. However, when he woke up, he was even more shocked because here…

He had never seen it before.

“Su Hao?”

That thin man glanced at the man beside him in surprise.

“What do you want?”

That lean man said in horror, “If it’s that secret that mustn’t be told, then no need to say more.”

“You are still shielding your own memory?” Su Hao smiled.

“You no longer have to worry.” Su Hao coldly said, “You don’t need to care about the secrets you worry about because bigger matters have happened. Now, no, it should be in the future, you no longer have to worry about it anymore.”

“Huh?”

That lean man was at a loss.

Although he didn’t have that memory, he knew that the sealed memory was extremely scary! Right now, Su Hao actually told him that it’s fine?

“Seems that you’re really clueless.”

Su Hao shook his head, “Unlock the seal. It’s no longer necessary. If you continue to conceal it like this, you won’t live through today because the entire world would be finished.”

“What?”

That lean man was horrified.

Su Hao…

He’s now a peak world esper!

Finished?

Did the beasts invade?

“It’s almost similar. Mingguang made his move.” Su Hao gently explained.

“Damn.”

That lean man jumped on his feet. Isn’t this more terrifying than the invasion of beasts?

That’s a Heavenly Emperor!

The seal was quickly lifted and a series of memories emerged. The lean man instantly became extremely shrewd. He was too familiar with this situation, but Su Hao mentioned that it was no longer dangerous…

“The law enforcers won’t care?”

The lean man wondered. He hid because of the emergence of the world summit, and the law enforcers were obviously about to be dispatched…

How could it be safe?

If it wasn’t for Su Hao, he would never believe it.

“The world summit appeared and Mingguang charged toward it.”

Su Hao broadcasted the scene at the world summit right now, “If Mingguang destroys this place, the entire world will be destroyed.”

“So.”

Su Hao froze the scene of that damn sword.

“What is this?”

“Dragon Scale?”

“Hold on…”

“Let me think about it.”

The lean man frowned, “I’ve heard of this thing and am familiar with it. Dragon Scale… Isn’t that thing from before the era of origin ability?”

“You really know about it?”

“Of course.”

The lead man continued in an irritated tone while his eyes lit up, “This stuff, my master had also studied it before in the past. The aura contained inside is completely different from the world’s aura…”

“How to put it in words, anyway it’s strange.”

“After some research, he came to a conclusion that it might be some mysterious item that existed before the era of origin ability or it appeared after a mutation. Of course, the possibility of the latter is very small. The existence of this thing also verified the existence of the era before origin ability. This item is extremely valuable.”

“The era before origin ability?” Su Hao was shocked.

These guys, they actually deduced history by themselves?

“You’re right.”

The lean man said sternly, “Since origin energy existed before the era of origin ability, what does that signify? It means that the world originally has origin energy to begin with. It only hides in the dark until the era of origin ability arrives and then appears in the real world.”

“Really?”

Su Hao suddenly pondered.

He knew more than the lean man, but he never thought of such a possibility.

He always thought…

The so-called era of origin ability began when this world was created.

However, now that seemed to not be the case. If this world was created a long time ago, it could be during the ancient time or the age of dinosaurs or even further in the past, but only when the era of origin ability arrive did this problem arise.

Explaining it in such a way seems plausible too.

Imagine.

If this world was created when human beings were born…

And everything was in line with the trajectory of mankind development until one day, the world had an issue that led to the existence of origin energy, which led to the arrival of the era of origin ability. People’s strength increased and finally stepped into the strongest esper, becoming Emperor-ranked and started to shake the world foundation!

Thus, this is why there was an existence of items before the origin ability era.

Perhaps…

Before that, humans had already come into contact with this mysterious energy, but there was no systematic understanding or from a lack of particles in the surrounding. Thus, there were only some mysterious phenomena occurring and they couldn’t grasp it? Of course, it wasn’t that no one mastered it. For example…

The forgotten ancient deities?

Su Hao suddenly opened his mind and rapidly brainstormed.

The lean man’s way of thinking had opened him a brand new vision, and whether it was right or not, it provided him another point of understanding of this world.

Of course.

The most important thing now was this Dragon Scale!

“Is it powerful?” Su Hao frowned.

“Strong!”

“Because of the unique aura, it has an extraordinary effect on everyone in this era, especially when it’s in Mingguang’s hands.” The lean man suddenly became a little frightened, “For Mingguang to use it, the effect would be absolutely powerful.”

“Then, what to do?”

Su Hao narrowed his eyes, “Since it’s so powerful, is it impossible to counter it? If it’s really invincible, what’s the need to continue this fight anymore? Why not just use that one sword and conquer the world? Haven’t you all seen this sword before in the past? Why did you never consider taking it away?”

“Uh.”

The lean man scratched his head, “I said it’s invincible because it could do everything, its destructive power is amazing. It is as if you are holding a lightsaber and going against a wooden sword. It’s not only because of the difference in material, but a complete difference from two eras. This Dragon Scale…”

“Because of the existence of origin energy, Dragon Scale might even have complete information from a certain era attached to it.”

The lean man smiled bitterly, “So, if you use Dragon Scale, it will be a devastating attack against other origin energy or Rule Force.”

“Crack!”

“I want the method to crack it!”

Su Hao’s eyes were moving like electricity, “Don’t tell me you don’t have one!”

“I do.” The lean man nodded, “But the probability is very low.”

“Share it with me first.” Su Hao calmly said.

“The special aura made Dragon Scale literally invincible, but it also caused itself to become almost non-resistant to items of a similar type. To put it simply, if you also have another item from before the era of origin ability, Dragon Scale will lose its original function.”

“Because since they are both from before the era of origin ability, they will be assumed to be in the same era!”

“Before the era of origin ability?” Su Hao repeated.

“En.” The lean man smiled bitterly, “That’s the problem. Apart from Dragon Scale, I haven’t seen anything that’s from the era before origin ability.”

“You mean this?” Su Hao suddenly revealed a fragment he obtained from the past.

“Damn!” The lean man was shocked. After a careful glance, he became excited and could barely control himself, “Where did you get this thing?”

Su Hao looked at him with a smile, “What do you think?”

“It’s enough!”

The lean man looked mesmerized, “This is good enough. Let alone Dragon Scale, even Dragon Whip won’t work!”

Su Hao: “…”

“Then, that’s good.”

Su Hao smiled lightly, “I’ll stop him.”

“Hold on…”

The thin man suddenly turned pale, “Stop who?

“Who else but Mingguang?”

Su Hao pointed at the screen, “Look, Mingguang already used Dragon Scale.”

“Wait, damn.”

The lean man became more confused, “You mean, the scene you showed to me is synchronized to reality?”

“Of course.” Su Hao shrugged.

“You stopped the whole world?!” The lean man was completely stunned.

To make the entire world stop moving, Su Hao was actually this heaven-defying?

“Ahem, that’s not the case.” Su Hao was a little embarrassed, “I just stopped this place which we’re on.”

“Oh.”

The lean man then only breathed a sigh of relief, but soon realized that something was wrong, “Impossible, such stillness, how could there be no reaction at all from outside? Isn’t this still the static world?”

“Actually…” Su Hao sighed, “This is no longer the same world.”

“Huh?”

That lean man was at a loss.

Su Hao roughly explained Kingdom of Heaven.

The lean man was silent for a long time and then said in a sad tone, “In other words, you took me to Kingdom of Heaven in order to save time for questioning! This place where once I step in, I can’t leave? If I guess correctly, I should be dead in reality, right?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1061 - Time Flies?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1061 - Time Flies?

Chapter 1061: Time flies?

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“I can’t go back?”

The lean man was extremely sad.

“You can understand it that way.” Su Hao said awkwardly.

“…”

Looking at Su Hao speechlessly for a long time, the lean man could only sigh. However, he quickly regained his composure. At least, he no longer had to seal his own memory and worry about being hunted down. After confirming that there was not much difference between this place and reality, the lean man soon integrated into Kingdom of Heaven’s community.

This made Su Hao quite pleased.

Kingdom of Heaven was getting closer and closer to the actual world.

Now, perhaps the only missing thing here was the people?

Smiling lightly…

Su Hao returned to reality!

Now that he knew how to counter Dragon Scale, the following step would be to think how to kill Mingguang in a simple and ruthless way.

“I will go visit the world summit!”

“You guys wait here.” Su Hao said.

The moment Su Hao returned to reality, Mingguang’s sword was already slashing down!

At this moment, a huge roar echoed.

The barrier outside the world summit exploded and light flickered. A heroic figure stood in front of Li Xiaoru, blocking the sword for her.

Glorious light ray illuminated.

That figure was as domineering as always

Li Xiaoru finally had a hint of joy in her eyes. Seeing the person who stood in front of her like a hero, she suddenly felt a sense of happiness.

He really came.

“Su Tiancheng?!”

An angry voice rang.

Mingguang looked at the figure in front incredulously.

His clone died, and the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea was destroyed. He didn’t even have time to obtain the final information, but subconsciously thought that everyone would be destroyed along with the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea. However… he actually saw this guy now, the guy who should have been sealed!

“You had quite the growth.”

Su Tiancheng casually continued, “Want to kill? I will stand here for you to kill. Do you dare?”

“Why don’t I dare?” Mingguang sneered.

“Su Tiancheng, do you think that I am still the same as I was before?”

“You’re wrong!”

“Twenty years have passed. There were so many things happening that you can’t even think of. Not daring to kill you? What a joke! I will let you see whether I dare or not!”

Boom!

A sword slashed down.

A cluster of energy burst out from Su Tiancheng’s hand, which was only able to stop the incoming attack.

“Interesting.”

Su Tiancheng looked at the sword, “So this is your source of confidence?”

“Hmph.”

Mingguang snorted coldly, and the anger all over his body seemed to be channeled toward the sword before he was able to calm down, “Su Tiancheng, have you really forgotten your original goal?”

“Twenty years ago.”

“Outside Tian Ling City, there was a great battle with countless casualties.”

“That night, you swore that you want to be the god of this world! You swore that you would bring those brothers back to life. Have you forgotten them all?”

“Tiancheng Martial Army, how many brothers of yours fell in that battle!”

“Did you really forget?”

“They all died in the hands of the law enforcers!”

“All of them…”

“Have you forgotten everyone?”

Mingguang’s eyes were filled with killing intent.

Tiancheng Martial Army!

The martial army that was destroyed in the past actually had something to do with Mingguang!

Everyone seemed to recall that Tiancheng Martial Army, Mingguang, and Su Tiancheng all seemed to be representing the era of that time, so knowing each other wasn’t difficult. Moreover, in order to destroy the world, they fought against the law enforces together before failing miserably with almost everyone killed!

From this fact, one could see the strength of the law enforcers.

“They are just emotionless machines.”

Su Tiancheng said indifferently, “Aren’t you too stupid to compete with some kind of force? The law enforcers are born from rules. Except Xiaoru and a few others, they were all obeying the rules without question! They hardly had any consciousness but rules.”

“Are you trying to compete with rules?”

“Since we are trying to annihilate the world, we should be prepared for the price of sacrifice, right?”

Su Tiancheng sounded calm.

This was actually easy to understand.

Rules…

They are regulations.

Just like in the legends, the ancients had to survive the tribulation in order to ascend. If they are destroyed in the process, are they supposed to seek revenge from the tribulation later? This is the rules of the world. Revenge on that? Ridiculous! Obviously, Mingguang transferred his hatred to Li Xiaoru and the others.

Not only that…

“I will naturally have a way to bring them back to life.”

Su Tiancheng looked at Mingguang, “You don’t have to worry about this, but you are here for your obsession! The so-called obsession of becoming a god.”

“This obsession, wasn’t it you who gave it to me?” Mingguang smiled strangely.

“Becoming a god!”

“That’s the only thing I can aim for.”

“Only by becoming a god can I get rid of you and truly control this world!”

“How can you understand my feelings?”

Mingguang sneered, “However, it doesn’t matter. As long as I kill you and Li Xiaoru, everything will be over.”

Boom!

Finishing his sentence…

Mingguang stormed out, but he didn’t use Dragon Scale this time. Instead, a cold light flashed by, and the speed was so quick that Su Tiancheng had no time to dodge.

It was akin to lightning.

“Puff~”

Su Tiancheng turned sideways.

A blood stain appeared on his arm.

However, unexpectedly, just when everyone felt that Su Tiancheng was only capable of this level of strength, they saw a light flash as the same trace appeared on Mingguang’s body. That same location, the same bloodstain, it was a total copy.

“This…”

Everyone was shocked.

Same?

“Injury reflection?” Zhou Wang was shocked.

“No, it’s not injury reflection.”

Wan Cheng watched carefully, “If it’s injury reflection, the damage will not be on the same position. This kind of talent, I seem to have heard of it before…”

“It’s called Time Flies!”

Time Flies, it was said that in the ancient novels, there was a unique skill called Time Flies. In ability talent, there was a similar one too, but it’s more unique and doesn’t have exact same technique or internal force but more on…

Injuries!

If you hurt me one bit, you will have to scream of pain for a second too.

The damage would be an exact copy.

Excluding the feeling of pain, the physical damage would be similar!

This is a talent that’s literally a bug and ranked among the top talents. If one could develop it into Rule Force, it would be equally scary!

No one knew what Su Tiancheng’s talent was, and Su Hao was also kept in the dark.

No one would have thought that it was actually Time Flies!

“Is it really Time Flies?”

Everyone was stunned.

No wonder Su Tiancheng wasn’t afraid of Mingguang at all!

If his strength wasn’t good enough?

There’s nothing to fear.

Come then, let’s chop each other up.

You cut me with a sword. Fine, you will have to take a blow yourself too.

Obviously, in front of this bug talent, most talents would have to kneel!

Mingguang’s smile was as if he was mocking himself, “I saw a flaw just now and couldn’t wait to attack. Only then did I remember this… however, that’s only applicable to the past.”

Mingguang’s eyes turned cold as he raised Dragon Scale in his hand, “With this, I can completely restrain you!”

Boom!

Light erupted from Dragon Scale.

Endless killing intent was shoured around Su Tiancheng. Just as what he said, when both passed by, the light from Dragon Scale left an injury on Su Tiancheng’s body. However, this time, the injury didn’t get transferred.

Everyone’s eyes opened wide.

“He’s fine?”

“Totally fine?!”

Li Tiantian couldn’t believe it, “Time Flies didn’t take effect.”

“Maybe it’s not Time Flies.”

Mo Ling guessed, “Maybe it’s another talent.”

“It’s that sword.” Zhou Wang stated coldly.

However, can a sword actually suppress Time Flies? This sounded a bit ridiculous, but the fact that when Dragon Scale erupted, no one could stop it!

“Kill, kill, kill!” Mingguang rampaged.

“Twenty years ago, I wasn’t your opponent, but now?”

“You have been sealed for twenty years!”

“And I have been improving for twenty years!”

“I have Dragon Scale with me now!”

“And you have nothing!”

“You can fight against me? Based on what?”

Mingguang seemed to have deep resentment. The light from Dragon Scale shot out from time to time, completely suppressing Su Tiancheng!

Without a doubt!

This was the power of Dragon Scale.

The imprint of the era was unique.

Is Su Tiancheng strong??

Strong!

However, facing the raging Mingguang with Dragon Scale, there was still no solution, but Su Tiancheng’s expression remained unchanged even under such a situation. He looked at Mingguang’s eyes with an unexpected touch of sorrow and also… pity?

Far away.

When Chen Yiran saw this scene, she was taken aback.

She was a woman and was naturally more sensitive to these things.

That look…

Pity?

Why did Su Tiancheng have that look when he looked at Mingguang?

This was simply too strange!

“Die, die, die!”

Mingguang fell completely into madness.

Slashing down, he had the absolute upper hand! As for Su Tiancheng, he kept retreating one step after another under the intense attacks. Li Xiaoru, who was behind him, stepped forward nervously, but in the end, she didn’t dare to make a move.

Because Su Tiancheng waved his hand and stopped her.

She couldn’t do so!

As the core of the world, if she’s injured, the entire world…

It would be shaken by this!

“Aren’t you extremely strong?” Mingguang sneered.

Poof~

Su Tiancheng had a long trace of blood on his body, but Mingguang was free of any! The power that could reflect injuries was still ineffective and completely suppressed by Dragon Scale.

“For saying that I dare not kill you….”

“Isn’t it because of you relying on that talent of yours?”

“Now.”

“Losing it…”

“What else can you do?”

Mingguang had cold eyes.

Su Tiancheng just smiled calmly, “Then, make your move.”

“Let me see whether you dare to kill me or not.”

Su Tiancheng was as calm as ever, “I can transfer the injury, but… If I die, do you really think you can be safe?”

This is a gamble!

Su Tiancheng was as crazy as Su Hao!

Both father and son had the same temperament.

“Give it a try then.”

Mingguang’s eyes actually had the same crazy look, “Let’s see whether we will die together or not!”

Boom!

Dragon Scale in Mingguang’s hand bloomed again.

chapters.title: Chapter 1062 - The Mad Mingguang
chapters.body:
Chapter 1062 - The Mad Mingguang

Chapter 1062: The mad Mingguang

Buzz~

The brilliance coming from Dragon Scale flickered.

Su Tiancheng was betting!

He bet that his own ability would take effect!

Mingguang was also betting!

He bet that the glory of Dragon Scale would suppress that power!

These two most powerful men actually made the craziest bet of their lives. That familiar gaze in their eyes, Chen Yiran couldn’t be more familiar.

“These two lunatics…”

“It turned out to be the same as Su Hao!”

Chen Yiran was secretly anxious.

Mingguang’s life or death had nothing to do with her, but Su Tiancheng, even if he won, wouldn’t it spell death?

Su Hao had left for so long. Where’s he now?

Boom!

At the world summit…

Just as the sword was blooming, an old fragment cut across the space and fell by Su Tiancheng’s side. When Su Tiancheng caught it…

Swish!

A faint phosphorescence flashed.

Boom!

The brilliance of Dragon Scale diminished by a layer.

“Not good.”

When Mingguang saw this scene, his face changed drastically. It was too late for him to retract his attack, so he could only temporarily reduce 90% of his power. As for the remaining 10%…

Poof~

Su Tiancheng’s left arm was literally penetrated.

At the same time, Mingguang’s left arm had the same scar, which was strangely similar to the clone that was suppressed in the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea.

“Who?”

Mingguang hatefully gritted his teeth.

When his grand scheme was about to come to fruition, someone actually interrupted him?

Who is so bold!

Su Hao walked out indifferently and had a cold glance. Then he walked toward his father’s side. Fluorescent light flashed from his hand, “Realization: Healing.”

Realization!

Su Tiancheng was actually recreating Su Tiancheng’s body!

This was an interesting way of using Realization. The damaged cells could be perfectly recreated just like the original.

It was slow.

And extremely difficult.

However, under everyone’s eyes, Su Tiancheng’s injury gradually recovered, and his left arm became intact again in just a few seconds.

Mingguang glanced at this and was stunned.

What was actually happening here?

Healing?

There was actually someone who could heal them!

God knows how long it will take for their bodies to heal once they were injured. Whatever origin energy or Rule Force, they were all ineffective!

Su Hao…

What kind of power was that?

Su Hao healed his father before raising his head and looked at the high world summit. As for Li Xiaoru, facing her son’s eyes, her gaze softened unconsciously and was about to go down. A smile flashed across Su Hao’s face as gently shook his head, quietly retreating from the battlefield.

He knew his strength extremely well.

This is a battle between the strongest espers.

To join the battle…

Only death awaits him!

Regardless of Su Tiancheng or Li Xiaoru, this was definitely not a battle that Su Hao could intervene in now. If he dares attack Mingguang…

Mingguang could definitely kill Su Hao in a snap of finger!

This was the gap between them!

For Su Hao to appear in this battle, he could at most be a cannon fodder that was a hindrance. Thus, after sending the fragment and healing their injuries, Su Hao quietly retreated.

This battle wasn’t something that he could intervene in.

“Alright.”

A flash of appreciation could be seen in Su Tiancheng’s eyes.

Indeed, Su Hao is worthy of being his son!

Unexpectedly, when Mingguang saw Su Hao left, he was still showing a hint of surprise, “He’s Su Hao? After the Battle of Glory, he actually became this strong!”

“This is why he’s my son.” Su Tiancheng’s tone was full of pride.

Hearing this, Mingguang sneered.

Son?

For him, that’s a strange term. However, without knowing why, he didn’t feel bad about it. Su Tiancheng… Su Hao…

Due to Su Hao’s inexplicable intrusion, some changes seemed to have taken place.

When Mingguang tried to kill Su Tiancheng again, he suddenly discovered that the small fragment unexpectedly erupted an unbelievable aura!

Dragon Scale…

It was no longer effective.

Once ineffective, that meant Su Tiancheng could no longer be suppressed.

That meant the terrifying power of Time Flies would appear on Mingguang again.

He couldn’t bear it!

“Damn it, damn it!”

Mingguang was furious.

Why would this happen?

He clearly was about to kill Su Tiancheng, but why did the battle have a change of direction? Just because of that damn small fragment that had the trace of ancient times. Because of both items from a similar era, the special effect was no longer valid, and Dragon Scale became just an ordinary sword.

Today’s Mingguang was without a doubt stronger than Su Tiancheng.

However, in the face of such a situation, he was helpless.

Because…

Su Tiancheng could beat him, but he couldn’t make a move!

For each attack, Su Tiancheng would have one injury and so would he. Not to forget, that original injury on his shoulder.

If he was to continue the fight like that…

The one who dies would be him!

Looking at the world summit, Li Xiaoru was aloft and didn’t make a single move, but any fatal blow could be coming from her at any time. The spot that he couldn’t see, Su Hao would definitely be on standby there. Once he and Su Tiancheng died together or both were seriously injured, Su Hao could even restore Su Tiancheng back to normal.

And he…

He would most likely fall.

This is a battle.

He was supposed to have absolute advantage, but who would have thought that even though Su Tiancheng wasn’t strong enough, he would have such family members instead?

He had a complete family.

And Mingguang was fighting the family alone!

“Family, huh?”

Mingguang suddenly felt bitter.

All these years.

His self pursuit on strength, was it right or wrong?

Of course, before entering a trance, Mingguang completely abandoned this thought and charged at Su Tiancheng with unprecedented decisiveness in his eyes.

“You think that with these, I won’t be able to defeat you?” Mingguang’s sneer echoed.

Twenty years.

How much had he suffered for twenty years?

What had he done in those twenty years?

“You will soon know.”

Mingguang suddenly slashed Dragon Scale toward Su Tiancheng.

Unexpectedly, splashes of blood could be seen.

Poof~

Layers of blood stains appeared and soon those stains burned like a fire all over Mingguang’s body.

Swish!

The flaming blood surged forward.

The world summit almost collapsed at that moment.

The raging flame alone had already created such a terrifying power. The life flame on Mingguang’s body was actually this terrifying?

At the same time, a pained expression flashed across Mingguang’s face.

Pain.

Severe pain.

However, Mingguang gritted his teeth and got through the ordeal.

“Why the need to do so?” Su Tiancheng sighed.

“Why the need to do so?” Mingguang sneered, “You will never know my pain!”

“Twenty years have passed.”

Mingguang’s face forced a smile, but with his blood burning, he looked a little strange.

“Twenty years.”

“For others, what they have to do is to improve their own strength.”

“As for me…”

“For twenty years, I have only done one thing, which is to shield this damn force!”

Endless killing intent flashed in Mingguang’s eyes.

“Because I know that one day, I will meet you again. Even after I become a god, a battle between us would be inevitable!”

“However, after killing you, I will die!”

“Thus, only by blocking that force can I win.”

“For this…”

“I had searched so many places.”

Mingguang sounded very emotional.

“There is no one who can stop me in this world!”

“However, you’re the only one who can do so!”

“So…”

“As long as that force is erased, I will be the strongest one in the world!”

Finishing his words, Mingguang erupted with dense killing intent.

“Right now….”

“Do you still wish to try?”

Boom!

Mingguang cut through with a sword. Su Tiancheng didn’t hide because he could clearly see it was just a test. It was Mingguang’s arrogant declaration of war.

Poof~

Su Tiancheng had bloodstains on his arm.

As for Mingguang, he was safe and sound.

It got blocked!

Everyone was shocked.

Even Su Hao was shocked at this moment.

It got blocked…

Su Tiancheng, wasn’t he only relying on Time Flies to continue this fight?

Once it was countered, this battle was no longer necessary. No one would have thought that besides Dragon Scale, Mingguang would actually manage to find an alternative!

Yes.

Yes, twenty years of preparation, how could he not have any additional tricks in his sleeves?

However, what about Su Tiancheng then?

Sure enough, when Time Flies was countered, Mingguang occupied the absolute advantage in battle! A Peak Emperor-ranked against the strongest esper who had been sealed for twenty years…

This fight literally had no suspense!

“I have been waiting for this day for a long time.”

Flames flashed across Mingguang’s face. That was the trace of the life flame.

His blood was intertwined with the flame.

That made Mingguang’s entire person look extremely scary.

Especially, when the joy of winning and pain coming from his heart, that feeling was even more weird.

This battle, it’s going to end like this?

Su Hao knew that it was dangerous when he saw this scene!

It was extremely dangerous that he had to use the fragment to reverse the battle. However, that damn Mingguang used a method that harmed himself to once again suppress Time Flies!

If this is to continue…

Su Hao was a little nervous.

As he suddenly had a look at her mother, Li Xiaoru had an anxious look on her eyes. The force within her hand was looming. Obviously she was also searching for opportunity.

However, she couldn’t find it…

Unless she took action regardless of the safety of the world.

“Damn it!”

Su Hao’s quantum computer was running wildly.

He was trying to find a solution. Whether it’s Time Flies or Mingguang’s life flame, as long as he finds a solution, it might change the situation.

However, he couldn’t!

Unexpectedly, whether it was Time Flies or that life flame, there was nothing to be done in order to reverse the state!

“Something’s wrong!”

Su Hao frowned.

It was ineffective!

Completely ineffective!

Could it be those two forces aren’t Time Flies and life flame?

This wasn’t important anymore.

Su Hao smiled bitterly. They were about to lose. Who cares whatever it was?

Just that, is there really no other method?

Su Hao looked through the battlefield and landed on the world summit. Then only was he stunned because it was then that he discover the light that formed around the world summit.

Are these…

Rule Force?

chapters.title: Chapter 1063 - Sprint: The Strongest Esper!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1063 - Sprint: The Strongest Esper!

Chapter 1063: Sprint: The strongest esper!

“Rule Force?”

Su Hao looked at the world summit in a daze.

Before this, in order to hurry up and deliver the fragment to Su Tiancheng as quickly as possible, how could there be any time for him to pay attention to other things along the way? Now, when he was frustrated, he could finally notice these things. Seeing the composition of the world summit, it turned out to be Rule Force!

“This place is all made up of Rule Force!”

Su Hao was shocked.

One giant mountain!

It turned out to be purely composed of Rule Force. How complicated would that be?

How amazing was that?

“The world summit!” Su Hao exclaimed.

In his eyes, the battle was no longer in his vision because when Su Hao saw the Rule Force, he suddenly realized it. What if…

What if he’s to absorb the Rule Force here?

In the past, he was just a domain esper. In order to find different talents to build a complete world, he had to travel across mountains and rivers to visit many places.

Until in the end!

He had to use Backtrack with the help of the enemy before managing to complete it!

As for now?

He broke through.

Gorgeously entering the world realm, as for how to be the strongest esper, that was still a nightmare. However, because he broke through not long ago, Su Hao had never considered things that far, but now such a sudden opportunity was presented to him.

Hypothesis.

It was just an hypothesis.

What if he absorbed every bit of Rule Force here?

Countless ability talents eventually build a near perfect Kingdom of Heaven. Then, would these countless types of Rule Force form an extraordinary world?

A…

Unique world?

Kingdom of Heaven, could it transform again?

This would be a transformation of its foundation!

From countless talents to countless Rule Force, it was literally an upgrade in quality!

Ability talents begin from the integration of origin ability, and Rule Force only begins when one becomes a world esper! If it was before, Su Hao would never think of it.

However, now…

Could there be any other place with a more comprehensive collection of Rule Force in this world?

Whether it was in the past or present, as long as a Rule Force appeared once in this world, it would all be recorded here! This was as if it was prepared for him!

Thus, Su Hao became a madman.

Breakthrough!

He must breakthrough!

Such an opportunity must never be let go!

No one outside the world summit noticed. Just when others were focused on the fight between Su Tiancheng and Mingguang, there was such a person quietly placing his hands on the world summit.

“Sense!”

“Realization!”

Buzz~

A flash of light enveloped the world summit.

How long did it take to analyze all these Rule Force?

Not long!

It was thanks to the quantum computer working at full capacity. Even those in Kingdom of Heaven also followed suit. Chen Yiran, Mo Ling, Zhou Wang, and Li Xin were all almost comparable to the strongest esper, even Erha, Wang Ru, and the fellow old folks were taking action. In fact, Li Tiantian and the rest also took part.

Everyone was helping to separate the Rule Force!

It only needs to be copied for a moment. As for the rest, it will be completed in Kingdom of Heaven.

“Time!”

“Extreme acceleration!”

Buzz~

Endless light shrouded the area.

“Analyze!”

“Copy!”

“Separate!”

Everyone in Kingdom of Heaven was going crazy.

At this moment, the entirety of Kingdom of Heaven was helping Su Hao. He wasn’t fighting alone!

One day.

Two days.

…..

One month.

Two months.

…..

One year.

Two years.

…..

In fact, Su Hao had lost count of the time.
