In his memory, as long as he keeps fusing and processing them, he would be able to integrate with all the Rule Force. Kingdom of Heaven seemed to have turned into a special force that had been tempered, fusing everything together.

This was a feat beyond imagination.

One needs to know that the current world they were on, wasn’t it formed from ten boundary spirits?

Su Hao, what was he trying to achieve?

What will the world created using this method look like?

How terrifying would the new world be when countless Rule Force merged?

As for what’s the result.

No one knew.

When Su Hao used Rule Force to temper Kingdom of Heaven, he was already taking a route that even the creator of the past would never dared to think of!

Su Hao was trying to create a legend.

Rule Force kept advancing at this moment.

Kingdom of Heaven had already become a new world because of the original 108,000 talents, and everything was no different from reality. When the Rule Force merged together, there was yet another change here, and the world began to have a faint origin energy. In fact…

It began to give birth to Rule Force.

It was no longer ability talent but Rule Force!

Boom!

Boom!

In an instant…

The dark fishes in the sea that were at a bottleneck broke through! Even Li Tiantian and the others reached level three world realm in an instant!

The bottleneck that they couldn’t overcome was broken with the help of the world.

This was an extremely shocking scene in itself.

Kingdom of Heaven had changed.

And these were not even noticeable to Su Hao.

Within Kingdom of Heaven, numerous light rays suddenly appeared.

That was the history of Kingdom of Heaven. With the emergence of Rule Force of time, space, and so on, the history of Kingdom of Heaven repeated itself at this moment.

Initial establishment…

The appearance of living things…

A heroic sacrifice…

The reconstruction of Kingdom of Heaven…

One scene after another was replayed.

Chen Yiran and the others all watched this scene blankly. It turned out that when they were with Su Hao, these friends in Kingdom of Heaven were also working hard!

Everyone cried when they saw the sacrifice of the countless people in Kingdom of Heaven.

Are these…

The price paid in the past?

“Sorry.”

Xiao Die’s tears fell.

If it wasn’t for her, if it wasn’t for her sake, how could this have happened in the past?

She would have never thought.

So many people died for her!

Li Tiantian also had his face tightened.

At this time, suddenly endless light flashed. Among the countless Rule Force, the Rule Force of rebirth and realization were flashing!

Terrifying force was condensing, and the world became totally golden.

In an instant, the world became vast.

The entire Kingdom of Heaven was shrouded in light!

When the light rays faded away, countless figures suddenly appeared in Kingdom of Heaven. When Xiao Die and the others looked over, they became choked in excitement.

“That is…”

Everyone was stunned.

Far away…

Those people looked at the surrounding environment blankly. Looking at this strange place, everyone quickly formed a battle formation, “Who?”

Their killing intent skyrocketed!

Even though their strength was weak, these people were not afraid!

These were the previous residents of Kingdom of Heaven.

Facing a world esper like Tian Gang, even when they were weak, they were fearless.

“Teacher.”

Chen Yiran and the others walked out and greeted Shi Mingxuan.

“Chen Yiran?”

“Li Xin?”

“Li Tiantian?”

Shi Mingxuan called out each name after another. These were all students from Zhanzheng College. Of course he knew them, and he knew them well thanks to Su Hao.

Why would they be here?

“You guys are also dead?”

Shi Mingxuan was taken aback.

Poof~

Chen Yiran smiled “Teacher, this is Kingdom of Heaven.”

“Kingdom of Heaven?!”

Shi Mingxuan’s eyes suddenly widened.

Around them, that burly man and even those residents of Kingdom of Heaven were all shocked. At this time, they finally noticed this incredible world.

“This… this is Kingdom of Heaven?”

Everyone was stunned.

In the past, Kingdom of Heaven was just a small village.

And now…

It was literally a world!

“Your strength…”

Shi Mingxuan suddenly realized, “Could it be that you guys have…”

“Su Hao is now a peak world esper.” Chen Yiran smiled, “And now, he’s still attempting to breakthrough!”

Peak world esper?

Shi Mingxuan and the others were shocked for a very long time.

It turned out…

Such a long time had passed?

It also turned out that…

Su Hao became so powerful?

Yes.

If not, how could it be possible to revive them! Not only was Su Hao alive, he was living well, which showed that their past decision was right!

“Lord God really succeeded!”

All the people of Kingdom of Heaven were excited.

Then Shi Mingxuan suddenly realized something, “Wait, you said that he had reached the peak world realm, but he’s still breaking through? Doesn’t that mean…”

“It should be.”

Chen Yiran looked up at the sky.

At this time, Kingdom of Heaven was still undergoing tremendous changes.

Boom!

Boom!

More Rule Force appeared.

Kingdom of Heaven seemed to have become a mixing device, fusing countless Rule Force as it began to thicken the Rule Force of realization.

It seemed to be giving feedback.

This was a surprising scene.

Kingdom of Heaven was like a huge sphere with countless powerful Rule Force instilled on top of it, and below it was purely the Rule Force of realization!

Conversion!

Absorption!

Tempering!

The Rule Force of realization kept changing!

Su Hao sat cross-legged.

A misty accumulation of force appeared around him.

Meanwhile, at the world summit…

When Mingguang was completely suppressing Su Tiancheng, he suddenly felt something was amiss. This aura…

“Someone is breaking through to become the strongest esper?!”

Everyone was shocked.

At this most critical time, there would still be someone breaking through? They were about to ignore it, but suddenly discovered that the aura was extremely close to them!

In fact…

It was coming from the highest level of the world summit!

That aura…

Seemed to be from the entrance?

The entrance of the world summit?

Boom!

Mingguang slashed the entrance with his sword.

On the mountain of the world summit, a young man was sitting cross-legged, surrounded by endless brilliance. A horrifying aura was rising, and he could become the strongest esper at any moment. Plus, he was still improving!

Improvement!

Improvement!

That unbelievable force kept increasing without limit. In fact, it was about to surpass Mingguang!

“How is this possible?!” Mingguang was horrified.

For Su Hao to become the strongest esper, he turned out to be this strong?

“No, I must never let him breakthrough!”

A flash of light lit up in Mingguang’s eyes, “Kill!”

Boom!

Mingguang slashed down with his sword. This time, his target was no longer Su Tiancheng but Su Hao!

chapters.title: Chapter 1064 - Master And Student Pair…
chapters.body:
Chapter 1064 - Master And Student Pair…

Chapter 1064: Master and student pair…

Translator: Exodus Tales Editor: Exodus Tales

“Kill!”

Mingguang had cold eyes.

When he was about to aim at Su Hao, he hesitated for a second but soon regained his composure. If he didn’t kill Su Hao now, how long should he wait?

Boom!

One slash of his sword could destroy the sky.

How strong was Mingguang?

His slash couldn’t be stopped by anyone but Su Tiancheng!

At this time, before everyone else could react, he actually slashed toward Su Hao. That sword penetrated time and space as no one could stop it!

“Not good.”

Su Tiancheng was stunned.

He didn’t expect that Su Hao’s breakthrough would be so powerful that even Mingguang felt an intense crisis.

Swish!

An afterimage flashed.

Su Tiancheng rushed toward Su Hao.

However, that wasn’t enough!

The distance was too far!

The aura around Su Hao became more and more condensed, but no one dared to bet that the defense around Su Hao could block Mingguang’s attack…

After all, that was Dragon Scale!

Boom!

The sword cut down with no suspense.

However, at this moment, a leisurely light ray descended from the sky. It was so casual that it fell lightly on the sword and countered it!

Mingguang suddenly became astonished.

Looking back, Li Xiaoru, who had always been aloof, actually took action!

“You dare to touch my son?”

Li Xiaoru’s murderous intent skyrocketed.

She was worried of the vicissitudes of the world, but when Mingguang aimed at Su Hao, this mother raged. Even Mingguang was stunned by this situation.

He had no family.

Thus, he will never understand this feeling.

This is what one called a maternal love.

“Hmmpphh!”

Mingguang’s eyes were filled with cold light.

For Li Xiaoru to leave the throne, that’s a golden opportunity for him!

Swish!

Mingguang slashed down again.

Bang!

A crisp sound echoed.

Su Tiancheng had already stood in front of Li Xiaoru. He hadn’t caught up when his son was attacked earlier, but this time, he was prepared and didn’t fall behind.

“Want to kill my wife, do you have that qualification?”

Su Tiancheng had an evil grin.

Standing in front of Li Xiaoru, he was akin to Mount Tai!

“Courting death!”

Mingguang’s murderous intent was so overwhelming. Looking at Su Tiancheng, “Then I will first destroy you!”

Swish!

The aura coming from his sword was akin to a rainbow.

With the aid of life flame, Mingguang was so much like a spirit.

However, at this moment, the sky trembled and the aura surrounding Su Hao suddenly spread to the surrounding, and an aura that shook the entire world erupted.

When they felt this aura, everyone trembled.

Within the Federation, the things happening in the world summit had shocked countless people.

Shock.

Panic.

Fear.

The entire Federation was terrified because of the horror of the unknown. However, when the powerful aura swept across the planet, everyone seemed to have been given a booster shot because that aura and feeling… It was so familiar; that’s Su Hao’s aura!

Su Hao.

He finally broke through!

He became the strongest esper!

The history of the past had been forgotten, and after the chaotic era, Su Hao was the first peerless talent to step into this realm and could be labeled as the first person in the Federation to do so!

“He has finally reached this point…”

In the Pharmacist Association, Zhang Zhongtian had now become the Vice President and looked pleased at this scene. He still remembers the time when that boy, that little brat came to him to change drugs.

At that time, he seemed to only have 5 points of origin ability?

That time…

He still remembered hearing Su Hao’s ridiculous declaration that he wanted to become the strongest esper, but Su Hao had reached this step and completed the declaration that sounded ridiculous then.

He truly became the strongest esper!

“It’s Brother’s aura!”

Su family’s residence.

Su Ling, who had been worrying over her brother, suddenly sensed his aura and tears of excitement fell, “Brother finally fulfilled his dream…”

“I want to be the strongest esper!”

Su Ling still remembered it clearly.

In the past, even she surpassed her brother.

Brother could only train hard in the middle of night, but no matter how hard he tried, there seemed to be no return for his effort and now…

He did it!

In just a few years, he became the top powerhouse!

“Brother, you have become the strongest esper.”

“You must have found Dad, right?”

“You must bring him back.”

Su Ling prayed silently, putting her hands together and blessed her brother.

At the same time, in Jianghe City, Chen Ge was flipping the coin in his hand. When he felt the aura, he was stunned for a long time before finally revealing a relieved smile.

“This little brat has finally reached this point.”

“After all…”

“He still managed to catch up to his father.”

Chen Ge was quite pleased.

Back then, he was also a peak world esper, but was one step away from the ultimate realm; it was hard to surpass!

No matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t become the strongest esper!

However, seeing Su Hao becoming the strongest esper, how pleased was that? After all, one could say that he had been watching Su Hao grow up…

“A person with no talent, once overcome the storm, and he turns into a dragon.”

Click, click…

Chen Ge sighed with emotion.

“When did you learn to show off erudition?”

A cold voice floated.

Chen Ge’s hand trembled and almost dropped his coin. He didn’t need to look back and already knew who that was, “Sister, can you stop making trouble?”

Turning around, Chen Ge was very helpless because that person was Su Wan!

The Witch, Su Wan.

“I sensed him.” Su Wan bit her lip.

Chen Ge was stunned. Who else but him?

Su Tiancheng!

Actually it wasn’t now. They could already feel it the moment Su Tiancheng appeared. Su Tiancheng, who they thought to be killed by the law enforcers, had appeared after all.

Plus, he was still the same strongest esper!

However, to appear along with the world summit, what was actually happening?

“Aren’t you even willing to come and take a look at me?” Su Wan was a bit angry.

How long had she waited for Su Tiancheng!

That big brother of hers was clueless of how much she had suffered all these years.

“Hey, help me see the battle.” Su Wan said.

Chen Ge’s face twitched. Sister, I’m not a street fortune teller! However, facing Su Wan’s icy look, he could clearly see the consequences if he refused.

A vivid ice sculpture appearing slowly in Jianghe City…

“Alright then.” Chen Ge shivered.

Buzz~

The coin spun.

With the emergence of the world summit, his strength was rapidly recovering!

Boom!

The space door opened.

On the world summit, countless scenes appeared, and the coins were suspended in mid air, spinning at an incredible speed. Countless Rule Force flowed toward the coins. Unexpectedly, a scene of the world summit appeared!

That was a deduction.

A deduction that had been deduced to the extreme!

The situation on the world summit was scanned. Unsurprisingly, they saw Su Tiancheng confronting Mingguang!

He was indeed still alive.

Everything was fine.

“As long as you live, everything is fine.”

Su Wan suddenly wanted to cry.

It’s good that he was alive.

However, on the side of the screen, they immediately saw behind Su Tiancheng, a woman with a luxurious aura…

“Wait, who’s that?” Su Wan was stunned.

Su Tiancheng actually had another woman?

“Quickly calculate.” Su Wan glared.

“Cough, cough.”

Chen Ge also wiped off his sweat.

Forget about Li Xiaoru, if there is another woman…

Hehe.

Chen Ge could foresee the scene of the entire Jianghe City being frozen. One must know that when the world summit appeared, his strength was restored, but he wasn’t the only one…

Ding!

The coin spun.

Chen Ge quickly figured out the identity of that woman.

Then…

A surprised look appeared on his face.

“What’s wrong?” Su Wan felt strange.

“Well, Sister, I think you can stop fighting with her for Big Brother Su.” Chen Ge wiped off his sweat.

“Why?” Su Wan’s murderous intent intensified.

“That’s Li Xiaoru.” Chen Ge smiled bitterly.

“!!!”

Su Wan was stunned but quickly realized, “But why does she look like, wait… Didn’t she look like that at the beginning? Twenty years have passed and I’ve been accustomed to her aging look. She actually regained her youth?”

“More than that.” Chen Ge smiled bitterly, “I just now deduced her identity.”

“Who?”

“The master of the world!”

Chen Ge sighed, “In other words, the true master of this world, our greatest goal when we tried to destroy the world last time.”

Su Wan: “…”

The master of the world?

That woman?

Su Tiancheng was stunned for a long time before she jumped, “This trash Su Tiancheng actually got smitten by a beauty!”

Chen Ge wiped off his sweat.

One couldn’t blame him for that, the enemy was too cunning after all!

Of course, he dare not say it out loud.

In fact, everyone knew that when Li Xiaoru gave up her status as the master of the world and dared to go to the Federation alone to raise both Su Hao and Su Ling, everything was now in the past.

Because that was love.

Su Wan curled her lips, but she had to admit she somewhat admired Li Xiaoru. For a woman to give up everything for the sake of Su Tiancheng and the two children…

“Hmph.”

Su Wan snorted softly.

“Anyway, Su Tiancheng is your brother. Why are you fighting him for?” Chen Ge smiled bitterly.

“When I was taken away from the snow by him, I had already imprinted it in my mind.” Su Wan coldly said.

“Then you can’t compete with her. Plus, her identity…” Chen Ge pointed at Li Xiaoru.

“Hmph.”

Su Wan was as cold as ice, “Who wants to compete with her. She likes Su Tiancheng so much, let her have him then. Don’t I still have Su Hao? If I can’t be Su Tiancheng’s wife, I will be his wife instead.”

Poof~

Chen Ge almost spurted out a mouthful of water.

Damn it.

This woman is mad.

“Sister, can we stop making trouble like this?” Chen Ge wiped off cold sweat.

“Who’s making trouble?”

Su Wan suddenly smiled charmingly and looked breathtakingly beautiful, “Chen Yiran is my apprentice. Um… a master and disciple pair together, um… That kid probably couldn’t refuse it.”

“Master and disciple together…”

Chen Ge’s brain almost malfunctioned when he saw Su Wan casually leaving.

Chen Ge smiled bitterly, “…”

A loud sigh rang.

Even if he regained his strength, he still couldn’t help. He knew that the world summit is a stage for the strongest espers! His strength was never enough.

Returning to his room, Chen Ge turned on the computer, and there were records of history in it that were his usual historical chronicle. For the chapters regarding the era of origin ability, Chen Ge hesitated for a long time and finally started to write the title.

“The Torment Chronicle of Su Hao’s Family”

chapters.title: Chapter 1065 - Mingguang: The Start Of The Final Plan!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1065 - Mingguang: The Start Of The Final Plan!

Chapter 1065: Mingguang: The start of the final plan!

Breakthrough!

The glory of the strongest esper!

When the glory belonging to the strongest esper was over, Su Hao had broken through. The aura coming from his body revealed his strength, the strongest esper!

Countless Rule Force.

The huge Kingdom of Heaven…

When both fused together via Realization, everything was already determined.

Realization, Supreme Rule.

Swish!

A light ray flickered.

Su Hao awakened.

Opening his eyes, he saw Mingguang charging at Su Tiancheng.

“Hmmpphh!”

“Courting death!”

Boom!

Su Hao shot a Xinghe Arrow at Mingguang’s back. When the light vanished and Xinghe Arrow appeared, even Mingguang had to retreat. The attack on Su Tiancheng was canceled abruptly by him in order to avoid it.

Right now, Su Hao was at the center of the battle.

He already had the qualification to participate in this battle!

On the opposite side, Mingguang gritted his teeth in hatred. It was because he discovered an extremely annoying problem!

If he targeted Su Hao, Li Xiaoru would protect him.

If he targeted Li Xiaoru, Su Tiancheng would protect her.

If he targeted Su Tiancheng, Su Hao would protect him.

This family of three were not as strong as him, but they actually managed to trap him into a deadlock in the battle!

Three strongest espers in a family!

So what if Mingguang is a Peak Emperor-ranked?

“Damn it!”

Mingguang’s murderous intent became denser.

His entire body was burning with Life Flame, and one could imagine how much of a pain he was enduring right now. However, even after suffering from such a degree of pain, there was no effect at all in this battle. How could that not make him rage?

“Su Tiancheng, Su Hao, Li Xiaoru…”

Mingguang suddenly felt this was ridiculous.

His plan…

Because of this family, it was going to fail?

Ridiculous!

A family?

Mingguang was a little dazed.

To him, that was something strange.

Because…

He had no family!

Yes, he has no parents, no family, he was born from darkness, and had been serving the darkness all his life, yet eventually got abandoned…

Does he not want a family?

No.

It was just that he couldn’t!

“I will definitely win!”

Mingguang looked firm, “I will have everything. Of course, before that, I need…”

“I need to be a god!”

Mingguang quickly turned his attention to Su Tiancheng, “Do you really think that this can defeat me?”

“What a joke!”

Mingguang’s face became extremely sinister.

“Su Tiancheng, I have already said you will never understand…”

“The bitterness I have eaten, I will make you taste it one hundred times more!”

Boom!

Mingguang’s body had numerous cracks all over his body.

Su Hao glanced from afar and suddenly frowned slightly.

What happened?

Mingguang is going to reveal his true body?

A beast revealing the true body represented the eruption of their full strength.

As long as his body appears, he could fully exert his full power. Back then, during Battle of Glory, many beasts were like this, and Mo Ling was no exception.

However, Mingguang’s current power seems to have made one ignore this fact. Without his actual body, he was already this terrifying. Once Mingguang reveals his true body, how much more terrifying would he end up?

Su Hao was a little worried.

Then, when he looked at Su Tiancheng who had an indifferent look.

“Dad, aren’t you worried?” Su Hao asked.

“Of course not.” Su Tiancheng sneered, “Because he can’t transform himself.”

“What?”

Su Hao was shocked and shifted his gaze back to Mingguang.

Prior to this, he never noticed.

The only time Mingguang revealed himself was during Endless Sea, but that was just a clone which is why he couldn’t sense it, but when he was a truly strongest esper, facing the equal footing Emperor-ranked, he could suddenly see it now with Realization.

“Mingguang, he can’t transform?”

Su Hao’s eyes looked surprised, “What the hell is going on?”

Swish!

The light circulated.

Through the endless brilliance, Su Hao finally saw Mingguang’s original body. Then, his entire person was dumbstruck because that was a person.

A person?

Mingguang is a human?

Su Hao was stunned.

He had thought of countless possibilities, but never would he imagine Mingguang to be a human?!

!!!

Something was amiss!

Su Hao suddenly felt that the progress of this battle turned worse.

If Mingguang is a human, what’s his actual ability talent then? Su Hao continued to inspect before he saw a blank space!

Mingguang’s talent was blank.

In other words, Mingguang had no talent!

“This is impossible!”

Su Hao was shocked.

Humans are different from beasts.

After integrating an ability talent, one could have origin energy. Thus, everyone has an ability talent, and there would absolutely be no exception. However, this situation…

Having said that, without a talent, how did Mingguang cultivate?

What’s with his strength?

Su Hao was a bit confused.

He felt that everything had been turned upside down. Of course, in this case, there might be an unique case in which his talent was stripped off and destroyed by a strong esper.

However, in that case, the cultivation base would be abolished!

Who could still use it?

Besides, to abolish a Peak Emperor-ranked, no, to be precise, it should be the talent of a peak strongest esper? No one could do it!

“Something is wrong. I always feel something is amiss.”

Su Hao looked at Mingguang. The more he looked at, the stranger Mingguang became.

Because he couldn’t see anything.

Even with the Supreme Rule of Realization that was extremely strong and had a deep understanding of, he still couldn’t find the problem with Mingguang.

This was the biggest problem!

“Mingguang, what the hell is going on with you?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

At this time, facing a family of three, Mingguang broke out again. His blood was boiling all over his body. It was indeed not a transformation, but the usual…

Forbidden technique!

It was still the old same forbidden technique!

For twenty years, Mingguang had prepared so many things. This was definitely not something that Su Hao who rushed a breakthrough could compete with.

When the forbidden technique was fully activated, Mingguang’s body was full of golden light.

“Bright sun!”

Boom!

The familiar scene was revealed again with the same brilliance radiating to the surrounding. However, before Su Hao and the others could resist, they saw another brilliance flashing by.

“Bright moon!”

Boom!

Silver light spread!

A fusion of yin and yang energy, endless light fell.

“Blackhole!”

Boom!

Yet another move!

It was another powerful move.

Everyone suddenly understood that Mingguang’s forbidden technique just now wasn’t a scary attack, but a terrifying technique that allows him to perform several attacks at once.

Bright sun.

Bright moon.

Black hole.

These three attacks were heading toward Su Tiancheng, Su Hao, and Li Xiaoru respectively.

What was even scarier was even each of these three attacks were aiming at someone, they were all indiscriminate attacks!

Boom!

Boom!

Terrifying attack was incoming.

Li Xiaoru summoned countless Rule Force on the world summit and blasted that blackhole.

Blackhole?

Is it that formidable?

The so-called bright sun and moon, Su Tiancheng didn’t even need to take action and Su Hao absorbed them all with a wave of his hand. Sorry but Kingdom of Heaven was just reborn. It happens to short of something…

Three moves were all rendered useless!

It was just for a moment.

Three strongest espers!

Mingguang’s plan was doomed to fail.

However, when these three moves shattered, and they were about to head out to defeat Mingguang, they suddenly discovered that Mingguang… vanished. Yes, he vanished from the world.

“He fled?”

Su Hao was taken aback.

Yes, not only was he stunned. Even the others who saw this scene were stunned.

This…

Is it the same Mingguang?

What’s happening here?

It turned out that trick earlier wasn’t to kill them, but to cover up his action?

Su Hao felt pain.

Yes.

It hurted so much.

Because he remembered that whether it was a novel, show, or game, as a boss, especially the last villain boss, shouldn’t the boss be arrogant and fight until the end? Why did Mingguang run away at the last moment?

This was simply a damned move!

This doesn’t make sense!

They joined forces, but their strength only barely surpassed Mingguang. Unless Mingguang fights to the death, if such a person wishes to run away, who can stop him?

After all, in single combat strength, Mingguang was stronger!

“What to do next?”

Everyone looked at each other in a stunning expression.

“This…”

Su Hao literally was too speechless to curse.

Hey, with such a huge battle ongoing, when the world summit already appeared, you ran away as the main villain? Is this reasonable? To not fight until the end, aren’t you embarrassed to call yourself the final boss?

Obviously, this Mingguang has no sense of being a boss at all.

Su Hao could only smile bitterly. The TV series had indeed harmed one!

“He ran away?” Su Tiancheng muttered to himself.

“What kind of forbidden technique was that? It could hardly be noticed by everyone!” Su Hao also realized the problem because it was too quick. Mingguang seemed to have disappeared the moment the blackhole appeared.

How did he disappear?

Swish!

Su Hao activated Synchronize Space.

With the Supreme Rule of Realization, this couldn’t be any easier.

In Synchronize Space, the scene earlier slowly went Backtrack.

Then…

The moment the blackhole appeared, space was distorted. Unlike Bright Sun and Bright Moon, the strength of this black hole seemed to be beyond one’s imagination.

Then endless Rule Force destroyed it!

The black hole burst suddenly.

“Hold on…”

Li Xiaoru suddenly realized the problem. “It shouldn’t explode. That moment, something was amiss.”

Su Hao took a closer look.

Wasn’t that the case?

The eruption was too early.

Wait, in other words, it was blasted under Mingguang’s control?

He deliberately detonated it?

That Mingguang…

When Su Hao was puzzled, he saw the black ohle burst into a net of black light that seemed to be a real black hole, which was completely different from the one used to attack before!

That trace of black hole had no offensive power!

There was no aura!

In fact, there was no light in it so that no one could notice it!

Yes.

No one could see anything.

Because the black hole had absorbed all the light!

If it wasn’t for the reconstruction from the particles of Realization, they won’t even be able to notice this black hole. This was when Mingguang hid himself there in an instant before completely disappeared.

“This is…”

Li Xiaoru seemed to have thought of something.

Su Tiancheng also stood up abruptly. Both looked at each other and revealed a hint of bitterness, “This is a big problem!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1066 - Charge: The Final Reserve
chapters.body:
Chapter 1066 - Charge: The Final Reserve

Chapter 1066: Charge: The final reserve

This is a huge problem!

Su Hao guessed something when he saw the look of his parents, but when Su Tiancheng told him, Su Hao was still shocked. This was because he would have never thought that Mingguang’s ambition was that huge!

What does Mingguang want to do?

Destroy the world!

Using the energy born from the destruction of the world to breakthrough and become a god!

He wanted to truly become god!

Of course…

This world was the best source itself.

Once this world was destroyed, the moment the entire world erupted, all forces would explode at that moment, and if those forces were to be absorbed…

That would be enough for Mingguang to complete the legendary breakthrough.

“This lunatic!”

Su Hao didn’t know what to say.

Destroy the world?

It turned out that was the reason!

”Then what about now?” Su Hao felt a bit strange.

“He fled.” Li Xiaoru’s face was a bit ugly, “I can feel that he had left this world.”

“This… world?”

Su Hao paused for a second.

He left this world?

What does that mean?

Su Hao didn’t understand at first but soon he realized. Damn, leaving this world, he borrowed the power of the blackhole to leave this world?

“Could it be…”

Su Hao’s pupils contracted.

“You’re right.”

“If I didn’t guess it wrong, that guy had reached the actual Earth!”

Su Tiancheng’s tone was so solemn that Su Hao took a mouthful of breath.

The real Earth?

What kind of world is that?

No one knew!

However, since this world was created by that strong esper, everything could now be connected. There was actually such a world, the real world!

The real Earth!

“Can Mingguang come back here?” Su Hao asked suddenly.

“Theoretically, that’s imposisble. With him alone, it’s impossible to recreate the same blackhole. However, no one knew the specific situation of Earth. If he could find a similar Rule Force, then he could recreate the same scene again. Of course, the more serious issue is…”

Li Xiaoru thought for a while, “If Mingguang successfully breaks through and steps into the god realm, then I’m afraid he will be omnipotent.”

God!

This was a realm that no one could step into.

Different from the strongest espers like Su Tiancheng and the others, the god realm is just a legend!

Because even the one who created this world, Li Xiaoru’s father, didn’t step into that god realm! Thus, no one knew exactly what would happen.

Mingguang escaped.

However, he left behind a time bomb.

Where is the original earth?

No one knew.

Maybe there was nothing there, but maybe there were countless strong espers too. If Mingguang breaks through into the god realm, can this world still exist?

This was an unknown factor.

Everyone glanced at each other and realized the seriousness of the problem.

What’s more depressing was that no one seemed to be able to stop Mingguang. How long did Mingguang prepare for this day? He had plans after plans. When one plan failed, he had a backup! His plan to cross into the real world was obviously his backup plan, a special plan that could only be activated when all other plans failed.

“It’s not that pessimistic either.”

Su Hao pondered for a moment before said in deep thought, “What we don’t know, Mingguang is also clueless. Even if he went there, it would be unknown. The real Earth is a mystery to everyone in this world. One more thing, since Mingguang can cross there, why can’t we go too?”

“What are you trying to do?” Su Tiancheng’s expression changed.

“If I use Backtrack to analyze that move earlier…”

Su Hao pondered for a moment, “With my current strength, it might be possible to me to recreate it.”

“You want to create that blackhole?” Su Tiancheng was shocked.

“You’re right.” Su Hao nodded, “If I can recreate it, Mom can use the Rule Force in the world summit to bombard it. As long as the procedures are the same, a real blackhole will appear. Then…”

“I can go there!”

“You mustn’t!” Su Tiancheng instantly rejected, “Even if so, it’s me who will go and not you.”

“I have Kingdom of Heaven. He can’t kill me.”

Su Hao calmly analyzed that only this way could he convince his parents, “When I encounter danger, I can hide in Kingdom of Heaven.”

“If he breaks through into the god realm, will hiding in Kingdom of Heaven be any useful?” Su Tiancheng rejected.

“If he breaks through into the god realm…”

Su Hao glanced at Su Tiancheng, “Could hiding here be useful?”

Su Tiancheng was taken aback.

He revealed a wry smile immediately.

Yes.

Once Mingguang breakthrough into the god realm, this world would be completely over. How could it be any useful to hide somewhere? He wasn’t as strong as Mingguang, going there would only spell his death! On the contrary, it was Su Hao whose strength wasn’t below him, but the concealment was much higher than his. Moreover, Su Hao had that terrifying Supreme Rule of Realization…

Even if he wants to create Mingguang, that seems to be fine too!

Su Tiancheng only realized…

Unknowingly, his son had surpassed him?

When he was sealed, he had made several shots and each time, he consumed a lot of strength. It was all for his son and to snipe the enemy! In his heart, no matter how strong Su Hao is, Su Hao is his son that he has been silently protecting. Yet, he ignored the fact that his son had already become that strong.

Su Tiancheng was dazed for a second.

Li Xiaoru took Su Hao’s hand, “I won’t persuade you because I know I can’t stop you, but no matter what, you have to survive.”

“You should know that you are this family’s everything.”

“Alright.”

Su Hao looked firm.

This mother and son had depended on each other for so long, and naturally Li Xiaoru knew him the best.

When Su Tiancheng saw this, he could only sigh.

Twenty years.

Things remained the same, but people had changed!

This was no longer his era…

The decision had been made.

Su Tiancheng will soon follow Mingguang into the world that no one had set foot in. However, before that, Su Tiancheng needs to ensure Su Hao has a qualified understanding of Supreme Rule before he is allowed to leave.

In this regard, Su Tiancheng is an expert.

Light circulated around the world summit.

The light filled with majesty was still spreading across the world.

The emergence of the world summit was regarded as a miracle in the online community. After all, in this suffering world, they needed some form of faith.

And the world summit just appeared.

When humans and beasts joined force to let go of all grievances, the world summit appeared. These kinds of rumors spread widely under some works of the world espers.

As for those who knew the truth, they just smiled faintly.

Meanwhile, in a place full of miracles, Su Hao was training his Supreme Rule. After several days of hard work, under Su Tiancheng’s wholehearted teaching, coupled with infinite acceleration of Kingdom of Heaven, Su Hao’s mastery of Supreme Rule was no longer under Su Tiancheng’s!

Su Hao’s strength grew rapidly.

There was no doubt that he would become the strongest out of all the strongest espers!

Su Tiancheng’s strength could no longer grow.

Twenty years of being sealed, the price paid was beyond one’s imagination. Not to mention, each time a little strength was gathered, he would forcibly break the seal and use the residual force to make a move.

And those few times…

They were the most painful period.

For Su Hao’s sake, Su Tiancheng had paid too much. Fortunately, Su Hao’s strength had caught up.

It wasn’t just Su Hao alone who improved.

Li Tiantian, Li Xin, and Chen Yiran; everyone was madly sprinting to become the strongest esper. When Kingdom of Heaven was transformed, they could already cultivate by themselves. The bottleneck that had been stuck on everyone was broken through just like that.

Cultivate and cultivate!

Breakthrough, breakthrough, and breakthrough!

This was what everyone was busy doing. Although in reality, Su Hao wasn’t considered the strongest, in Kingdom of Heaven, he’s the only god!

Countless brilliance emerged.

Su Hao was helping everyone breakthrough!

Time acceleration!

Quantum deduction!

Su Hao literally used all of his might.

These days, everyone is working hard.

Everyone knew that the next confrontation with Heavenly Emperor Mingguang would definitely be an epic one. At that time, whether it was Mingguang or Su Hao, one of them will inevitably die!

That would be the final battle.

Chen Yiran was one step away from being the strongest esper. Although she was utilizing the Supreme Rule in the Secret Realm of Deepest Sea, Chen Yiran had touched that realm before her death!

With just one step, she can breakthrough.

Similarly, there were Zhou Wang, Mo Ling, Li Xin and even Erha! These people were only one step away from being the strongest esper or Emperor-ranked. Now, with Su Hao’s aid, they were making the final breakthrough. Once they become the strongest esper, Su Hao’s strength will increase sharply.

Even Li Tiantian and the others were sprinting toward the strongest esper realm.

They were a bit far apart. Even with Su Hao’s aid, they just managed to reach level three world realm, but that wasn’t too bad. Once Chen Yiran and the others broke through, the momentum they brought will definitely make those late bloomers stronger. With the birth of three strongest espers and two Emperor-ranked…

That can definitely push them to breakthrough from peak world realm to the realm of strongest espers!

So, now everyone’s breakthrough was waiting for that one opportunity. Once someone breaks through, the chain reaction triggered would be absolutely extraordinary.

And everyone was waiting for it to arrive.

Today, Su Hao was cultivating.

However, his peaceful training session was soon interrupted. When Su Hao raised his head, he noticed it was Wan Cheng, Zheng Tai, and Wang Jun.

“You guys?”

Su Hao felt a bit strange, “Aren’t you guys cultivating?”

“That’s not important.”

Wan Cheng shook his head slightly. His eyes were bright, “You want to go find Mingguang?”

“En.” Su Hao nodded.

“I will go as well.” Wan Cheng smiled lightly.

“Include me.” Zheng Tai calmly said.

“Same here.” Wang Jun also had the same attitude.

“You guys?”

Su Hao was taken aback before smiling bitterly, “I want to bring everyone out, but is it possible? The so-called blackhole, only one person can pass through.”

“That’s why I’m looking for you.” Wan Cheng sounded calm.

Su Hao’s pupils shrank suddenly, “Could it be that you guys…

“You’re right.”

Wan Cheng’s tone suddenly became solemn, “Use Universe Creator to bring us to Kingdom of Heaven even if we may not come back! This is the final battle after all.”

“We can’t afford to sit back and wait!”

“This battle.”

“We must participate!”

Su Hao raised his head and saw their determined eyes, they belonged to one who is willing to die!

chapters.title: Chapter 1067 - Strongest Esper: A Series Of Breakthroughs!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1067 - Strongest Esper: A Series Of Breakthroughs!

Chapter 1067: Strongest esper: A series of breakthroughs!

“Alright!”

Su Hao agreed.

Regarding Wan Cheng and the others’ request, Su Hao didn’t know how to refuse them.

In fact, he was left to do nothing but agree!

Wan Cheng, Zheng Tai, and Wang Jun; which one of them wasn’t a prideful person? Seeing the decisive battle was imminent, sitting here and waiting for death was not something they could do! To put all hope on Su Hao and wait for him to fight is impossible! They wanted to give it a try even with their meager strength.

As for the danger?

Not being able to return after entering Kingdom of Heaven?

Is that still important now? Once Mingguang’s plan was successful, the entire earth may be destroyed. Then it would truly be a disaster.

Within Kingdom of Heaven, there were additional people joining the community.

With the help of Li Xiaoru, Su Hao could be said to have the support of the entire world! Every Rule Force, all the power of the world summit. At this time, Su Hao’s power was almost inexhaustible, and the entire Kingdom of Heaven was powering up extremely fast!

Time.

One second, several years.

It just passed like that.

Having lost track of the time, it suddenly just happened like that.

A strange aura emerged in Kingdom of Heaven. Su Hao suddenly woke up and looked at the person who had broken through. Without any surprise, it was Mo Ling!

As the person closest to Emperor-ranked, she had been given the chance to breakthrough first.

When that horrifying aura appeared…

When Mo Ling completed her transformation under the glory of Emperor-ranked, the supreme glory of the world descended, covering all the surrounding people.

It was the blessing of an Emperor-ranked beast.

Who would be next?

Buzz~

Space shook.

No one would have thought that the second to breakthrough turned out to be it!

That husky who was drooling in saliva!

Erha.

It broke through.

Although it was amusing, it was a pseudo-emperor after all. Since then, its strength had remained like that and never changed. Later, when its borrowed strength was recovered, after painstaking cultivation, it finally regained its original strength. Now, with Mo Ling leading them, it finally broke through.

Mo Ling was a beast after all.

So was Erha.

The same aura of beast assisted Erha into being the second one to break through. Soon, when Erha’s aura fell, golden light enveloped it as the blessing of heaven descended. This time, another wave of blessing belonging to the Emperor-rank covered everyone around it!

The rich golden light was absorbed by the surrounding people.

Everyone was on the verge of breaking through.

This time…

The first one to breakthrough turned out to be Li Xin!

Yes.

It was that Li Xin.

Because of his relationship with Erha, Li Xin received the most benefit. Almost immediately after Erha broke through, a terrifying force poured into him. When the power was transformed by the Supreme Rule of luck, Li Xin finally took the step to become the truly strongest esper!

Buzz~

A crown emerged.

Different from the previous illusory crown, the current crown on Li Xin’s head already formed its essence, the glory of the strongest esper…

Finally the main event was here.

It wasn’t an aura of an Emperor-ranked beast, but the blessing from the strongest esper.

First.

Li Xin!

Swish!

Li Xin waved his hand.

The endless Supreme Rule of luck enveloped everyone, and it could faintly help the others breakthrough. Li Xin grinned when he saw this, “Hehe, please call me lucky guy in the future.”

Everyone: “…”

Breakthrough!

Breakthrough!

After Li Xin, that amusing guy being the first human representative to breakthrough, the aura of Chen Yiran, Wan Cheng, and Zhou Wang broke out almost at the same time. On everyone’s head, the crown of the strongest esper appeared. Finally, they had reached this point too.

Buzz~

Chen Yiran’s blessing came, and golden light swept across.

Sweeping through all the residents in Kingdom of Heaven such as Li Tiantian, Ping Yang, Xiao Die, Blue Dream Butterfly, Wang Ru, Cheng Tianya, and the others who were already at peak world realm, the bottleneck of these people’s cultivation in Kingdom of Heaven suddenly became shaky. Wang Ru and Cheng Tianya, those two men who were literally half-step strongest espers, broke through directly.

Boom!

A crown emerged.

Wang Ru broke through.

Cheng Tianya broke through.

Buzz~

Zhou Wang’s blessing came.

Golden light swept across again.

Everyone was once again bathed by this terrifying energy.

Buzz~

Wan Cheng’s blessing descended!

Buzz~

Wang Ru’s blessing arrived!

Buzz~

Cheng Tianya’s blessing was no exception!

This was the supreme glory. Never had history experienced so many strongest espers breaking through at once at the same place. How strong was the blessing of the strongest esper’s breakthrough? After being bathed countless times by different blessings, how strong were they now?

One could only use the word horrifying to describe it.

Among these people…

After several blessings, Li Tiantian had also reached that point. When the blessing of Cheng Tianya swept across, he finally broke through.

Boom!

A crown emerged.

The crown of time appeared.

Li Tiantian broke through!

Buzz~

Li Tiantian’s blessing descended!

Breakthrough!

Breakthrough!

Golden light swept across!

Xiao Die broke through!

Ping Yang broke through!

Blue Dream Butterfly broke through!

Kingdom of Heaven.

The entire Kingdom of Heaven was shrouded by endless golden light.

Terrifying golden light was spreading, and because Kingdom of Heaven itself belonged to Su Hao, these glories passed through Kingdom of Heaven to Su Hao. Thus…

At the world summit, Su Hao sat cross-legged.

Visible to the naked eye, horrifying brilliance burst out from Su Hao’s body.

That was the glory belonging to the strongest esper!

If this scene was seen by outsiders, they would pee themselves from fright.

Since when could the strongest esper be mass-produced?

Plus…

The glory of the strongest esper, how could it repeatedly appear in one person?

Is that a cheat?

When Su Tiancheng and Li Xiaoru saw this scene, they were shocked for a long time and were speechless.

“Luckily I blocked the world bell.” Li Xiaoru could only sighed.

Yes.

The world bell was blocked. After all, this scene was too shocking. The breakthrough of the strongest esper wasn’t as simple as the general world esper’s breakthrough. The sound would probably be heard all over the world! If this scene was to happen, the entire world would be spammed with the sound of the bell in one day!

How could one bear it?

Most likely, the entire world would be in chaos by then.

“This brat…” Su Tiancheng smiled bitterly, “He has far surpassed me.

This is the power of the world?

The so-called bloodline of creation was actually just the strength from Li Xiaoru’s father. With Model Analysis, Su Hao could exert its terrifying might better.

The power of creation, perhaps it contributed in adding spirituality?

And this happened to be the missing factor of Model Analysis.

A perfect match made in Heaven.

Su Hao’s Model Analysis coupled with the bloodline power was enough to give birth to spirituality, a real world that shines with dazzling brilliance.

To be frank…

If not for Li Xiaoru being unable to leave, Su Tiancheng didn’t mind bringing the entire family to live in Kingdom of Heaven. After all, it was at least safer than here.

What a pity.

Li Xiaoru is the master of this world, and it was impossible for her to leave.

Breakthrough!

Breakthrough!

The golden light literally bathed the entirety of Kingdom of Heaven.

Kingdom of Heaven, which was extremely terrifying to begin with, underwent changes once more due to the breakthroughs. Last time, when Li Tiantian and the others broke through into the world realm, Kingdom of Heaven was tempered by an unknown amount of times. However, now, with so many people breaking through into the strongest esper, Kingdom of Heaven experienced a crazy rate of transformation.

Was Su Hao the one who had the most changes?

No, that wasn’t it.

The one with the biggest changes was Kingdom of Heaven!

The golden light lasted for a long time.

It was so mind numbingly long.

The glory of the strongest esper?

Is it valuable?

Sorry, it’s all over here!

Kingdom of Heaven was now undergoing a qualitative change. Shi Mingxuan and the others who were originally ordinary domain espers, under countless baths of such blessings, they had also successfully broken through into the world realm! When Shi Mingxuan smoothly created a large number of fourth grade boundary spirits, everyone successfully reached level three world realm.

They became peak world espers.

Those ordinary citizens of Kingdom of Heaven in the past had now become peak world espers?

Unbelievable!

It was that simple.

First, the accelerated time in Kingdom of Heaven, then countless times of unimaginable blessing of the strongest espers, and finally ten fourth grade boundary spirits that Su Hao provided with; how could that be any smoother! Of course, because their own foundation was too weak, they could only stop the progress at this point.

However…

Was it really over?

Of course not!

Just when everyone thought it was over.

Suddenly, another terrifying aura erupted, and an incredibly powerful aura rushed across the world, causing everyone to stand up in shock.

“There is actually still someone breaking through?”

“Who?”

Yes.

Who?

In Kingdom of Heaven, everyone was already present here.

Where was this other person from?

When they glanced over and saw that figure, everyone opened their mouth in surprise. A loli dressed in Gothic clothes was suspended in the air.

Such an unique dress, there was only one such person in the entire Kingdom of Heaven!

Xiao An!

Hydra’s daughter!

That sleeping girl actually was awakened by the thrill of the glory of the strongest espers?

Boom!

Xiao An broke through.

Golden light swept across again.

“Damn!” Ping Yang jumped up and down excitedly, “My wife, you’re finally awake!”

Everyone couldn’t help but give him a blank look. What wife are you talking about? Does she even know you?

Buzz~

The blessing of heaven arrived.

Everyone was once again bathed under the blessing.

Golden light, they saw more golden light.

The glory of the strongest espers finally came to an end. In Kingdom of Heaven, except Shi Mingxuan and the others who were peak world espers, everyone else had become the strongest espers!

This was an absolutely incredible scene.

With the power of the entire world assisting Kingdom of Heaven, with endless resources, Su Hao finally created another miracle.

Each appearance of the strongest espers made the aura of Kingdom of Heaven different. Each baptism of the strongest esper made Kingdom of Heaven purer, and Su Hao’s physical body also entered the rank of the strongest esper after countless tempering.

He was now a well-deserved double strongest esper!

His flesh, strongest esper realm!

His Realization, strongest esper realm!

“Mingguang, I will kill you the next time we meet!”

Su Hao’s eyes were murderous.

When he got up from his cultivation and looked at Li Xiaoru, it meant that everything was ready and it was finally the time to leave…

His goal: Earth!

chapters.title: Chapter 1068 - Traverse: The Blackhole Of Nothingness
chapters.body:
Chapter 1068 - Traverse: The Blackhole Of Nothingness

Chapter 1068: Traverse: The blackhole of nothingness

“Are you prepared?”

Li Xiaoru looked at her son.

Such a moment had arrived.

Perhaps, she originally thought of spending her life slowly in Jianghe City. Who would ever thought that one day she would come back here?

For the world.

For humans.

For…

The final glory of her father!

“If you can find news of him, let me know.” Li Xiaoru whispered, “I also want to know what kind of person he is. Of course, the most important thing is you must survive! If you have an accident, I will never forgive you!”

“Rest assured.” Su Hao hugged his mother, “I will definitely be back!”

“Good luck.” Su Tiancheng just patted his shoulder, “I’ll be waiting for you.”

“Alright!” Su Hao nodded solemnly.

Su Tiancheng was also helpless as he could only stay here. It was for Li Xiaoru. What if that bastard Mingguang somewhat managed to return? Even if Li Xiaoru killed him, the entire world might collapse. After all, all his planning was for the sake of destroying this world!

Thus, Su Tiancheng must stay here.

With him here, even if Mingguang returned, it would be a deadly battle. For Mingguang to win, it would definitely not be an easy task.

At the world summit.

No one noticed that when the energy in Su Hao’s hands erupted, when he was in Kingdom of Heaven, he had been simulating for unknown years to replicate the same blackhole. The same scenario happened once more.

In space, an invisible force burst.

That was a blackhole!

Li Xiaoru’s hands blasted Rule Force towards it as she opened the door of both worlds.

Flashing through Space.

Su Hao’s figure suddenly vanished, and the world summit returned to its calmness once more.

Li Xiaoru and Su Tiancheng both looked at their son’s disappearing figure and stood there for a long time. To save this world, to place such a burden on their shoulders, would that be too heavy?

However, there was no one else but them!

“You must.”

“You must stay alive.” Li Xiaoru prayed silently.

Swish!

At the world summit, a cluster of stars representing will lit up. That represented Supreme Rule. As the master of the world, even when Li Xiaoru prayed, she still had the power to shake the entire world!

In the sky, a meteor passed by, appearing to cut through time and space.

…..

How long was that?

No one knew.

Time seemed to stand still.

In front of Su Hao was total darkness or perhaps, one could say there was not even darkness. It was a strange feeling. There was nothing in front of him and he felt nothing.

Not even darkness.

Su Hao was in such a place. This was a crazier situation than Little Dark Room!

No concept of time.

No concept of space.

There was zero concept.

There was nothing. Around him was a total emptiness.

When one is in Little Dark Room, you will know that the thing you have to do is to compete with the opponent who can last longer. If you survive, you win. This was an instinctive observation. However, there was no hope or future in this kind of place, and you will never know what might happen in the next second!

Touch?

Smell?

Taste?

Everything.

They weren’t blocked.

However, he just couldn’t sense anything. Even if it was perception or feeling, there was only endless nothingness, and this was far more terrifying than the so-called Nine Seals.

“Here, what place is this?”

Su Hao had such thoughts in his mind.

There was no doubt that he entered the blackhole.

Mingguang also entered here in the past, but no one knew what the final result was. Su Hao was also clueless and could only wait within nothingness.

What was more frightening was there is no concept of time here.

One second?

One year?

One thousand years?

All might be possible.

In this case, Su Hao deduced with his quantum computer that 99% of people can only survive under such an environment for one minute before death due to the abnormal heart rhythm. As for the rest, they will start to slowly suffer in this endless void, and some might hold on for an additional second.

However, the quantum computer calculated that one week later, the remaining 1% will die. Even if they could control their body to not be destroyed, they would turn crazy.

This was the result from the experiment.

In this place, at most one could last one week. What’s interesting was that in this one week, as a player, you will think that you have stayed for countless years. This was how scary this place is.

Time advanced another week.

Swish!

The deduction of the quantum computer stopped.

Because everyone died.

Su Hao used a population of 100 million to perform this deduction. In the end, the entire army was wiped out in half a month. Even the strongest espers would go mad in this situation.

No one could overcome it!

“Force?”

Su Hao tried to use his force.

It was ineffective!

For those unique talents, as long as they could use their force, they could create the best environment for themselves in minutes and can even create illusions, sealing themselves, blending into the illusions to relieve their boredom.

However…

It was ineffective.

When one couldn’t use any force, everything was in vain.

“Internal force is ineffective.”

“Supreme Rule is unusable here.”

Su Hao had tried everything. All his power was sealed. In this magical blackhole, only death awaited him unless he could step into the other end of the blackhole.

Just like that, Su Hao experienced such a dilemma.

However…

The same thing happened to the situation too. It was ineffective against him because Su Hao could return to Kingdom of Heaven. Inside, countless people were watching this scene curiously…

“Aha, so this is a blackhole?”

Li Xin sounded excited as he stood in front of Synchronize Space, waving his hand, “Space battleship, Su Hao, go!”

Everyone: “…”

Space battleship, Su Hao.

Yes.

Wasn’t that the case right now?

Su Hao’s body couldn’t sense anything. His powerful body was like an empty shell while everyone was inside Kingdom of Heaven! It was akin to being inside a space ship so Li Xin’s phrase seemed to be correct.

However, Su Hao just sneered.

“Isn’t Wang Jun a battleship?”

“True.”

Li Xin patted his thigh and looked at Wang Jun, “After all, Zheng Tai rode on you before.”

Wang Jun: “…”

Damn, how could he end up being the target?

Everyone seemed happy in Kingdom of Heaven.

The so-called blackhole crisis didn’t exist for Su Hao after all. Being able to withstand with the body of the strongest esper, it allowed him to travel smoothly in the blackhole. Thanks to the existence of Kingdom of Heaven, it allowed him to completely ignore the effect of blackhole. After some excitement, everyone also began to resume cultivating.

After all, they all just stepped into the strongest esper realm.

Su Hao simply explained the situation in which Su Tiancheng taught him about Supreme Rule. Everyone was madly absorbing the information of Supreme Rule.

A classroom.

A podium with a group of students sitting below.

Of course.

If one didn’t consider these guys were all strongest espers, this scene seemed to have brought Su Hao back to the time when he was in the campus.

Wasn’t it what he used to do last time?

Time flies.

Who would have thought that in a few years, things would have come this far?

His father was still alive, and everything was developing for the better, but the condition was he had to eliminate Mingguang! As long as Mingguang is eliminated, everything will end.

“No tricks please.” Su Hao suddenly glared.

Ping Yang, this guy actually whispered to Xiao An during the class.

“What are you doing?” Su Hao raised his eyebrows.

“Damn, you can even notice this?” Ping Yang was shocked.

After all, he was transmitting via a secret technique, and his entire person didn’t show any sign of movement at all. This was a secret space technique he worked so hard in order to hook up with Xiao An, Paper Slip.

How did Su Hao notice it?

“Hehe.”

Su Hao just smirked, “In Kingdom of Heaven, I am god!”

“Hmmpphh.”

Ping Yang curled his lips.

True, how could he forget about this.

The entire world belonged to Su Hao. What secret technique could be concealed from him?

“Just a friendly reminder.” Su Hao smiled, “If you dare to make any more trouble, I don’t mind doing a live broadcast when you’re in the bridal chamber or even…”

Su Hao glanced at Ping Yang maliciously.

Ping Yang shut up decisively.

No one can provoke Su Hao, this is his world!

Beside them, others were happy to look at this scene. This was a scene that was inevitably staged every day. Everyone knew Ping Yang lkes Xiao An. As for Xiao An who has always been arrogant, she was quite shy. Of course, Xiao An generally didn’t have the time to bother with him but Mo Ling.

Two lolis…

They were both beasts too. Now, they were truly best friends.

As for Erha?

Those two obviously didn’t recognize Erha as a beast. After careful research and discussion, they believed that Li Xin and Erha belonged to a new species…

Hearing this, Li Xin was overjoyed.

In the blackhole.

This horrifying scene was spent in joy. For everyone, these days have been spent mostly on cultivation!

There was no change of time in Kingdom of Heaven.

Because Su Hao wanted to save every effort to deal with any mishap that may happen at any time.

After all, this is a blackhole.

And their goal is the true earth. If there’s any mishap, it won’t be a surprise. As time passed, everyone gradually became proficient in Supreme Rule. In the endless void, after an unknown distance, there was a ray of light from afar.

“There’s light!” Li Xin shouted.

Everyone became excited.

Yes.

The endless blackhole finally had a light appearing.

“Be alert.”

Su Hao called everyone to pay attention. That was when he returned to reality for the first time since then. Indeed, he could see a ray of light from a distance. If he didn’t guess it wrong…

That should be the end of the blackhole.

Earth.

The planet that they should have been familiar with but became strange after they knew the truth. Was it about to show itself? According to Li Xiaoru, the Earth in the current world is just a fake planet built by the creator. As for the original, the true Earth?

No one knew!

It might be possible that in that catastrophe, the creator of the world had fallen…

Swish!

More light could be seen.

With light, the power of the blackhole was weakening, and all perceptions were returning. In an instant, Su Hao recovered his normal senses.

Boom!

A gap appeared in the space, and Su Hao seized the opportunity to leave instantly.

Snap!

As his feet stepped on the earth, there was a strange coldness.

Su Hao raised his head and his eyes displayed an indescribable shock.

chapters.title: Chapter 1069 - The Truth Of The Past.
chapters.body:
Chapter 1069 - The Truth Of The Past.

Chapter 1069: The truth of the past.

It was an eye-catching scene.

It was a desolate world; the aftermath of a disaster.

This was not out of the expectation. Su Hao and the others had already guessed that this might be caused by a disaster, which is why the true Earth now looked like this. However, Su Hao was truly shocked because he had seen this scene before, in the countless dreams he had when he woke up.

He still remembered.

In the middle of the night, he woke up from this big dream of a vast land dyed in blood red. This was the moment when Li Lei broke through into the strongest esper realm, and used his talent to see it.

So, this was the truth of the world?

“Phew.”

A gale howled.

It was mixed with endless coldness.

Everyone turned silent.

Red.

Red.

In front of their eyes was nothing but redness.

The whole earth seemed to be baptized in blood and fire. Su Hao knelt down and touched the ground. There was no temperature or aura, only endless coldness.

Inexplicably, Su Hao suddenly wanted to cry.

Is this the real Earth?

Exactly what had happened back then that it turned out like this?

In their world, Earth was still there. Although the beasts were rampaging, it still maintained its original appearance. As for the current scene in front of them, is this still a planet?

Su Hao took a step and paused for a second.

In front of him was a canyon hundreds of miles deep.

Yes.

It had no bottom.

Su Hao raised his head and couldn’t see anything. However, he could sense through Supreme Rule that such depth, even through satellite observation, one could find that this is a super trauma! He had seen this before on the map. In history, this place seemed to be a huge state.

However, what remained now was a bottomless pit.

That kind of feeling…

It was as if being hit by something!

What happened back then? Su Hao went silent, and everyone in Kingdom of Heaven was silent too. Right now, this desolation was beyond their imagination.

Oh yes.

That person was alive once.

Li Xiaoru’s father, in other words, his grandfather.

That strong esper was at least still alive when the world was created. However, he stayed on this land later. Then what about after that? Exactly what had happened?

Su Hao raised his head and suddenly turned around.

There was a temple built of rocks.

Inside the temple, there was a solid statue. It was a middle-aged man with a faint smile on his face and a long sword at his waist.

Standing in the wind, even on the icy ground, it still gave one a strong warmth.

Su Hao suddenly was shocked.

“A statue?”

“No.”

Su Hao walked forward while trembling.

For others, it was a statue, but he could clearly see via Model Analysis that it turned out to be an immortal body of the strongest esper!

That turned out to be the strongest esper!

To die here.

With the supreme glory, he transformed himself immortal and stood here.

“Su Hao.”

Chen Yiran’s voice made Su Hao turn around.

“Huh?”

Su Hao withdrew his hand.

“He’s a bit like you.”

Chen Yiran looked complicated.

Being obsessed with the big pictures, this was something she didn’t miss. Only then did Su Hao carefully observe the statue in front of him, and he didn’t speak for a long time.

Somehow alike?

In this new earth, who else can resemble Su Hao but him?!

“Could it be…”

Su Hao suddenly took a long breath.

The creator!

Li Xiaoru’s father, in other words, his grandfather!

“Is it really him?”

Su Hao’s Supreme Rule of Realization was utilized.

Layers of aura wrapped around the statue, and he soon obtained the truth he wanted. This man turned out to be his grandfather, the so-called creator!

There was this rumor that when this man created the world, he decided to stay here.

Then…

Su Hao felt this is more complicated.

What happened back then?

The time didn’t seem to match!

How long was the creation time? His mother Li Xiaoru couldn’t tell, but she remembered that the world summit already existed ever since…

This world should have been created long ago.

And then…

In the year 2030, the world changed, but why?

Su Hao fell into deep thought.

The others were also pondering.

The truth was probably right in front of them, but it always felt like a tiny bit was missing, just a tiny bit before they could touch the truth and reveal everything!

“What exactly is it?”

A cold light flashed in Su Hao’s eyes, and the quantum computer was operating frantically.

Time…

2030…

Memory…

The immortal strongest esper…

Endless deductions began.

However, even the quantum computer couldn’t figure out the truth. Su Hao was stuck in a deadlock. He felt that if this problem wasn’t solved, he might always have a knot in his heart. At this time, that lean man saw the difference in the statue with a glance.

“Look at the mark of his sword.”

Everyone followed the direction where his hand pointed and looked.

Sure enough, there were countless patterns and runes on the sword of this strong esper. These might be the triggering points to reveal the truth.

“Great.” Su Hao excitedly said, “Continue to look for more clues.”

Soon, that guy actually found some problems.

“Hehe, this guy must be an expert in playing puzzle games…” Li Xin exclaimed.

At this time, Zhou Wang suddenly looked at the countless runes on the sword thoughtfully. After a while, his pupils contracted, “Those runes…”

“What’s wrong?” Su Hao took a look.

“I have seen them before.” Zhou Wang said solemnly.

“What?!”

Everyone was shocked.

He had seen them before?

“Where was it?” Su Hao said excitedly.

“In my master’s inheritance.”

Zhou Wang thought for a while, “My master isn’t too strong, but he had obtained a good inheritance. Although he failed to exert its power, it was left for me. I have seen them, and the runes are of similar type although they are different.”

“However, I am sure they belong to the same type!”

“Plus…”

“It’s very plausible that my master obtained something from this senior?”

Zhou Wang’s tone was solemn. Hearing this, everyone was shocked.

Is it the inheritance coming from this creator?

“Hold on.” Su Hao suddenly thought of something, “Let me think about it.”

“Inheritance…”

“Patterns…”

Su Hao felt that he was getting closer and closer to the truth. Suddenly Su Hao set his sights on Zhou Wang’s master. That Thunder King?

Who is Thunder King?

Former deputy dean of Zhanzheng College.

At that time, he was only a peak professional esper. After a period of time when the origin energy became stronger, he unexpectedly died, leaving behind only his soul. Later, he assisted Zhou Wang and became a master to help Zhou Wang. When faced with a crisis, he sacrificed himself to save Zhou Wang.

This is the history of Thunder King.

It was legendary.

Although he wasn’t strong, he deserved everyone’s respect.

However, he had never thought of it before, but thinking about it now, there was a problem.

Thunder King was obviously mastered in thunder type talent so where does his soul clone come from? If it was similar to a soul clone type, it might be possible, but that obviously wasn’t the case! He didn’t understand it before, but after being the strongest esper, Su Hao had never heard of the existence of any secret technique in this field. What happened to Thunder King?

Of course, if it’s a secret technique of the creator…

Then, it’s another story.

So, could it be possible that Thunder King had found the inheritance of that person?

A man with ordinary talent was lucky enough to stumble upon the legendary inheritance of the initial period of origin ability era but died unexpectedly. He then used the power of the inheritance to survive until he met Zhou Wang. If it was like that, that seems to make sense. Then, here comes a problem.

If Thunder King really found that legacy…

What does that similar rune have to do with the world?

Does it matter?

Of course!

Plus it was extremely important. However, what was it?

No one knew!

Everyone seemed to be stuck at a certain bottleneck. The truth was in their hands, but they couldn’t touch it. That feeling was very tangled.

Perhaps, one could find the information in the inheritance?

“Thunder King!”

“Thunder King!”

Su Hao’s gaze was akin to a torch.

The quantum computer in his body was crazily deducing. Thunder King’s life, everything when he was alive was analyzed by Su Hao but…

Useless!

From the inheritance known by Zhou Wang, there was no relationship!

The so-called inheritance were all secret techniques. Perhaps it was just a stray one. It had nothing to do with Thunder King. At least, in his life, there was no such similarity.

“Perhaps, it is really just a coincidence?” Zhou Wang shook his head helplessly.

Coincidence.

For the runes to be similar, was it a coincidence?

Su Hao muttered to himself. No, forget about him not believing it. Even the quantum computer eliminated such a possibility.

“Thunder King…”

“Life…”

Su Hao frowned.

Then, Su Hao was suddenly stunned.

Yes.

There was indeed no information on Thunder King’s life, but what about after his death?

What happened to Thunder King?

Died!

He split up his essence!

Su Hao still remembered such a scene. In order to protect them, Thunder King disappeared into countless particles, benefiting the entire Jianghe City! One could said that for the city to be able to rise rapidly and possess countless geniuses, at least half of them were due to Thunder King!

“Essense split…”

“Essense split!”

Su Hao’s body trembled as his eyes lit up.

He understood!

He finally understood!

“So that was the case…”

“So, this is the truth?” Su Hao muttered to himself.

Does one still remember in the year 2030, when the origin ability era descended? Has the world changed because of that time?

No.

That day was the day when the creator of the world died.

Thunder King learned countless secrets from the creator’s inheritance, and one of them is essence split. When everything came together, Su Hao suddenly understood.

Thunder King, essense split!

The sky drops origin energy!

How similar was it to the scene in Jianghe City and the day when the origin ability era arrived?

However, one was a small scale covering Jianghe City while the other covered the entire world!

One is Thunder King, who is a peak professional esper, while the other is the creator of the world who is at peak strongest esper realm!

It turned out that in the year 2030 was the day when the creator of the world died. With his final moment, he turned his life into energy for everyone in the world…

He felt that he couldn’t hold on any longer.

He felt that he couldn’t stand anymore.

Thus, he decided to use his last bit of strength to let the whole world run on its own. At the same time, he turned his body into immortality to protect that side of the world!

So, this was the truth?

Everyone looked at the statue and suddenly felt an unprecedented respect!

chapters.title: Chapter 1070 - The Creator Appears
chapters.body:
Chapter 1070 - The Creator Appears

Chapter 1070: The creator appears

Sacrificing oneself for others.

The price paid by the creator, how terrifying was that?

Su Hao was now clear.

For example, when Chen Yiran and the others died, if it was just a normal death without any special force intervening, Su Tiancheng could reverse time and Su Hao could save people with his Universe Creator! However, if it was a person like Thunder King and the creator…

They could no longer be saved.

Origin essence.

Giving up reincarnation to benefit others.

The so-called reincarnation, was it like that?

That statue remained the same.

Standing firm in the cold wind, the man still had a smile on his face. Su Hao silently stepped forward, bent over, and bowed. Everyone in Kingdom of Heaven followed suit. Such a person could be said to have single handedly saved their entire world. He deserved their respect! What’s more, he is Su Hao’s grandfather!

Su Hao stepped forward.

Under the tall statue, there was a row of almost invisible imprints.

Su Hao gently touched it with his hand, and there was such a line of small characters on it.

“Li Yijing, age 45, 1985-2030”

“Li Yijing…”

“It is his name?” Su Hao softly said.

Su Hao was still shocked. Suddenly, he felt a different sensation in his hand. When he looked down, the row of words was actually glowing.

“What happened?” Su Hao frowned slightly.

Buzz~

The light circulated.

“Who are you guys?”

An ethereal voice came from a distance, but it seemed to enter straight into Kingdom of Heaven so that everyone there could hear it clearly.

“Who?!” Su Hao asked coldly.

“Me?” The cold voice paused, “Enforcer. code number #237857231.”

“Enforcer?” Su Hao’s pupils shrank suddenly.

A law enforcer, isn’t that the senior from the world summit? Could it be…

“Please indicate your identity.”

The cold voice of the law enforcer came.

Su Hao took a deep breath, “Su Hao!”

“Subject: Su Hao, identity inputted.”

“Subject: Su Hao, identity scanned.”

“Subject: Su Hao, identity confirmed!”

Buzz~

The voice of the law enforcer suddenly vanished.

There was a powerful cyan light around. At this moment, the statue seemed to come alive, and everything around it became lively.

Li Yijing!

That statue turned into a living human!

“You’re Su Hao?”

Li Yijing turned around.

Under everyone’s surprised look, he looked at Su Hao and even spoke.

“You’re still alive?”

Everyone was shocked.

“It’s an illusion.” Su Hao could see it clearly with a glance, “This is something left from the past.”

“Yes, I’m just an illusion.” Li Yijing said with a smile, “Last time, Xiaoru told me that if she has a daughter in future, she will be named Hao Er. When I hear your name, I could already confirm your identity.”

It was an illusion left over decades ago.

To be able to still interact, that proved his strength as a peak strongest esper.

“To leave behind an illusion, what do you want to tell me?” Su Hao pondered.

“You’re right.” Li Yijing sighed, “This illusion will be destroyed after a while if there’s still no one coming.”

“Why?”

“Back then I created that world. Because of my special talent, I found out that after I stepped into the level three world realm, the world I constructed was different from others. My world is full of spirituality! Because of my unique talent Rule Force, I created a similar simulation world.”

“That is the world you exist in!”

“After I became the strongest esper, that world gradually improved and eventually reached the stage of an actual world. However, at that time, there was no one in it and never would I have thought that there could be someone living in it! Until one day, Earth suddenly faced a terrifying disaster!”

“There was this legend that Earth will be destroyed once every epoch.”

“From the ancient times of dinosaurs to the present, one could say each step of the process was difficult. After countless destructions and reconstructions, there is today’s Earth.”

“However, the disaster has finally come.”

“The legend that was originally thought to be a rumor became a reality that day. Earth shattered, and there were countless meteors that pierced through the boundless void! During that battle, all the strong espers were dispatched to protect Earth. Outer space cracked, and even the moon disappeared…”

“In the end, we managed to stop the disaster.”

“However, the entire Earth has been completely ruined, and the remaining prestige alone will bring this Earth back to the ancient times with very few surviving…”

“And I didn’t even have the qualification to participate in that battle.”

“I managed to breakthrough into the strongest esper realm during the crisis, and took everyone on the earth into my world. However, before the inclusion was completed, I was almost obliterated by a meteor.”

“Thus, in the new world…”

“It only covers the mainland.”

Li Yijing sounded a little sad.

In the new world, Earth had been reshaped, and many people didn’t even know that they had already changed the world. However, there was no other country, and there were issues with memory. In order to let them live well, many people’s memories were erased. Gradually, things about the original Earth became blurred.

Everyone forgot the past and made a new start.

This is the origin of the new world.

Originally, everything should develop normally. What’s a disaster? For them, as long as the world hasn’t changed, there will be no disaster.

However, the new Earth was almost destroyed.

Those who survived turned out to be the hidden powerhouses!

In the original world, the superpowers were hidden all over the cities. The entire world had no existence of origin energy. However, after the disaster, they were the only ones left. Life on Earth was very bleak that even Li Yijing was seriously injured and died.

In the year 2030, Li Yijing died.

Before his death, the only thing he could do was transfer the knowledge of origin energy.

Basic, specialized, professional, domain, world, and strongest esper…

These were all passed on in the small circle originally belonging to the espers’ community, and they were directly moved into the new world by Li Yijing. However, it was a small circle to begin with.

On the real Earth, the number of espers was minute.

In the new Earth, most people could cultivate, that’s hundreds of millions of people!

The development of origin energy gradually became a norm, and the original cultivation systems even had some of the problems pointed out. Various problems had also appeared in the operations of this world…

To put it in simple terms…

Li Yijing created a world full of bugs, and those who found the bugs began to question this world. This was also the reason for the existence of law enforcers.

Find bugs, fix bugs, and obliterate doubters!

All for the stability of the whole world.
