Before his death, Li Xiaoru had completely changed the nature of the law enforcers in the world summit, which was originally set to only protect Li Xiaoru in order to maintain the world and protect everyone.

This was everything in this new world.

An imperfect power system…

An irregular world module…

An incomplete memory of history…

everything may just be Li Yijing’s random thoughts. He was just doing his best to make these humans live better.

And this was the truth of the world!

“Now, do you understand?”

When Li Yijing finished speaking, everyone was still immersed in shock.

The truth…

This was the truth they wanted!

It turned out that espers did exist on the original Earth, and the reason for not having any foreigners was because it was too late at that time as he only managed to cover the mainland before the disaster arrived.

“My first dream…”

“It is to transfer the entire Earth to my world so that everyone wouldn’t notice any changes and there wouldn’t be any need to resort to memory erasure.

“However…”

Li Yijing smiled bitterly, “It was still too late.”

Everyone sighed.

When all the truth had been revealed, why do they feel so bitter?

“May I know what year the disaster occurred?” Su Hao suddenly voiced out.

“Year 2012.” Li Yijing spat out a number.

Su Hao guessed correctly.

From his countless materials, he had been studying countless times regarding the destruction of the world in the year 2012. However, the year 2012 had clearly passed without any mishap.

It was like that in everyone’s memory.

However, how could one know that your world is still in the original world’s plane?

For example, Li Yijing.

If it wasn’t that the disaster came too quickly, he could completely transferred ordinary people across the planet! When they entered a new plane, nobody would even be aware.

“Year 2012.” Su Hao sighed.

In ancient books, it was stated that the earth had experienced countless such disasters, but the earth had survived for 4.6 billion years and has never been destroyed. After the disaster strikes, only those species would be wiped out.

Of course, the latest disaster was indeed a bit more severe.

Su Hao raised his head and looked in a certain direction.

Because…

The moon was gone.

A heavyweight disaster against an absolute defensive counterattack, Su Hao wasn’t clear how the fight went on, but being able to make a moon disappear during the fight, one could see how huge the scale was.

Everything was now clear.

The so-called source turned out to be just that absurd doomsday rumor.

For them, this was a complete joke. However, on the real Earth, it really existed and was very scary.

These seniors were fighting hard to defend their homeland!

All this was the truth.

“Then what should I do now?” Su Hao looked at Li Yijing, that grandfather of his.

“To be able to appear here, it means that the other world is already unstable and could collapse at any moment. Otherwise, no force could penetrate two worlds from different planes.” Li Yijing calmly said.

Su Hao nodded.

“Thus, the inheritance of the new world requires you to be prepared.”

“I don’t know how your world is, but before that world is destroyed, you must make a brand new world!” Li Yijing’s face was serious, “Otherwise, everyone will die! The reason I appear here is to pass on the true way to create a world to you.”

“Create a world?” Su Hao went speechless.

“You’re right.” Li Yijing started talking about the idea of building a new world with ten boundary spirits when Su Hao revealed a touch of Kingdom of Heaven’s aura.

“This…”

Li Yijing’s eyes suddenly widened!

chapters.title: Chapter 1071 - The National Father
chapters.body:
Chapter 1071 - The National Father

Chapter 1071: The national father

Creation?

Inheriting Li Yijing’s spiritual bloodline and possessing Model Analysis, coupled with countless transformations from the strongest espers’ aura, today’s Kingdom of Heaven was already far stronger than the original world!

This is Su Hao’s world!

Kingdom of Heaven is a sphere.

Under Su Hao’s creation, it was almost indistinguishable from Earth. However, it was far stronger than Earth, and as stable and unshakable as Mount Tai!

Unless one is the strongest esper!

Otherwise, don’t even dream of destroying it.

This is what the current Kingdom of Heaven is capable of.

One could be sure that…

Once the new world collapses and Kingdom of Heaven is officially used to replace it, it would be yet another new beginning. After Li Yijing learnt about it, he just laughed wildly for a long time that he even burst into tears.

“Great, this is great!” Li Yijing said excitedly, “Since it’s better than my world, I can be rest assured. I really didn’t die in vain. You all need to live well!”

“However, there is still a law I need to pass to you.”

Li Yijing pointed at Su Hao and a series of memories came, “This is a method to transfer everything from the original world to the new world so that nobody could even sense any differences!”

Su Hao silently remembered it.

“Great.”

A smile appeared on Li Yijing’s face, “This way, I’m relieved.”

However, just when he was about to leave, Su Hao revealed the purpose of this trip. After hearing that someone was trying to destroy the world to gain power, Li Yijing’s face was full of murderous intent.

“How bold.”

“No matter who Mingguang is, I will spare him no mercy!”

“To condense that world, I have paid so much for it. How could I allow him to destroy it?”

Li Yijing’s killing intent became dense.

Seeing Su Hao’s near perfect Kingdom of Heaven before thinking back of his own world, Li Yijing suddenly felt relieved to have such a grandson. Hesitating for a moment, he finally told Su Hao a law that he didn’t intend to teach, “Remember, unless it’s a crisis, never use it at all.”

Su Hao felt surprised, “This…”

“Of course, if you don’t have to resort to this, that’s the best.”

Li Yijing smiled lightly, “Boy, my world, it’s almost time…”

“This world belongs to you, the younger generations.”

“Exterminate Mingguang as soon as possible.”

“Yes.” Su Hao respectfully responded.

Phew!

Cold wind blew past.

Li Yijing’s figure had turned into a statue again! The vivid scene before seemed to be an illusion, and there was only an immortal monument left behind.

“Take care.” Su Hao bowed.

In Kingdom of Heaven, everyone saluted.

Farewell Li Yijing, Su Hao was about to look for the traces of Mingguang. When he heard a call for help from a distance, it seemed that someone was suffering from great pain.

“There’s someone else?”

Su Hao was startled.

Just now, Li Yijing told him that there were still people surviving, they were those strongest espers in the past!

Someone met danger?

Being alert, Su Hao followed the voice and when he saw the scene, he frowned.

Two men were driving a tattered carriage. On it, there was a girl in her early twenties with some blood stains on her body.

The cry for help earlier was from none other than from that girl.

“This is?”

Su Hao took a glance.

That girl’s strength was in the professional realm while those two guys were in the domain realm. This was completely different from the strongest esper he imagined. How could there be such humans with such low strength here?

However, Su Hao soon came to a realization.

The ones who survived back then were strongest espers, but that was all in the year 2012!

What about now?

More than forty years had passed!

They probably had great-grandchildren by now. These people should be the descendants of the past strongest espers, right? However, as the descendent of the strongest espers, how could they be so miserable?

Thinking about it, Su Hao could make a wild guess.

Those espers probably died like Li Yijing too…

Once one served his purpose, he would be eliminated.

Dark Age, wasn’t that the same situation? This was the case when Su Hao first stepped into the era of origin ability, and now it was the same on Earth.

“Who?”

The other party obviously noticed Su Hao’s figure.

When the girl saw Su Hao, her eyes brightened, “Help me!”

A hero saving a beauty?

Su Hao smiled lightly.

“Who are you? Which strongest esper’s descendant are you?”

Although those two men were in tattered clothes, they were obviously more cautious. The aura coming from Su Hao’s body and his clothes were absolutely incomparable.

This is a child from an existing strongest esper’s family.

He’s on a different level from these people.

“No.” Su Hao calmly said.

Dark light flashed in one of the men’s eyes. Soon, he quickly investigated Su Hao’s identity, “Nope, there is no strongest esper family with him as a descendant!”

“That means…”

Those two looked at Su Hao’s clothes and greed flashed in their eyes, “Is he an outcast just like us?”

“Hehe.”

An outcast.

The descendant of the strongest esper who had been abandoned.

When the strongest esper dies, unless someone was willing to take care of them, one will be labeled an outcast here. After the disaster, the Earth’s resources were pitiful that the competition was too fierce.

Greed flashed in their eyes as they headed toward Su Hao.

Hearing that Su Hao wasn’t a descendant of a strongest esper, that girl’s face suddenly changed, “Quickly flee! They are domain espers. You can’t stop them!”

“Want to leave?”

“It’s too late!”

Those two men licked their lips and stepped forward, “Those clothes, I don’t know which descendant of strongest esper you stole it from but it suits me. Hahahaha.”

Boom!

Two domain fields appeared.

As both men stepped forward, a powerful aura drew the surrounding cold wind.

Swish!

Thow two men charged at Su Hao with strong killing intent. Facing an unknown enemy, they had to do their best. This was the rule of every outcast, or else one can’t imagine how they’re going to die! After all, one will never know what terrifying amulet was left in the hands of the descendant of those damn strongest espers.

At this moment, although they believed that Su Hao was an outcast, the clothes were enough to make them take him seriously.

What if he managed to steal the amulet by chance?

Thus…

They must kill the target in one hit!

“Domain realm?”

Su Hao suddenly felt nostalgic.

This is the gift that greets him after coming to this world?

This was simply interesting!

“I am indeed not a descendant of the strongest espers.”

Su Hao’s leisurely voice floated in the air, reaching the greedy men and the worried girl, “Because I am the strongest esper!”

“What?”

Those people were taken aback.

Before they could react, they saw a dazzling crown emerge on Su Hao’s head!

It was as bright as a flower.

“Strongest esper?”

Those two men yelled in shock.

This young man who looked like only over twenty years old is actually the strongest esper?

They couldn’t be blamed for being clueless!

Which strongest esper wasn’t from the older generation? This young man… the attack on his hand that was about to be shot out, when it was about to touch the young man’s body, that man actually gritted his teeth and destroyed his own domain. His arm was cut off!

He is now a cripple.

“Puff~”

That man knelt on the ground, covered in blood.

As for the other man, after approaching Su Hao, he slashed Su Hao with a sword. Su Hao didn’t even bother to fight back. That power landed on Su Hao’s body. Then, it turned into nothingness. After that man approached Su Hao, he gradually evaporated.

He directly vanished!

This is the power of the strongest esper!

Unrivaled in strength!

The surviving man had a look of happiness in his eyes. Even if his domain was abolished, even when he severed his hand, at least his life was still intact. Su Hao glanced at the girl. That beautiful face of hers had that unspeakable shock. A twenty plus year old strongest esper? This is a phenomenon beyond common sense!

“You’re very smart.”

Su Hao looked at the man who bowed his head.

“It’s the lord who is merciful.”

That man knelt down and dared not lift his head.

“Why catch that girl?”

Su Hao pointed at that cage and it snapped. The cage with countless patterns was automatically opened, and the girl walked down cautiously.

“Because of a mission.”

“A strongest esper, his son just reached adulthood and he needed someone to get married to. He heard that this girl is the most beautiful in the neighbourhood so he made us catch her.”

“Huh?”

Su Hao was at a loss.

Hold on…

What’s with this situation?

What’s with this son that had just reached adulthood and needs to get married, then he had to start kidnapping women?

Su Hao faintly felt something was amiss.

“There are very few women here?”

Su Hao suddenly thought of something.

“Women?”

“Ah, yes.”

That man nodded, “In the beginning, there were a lot of strongest espers alive, but very few were women. Thus, only a few got married and had children. Later, when the girls gave birth, they were first married off to those strongest espers. As for the younger generation, many are still bachelors…”

“It’s better now, but in the past, they were people who remained a bachelor until death.”

Su Hao had cold sweat listening to this.

Damn it.

He should be glad that there were still a small number of females left behind in the past, or else, what kind of world the Earth became, he didn’t even dare to think!

Damn it.

“Right now, the number of girls are still small?” Su Hao asked.

“He is lying.”

The girl’s cold voice came, “They are all liars. Indeed, there was a lack of females in the past, but since that strongest esper named Wang Jian, there was never any lack in females. Now, there is a balance between men and women. There will never be such a problem occuring. He lied!”

“Oh? What’s happening?”

Su Hao was shocked. The balance between men and women was solved?

“After Wang Jian married, I don’t know what Supreme Rule he has, but after he got married, every time his wife gave birth to sextets, and every newborn is a female! If his wife was not at least a domain esper, I guess by now she would have… In these few decades, we have lost count of how many girls have been born!”

“In fact, there were even people who requested him to take a concubine to give birth to more children…”

The girl’s face was a little red, but she managed to explain to the end.

Su Hao: “…”

He no longer knew how to put his current mood into words.

“For decades, Senior Wang Jian has married several wives. As for his daughters, the number is unimaginable.” The girl explained in a low voice. Her voice was getting softer and softer.

“…”

Su Hao was completely stunned.

Damn!

The wisdom of mankind was indeed unmatched by any other race.

In their world, there was this senior named Han who became the national father because of his beautiful daughter ,but how could he be compared with Wang Jian? Isn’t this the true national father?

chapters.title: Chapter 1072 - Secret Confrontation
chapters.body:
Chapter 1072 - Secret Confrontation

Chapter 1072: Secret confrontation

The father of the nation!

After hearing about this Senior Wang Jian, Su Hao was in awe.

With the power of one person, he could solve all the sufferings of the bachelors on Earth. This was simply the rebirth of a bodhisattva! Look, assuming he has 10 wives, 6 newborns at a time, 60 a year, from the year 2012 to now…

Swish!

Chen Yiran’s cold killing intent came through Kingdom of Heaven. Su Hao coughed awkwardly as his expression returned to normal before kicking that man, “Since there’s no shortage of women, why kidnap women?”

“Answer honestly or I will kick you to death.”

The girl next to him looked at this scene in cold sweat. If Su Hao was not the strongest esper, she would have run away long ago. Why is this strongest esper look so unreliable?

The man hurriedly said a bunch of words while trembling.

Now, Su Hao had a rough idea. First, after the world destruction, there were not many strong espers. After a reclassification, there were only three distinct types of people.

The first type is ordinary people, those who can’t cultivate and live at the bottom of the society.

The second type is cultivator, cultivators under the strongest esper realm. Here, a professional esper and a world esper are called cultivators because without becoming the strongest esper, one cannot truly be a strong esper on Earth.

The third type, the strongest espers.

This is the top level of the food chain.

Every strongest esper was terrifying, so when Su Hao revealed his strength, it was enough to scare everyone, but the current situation was actually simpler. Certain strongest espers admired this girl’s beauty and intended to grab her to be married into his family. It was just that simple.

Su Hao didn’t care about these.

Anyway, this kind of thing could happen anywhere. What really moved his heart was that when he asked that man, the man mentioned that a mysterious strongest esper appeared and invited all the strongest espers of Earth. It seems like he claimed to be able to solve the various current life problems.

A mysterious powerhouse!

Invitation!

Solving all the problems?

Without having to think twice, it must be Mingguang.

“Where is it?” Su Hao asked.

“At Moyu Villa.”

The man nervously continued, “The mysterious strongest esper invited all strongest espers to visit Moyu Villa as a guest, saying that he planned to announce news that could change the world at the wedding.”

“Oh? Which wedding?”

Su Hao’s eyes lit up, and the man looked at the girl next to Su Hao.

Su Hao: “…”

The so-called wedding was already prepared. They were just waiting for the bride to be grabbed and that’s it?

Can you be any worse than that!

What about humanity?

What about morality?

However, Su Hao also understood that such a thing must have happened often in such a deserted place. Ruthlessness is the biggest rule…

The strong eat the weak.

Su Hao closed his eyes and pondered.

If I were Mingguang, what would I do?

Inviting all strongest espers?

What’s he planning to do?

First of all, Mingguang didn’t know and would never imagine that I came here. Thus, if I don’t make a move, Mingguang won’t notice me, and once I do so, it will be my only chance to inflict a fatal blow to Mingguang!

This is the first point.

Next, it would be Mingguang’s plan.

Mingguang should have been here for many days. First, he established his existence and became acquainted with other strongest espers before taking advantage of the so-called wedding to have a group party. Su Hao had no doubt that this wedding was planned by Mingguang in the dark.

That’s very likely!

In other words, he needs an excuse tomorrow.

A reasonable excuse to summon everyone together. Then, why did he do so?

Why does he need everyone else to be together?

Su Hao pondered.

What is the purpose of Mingguang coming to this world?

Breakthrough!

Only to breakthrough! Everything he did was to breakthrough into the god-like realm, and what’s the relation of summoning other powerhouses together?

“To breakthrough, Mingguang definitely requires a lot of force.”

“The destruction of the entire new world could provide the energy that Mingguang needs to reach that god-like realm.”

Su Hao pondered.

The original new world was incomplete, but the current modified world became rich in energy after decades of development. Once it is destroyed…

So, does Mingguang intend to destroy the new world?

No, impossible.

Mingguang finally escaped from there, and it should be impossible to go back. Then, Mingguang is probably looking for a breakthrough method on Earth. At the same time, he needs countless energy…

Where would the energy resources be coming from on Earth?

The strongest espers!

Su Hao’s eyes became slightly cold.

Although Earth is extremely desolate, it is still the main world after all. The number of the strongest espers here is beyond one’s imagination. Thus, powerful energy was brewing here. Each strongest esper had an incredible amount of force in their body, and once this energy burst…

Su Hao’s hand trembled.

In the past, when the new world was created, it was only with the help of the strongest esper.

And now…

Dozens?

Or even hundreds of them?

Although most were seriously injured and certainly unable to fully recover from the original injury or use their strength to their full potential, they were still true strongest espers with terrifying energy. This was the reason why no one dared to touch them even after losing their combat strength.

A seriously injured strongest esper is still a strongest esper.

Unless one is truly dead, the eruption of a strongest esper is far more powerful than a nuclear weapon!

Thus, this is your goal, Mingguang!

Su Hao turned cold.

To gather all the strongest espers, including those who were injured heavily, based on that man’s explanation, there could be dozens of strongest espers or even exceeding one hundred!

With hundreds of strongest espers!

What kind of energy was that?

And if that time…

Boom!

If Mingguang made his move, what would happen?

Bright sun?

Bright moon?

Blackhole?

Or an even more terrifying mass destruction attack?

Once the power of hundreds strongest espers erupt at one point, there is no doubt that it will trigger a heavyweight disaster comparable to the destruction of the new world!

And everything…

It was all to gain sufficient energy to breakthrough into the godlike realm.

As for this girl?

She’s mere cannon fodder.

Everyone is cannon fodder.

They would never have thought that there would be a world destroying powerhouse like Mingguang, who was far superior to them but hidden in the dark, pulling the strings.

Su Hao was very sure.

Based on how cautious Mingguang is, he must have first understood the world and slowly began analyzing before finally starting making a plan to carry out.

Mingguang had always been very cautious.

Otherwise, how could he still have a follow-up plan to escape even when Su Hao repeatedly performed miracles.

This is who Mingguang is.

Su Hao looked from Mingguang’s perspective and quickly calculated everything.

Perhaps for Mingguang, everything here is nothing more than a NPC-like character in a game or he didn’t care at all?

Su Hao shook his head.

Since Mingguang had arranged such a scene, it was obviously foolproof. With Mingguang’s shrewdness, he must have released news that was enough to make all strongest espers move.

In this battle, Mingguang will definitely take action.

“Then what should I do?” Su Hao pondered.

Destroying Mingguang’s plan is a must, but how to do so?

Directly charging in would be a fool’s act. Su Hao not only wanted to destroy the plan but also attack Mingguang thoroughly.

Because he knew that there was only one chance!

Once Mingguang was aware of his existence, all other plans would be invalid.

Thus…

First, he needed to secure an identity.

And now…

Su Hao’s gaze swept across that man, but he quickly skipped over him. That man was ignorant, but Su Hao wasn’t stupid. There was no doubt that once this task was completed, this guy would be silenced but he still wasn’t aware of this. Thus, disguising as him would not be feasible.

Then…

Su Hao put his sights on another person, that bride.

“…”

Su Hao was embarrassed.

Within Kingdom of Heaven, Li Tiantian sneered. You also have such a day?

Su Hao sighed and smiled bitterly. How did the situation turn like this?

“What’s your name?”

“Chen, Chen Xinglian.” That girl replied cautiously.

“Chen Xinglian?” Su Hao pondered.

Su Hao turned into an exact copy of the girl, “From now on, I am called Chen Xinglian.”

“Huh?”

The girl was dumbfounded.

That man was even more shocked.

“You…”

Chen Xinglian pointed at Su Hao.

“My plan requires this.” Su Hao sighed, “I need to impersonate you temporarily.”

Chen Xinglian’s body trembled, “Then I… will I be killed?”

“No.” Su Hao calmly said, “Do you have relatives here?”

“Nope.” Chen Xinglian sadly said, “My father used to be the strongest esper ,but he died unexpectedly and I became an outcast from the descendant of the strongest esper. Otherwise, how would these guys dare to kidnap me?”

“It’s great if you have no relatives.” Su Hao calmly said.

Swish!

The stars flickered.

Kingdom of Heaven’s gate opened, and everything inside appeared.

“This is my world. You will not lack anything.” Su Hao continued, “If you’re interested, I will keep you safe for the rest of your life. Of course, if you disagree, I need to let you sleep for a moment. After all, my identity needs to be kept confidential.”

Chen Xinglian’s eyes flashed with surprise.

Looking at that mysterious world, looking at everything in Kingdom of Heaven and the Earth right now, she suddenly felt like she was living in an ancient world…

“I will go!”

Without any hesitation, Chen Xinglian made a choice.

“Great.”

Su Hao brought her into Kingdom of Heaven. Presumably with the enthusiasm of those few bachelors, this girl wouldn’t be wronged. Next, it was time to execute his plan.

“What’s your name?” Su Hao looked at that man.

“Shang Lin.” That man said with trepidation. He was truly terrified.

“Alright.” Su Hao smiled lightly.

Boom!

An invisible wave flashed, and Su Hao turned into Chen Xinglian to sit on the carriage. However, that man’s memory had been tempered instantly and it took a long time for him to look up in confusion.

“Damn it, Zhao Sanpao still hadn’t come back from shitting?”

“Forget about it, it’s almost time!”

Shang Lin checked the time before looking at the “Chen Xinglian” with contempt and hurried toward Moyu Villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 1073 - I'M Not A Sissy Like You
chapters.body:
Chapter 1073 - I'M Not A Sissy Like You

Chapter 1073: I’m not a sissy like you

Moyu Villa.

This is the site of Chen Xin, a strongest esper.

Today, Chen Xin’s son was going to get married, and his friends were invited to participate. Of course, more importantly, the mysterious powerhouse who appeared a few days ago actually possessed the Supreme Rule of Healing.

First, it could cure the sick and disabled strongest espers.

Secondly, that man actually knew how to solve the current situation!

One needs to know that since the great war, when the moon vanished, Earth had undergone unusual changes. The post recovery ability was absent, and the Earth seemed to be frozen. Occasionally, one could see light during the day, but it was extremely dark at night. Wherever the sun couldn’t reach, there would be nothingness.

That was such a cold and terrifying period.

Even though the strongest espers had nothing to do with each other, over the years, dozens of them had worked together, but the Earth’s environment remained unchanged.

Even they didn’t know when the earth would turn better.

One hundred years?

One thousand years? Or the ever lasting hundreds of thousands of years?

No one knew!

The scariest thing was that this planet gave a hopeless feeling to these people.

No one knows when the planet will recover. That disaster had done such a huge damage to the Earth that everyone now became desperate.

However, that man had a solution.

There was this rumor…

That he had the Supreme Rule of Healing.

Not only was it applicable to human beings, but also the environment itself. Once the Earth was healed, the environment could be regenerated, and the origin energy will surge again. For them, isn’t it just a matter of minutes to restore the Earth by then? As long as the problems are solved, a new era will begin!

Thus…

When they heard this news, their blood boiled!

Forget about the disabled strongest esper…

Healing the world sounded so exciting with just the thought of it.

At that time, these surviving strongest espers would become true heroes. Today’s party and wedding was just an excuse for Mingguang to ensure a perfect execution for his plan.

Noon.

Perhaps it was due to the sun no longer shining light to the Earth, but even the time prediction had shifted.

Everything was proceeding in an orderly manner. Each name and character was within Mingguang’s plan. He had replayed this scene many times.

This time, there will be no accident.

The thirteenth person…

The fiftieth person…

…..

Half an hour later, when the last person on the list came, Mingguang finally had his eyes light up, “Alright, it’s about time to get started…”

What no one noticed was that Moyu Villa was secretly sealed.

A wave of aura blocked everything around Moyu Villa. Here, it had truly become an isolated and helpless place. At this time, except the invited strongest espers, the bride and groom, there was no one else!

Even the cooks were sent out.

As for the man escorting Chen Xinglian, he was killed as soon as he stepped in and everything was moving on silently. Chen Xinglian was pushed and shoved by several men to the new house. They only quickly touched up on her makeup for a better look before returning to their position.

Within Kingdom of Heaven, Li Tiantian saw this scene and sighed, “Su Hao, is it really fine to do this?”

“Why is it not fine?” Su Hao sneered, “I am not a sissy like you.”

“Hahahahaha!” Li Xin laughed crazily, “Do you think that Boss is trans like you?”

Li Tiantian’s forehead veins were exposed.

Because right now, the Chen Xinglian outside had been created by Su Hao via Realization! With just a click of a computer, the AI deduced the original character of Chen Xinglian. As for Su Hao becoming Chen Xinglian himself?

Is this some kind of joke?

Do you think I am Li Tiantian?

“Get lost!” Li Tiantian said irritably. When he turned around, he saw Zheng Tai holding a bunch of flowers and gave them to Xiao Die as he tried to court favor.

“Damn it!” Li Tiantian roared, “Zheng Tai, come and fight with me!”

Boom!

These two men had a duel.

Everyone rolled their eyes. It wasn’t the first time they saw this scene anyway. Xiao Die’s eyes were flashing with smiles. These two guys… As on the other side, one could see Blue Dream Butterfly sitting cross-legged as usual, cultivating hard… Perhaps it’s more accurate to call her Zhang Yating now?

Opening her eyes, Zhang Yating glanced over there. There was a clear sign of hesitation on her face.

“You still refuse to merge with me?”

Zhang Yating muttered to herself, “I don’t want to do this either, but is there a second route for us to choose?”

…..

Moyu Villa.

After everyone was present, Mingguang appeared indifferently, as cold and elegant as ever.

Through Synchronize Space, Su Hao could see everything. There were countless strongest espers on the scene with over hundreds of them! However, among these people, there were more than 60 who were disabled! It wasn’t sure how serious their injuries were, but they couldn’t recover their strength as the strongest esper.

The appearance of Mingguang gave everyone hope.

“I know everyone doubts me.” Mingguang’s eyes glanced at everyone, “I probably have no guts to deceive so many seniors who are stronger than me.”

Senior…

Yes, senior.

Mingguang’s current identity turned out to be a new strongest esper who had just mastered the Supreme Rule of Healing.

Buzz~

A light shined behind Mingguang’s back.

That was a silver moon!

Moonlight.

It was the first time since ages ago to be seen before everyone’s eyes.

“Moonlight, it turned out to be moonlight!”

Everyone was excited.

How long had it been since they saw moonlight?

Without the existence of that thing, the entire Earth becomes disordered. Of course, the Earth was fine, but the people who live here were miserable.

And now, they finally saw it.

Too bad, it was just a flash.

“My strength is limited.” Mingguang continued, “With everyone’s help, I can restore the existence of the moon. Of course, if everything returns to normal by then, I believe without my help, everyone can recover on his own, right?”

Everyone was excited.

Mingguang just casually said this sentence, leaving behind high expectations.

If…

If that was the case, it would be perfect!

“What should we do then?” One man excitedly said.

Mingguang scratched his head, “You guys just need to pass the force to me. However, I hope you can control your force and don’t transmit it too fast. After all, I am not strong. If I am triggered by a senior’s force, I’m afraid I will be abolished…”

Mingguang looked a little worried.

“No worries.” A strongest esper stood up and said, “I will test for you. Who dares to use force indiscriminately, I will be the first to cripple him.”

“Me too!”

Another veteran strongest esper stood up.

The restoration of Earth’s power is imminent, how could they let anyone destroy their hope?

“Damn.” Li Xin was stunned, “They actually believed that?”

“Yeah.” Li Tiantian sighed, “How could they be stupider than Li Xin!”

Just as Li Tiantian finished speaking, Li Tiantian felt a bite on his leg. He lowered his head and saw Erha staring at him viciously.

“Get lost!” Li Tiantian didn’t hold back.

“You, you’re an Emperor-ranked beast, right?”

“Look at that Mingguang, look at Mo Ling, look at Xiao An! No wonder no one admits you’re a beast. If you continue like this, will anyone accept you?”

“Aooo…”

“Damn, has he gone mad?”

Li Xin’s eyes widened and had a duel with Li Tiantian.

“These guys…”

“Why can’t they stay quiet for a while?”

Zheng Tai’s soft voice floated in the air. Zhou Wang just sneered. Damn it, who was the one who gave a bone to Erha and requested him to eliminate Li Tiantian?

Otherwise, how could you get away?

To flirt with someone’s wife, isn’t that just asking for a beating?

Seeing everything in Moyu Villa, Su Hao shook his head slightly.

“It’s not because they believe it easily. It’s more like they didn’t wish to give up on this hope.”

“Because reality is too cruel, and the future that Mingguang promised is too beautiful, that beautiful future is within their reach.”

“Even if it’s fake, they wish to try.”

“So what if it’s fake?”

“After all, there’s no need for him to cheat them. He’s just a little guy who just became the strongest esper. However, they are peak strongest espers.”

“This is most likely… their mentality.”

After Su Hao’s deduction, he had already obtained the result, “Because the Earth is too bleak, even if there’s a possibility of being deceived, they have to try.”

Everyone went silent.

Moyu Villa.

Mingguang successfully fooled everyone.

The strongest esper’s force was transmitted into Mingguang’s body. At this time, the moon behind Mingguang was shining like a holy light.

Buzz~

The moonlight illuminated the Earth.

Su Hao could roughly guessed that Mingguang intended to draw everyone’s force into a ball and eventually detonate it completely. However, would Su Hao give him such a chance?

The force was flowing, and Mingguang was enjoying the fruits of victory.

Suddenly, a voice rang in the mind of all the strongest espers, “What you see in front of you is a peak strongest esper with the Supreme Rule of Absorption. He intends to absorb your power for his own use to break through into the god realm! Withdraw your force immediately if you don’t want to be cannon fodder…”

“Who?”

Everyone was shocked.

“What’s wrong?” Mingguang looked up in shock.

Swish!

Everyone withdrew their force in a hurry. The force that had almost reached the critical point was now gone, and this went beyond Mingguang’s expectations.

Perhaps they also didn’t believe that voice.

However…

There is no loss to withdraw, right?

At most, they will restart the process again. However, if it’s true…

Everyone looked at Mingguang sternly.

“What happened to you guys?” Mingguang frowned slightly.

Someone is coming?

No, impossible.

With the seal across the entire Moyu Villa, even he couldn’t break in. Besides the espers here, there were only the pair of bride and bridegroom who are in the professional realm, and the locals were even less of a problem. So, how did these people suddenly change their attitude?

“Seniors, what’s the matter with you all?” Mingguang had a look of sincere doubt on his face.

Everyone looked at each other and hesitated. Whose words should they believe?

Who cares!

A cold light flashed in the eye of a certain strongest esper. Let them have a dogfight!

As for the truth, wouldn’t they know it once it is distinguished?

chapters.title: Chapter 1074 - The Forgotten Rule Force
chapters.body:
Chapter 1074 - The Forgotten Rule Force

Chapter 1074: The forgotten Rule Force

Let them have a dogfight among themselves!

When a certain esper was about to say something, suddenly that voice came again.

“Tell him this. Stop acting. Someone told us the truth last night of your true identity, your serious injury, and that you fled here with the intention of destroying the world.” A voice floated in his ears and continued when that esper hesitated, “Don’t you want to see his reaction?”

“Alright.”

“Then I will try.”

That esper finally stood up and sneered at Mingguang’s sincere gaze, “No need to act. Someone told us the truth last night of your true identity, your serious injury, and how you fled here with the intention of destroying the world.”

Swish!

This one sentence caused an uproar.

As for Mingguang, his pupils shrunk. Last night? Could it be that besides him, there is still someone here? Who? Su Tiancheng or Su Hao?

Damn it!

Mingguang suddenly felt something was amiss.

The reason he was so unreserved is due to the fact he is the only one here!

As for the others?

He never regarded them as human beings.

Now, with the appearance of either Su Tiancheng or Su Hao, it will be troublesome. He mustn’t delay this any longer otherwise his plan won’t succeed.

Last night…

Then, if Su Tiancheng or Su Hao knew of this matter here, wouldn’t they quickly come here?

Swish!

His detection once again scanned through the surrounding.

Mingguang confirmed that there was no outsider here!

Great!

In order to prevent him from noticing their existence, did they hide?

Ridiculous!

Since they are not here, he would take this chance to enforce it!

A cold light flashed in Mingguang’s eyes. He had already decided to take action, and his terrifying strength burst out on the spot, “Since you all don’t want to be obedient, I can only resort to force.”

Boom!

The sky was full of aura.

That was the aura belonging to a peak strongest esper.

In an instant, the aura of everyone around was suppressed. Mingguang’s strength was powerful to such a degree.

“Not good.”

Everyone’s face had a great change.

“You turned out to be a liar!”

“What big guts!”

“You’re simply courting death!”

Everyone was mad.

After all, there were hundreds of them!

Although quite a number of them were injured, they are still strongest espers! This man named Mingguang dared to toy around with them like this? This was simply intolerable!

“So what if is he a peak strongest esper? Kill him!”

An angry voice shouted.

Everyone was completely irritated.

Boom!

One could see bright brilliance.

Countless attacks were heading toward Mingguang.

As for Mingguang, sensing this situation, he just sneered. A group of ignorant fools; in this age, is the current strongest esper still the same as before? The originally abundant origin energy had long disappeared after the disaster, which is why they couldn’t recover.

Everyone’s strength was in fact declining.

As for Mingguang…

He’s a true peak strongest esper from another world.

“Die!”

Mingguang held Dragon Scale and slashed it down.

Poof~

Bloodstains could be seen blooming like lotus flowers.

Mingguang’s strength was terrifying!

Without beheading a strongest esper, Mingguang nailed them to the ground. A strange seal shot out from his hand, locking on everyone firmly. They didn’t die immediately, but were left with a breath remaining. All they could do was to open their eyes wide, watching everything happening around them.

Swish!

One more victim.

Swish!

One more victim.

In just a moment, twenty people had been sealed by Mingguang!

And all of this was just a start.

Everyone was terrified because this Mingguang was too strong!

One hit kill!

It had always been one hit kill!

Although Mingguang chose the weaker ones among them, that feeling wasn’t great. The gap was too huge!

“Kill, kill, kill!”

Mingguang went on rampage as usual.

The anger due to his failed plan was poured out at this moment.

Unstoppable!

Twenty… Thirty… Fifty…

The number of people sealed on the ground was increasing.

Within Kingdom of Heaven, everyone also watched this scene in silence.

“Aren’t you going to take action now?” Wan Cheng asked.

“It’s not the time yet.” Su Hao shook his head slightly, “These people are enemies too.”

Yes.

He can’t consider them as teammates just because of Mingguang. If they knew that he and Mingguang were from the other world, their treatment toward Su Hao wouldn’t be much better.

These people were also enemies.

“It’s good anyway to let Mingguang consume some of his strength.”

Su Hao was as cold as usual, “In order to maintain this state of being unmatched, the force he consumes isn’t small.”

Swish!

One hit kill!

Mingguang was like a demon god, rampaging wantonly here and there. Each time, it will be one hit strike. No one could stop him. Even those who are the same peak strongest espers were helpless.

“Kill, kill, kill!”

Mingguang’s killing intent soared.

On Earth, this place became a desolate region.

Cold wind rustled as Mingguang continued his rampage without any reserves, and the barrier that had been set up secretly around him began to show its effect this time. No one knew what happened here.

These men.

They were originally heroes.

They were originally the strongest espers of Earth! However, after the disaster, all that was left behind was the shadow of heroes. They actually ended up in such a miserable state!

Their ending shouldn’t be like this…

“They deserve it!”

Chen Xinglian’s voice suddenly rang from Kingdom of Heaven.

Su Hao turned around and saw this little girl with murderous intent toward these strongest espers, “They have no interest in their future, only their own personal interest…”

“My father used to help them a lot but after dying…”

“Everything is gone.”

“They deserve death!”

What kind of hatred was that, brewing in Chen Xinglian’s eyes?

Su Hao just smiled indifferently, looking at those struggling under Mingguang, “Sure enough, these poor men must have done something hateful, but it’s just that I can’t let those guys die…”

Three minutes.

Only three minutes.

Moyu Villa was full of dead bodies.

No, to be precise, these people were barely breathing, and they were all looking at Mingguang with wide eyes, not knowing what he wanted to do…

“I have already said this before. Wouldn’t it be much better if everyone cooperates?”

“Why do you want me to resort to using force?”

Mingguang showed a cold smile.

Suddenly a strange voice came, causing Mingguang to turn around and saw that strongest esper’s son looking at him tremblingly with “Chen Xinglian” in the distance.

“Hmmpphh!”

Mingguang waved his hand.

Puff~

Both died directly.

“Son!”

A certain strongest esper watched this scene in horror.

“Sorry, but I am not used to letting anyone stay alive.”

Mingguang smiled apologetically, but his eyes became colder, “He’s coming soon too. I need to speed it up.”

Swish!

Swish!

Two light rays flashed.

Mingguang took action and placed all the strongest espers together. Everyone with their pair of cold eyes looked at Mingguang in fear.

This man was simply a madman.

“Oh, one hundred and three men.”

Mingguang was satisfied, “This kind of energy should be enough.”

Mingguang muttered to himself.

The person who heard his words suddenly frightened inexplicably. What does this sentence mean?

Enough?

Thinking about the question from a certain man just now, is he really going to attempt breaking through into the god realm?

“It’s about time.”

Mingguang showed a satisfied look.

Buzz~

In the air, a black hole appeared.

That wasn’t a real black hole. At least, since they could see it, it’s not a real black hole.The black hole suspended in the air, and its brilliance spread to the surrounding.

The dark light was moving.

It was as if nothing had happened.

Swish!

Suddenly, the black hole began to spin.

Then everyone was horrified to discover that their own power had begun to disappear. No, to be precise, all of their power had been absorbed into that terrifying black hole.

“You, what are you doing?!”

Someone couldn’t help but ask.

“Absorbing your energy.” Mingguang grinned.

“No, you can’t bear that!”

Someone sneered, “Although we’re limited by the current state of Earth, we can’t exert our true strength, but we’re still strongest espers! The energy in our body is real! The power of over one hundred strongest espers, you absolutely can’t bear it. You will die in a horrible way under the energy.”

“I will wait for you to die!”

That person was full of hatred. He was the owner of Moyu Villa who invited Mingguang to come here.

He never would have thought that he had found a demon.

He would have never thought that by relying on that person’ name to find a good daughter-in-law for his son ended up resulting in such a result…

It was his greed.

He could only blame himself.

These words were haunting him, making him feel that he himself killed his own son, but in any case, he would bring this Mingguang to hell to repent together!

“Really?” Mingguang smiled lightly, “Then just watch carefully.”

Swish!

Swish!

The black hole was still absorbing their power.

Everything around was integrated into the black hole, and it was the power belonging to over one hundred strongest espers. Once it was all absorbed, terrifying changes would definitely occur.

“I have been waiting for this day so long.”

There was joy in Mingguang’s eyes.

He couldn’t bear it?

Of course he couldn’t bear it, but everything was within his expectations. The moment the black hole erupted, it will be the moment he steps into the god realm.

“All this power, come to me.”

Mingguang looked at the black hole’s absorption in fascination.

Around him, there were countless resentful but helpless strongest espers. How would they have ever imagined that one day, they would have such a day?

They couldn’t even commit suicide!

However, unexpectedly, just when they thought their death was inevitable…

A light suddenly flashed.

One of the strongest espers vanished.

Yes.

He disappeared into thin air. No one noticed. Not even Mingguang…

Swish!

Another strongest esper vanished.

Swish!

Every few seconds, a person vanished. They were outside of Mingguang’s vision, and he didn’t find any abnormalities.

One man.

Five men.

Ten men.

Thirty men.

…..

“Hold on.”

Mingguang suddenly felt a sharp decrease in the power being absorbed by the black hole and quickly became sober. He then realized that the number of strongest espers had been reduced by half!

“Who?”

Mingguang’s eyes turned cold.

The barrier in Moyu Villa was still up. Who was it…

Swish!

While in doubt, ten more people vanished.

A figure leisurely flashed and around him, the forgotten Rule Force gleamed brightly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1075 - Run, Heavenly Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 1075 - Run, Heavenly Emperor

Chapter 1075: Run, Heavenly Emperor

“Su Hao?!”

Mingguang’s pupils suddenly contracted.

Who else could this person be besides Su Hao?!

“Long time no see.”

Su Hao stood there calmly with a cold demeanor.

Rule of forgetting.

This is the advanced version of the lean man’s ability. Su Hao once remembered that he had always inadvertently ignored the existence of this man. This is the true ability of this Rule Force.

But now…

Su Hao used it.

With the Supreme Rule of Realization creating a Rule Force couldn’t be any easier! To fight against Mingguang is one thing, but it’s completely feasible to try tricking Mingguang.

“How is this possible?”

Mingguang couldn’t believe it. He didn’t sense it at all.

“Why is it impossible?” Su Hao smiled calmly.

First, Mingguang had set up a barrier around the villa, a barrier that can even stop Su Tiancheng. When this barrier is established, Mingguang also set up a trigger that will alert him the moment an enemy strikes.

As for before the barrier was set up?

He subconsciously took it easy.

Since even if Su Tiancheng comes over, he could only resort to entering with brute force.

Only Su Hao…

He had already entered before that!

The second reason was the Rule of forgetting. As long as Mingguang couldn’t see or pay attention, he would subconsciously ignore it. When his attention was focused on the black hole, he ignored everything on the ground, even himself. It was all thanks to the Rule of forgetting that his heart felt at ease.

Rule Force had an effect on the strongest esper?

Although it was very weak, its effect was evident.

Swish!

While both of them were talking, Su Hao’s Universe Creator began and he took ten more men away. In front of Mingguang, he was absolutely unrestrained.

“You…”

Mingguang’s lungs burst in anger, “How dare you!”

Buzz~

The power within the black hole was condensing, but with the disappearance of everyone, it was no longer possible for it to gather any more energy. This was the reason why Su Hao had been so slow in taking action. He allowed it to absorb for a bit but it still couldn’t detonate without completion.

As for Mingguang, he was obviously triggered by this.

Give up?

Fight for it?

There was only one Su Hao!

This is a great opportunity!

One needs to know that Su Hao just broke through into the strongest esper realm. His strength was definitely not too strong, and Mingguang was a peak strongest esper who is about to breakthrough into the god realm. How could he be compared to Su Hao?

“Time to kill him!”

Mingguang’s thoughts were boiling.

Dragon Scale appeared in his hand as he was ready to make the first move.

However, when he was about to attack, he suddenly came to a realization. Wait, what am I doing? Kill Su Hao? Since when have I been that impulsive?

Mingguang regained his composure.

Swish!

He suddenly looked at Su Hao, “It’s you again!”

“Hehe.” Su Hao smiled.

This time, the flashing Rule of spirituality flashed around him, it was an attack on the psychological defense.

Since his Realization had transformed into a Supreme Rule, Kingdom of Heaven had gathered countless types of Rule Force. Supreme Rule could use almost every Rule Force. Although it couldn’t be used to confront strongest espers, it is still effective in affecting the enemy’s subconsciousness without them realizing. This was simply terrifying! Moreover, the Rule Force used by Su Hao is endless.

Just like earlier…

Mingguang glaced at Su Hao carefully.

As expected, after only a few days of breaking through, Su Hao’s current combat strength had reached the peak level! With Mingguang’s current state, whether he would appear victorious or not is still unknown if he is to fight against Su Hao. It’s highly possible that Su Hao kill him too!

“No wonder you are so confident…” Mingguang sneered, “It seems that you have broken through again?”

“En.” Su Hao nodded.

Kingdom of Heaven had transformed countless times, and its strength was so powerful that there are countless strongest espers in Kingdom of Heaven. As for himself, he naturally became strong thanks to the help of Kingdom of Heaven’s luck!

In this state, he’s not afraid of Mingguang!

Swish!

While both were talking, Su Hao took away ten strongest espers again.

However, Mingguang didn’t react this time at all. Su Hao smiled calmly, “It seems that you’re ready to give up breaking through, are you ready to fight to the death with me?”

“No.”

Mingguang remained silent, watching Su Hao taking away the strongest espers on the ground one after another.

Soon, all the strongest espers were taken away by Su Hao, and Mingguang was defeated.

His plan failed completely!

This time, it was still because of Su Hao.

“If I knew you are like this, I should have killed you earlier.” Mingguang stared at him.

“No, you’re wrong.” Su Hao calmly said, “If you had the ability of foresee, it’s not me that you should kill in advance.”

Mingguang was stunned.

Yes.

If he had such ability, Li Xiaoru should be the one killed! That heart of the world who was hiding in Jianghe City. If he had known this earlier…

Buzz~

Buzz~

A cloud of dark energy spun.

That was the power belonging to the black hole. Countless terrifying forces were rotating, and it was so terrifying that it could destroy the world but..

It wasn’t enough!

It was far from enough!

This kind of power was less than one-tenth of the breakthrough’s requirement!

“If it was Su Tiancheng, I would definitely win.”

Mingguang looked at Su Hao, “Unfortunately, it’s you.”

“You’re that confident?”

Su Hao frowned.

He remembered that his father is no ordinary man. He had repeatedly performed miracles, yet Mingguang insisted that he could definitely defeat his father?

“I know him better than you.”

“No, no…”

Mingguang suddenly smiled, “I know him better than himself!”

Su Hao’s eyes suddenly turned cold.

He suddenly remembered something.

Mingguang, who is he?

When Su Hao tried to identify him, his identity was blank, his talent was blank, everything about Mingguang was blank!

Su Hao once asked Li Xiaoru, but even Li Xiaoru didn’t know him!

The only person who knew the truth was Su Tiancheng, but each time Su Tiancheng mentioned something about Mingguang, it would be only on the surface so Su Hao couldn’t ask.

“There must be a problem!”

Su Hao smirked.

If it wasn’t because of the unmatched timeline, he might even think Mingguang was his father’s illegitimate child!

They both should be of similar age…

Or perhaps, Mingguang used to be from the Su family before?

Su Tiancheng’s brother?

No, that wasn’t right.

He had never heard of such a person in the Su family.

“Hahahahaha.”

Mingguang laughed, “You will know in the future. I think that will surely be a surprise. However, do you think you can really trap me now?”

“You’re too naive!”

“I might not be able to defeat you, but to flee?”

Mingguang laughed out loud.

Then…

He fled!

Su Hao was shocked.

In Kingdom of Heaven, when everyone saw this scene, they wanted to curse. The difference of strength between those two wasn’t huge, and Mingguang was still quite advantageous.

However, each time he would flee!

He would run if he couldn’t win!

Who decides that as a villain boss, he must fight to the end?

“This is too shameless.”

Those people in Kingdom of Heaven looked at each other.

“I remembered reading those hot-blooded novels and comics that the villain boss would be overpowered. The protagonist would start extremely weak and after various breakthroughs, he would become lucky enough to step over the enemy. In the end, even if the protagonist is already strong, the villain will not miss any chance to counterattack.”

Li Xin talked freely.

Everyone nodded. Li Xin was definitely an expert in this regard.

“So…”

Li Xin thought for a moment, “Something is wrong with this villain!”

“Get lost!”

Everyone threw their kick at him.

However…

In any case, Mingguang indeed planned to flee again.

However, this time was different from last time. With the experience of him escaping from the world summit, how could Su Hao allow him to do so again?

“You think I am not prepared for this?” Su Hao smirked.

“Kill!”

Boom!

A terrifying killing intent erupted.

Countless Shadowless God Needle emerged.

They were all heavenly grade!

Each one of them carried a strong murderous aura with a trace of terrifying Rule Force!

Yes.

This is Su Hao’s new trick.

Each Shadowless God Needle contained a different Rule Force.

What you’re confronting isn’t a strongest esper, but countless world espers with countless kinds of Rule Force plus a strongest esper who controls everything!

The interweaving of Rule Force and Supreme Rule, Su Hao’s attack was without doubt terrifying.

However, when the attacks were approaching, out of everyone’s expectation, Mingguang hesitated for a moment before his eyes turned firm and then…

He actually rushed towards Shadowless God Needles.

“He wants to commit suicide?”

Everyone was stunned.

Poof~

Mingguang’s body was hit by countless attacks.

Even when his body was dyed in blood, he still charged into them.

Mingguang was seriously injured!

Puff! Puff!

Shadowless God Needles passed through Mingguang and blasted directly into the black hole.

Boom!

Infinite force escaped.

The forces that had been gathered by Mingguang were bombarded one after another. Mingguang was the one closest, and unexpectedly suffered another wave of attacks. Su Hao suddenly felt something was wrong when he saw it. Thinking about the situation of Mingguang’s escape before, he suddenly trembled. This Mingguang…

“Hahahahah!”

“Thanks, Su Hao.”

“The next time when I become a true god, I will definitely come to you!”

Mingguang’s cold voice echoed.

Su Hao’s killing intent skyrocketed.

Mingguang suffered serious injuries.

To be precise, even when he had to suffer serious injury, he made sure to bring Shadowless God Needles to the black hole. Then, taking the advantage of the absolute confrontation of these two forces, he completed the journey over again!

Mingguang, he went back.

“Damn it.”

Su Hao cursed.

Under normal circumstances, such a scene would be absolutely impossible.

However…

How much force was brewing in that damn black hole? Since when Mingguang began to compress the force in secret to create such a scene?

Each step of his was well calculated.

Whether it was Su Hao or Mingguang, the moment they stepped into the villa, they had already begun confronting each other.

Except it wasn’t at the level of pure combat.

“Damn it, damn it!”

“Mingguang returned to the original world. Although he is seriously injured, he will soon recover and once he reaches the world summit…” Su Hao couldn’t imagine.

It took a long time before Mingguang recovered.

However…

When that time comes, who can stop him?

“I can’t let this go on.”

Su Hao’s eyes flashed in cold, “I must go back as soon as possible, before he recovers from his serious injury! This time, let’s see who is faster!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1076 - Destroy The Origin!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1076 - Destroy The Origin!

Chapter 1076: Destroy the origin!

Time!

All the battles had now been compressed into a battle of time!

Naturally, there’s nothing much to say if Mingguang recovers first, and if Su Hao returns first, the seriously injured Mingguang won’t even have anywhere to escape!

Su Hao carefully observed the scene and noticed something.

“Mingguang must have come up with this plan at the last moment.”

“To go back is definitely not in his consideration.”

“The situation inside the black hole is terrifying. Since Mingguang is seriously injured, traversing to the other world via such a route is extremely risky. This action of his could be considered the final straw.”

“In other words, Mingguang wasn’t prepared!”

After completing analysis, Su Hao took a breath of relief. Without preparation, that meant there was no planning done ahead. Otherwise, if everything was calculated from the start to the end by Mingguang, what’s the need to continue this fight anymore?

“Mingguang was seriously injured. After going back, I’m afraid the injury will be more serious.”

Su Hao silently analyzed.

So, I still have plenty of time to act, but I need to leave as soon as possible!

After all, time will never wait for anyone.

Su Hao made a decision in his heart and immediately looked at the over a hundred strongest espers in Kingdom of Heaven. If he wants to go back, he has no choice but to rely on them right?

Iminating Mingguang’s blackhole and letting them channel their energy to erupt it.

Perhaps, the time and space could be opened up again!

This was Su Hao’s aim.

“Wake them up, and tell them part of the truth. Then, when the time comes, all the strongest espers including you all will attack the blackhole at the same time…”

Su Hao exhorted, “Only then will we have an opportunity.”

“Alright!”

Everyone responded.

They knew this was the only chance to go back!

Within Kingdom of Heaven, experiments were being carried out one after another.

This wasn’t the world summit, and Su Hao could only use limited force. The time in this world had been accelerated ten times, which was already the limit or else he wouldn’t be able to make ends meet.

Boom!

Boom!

Eruption after eruption kept resonating.

Su Hao held the black hole and kept clashing with the strongest espers, one against a group of them alone! However, each time, the result was blowing up without the desired effect.

Black hole!

Countless consecutive experiments were performed, but none of them succeeded!

“It’s still not right.”

“How did Mingguang succeed?”

Su Hao pondered.

The traversal via the backhole required an opportunity. According to Li Xin, there was a hidden attribute and under a certain probability, a certain effect would be triggered.

Of course, if Li Xin was the one who initiated it, the success rate would be close to 100%.

Unfortunately, Li Xin didn’t know how to do so.

Another aspect to consider was that this is Kingdom of Heaven! After Kingdom of Heaven had been tempered, it was so powerful that one couldn’t imagine it. To create a blackhole here…

That was harder than ever!

Of course, as the creator of the world, Su Hao had already weakened the area they were experimenting at to the limit. If it continues to be weakened, there will be an imbalance in Kingdom of Heaven.

However, even with such steps, it wasn’t enough!

“Experiment!”

“It will succeed in the end!”

Su Hao didn’t believe he couldn’t do so, “Isn’t it just traversing through time and space?”

Boom!

Boom!

A blackhole appeared in the sky and an eruption appeared.

Under the circumstance that there is no other way, Su Hao intended to use the simplest and rude way, using quantity to accumulate. There will always be one time that it this the target right?

No one was resting within Kingdom of Heaven.

Under the leadership of Wan Cheng and the others, everyone confronted Su Hao.

With the disappearance of the blackhole one after another, everyone’s strength rapidly increased. In fact, they had forgotten their original purpose. However, one day…

Buzz~

A strange brilliance appeared.

Su Hao didn’t sense anything, but he could feel its presence.

“That is…”

“A real blackhole!”

“It finally appeared!”

Su Hao said excitedly.

Without any hesitation, Su Hao passed through from Kingdom of Heaven, stepping into the blackhole and entered the space channel.

What is a real blackhole?

No one knew.

However, the one made by Mingguang, its role is to traverse between worlds!

Based on Su Hao’s analysis, it is an arbitrary door that could be opened anywhere, but will eventually enter this unified space channel. This channel ignores all planes and worlds as it serves as a link between them.

Of course, the condition to traverse between worlds is also extremely difficult.

However…

Just after Su Hao left, Wan Cheng and the others suddenly realized something.

“Hold on…”

“Kingdom of Heaven and the new world, aren’t they from the same plane?”

“If one can return to Earth from the new world, then can we also do so from Kingdom of Heaven? If Su Hao can, why can’t we?”

“Traverse the door to return to reality!”

“In other words…”

“We can go back too?”

Everyone looked at each other in sudden delight.

Although Kingdom of Heaven was also great, it was a stopgap measure after all. There were too few people here. For them, their true world should be where the battlefield is.

“Let’s go!”

Wan Cheng followed closely behind Su Hao.

Others followed too.

Chen Yiran, Zhou Wang, Wang Ru, Li Xin… Everyone followed and entered the blackhole. After them, even those newly promoted strongest espers followed along.

Fighting against Mingguang, they succumbed to death on Earth.

If they could restore their true power, they wouldn’t mind letting Mingguang taste the power from ancient times!

Swish!

Swish!

Everyone stepped into the blackhole.

As everyone was leaving, what left behind were those world espers. Shi Mingxuan glanced blankly left and right, “Huh, it’s empty again?”

In the blackhole, Su Hao felt a hand holding him.

Chen Yiran.

“Why are you here?”

A voice was transmitted.

“To accompany you.”

It was a simple reply.

“You guys…”

Su Hao soon discovered more people, “The emptiness of a blackhole is truly terrifying.”

“Mingguang can live by himself. With so many of us here, if we’re afraid of this, wouldn’t it be too much?”

Li Xin’s consciousness came.

Su Hao went speechless.

Wasn’t that the case?

Relying on the unique ability of Realization, although Su Hao couldn’t use his power in blackhole, he could still establish a consciousness exchange circle for everyone.

There was a glimmer of light in the darkness.

Su Hao hurriedly travelled to Earth and realized the truth, so he tried to kill Mingguang again. However, this strange villain who fled the moment he sensed danger really caused Su Hao a headache.

How is this Heavenly Emperor Mingguang? This is more like Heavenly Emperor Escaper!

However, he hoped he would make it on time.

At the world summit…

Since Su Hao left, the world had returned to normal. Li Xiaoru used her strength to shield the world summit, and everything was as if it had never happened before.

The life of the Federation and the beasts were restored back to normal again.

“I hope they are fine.” Li Xiaoru prayed silently.

“They still haven’t come back?”

Su Tiancheng walked in, looking at his wife’s sad expression.

“Nope.” Li Xiaoru shook her head slightly, “It’s been three months, I wonder what’s going on over on the other side?”

“Don’t worry.” Su Tiancheng smiled bitterly, “Just like what that brat said. If there’s any danger, he can hide in Kingdom of Heaven which is a place that has never been discovered…”

“I’m afraid even if the world is destroyed, he will be fine.”

“What are you worried about then?” Su Tiancheng said helplessly.

“He’s still your son after all.” Li Xiaoru glared at him.

“Fine, fine.”

Su Tiancheng smiled. Just as he was about to say something, he paused suddenly and hugged Li Xiaoru, “Then, my dear majesty Xiaoru, please pray for my share too.”

“I hate you, it’s so corny!”

Li Xiaoru gave him a blank look. Su Tiancheng laughed out loud as he left.

However, Li Xiaoru didn’t notice there was a hint of desolation in Su Tiancheng’s laughter.

Outside the world summit.

At an unnamed hill, there was suddenly a small pavilion appearing with a stone table and a pot of wine. A young man sat there elegantly.

Su Tiancheng walked over and sat opposite him to take a sip.

“This wine is not bad.”

“Of course.”

That young man smiled, “This is after all dug up from the earth. It’s a genuine one thousand year old win.”

Su Tiancheng took a sip in silence. This mellow fragrance was indeed something this world couldn’t produce… It contains countless origin energy which have been accumulated and brewed for thousands of years.

“I thought Su Hao would be the one to come back first.” Su Tiancheng casually said.

“Your son is very good which is why I escaped back here.” Mingguang wasn’t ashamed, “In order to survive, I can only escape once more. Anyway, in these years, I have escaped too many times just to survive.”

“Why the need to do so?” Su Tiancheng sighed.

“To get rid of you.” Mingguang calmly said.

“If you give up destroying the world, what’s so hard about that?” Su Tiancheng sneered, “Your obsession is so deep that one can’t erase it.”

“Obsession?”

“How I was born, have you already forgotten about it?” Mingguang sneered.

“So what do you want now?”

Su Tiancheng drank a little bit of wine.

The atmosphere between those two was a bit strange. They were enemies, yet didn’t look like it. Instead, in this small pavilion, they were like friends they hadn’t seen each other for so many years!

“I want to destroy the world summit!”

Mingguang’s eyes were firm.

“Oh?” Su Tiancheng said lightly, “Then why call me here?”

“To negotiate!” Mingguang went silent for a moment, “I know that you must have a solution to bring Li Xiaoru out of the world summit to live. So you two can leave and I will destroy the world summit.”

“I get to step into the god realm, you and Li Xiaoru can get back together like before.”

“Isn’t it good enough?”

“Anyway, if this world is destroyed, there is still Earth. Just go there.”

Su Hao would probably never imagine that Mingguang would say such a thing. Obviously he had the advantage, yet he initiated a negotiation?

“I am serious.”

“You should know about that.”

Mingguang was as cold as ever.

“Of course I know.”

Su Tiancheng smiled, “However, people always change right? It’s true that you dare not attack me now. However, if you become a god, you have the qualification to renege and kill me. Thus, I will not agree with your proposal. In fact, I have a better way.”

“What?”

Mingguang frowned slightly.

Suddenly, a smear of blood ran through the corner of Su Tiancheng’s mouth. It was so bright red under the sunlight. Mingguang’s pupils shrunk, “You…”

“I have shattered my origin.” Su Tiancheng calmly said, “This is a perfect ending, isn’t it?”

“No, it’s not!”

Mingguang held down Su Tiancheng as the energy in his body escaped and rushed out crazily. For the first time, indescribable surprise appeared in Mingguang’s eyes, “You can’t die!”

“You must never die!”

“Su Tiancheng, you madman!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1077 - Beautiful Red Lotus
chapters.body:
Chapter 1077 - Beautiful Red Lotus

Chapter 1077: Beautiful red lotus

Swish!

Swish!

Mingguang’s force was poured into Su Tiancheng’s body.

However, it was ineffective!

All sorts of methods were used, but it was useless!

“No, no, you can’t die!”

Mingguang panicked, “You’re a peak strongest esper. How can you die like this here?”

“This scene should have happened long ago, isn’t it?” Su Tiancheng was calmer than ever, “The sins that I have done, let me pay for it myself.”

“You can’t die!”

Mingguang controlled the emergence of his force, converting it into origin energy to sustain Su Tiancheng’s ticking life. A crazy look flashed in his eyes, “You mustn’t die!”

“You should have known that this is futile.” Su Tiancheng looked at him calmly, “Perhaps, I should have done this long ago.”

“But as a human…”

“After all, I was too greedy. When I saw Su Hao, I thought to have one more look before ending my life. When I saw Xiaoru, I had the same thought again, accompanying her for one more second before ending all these grievances once and for all.”

“However, I failed to do so…”

Su Tiancheng laughed at himself.

“Time and time again, I kept deceiving myself.”

“I greedily enjoyed my happiness. It was only when Su Hao went to Earth that I realized if this continues, I will lose even more…”

“So, let me finish this all by myself.”

“Back then, it was thanks to my greed. So, let me personally end this.”

Su Tiancheng’s face was flushed, blooming with an unprecedented brilliance. After losing so much of his life force, he actually seemed to return to his peak strength.

This phenomenon has a scientific name called the final radiance of a setting sun.

“I already said, you can’t die!” Mingguang said it word by word.

What to do now?

What could he do now?

How could he save him?

Oh yeah, Su Hao!

Mingguang suddenly remembered that Su Hao mastered the Supreme Rule of Realization. Yes, he can create flesh or even copy another person. He can definitely save Su Tiancheng!

Buzz~

Countless force was condensed.

Mingguang summoned the blackhole again, but discovered that there was a place within the space channel where another force was constantly colliding with his own blackhole.

Swish!

Mingguang took the initiative to let go of the passage.

Of course, the only thing that puzzled him was that the time coordinate didn’t seem to be from Earth. However, it doesn’t matter. How could Mingguang have the time to pay attention to these details?

“Su Hao!”

“Did you feel it?”

“If you feel it, it will be soon!”

Swish!

The blackhole opened.

That was an unprecedentedly smooth passage because Mingguang personally opened it, and those two blackholes were connected to escort Su Hao.

Mingguang actually opened the path for his enemy Su Hao!

“Even if he comes, it will be futile.” Su Tiancheng smiled lightly.

“You won’t die.”

Mingguang just muttered this sentence again and again, “You won’t die.”

“Sorry Mingguang.”

Su Tiancheng suddenly spoke, causing Mingguang to have his entire body tremble. What did he hear just now? Su Tiancheng actually said sorry to him?

“Sorry for everything I did.”

“Sorry, I abandoned you.”

“I am sorry, because of my greed…”

“If everything can go back to the beginning, then how great would that be…”

Su Tiancheng’s eyes revealed a smile as well as a trace of being freed. A tear slid down from the corner of his eyes as it fell to the ground with a crisp sound.

“Su Hao will be back soon, you need to hold on.” Mingguang said trembling.

“Let’s end it all.”

Su Tiancheng’s face was calm. Slowly raising his hand, he touched Mingguang’s forehead and faintly said, “When I die, you will accompany me right, won’t you?”

“Why?!”

Mingguang looked crazy, “Why should I die with you!”

“Because…”

Su Tiancheng looked at the already crazy Mingguang in front of him. With a bitter aftertaste shown on his face, his finger finally tapped on Mingguang’s forehead.

“Because…”

“You’re me…”

Buzz~

A bit of dazzling brilliance bloomed at Su Tiancheng’s fingertips, engulfing these two figures. As far as Su Tiancheng and Mingguang were concerned, everything around them seemed to be receding.

When the white light escaped, the surrounding scenery changed completely.

That year.

The origin energy descended and the snow was blowing.

A young man stood still for a long time.

He saw with his own eyes that his mother died in the mouth of the pet he was feeding. That rabbit turned into a beast, swallowing everything. He madly picked up a stone to smash the beast to death. When his arm broke, he used his mouth to bite it. In the end, he killed the beast.

He drank its blood and ate its flesh.

However, his mother would never come back.

Back then, he had an ability talent and magical skills, but his only obsession was to see his mother again, to see her one more time.

Late that night.

“I’m afraid…”

It was a cry from that young man.

“I’ll be with you.”

Brilliance flickered and another young man appeared, silently by his side, “Don’t be afraid. In the future, I will be with you forever and ever.”

“Who are you?”

“I am you.”

There was a smile on that bright facial expression of the other man.

“Me?”

“Yes.”

That young man smiled, “I am your ability talent.”

That year, the young man finally knew his real talent. In those countless lonely and painful nights, it was this sunny young man who accompanied him.

“I’m afraid.”

“It’s okay, there’s me here.”

That sunny young man always had a bright smile.

“Are you really me?”

“Of course, I am you and your friend.”

“Then I will give you a name.”

“Alright.”

The sunny young man was surprised for the first time. He’s about to have a name?

“Um… I will call you Mingguang then.”

“Why?”

“Because I hope you will stay with me forever like sunshine.”

“Alright.”

Mingguang was full of smiles, “I can definitely do it!”

“En.”

Both had an agreement.

Later, when this talent was cultivated to the extreme, when the third person could be separated, Mingguang worried for a long time. However, the third person never appeared.

Mingguang didn’t understand it at first.

Later, he finally understood. It turned out that it was out of fear of his sadness. From that day on, he decided to definitely protect this young man for the rest of his life.

Suddenly, there was a year when Su Tiancheng said he must save his mother!

He must have one more look on her!

Thus, he began to struggle to the top. Both of them, two first generation espers far surpassed others. Su Tiancheng left his peers far behind.

However, when he touched the edge, he found out.

It turned out that…

Being the strongest esper isn’t good enough either.

Only by becoming god could one become invincible and omnipotent.

“I want to become a god.”

Those were Su Tiancheng’s words after being silent for so long.

“Alright.”

Mingguang showed a sunny smile, “You will definitely be able to do so.”

He still followed Su Tiancheng like a shadow, yet he was content with this. However, the road to becoming a god is so difficult, full of conspiracies and killing…

“Mingguang, I’m so scared, so scared that I can’t keep going on.”

“Don’t be afraid. I will be with you.”

“However, what should I do if I give up?”

“I’ll help you!”

“Really?”

“Of course!”

Mingguang smiled as always, like a spring breeze, “I will help bear your pain for you. This road, I will definitely walk to the end.”

“Alright.”

That was the promise between them.

Later on, because the road to become a god was too difficult, humans were almost everywhere, but not much progress to be seen. In the end, they decided to set foot into the beast domain.

“Let me go.”

Mingguang was as sunny as ever.

“Over there, life is going to be difficult.”

Su Tiancheng glared at him, “If you want to go, we will go together!”

“There needs to be someone to take care of the Su family.”

Mingguang answered him calmly, “We have lost a mother. We shouldn’t lose the other one.”

Su Tiancheng went silent.

That day, Mingguang stepped into the beast domain and became a Heavenly Emperor.

The road to becoming a god slowly progressed. One person with two figures was working hard for that goal.

One day, Mingguang noticed the beating of his heart.

It was too fast.

It was up to the point it was almost unbearable.

“Tiancheng is having a problem!”

Mingguang rushed to the human world like a madman.

He saw Su Tiancheng curled up there, unable to control himself in pain because behind him, a sinister shadow appeared, “You two bastards!”

“Based on what are you two trying to seal me!”

“Based on what are you two not letting me out?”

“I am the third person, no one can stop me!”

The insidious figure looked hideous.

“How can it appear?”

Mingguang was puzzled.

“Humph, peel off your ugly side and leave me alone? As long as there are negative emotions, I will appear. Hahahaha, if you created me early and controlled me, I would be a powerful helper, but how dare you try to shut me down? Hahahaha, this is simply ridiculous.”

That insidious figure was ferocious.

Mingguang suddenly understood.

It turned out that…

It was all because of him.

“I will torture him for a lifetime so that he wishes to be dead instead of alive.” The shadow said with hatred.

That day, Mingguang made his move. He fulfilled his promise, sealing that terrifying third figure in his body. Watching Su Tiancheng’s painful figure curled up, he finally left.

“I have said that I will bear all of your pain.”

“So…”

“Please forget about me.”

After he went back…

Since both of them were of the same mind, Mingguang knew that Su Tiancheng could feel it when he woke up. So, he sealed everything, sealed all the memories. Every night, he had to endure the pain akin to purgatory.

He had said before.

All the pain, he would bear it alone!

Twenty years.

Twenty years passed just like that.

He had forgotten all the happiness, and only pain was left. He still carried out the goal firmly to become a god to resurrect that person.

However, as time passed, the seal of the third figure gradually loosened.

The insidious figure gradually occupied Mingguang’s body and continued to corrode him. Unknowingly, Mingguang was controlled by that terrifying third figure… Everything went off track from his original plan. Even his original intention was forgotten…

Buzz~

The memory was gradually unblocked.
