Light flashed.

The tears that Su Tiancheng hadn’t shed in his life before fell just like that.

He always thought that because he left Mingguang in the beast domain, Mingguang gradually left his side and ended up hating him, but never would he have thought that Mingguang actually went to seal the third figure! It turned out that all these years, the pain Mingguang endured was worse!

“Sorry.”

Su Tiancheng had heartache as he almost choked.

How much suffering did Mingguang endure in these years?

“I should be the one who said it.”

Mingguang showed a sunny smile, just like twenty years ago, like a true brother, “I didn’t fulfill the promise to you. Sorry, I thought I would definitely do it.”

“Unfortunately…”

Reaching out his hand…

Mingguang wanted to put it on Su Tiancheng’s shoulder and tell him like before, to leave everything to him. However, the weakness in his body told him that he couldn’t hold on.

Puff~

Mingguang fell to the ground and landed on the other side of the stone table.

They were of one body to begin with. If Su Tiancheng dies, he wouldn’t be able to live in this world too.

His vision became blurred.

Su Tiancheng stretched out his hand with difficulty. Looking at the figure who had been taking care of him for so many years, he staggered to reach out. Mingguang’s pale face still squeezed out a sunny smile as he also stretched out his blood stained hand as if to say he’s fine.

Unfortunately, in the end, he still couldn’t say it.

Both figures fell on both sides of the stone table. Only two hands were stretched out in a pool of blood, trying to touch each other but failed to do so. Under the sun, the pool of blood bloomed like a lotus.

It was so fascinating and beautiful.

chapters.title: Chapter 1078 - The Arrival Of The Decisive Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1078 - The Arrival Of The Decisive Battle

Chapter 1078: The arrival of the decisive battle

Boom!

Traveling through the blackhole.

Su Hao finally traversed from Kingdom of Heaven.

However, when he appeared outside of the world summit, he was stunned. There was a pavilion, a stone table, and a pool of blood in front of him.

Swish!

Swish!

Everyone followed from behind.

“What’s wrong?”

“Did someone have an accident?”

“It seems like there was a battle before this here.”

Wan Cheng guessed, “There are blood stains on the ground. It hasn’t dried yet, and the smell is still present. It doesn’t look to be that long ago.”

“We found a battle the moment we came back?”

Everyone didn’t feel anything out of normal.

As for those strongest espers from earth, they were amazed by the surrounding. Here is actually another Earth, and it was exactly the same as the one in their memory! What surprised them even more was that their power was restored, and the Supreme Rule belonging to them was returning!

“I keep having this feeling that something is amiss.”

Su Hao ignored everyone and walked to the table. Silently observing, he quickly locked his eyes on the pot of wine. This thing…

Snap!

Su Hao threw it to the strongest espers from Warth.

“Huh?”

“There is actually good wine here?”

“Hehe, this thing is precious on Earth, yet it’s common in this new world?”

Everyone was shocked.

The one named Chen Xin had a change of facial color when he saw the pot, “This thing… I gave it to Mingguang before. Why is it here?”

“!!!”

The crowd was shocked.

Mingguang?

He gave it to Mingguang?

Could it be that…

Su Hao’s pupils suddenly shrank. Mingguang already recovered and came here? Sweeping his eyes on the ground, Su Hao found out that the blood stains belonged to two men.

“There are two pools of blood here, it’s not one person.”

“They should be evenly matched.”

“To be evenly matched with Mingguang…”

Su Hao seemed to realize something. Wan Cheng and the others were also showing a solemn expression.

The entire world!

There are only two people who’re qualified to hurt Mingguang, Li Xiaoru and Su Tiancheng!

“Let me take a look.”

Su Hao’s eyes were cold. With a wave of hand, endless brilliance swept past, “Backtrack!”

Buzz~

Scenes began to flow.

Numerous particles emerged.

A scene appeared in front of him. It was an exact same copy as what happened here not long ago. Su Hao rewinded ten minutes and saw two men drinking.

Mingguang and Su Tiancheng.

“It was really them!”

“Could it be that they fought each other?”

Everyone watched this scene nervously.

To have a friendly discussion before a battle, they had seen it many times. It was nothing more than an act that one has absolute confidence in themselves and wishes to get some information before the battle. However, the friendship between Su Tiancheng and Mingguang was beyond everyone’s expectation. Those two had been very calm since the start.

As for the conversation between those two surprised them even more.

Su Hao suddenly remembered that Mingguang’s identity had always been hidden in the clouds. Could it be…

“Who exactly are you?”

Following the conversation between those two, everyone watched Su Tiancheng silently. When Su Tiancheng’s mouth was overflowing with blood, they were shocked.

“So hateful, Mingguang actually resorted to poisoning the wine?”

“This is simply despicable!”

“Mingguang is as shameless as ever.”

Everyone mocked him.

However, Su Hao’s expression was the same because he saw Mingguang’s panic and when Su Tiancheng said that he had shattered his origin, everyone turned dull.

Origin.

Shattering his own origin.

That meant everything was over.

Boom!

Su Hao felt a shock in his brain.

Shattering his origin?

Dad is dying?

Su Hao was stunned. There was no way one could see the truth with this scene along. However, as Mingguang madly rescued Su Tiancheng, everyone was even more confused. Then, as the memory was unsealed, when the seal was broken, when Mingguang’s true identity was exposed, everyone was shocked.

Mingguang turned out to be Su Tiancheng?

A clone?

No, this wasn’t a clone. This was him to begin with!

One man turning into three.

This was simply a split personality, three versions of Su Tiancheng!

However, when Mingguang summoned the blackhole, when Mingguang’s memory was completely unblocked, when those two fell to the ground, everyone went silent and no one spoke.

So, this is Mingguang?

It turned out that the blackhole was initiated by Mingguang himself?

So, this was the truth?

Su Hao forced himself to calm down. He knew that at this moment, he mustn’t mess things up, “Problem, there is still a problem. Assuming Dad is dead, his body should be here. So, he’s still fine?”

Backtrack was used again.

One could see.

Both Su Tiancheng and Mingguang just lay down like that as they gradually lose consciousness.

However, just when everyone thought they were dead, an afterimage appeared from Mingguang, “Hahahahaha, I am finally unsealed!”

“These two fools!”

“Hahahaha, want to die? It’s not that easy!”

“An indecisive trash.”

“A virgin who only knows to consider the other side.”

“What qualification do you two have to be a hero?”

The afterimage laughed wildly.

Two black shadows wrapped Su Tiancheng and Mingguang and dragged them away. The afterimage had cole eyes, “From today onwards, I An Xue am the real master!”

Boom!

Space was torn.

The afterimage disappeared.

Su Hao and the others were left dumbfounded. The matter had ended and the truth was now completely exposed.

Mingguang is Su Tiancheng’s second self!

That was his sunny side.

An Xue is the dark side of Su Tiancheng. Over the years, after an unknown amount of time to grow, it finally burst…

“One good news and one bad news.”

Su Hao smiled, his face looked pale yet he was serious, “The bad news is this guy should be our new enemy. Obviously, he’s much scarier than Mingguang. The good news is both my father and Mingguang are still alive. Because of their special state, he dared not kill them.”

Everyone nodded silently.

“I’ll go back and have a look. You guys wait here.” Su Hao gave orders.

Swish!

After a while, Su Hao returned.

“My mother is clueless.”

Su Hao calmly said, “Then this will be easy. Leave some people here to protect the world summit, and the others will chase down that guy named An Xue with me.”

Su Hao’s eyes became colder than ever.

“This time.”

“I will let him die without a place to bury!”

In the end, Wang Ru and some powerful people from Earth remained. Thirty strongest espers were there, enough to protect Li Xiaoru.

As for Su Hao, he led a group of strongest espers to hunt.

Deduction!

Deduction!

Analysis!

Analysis!

Su Hao’s quantum computer was working at maximum load.

His eyes had completely turned red, and his entire person was akin to entering a crazy state. Obviously, Su Tiancheng’s life and death had made him completely blown up.

Li Tiantian, Ping Yang and the others were assisting him with their best.

Under the deduction of time, space, and even realization, in the end, An Xue’s location was identified.

“Here!”

“He’s on the other side of Earth!”

Ping Yang couldn’t help but curse, “This dog, he actually ran that far?!”

That guy, in order to avoid Su Hao and the others, he actually ran half of the world. If it wasn’t for Li Tiantian and Ping Yang assisting him, Su Hao will never be able to trace the enemy.

“Let’s go.”

Su Hao’s eyes were cold as he led everyone to kill.

On the way there, that guy deliberately left many obstacles. Su Hao and the others kept progressing slower further down the path, but leaving so many obstacles meant that the distance was getting closer.

At the deduction location, the aura of An Xue was getting denser and denser as they got closer.

They were already infinitely close.

However, when Su Hao and the others finally arrived, they saw a pale figure lying there, covered in blood stains and breathless.

“Mingguang?”

Everyone was shocked.

Isn’t that the Mingguang they met before?

Why is he here?

“Damn it.”

Su Hao glanced at the result of the deduction and suddenly discovered that Mingguang was the result of their deduction. In other words, their deduction was wrong!

“How can this be?”

Li Tiantian couldn’t believe it, “I have analyzed it countless times and it’s clearly that guy’s aura.”

“Yes.”

Ping Yang was unhappy, “This is absolutely impossible.”

“They’re the same person to begin with.”

Su Hao suddenly said, “Su Tiancheng, Mingguang, An Xue, are you sure you can differentiate them clearly?”

Everyone came to a realization.

Yes.

It wasn’t that they were wrong, but that guy was deliberately confusing them. However, why on earth would he place Mingguang here to delay their time?

“Not good.”

Su Hao’s eyes were full of coldness.

“Go, quickly rush back to the world summit!”

Swish!

Others followed.

Mingguang…

An Xue…

Although they had changed characters, the purpose remained the same. If one is to say what Mingguang did was for Su Tiancheng’s obsession to resurrect his dead mother, then this An Xue is clearly moving for his own personal interest! The final result remained the same, he still wanted to destroy the world, destroy the world summit!

Boom!

Boom!

Those men quickly rushed back to the world summit.

However, since An Xue had taken action, how would he give them any chance?

The moment when Su Hao and the others rushed to the other side of the world, An Xue had already taken action. Terrifying aura blasted countless law enforcers and he charged to the world summit.

“Li Xiaoru, come out for me now!”

“Hahahaha.”

“The lord of the world?”

“What a joke!”

An Xue’s crazy laughter echoed, and countless law enforcers rushed toward him. However, they failed to stop him.

As a peak strongest esper, how could these ordinary people stop him?

“Kill, kill, kill!”

An Xue’s killing intent skyrocketed.

“Once I destroy you, I will be god!”

An Xue was arrogant to the extreme. In an instant, Li Xiaoru was suppressed. However, this situation didn’t last long because Wang Ru and the others soon came here.

The strongest espers!

A full thirty of them!

Is that something that an ordinary squad could compare with?

“Kill!”

Wang Ru led this group of strongest espers toward An Xue. Since he wasn’t afraid of them, what else could he be afraid of?
